name: Election Day Alerts
subject: Election Day is here!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
body:
Have you already voted?
[](https://fitzs-scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-akjlttl-yuhdluddtl-r/) **Election Day is officially here!****[If you haven 't cast your ballot yet, make sure you do it today to make your voice heard](https://fitzs-scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-akjlttl-yuhdluddtl-y/)!**We're counting on your support to elect Republicans up and down the ballot and bring the Red Wave to Wisconsin!Polls opened this morning at 7 AM, and they'll stay open until **8 PM**. [Find Your Polling Location | Click Here](https://fitzs-scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-akjlttl-yuhdluddtl-j/) [Click Here for General Election Information](https://fitzs-scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-akjlttl-yuhdluddtl-t/) You can drop off your ballot that you received in the mail, or you can vote in person. If you vote in person, make sure you bring an acceptable photo ID. As long as you are in line by 8 PM, you will be guaranteed an opportunity to cast your vote.[_**Don't wait! Make your plan to vote now and bring your friends and family with you!**_](https://fitzs-scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-akjlttl-yuhdluddtl-i/) Thank you,**Election Day Alerts** [](https://fitzs-scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-akjlttl-yuhdluddtl-d/)[](https://fitzs-scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-akjlttl-yuhdluddtl-h/) [](https://fitzs-scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-akjlttl-yuhdluddtl-k/) [Donate](https://fitzs-scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-akjlttl-yuhdluddtl-b/) [](https://fitzs-scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-akjlttl-yuhdluddtl-n/) | Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
P.O. Box 5048, Elm Grove, WI 53122 [Preferences](https://fitzs-scottfitzgerald.updatemyprofile.com/t-akjlttl-D494E01E-yuhdluddtl-p) | [Unsubscribe](https://fitzs-scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-u-akjlttl-yuhdluddtl-x/)

name: Brenda Siegel
subject: Polls just closed
body:
| |
---
Friend, The polls just closed in Vermont across the state. Now all we can do is sit back and wait as the results come in. I have been reflecting on how hard it is to put yourself out there. We’ve known that this fight was going to be an uphill battle. But win or lose, the fight does not end. Please be sure to thank candidates for taking the leap for the future of the state and their staff for doing the work to get us here. Win or lose, each person has an impact on Vermont.
---
|
---
Even though the polls just closed, the work is not done. Team Brenda is still working to get our message out across the state as the night ends. clean_body: | | Friend, The polls just closed in Vermont across the state. Now all we can do is sit back and wait as the results come in. I have been reflecting on how hard it is to put yourself out there. We’ve known that this fight was going to be an uphill battle. But win or lose, the fight does not end. Please be sure to thank candidates for taking the leap for the future of the state and their staff for doing the work to get us here. Win or lose, each person has an impact on Vermont. | Even though the polls just closed, the work is not done. Team Brenda is still working to get our message out across the state as the night ends. Thank you, Brenda | | | | | | Copyright (C) 2022 Brenda for Vermont. All rights reserved.

Peter,
Have you cast your vote for me yet?
The polls say this election is TIED, and __**I am counting on your vote to WIN this race.**__ Our campaign is about representing YOU–grassroots Alaskans, not owing votes to McConnell, Biden, and the DC Establishment that invested millions in dark money this election to try to buy our Senate seat for Murkowski.

Kelly Tshibaka

clean_body: | | | | It’s coming down to the wire | Peter, Have you cast your vote for me yet? The polls say this election is TIED, and I am counting on your vote to WIN this race. Our campaign is about representing YOU–grassroots Alaskans, not owing votes to McConnell, Biden, and the DC Establishment that invested millions in dark money this election to try to buy our Senate seat for Murkowski. When I am elected, I will cut taxes and big government regulations, secure our border, protect the unborn, and defend your right to bear arms. Lisa Murkowski has never fought for us, and that ends today. Thank you, Kelly Tshibaka STAY UP TO DATE WITH KELLY AND THE CAMPAIGN BY CLICKING THIS LINK: "ckq.io/yl3xzs" | | | |

name: Rick Scott
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter, As the final votes are cast, I want to thank you for all of your hard work and support during this election season.

With your help, we’ll elect conservatives across the country who are ready to get to work and put America FIRST.

You have been an amazing patriot during these past few months, and all of your hard work has not gone unnoticed.

With you on our team, I know America’s brightest days are ahead of us.

Thank you,

Rick Scott

name: G.A.
subject: Do this instead of refreshing your newsfeed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, Kelly Burton, President
body:
|
---

Team, While the first results from the midterm elections are trickling in, the reality is that we may not have the full picture for a few days – or even a few weeks. **So here’s something you can do while you’re waiting:** **_[Donate to keep the NDRC’s work to defend democracy going.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54334864/378163665/64165165?&amount=30&refcode=20221108.4r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZhMThlODc1LWMxNWYtZWQxMS04MTljLTAwMjI0ODI1OGQyZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HtyagkZB_KDhIhpPoN1sgfI1FhV0V7sbMxUnxZ3gOkM=)_** Why am I asking on the evening of Election Day? Because the work doesn’t stop today. You could even say it begins anew. As A.G. Holder wrote, “If MAGA Republicans have shown us anything, it’s that they’re committed to dismantling our democracy until only one party – theirs – can win elections.” After today, the GOP will consolidate their wins and push even harder for permanent minority rule. **It’ll be our duty to keep pushing back.** Over the next few days, we’ll share more about how we plan to do that. But **_[you can give us a head start on the work by making a donation today: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ndrc-marathon](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54334865/378163666/64165165?&amount=30&refcode=20221108.4r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZhMThlODc1LWMxNWYtZWQxMS04MTljLTAwMjI0ODI1OGQyZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HtyagkZB_KDhIhpPoN1sgfI1FhV0V7sbMxUnxZ3gOkM=)_** President Obama said recently that “One of the things we learned over the last six years is that democracy is not self-executing.” He added: **“Democracy is fragile. You have to tend to it, you have to fight for it.”** This community has given us the resources to tend to our democracy in this election cycle, and I can’t thank you enough. I know we left it all on the field today. But this will certainly be a multi-year effort – and **_[I hope the NDRC can continue to count on your support.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54334866/378163667/64165165?&amount=30&refcode=20221108.4r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZhMThlODc1LWMxNWYtZWQxMS04MTljLTAwMjI0ODI1OGQyZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HtyagkZB_KDhIhpPoN1sgfI1FhV0V7sbMxUnxZ3gOkM=)_** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: | Team, While the first results from the midterm elections are trickling in, the reality is that we may not have the full picture for a few days – or even a few weeks. So here’s something you can do while you’re waiting: = Why am I asking on the evening of Election Day? Because the work doesn’t stop today. You could even say it begins anew. As A.G. Holder wrote, “If MAGA Republicans have shown us anything, it’s that they’re committed to dismantling our democracy until only one party – theirs – can win elections.” After today, the GOP will consolidate their wins and push even harder for permanent minority rule. It’ll be our duty to keep pushing back. Over the next few days, we’ll share more about how we plan to do that. But = President Obama said recently that “One of the things we learned over the last six years is that democracy is not self-executing.” He added: “Democracy is fragile. You have to tend to it, you have to fight for it.” This community has given us the resources to tend to our democracy in this election cycle, and I can’t thank you enough. I know we left it all on the field today. name: URGENT POLL (via VPP)
subject: have you voted?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Voter Protection Project
body:
your confidential live poll closes at 11:59 pm
| Emails are our best tool to keep in touch with supporters, but if you would like to receive fewer emails from us, please [click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=1&akid=5270%2E878179%2Eog-0XD). If you wish to no longer receive emails from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=5270%2E878179%2Eog-0XD).
---
**BREAKING REPORT: Record Voter Turnout Could Save Democrats in Final Election Day Push**

Polls are officially OPEN for Election Day -- our LAST chance to save our fragile House and Senate majorities and elect Democrats up and down the ballot.

Voting is our _only hope_ of stopping the vicious MAGA takeover, codifying _Roe v. Wade,_ and saving voting rights.

**_But time is running out for Democrats to make their voices heard!_**

**So we need to hear from 100 dedicated Democrats right now:**
[**Have you voted in the 2022 Midterm Election?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Have-you-voted/?source=VPP_20221108_EMPOLL_E5_T0_AC&t=8&akid=5270%2E878179%2Eog-0XD) | [YES, I HAVE! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Have-you-voted/?source=VPP_20221108_EMPOLL_E5_T0_AC&t=9&akid=5270%2E878179%2Eog-0XD)
---
[NO, I HAVEN'T »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Have-you-voted/?source=VPP_20221108_EMPOLL_E5_T0_AC&t=10&akid=5270%2E878179%2Eog-0XD)
[I'D RATHER NOT SAY »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Have-you-voted/?source=VPP_20221108_EMPOLL_E5_T0_AC&t=11&akid=5270%2E878179%2Eog-0XD)
**** YOUR CONFIDENTIAL LIVE POLL CLOSES AT 11:59 PM ****
* * *
Historic voter turnout delivered the Presidency, the House, AND the Senate for Democrats in 2020. And data shows that voting by mail was _massive._

Our _only chance_ of expanding our fragile majorities and saving President Biden's agenda from MAGA takeover is if every loyal Democrat reading this VOTES!
**_So we need to know:_**
[**Have you voted yet?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Have-you-voted/?source=VPP_20221108_EMPOLL_E5_T0_AC&t=12&akid=5270%2E878179%2Eog-0XD)
[YES, I HAVE! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Have-you-voted/?source=VPP_20221108_EMPOLL_E5_T0_AC&t=13&akid=5270%2E878179%2Eog-0XD)

[I'D RATHER NOT SAY »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Have-you-voted/?source=VPP_20221108_EMPOLL_E5_T0_AC&t=15&akid=5270%2E878179%2Eog-0XD)
**** YOUR CONFIDENTIAL LIVE POLL CLOSES AT 11:59 PM ****
Thank you,

_VPP Polling Team_
| | Paid for by Voter Protection Project
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To ending partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=3&akid=5270%2E878179%2Eog-0XD). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=4&akid=5270%2E878179%2Eog-0XD).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=5&akid=5270%2E878179%2Eog-0XD) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=16&akid=5270%2E878179%2Eog-0XD). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=6&akid=5270%2E878179%2Eog-0XD)

Hi Friend, If you're reading this email and about to head to the polls there is one hour left! If you're in line after polls close, you can remain in line. Our final campaign day has been amazing. I have spoken with Tennesseans from all walks of life - teachers, students, doctors, small business owners and so many from both parties. I know we have what it takes to win, and I’m asking you to step up to the plate right now. Vote for Jason Brantley Martin. Find your polling location at [GoVoteTN.org](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54335194/378168291/-1290474561?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDczOGNkYS1jMjVmLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNThkMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YBgaZsL0il_eLJrpK1hnObDbwJRTv3bvIDgbeZ10Y_o=&emci=0d744865-be5f-ed11-819c-002248258d2f&emdi=cd738cda-c25f-ed11-819c-002248258d2f&ceid=9304149). I know we have what it takes to win, and I’m asking you to step up to the plate right now. Vote for Jason Brantley Martin. Find your polling location at . name: =?utf-8?Q?Eden=20McKissick=2DHawley=20=28B=2FE=20Founder=20&=20CEO=29?=
subject: Look who I ran into today, Friends 📷
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Barrier to Entry PAC
body:
a little note while the polls are closing across the country and we wait in anticipation for the results >>
| | | [](https://barriertoentrypac.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb795e0b9271d112fbc5c1bd8&id=15edbc7c84&e=007b353608)
---
Look who I ran into on the campaign trail, friends! Two of my favorite people — **Commissioner Shenise Turner-Sloss** and **Angelina Jackson!**
[](https://barriertoentrypac.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb795e0b9271d112fbc5c1bd8&id=d75d68f5fa&e=007b353608) I was in Dayton, Ohio today knocking on doors and turning out the vote — and I got the chance to meet up with these two awesome Barrier To Entry candidates.

**Shenise Turner-Sloss** (left in the above photo) crushed an entrenched, endorsed slate of bad Democrats in 2021 and was elected as Dayton City Commissioner. Earlier this year, B/E was proud to fight alongside her as she won her historic election!

And **Angelina Jackson** (right in the above photo and pictured with me below) is running for Judge of Common Pleas in Montgomery County, Ohio — a critical area to protect abortion access. When elected, she will be the only Black woman sitting on a bench that is 90% white and will preside over abortion-related crimes in the same area where the Kettering Clinic provides essential care to the region — the same clinic where the 10 year old was turned away. **_(Yes, that clinic.)_**

[](https://barriertoentrypac.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb795e0b9271d112fbc5c1bd8&id=17837de1b2&e=007b353608) Megan and I will be monitoring results throughout the evening, and we’ll make sure to keep you updated. [**While we stand by and wait for the final ballot counts, you can help root for real everyday working-class progressives like Shenise and Angie: Please consider rushing a donation now! >>**](https://barriertoentrypac.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb795e0b9271d112fbc5c1bd8&id=6a09e4b2c7&e=007b353608) Talk soon!
**_\-- Eden
_** (Founder & CEO of Barrier to Entry PAC)
[](https://barriertoentrypac.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb795e0b9271d112fbc5c1bd8&id=eb727b0064&e=007b353608)
* * *

**BARRIER TO ENTRY PAC** is proudly 100% women owned and operated — by women of color, queer women, progressive women — who are committed to achieving social change through inclusive public leadership. Our mission is to build a political space that reflects and works for ALL of us by helping pro-choice, lower income candidates run for office. Because it's time to elect actual working-class representatives to represent the working class. _******[](https://barriertoentrypac.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb795e0b9271d112fbc5c1bd8&id=182d77d71f&e=007b353608)****_Pitch in today to break barriers with us! >>_**_ **______[DONATE →](https://barriertoentrypac.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb795e0b9271d112fbc5c1bd8&id=5064be317d&e=007b353608)**

name: Peter Welch
subject: We did it. We won.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT
body:
This is all possible because of you.

# [](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/144?t=2&akid=1204%2E61531%2EGctKcV)
We did it, team. We won. I will be Vermont’s next United States Senator.
I’ve been in public service for most of my life. My motivation for staying in this fight has always been to give people a fair shot and right injustices. Whether it was organizing against racial housing discrimination in Chicago, defending low-income clients as a public defender in White River Junction, or fighting for Vermonters in the state senate and Congress — I always fought to give everyone an equal opportunity.
There’s more injustice in our society than ever. Constitutional rights are being taken away, working families are struggling to make ends meet, and our democracy is being threatened by lies. But going out into Vermont and meeting voters during this campaign has given me renewed hope. I know that when we care for our neighbors, we all stand to benefit.
I wouldn’t be here if it weren’t for the many, many people like you who supported this campaign. In ways big and small, you’re the reason I will be Vermont’s next United States Senator.
We all know that the work ahead of me won’t be easy: in many ways, the Senate is broken, and we don’t yet know who will control the chamber. But I know what I’ll fight for no matter who is in charge. I’ll fight to lower the cost of living, I’ll fight to protect reproductive rights, and I’ll fight to save our planet.
I’ll fight for you.
I also want to say thank you to Patrick Leahy. No one has served Vermont so faithfully, so decently, and so fiercely as Patrick for 48 years. He’s dedicated most of his life to advocating for Vermonters. Alongside Marcelle — and with a camera in hand — they made Vermont an even better place to live and visit.
Thank you all again. I hope we can all appreciate this victory and everything that has led us to this moment.
And then we’ll get back to work in January. Talk soon.
Peter
[](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/5087?t=3&akid=1204%2E61531%2EGctKcV)

---

name: Josh Harder
subject: Update from the polls
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Harder for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/MLOO3FzgZps1jNJ9e66_L9Ujr6o1YtaHsHZK3sUfX3M=/KBadApjtj8NiyyDoB_x2I6b-5wS2GLqxBD5vGGj_6ho=)
Hi Peter,
It's official: polls are officially closed here in California!
The read-out from across the district is that turnout is looking strong - tens of thousands of people voted in-person today. We also know that over 80,000 people sent in mail ballots.
**What does all this mean?** Overall, we feel strong about where we are right now. Hundreds of volunteers helped us get out the vote and based on the responses we received on the phones and doors - people were fired up to vote.
It also means counting all these votes is going to take a _while._ Tabulating votes always takes a long time in California, but especially in toss-up districts like ours where a few hundred votes may determine the winner. **So, tonight we won 't have any news for you on if we successfully kept this district blue. **We will obviously keep you in the loop as we learn more over the following days and weeks.
I'll end with this: from the bottom of my heart, thank you for being a part of this team. Many of you have been on this ride with us since the Blue Wave of 2018, and I'm so grateful you took a risk on me. To our new friends and supporters, your energy and guidance have meant the world as we navigate some pretty scary times for our country.
I'm incredibly proud of the work we've done together, and even after a long and brutal campaign, I remain optimistic for our future. We simply have no other choice.
Thank you. We'll be in touch when we know more,
Josh (and Pam and Lillian)

Paid For By Harder for Congress
---
Harder for Congress
PO Box 4426
Modesto CA 95352 United States

name: Andrea Salinas
subject: This is my final ask before the polls close.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andrea Salinas for Oregon
body:
One last time.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54335583/378183258/-265926817?refcode=em_fr_2022.11.08_b4_AS_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZWNmYzE3My1jODVmLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNThkMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kPxscVM3TnEHUsvO8d7c6-srJYkixzBG23kl_iAz51U=)
---
Friend, I’ve said it many times, and I’ll say it again: My race is one of the most competitive in the entire country. [**In a moment, I’m going to ask you one last time to contribute to my people-powered campaign. But if you don’t have time to read this email right now, can you please chip in before you click away?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54335584/378183260/-265926817?refcode=em_fr_2022.11.08_b4_AS_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZWNmYzE3My1jODVmLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNThkMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kPxscVM3TnEHUsvO8d7c6-srJYkixzBG23kl_iAz51U=)

My dad immigrated to the U.S. from Mexico in 1950. He believed in the power of hard work to make a difference. He worked in the fields, served two tours in Vietnam, and took a union job to provide a path into the middle class for our family.

While we didn’t have a lot growing up, my family believed that through hard work, you can achieve anything. It took me seven years to graduate college – and I juggled multiple jobs, from painting houses to pouring coffee – but I put in the hard work and earned that degree.

My daughter was born 17 years ago, and my family’s hard work gave me the determination that I needed to leave the world a better place for her. That’s why I stepped up to join the Oregon legislature.

As a legislator, I’ve fought for more affordable health care, helped Oregon begin to tackle our climate crisis, and passed the nation’s most progressive paid family leave bill. It takes hard work to get these things done, but I was determined.

With that same level of determination, I decided to run for Congress. I’ve talked to people across Oregon’s Sixth District about what they care about. Most importantly, I’ve heard their stories – feeling their triumphs, pains, and hopes for the future. I’m ready to fight for you in Congress, [**but I need your help.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54335585/378183261/-265926817?refcode=em_fr_2022.11.08_b4_AS_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZWNmYzE3My1jODVmLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNThkMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kPxscVM3TnEHUsvO8d7c6-srJYkixzBG23kl_iAz51U=)

My team and I are racing to raise just a little bit more to help us reach undecided voters in the final hours of this race. We have just a few hours left to make a difference, and you better believe we’re going to run through the tape.

**[That’s why I’m asking: Will you please chip in $10 or whatever you can before the polls close tonight? clean_body: One last time. = Friend, I’ve said it many times, and I’ll say it again: My race is one of the most competitive in the entire country. = My dad immigrated to the U.S. from Mexico in 1950. He believed in the power of hard work to make a difference. He worked in the fields, served two tours in Vietnam, and took a union job to provide a path into the middle class for our family. While we didn’t have a lot growing up, my family believed that through hard work, you can achieve anything. It took me seven years to graduate college – and I juggled multiple jobs, from painting houses to pouring coffee – but I put in the hard work and earned that degree. My daughter was born 17 years ago, and my family’s hard work gave me the determination that I needed to leave the world a better place for her. That’s why I stepped up to join the Oregon legislature. As a legislator, I’ve fought for more affordable health care, helped Oregon begin to tackle our climate crisis, and passed the nation’s most progressive paid family leave bill. It takes hard work to get these things done, but I was determined. With that same level of determination, I decided to run for Congress. I’ve talked to people across Oregon’s Sixth District about what they care about. Most importantly, I’ve heard their stories – feeling their triumphs, pains, and hopes for the future. I’m ready to fight for you in Congress, = My team and I are racing to raise just a little bit more to help us reach undecided voters in the final hours of this race. We have just a few hours left to make a difference, and you better believe we’re going to run through the tape. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = = Thank you, Andrea Salinas = | | = Andrea Salinas for Oregon PO Box 230985 Tigard, OR 97281 Paid for by Andrea Salinas for Oregon Andrea is fighting for Oregon, fighting for affordable quality health care, an economy that works for everyone, and clean air, land, and water. Now, Andrea's ready to show Washington what hard work can accomplish – real, meaningful change for all of us. | =

name: Chris Deluzio
subject: Tonight, we won the fight for our common good here in PA-17.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Deluzio for Congress
body:
Derek, I wanted to take a moment to share my sincerest gratitude with all of you.

Tonight, we won the fight for our common good here in PA-17, and I’m honored to represent our community in Congress.

We won this race because we offered something different. The good people of western Pennsylvania believe, as I do, in fighting for our common good, for our shared prosperity, and for a government that serves all of us and puts people first.

It will be the honor of my lifetime to represent all of us in Congress. I promise I will always, every day, in every decision, right here in western Pennsylvania and down in Washington, put you, your families, and this country first.

So from the bottom of my heart, thank you for your support. This win is all of ours, and we wouldn’t have done it without each and every one of you.

Let’s get to work,

Chris Deluzio

----------
[https://www.facebook.com/ChrisforPA]
[https://twitter.com/ChrisForPA]
[https://chrisforpa.com]

Paid for by Chris Deluzio for Congress
Chris Deluzio for Congress
PO Box 16210
Pittsburgh, PA 15242
United States
Chris Deluzio is a United States Veteran. Use of rank, title, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of Defense, Department of the Navy, or Department of the Army.

We’re glad to have you on our side in our fight for Long Island’s conservative values in this crucial election. Nancy Pelosi, Chuck Schumer, Hakeem Jeffries, Adam Schiff, and the DCCC are targeting our race in hopes of flipping Long Island blue. name: Mark Ronchetti
subject: Don’t Miss The Polls! STAY IN LINE
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Mark Ronchetti for Governor, Anne Perez Treasurer
body:
Polls close tonight at 7:00 pm! If you haven’t voted yet, there’s still time but you need to act fast. As long as you’re in line at 7:00 pm, your vote counts. And please, DO NOT LEAVE THE LINE if you are in it at 7:00 pm! | | |
---
| | Peter,

Polls close tonight at 7:00 pm! If you haven’t voted yet, there’s still time but you need to act fast. As long as you’re in line at 7:00 pm, Peter, **your vote counts. And please, DO NOT LEAVE THE LINE if you are in it at 7:00 pm! ** In this race to reject the career politicians and reclaim our state, we’re fighting **tooth and nail to get every last voter who supports our mission** to show up to vote **TODAY!** There are no do-overs. This. Is. It. _**Peter, we can’t afford to let even one friend or family member stay home today. If you or a loved one is just getting off work, we NEED you to GET OUT and VOTE TONIGHT!**_ For a list of polling locations near you, please visit [markronchetti.com/vote](http://links.markronchetti.com/u/click?_t=b07bd752cdb64edc94e23391776d0f53&_m=f50b4166bf1a4fe1a0d5b9a1b2b91c3c&_e=AOyf_sKPNT2gEXpIYM1ar4Dic6usb2AkRnmxtrr3onxjwoGv8NZFdirJnpg-_Q8Dp9SVq26nsLgIOc4_P_jQ0fsuTvY_gy6u2O9XXVSEqrltgtrfcMMeOmpC5Hl9UnZ86xQFBokOvwBPUWXfYxQqnNR7ymqTJ5l7taBcPlvgwwhI62ysN8WJa_vdjS8B7liaBp8hk1fB1pTENTNm4cvRug%3D%3D). This race is going to come down to the wire, Peter. Are you prepared for the consequences if MLG **wins** tonight? Just think about everything she’s given us over the last four years:
* Our schools are the **worst in the nation,** and they’re only getting worse
* Our streets are **riddled** with violent crime and drug and human trafficking because of MLG’s soft-on-crime policies, hurting innocent New Mexicans every day
* Our businesses are **suffering** under the weight of state regulations and taxes, all for our state government to **prioritize themselves over your business and your family**

**Today’s vote is about believing that better is possible.** We have everything we need to turn things around in New Mexico, but we may never get that chance if **you don’t vote tonight.**
Make sure you get to the polls **by 7:00 pm so that YOUR vote can count.** Check where your closest polling location is and get in line as fast as possible, Peter: [markronchetti.com/vote

](http://links.markronchetti.com/u/click?_t=b07bd752cdb64edc94e23391776d0f53&_m=f50b4166bf1a4fe1a0d5b9a1b2b91c3c&_e=AOyf_sKPNT2gEXpIYM1ar4Dic6usb2AkRnmxtrr3onxjwoGv8NZFdirJnpg-_Q8DfPpnhq4WDYVN-dhQzTfdpaeNaEQ6MCwl3XTWPNWpQQPzSFcjrFFTc188BYlf-4OYFgGZ1CnUd_mu7OYFf1xhcuHBbALYbhsCJ40kBBXi8n1Qm-hf2mEnrGE45VackraTyQH85y3ncMfrn0Hem4aW_g%3D%3D)If you are interested in donating to the campaign, visit here: [https://secure.winred.com/mark-ronchetti-for-governor/contribute](http://links.markronchetti.com/u/click?_t=b07bd752cdb64edc94e23391776d0f53&_m=f50b4166bf1a4fe1a0d5b9a1b2b91c3c&_e=AOyf_sKPNT2gEXpIYM1ar_jiSeiJ6I9W9uG1E3tk7u5Ablmqhsw43L7UqTRfb3DClj-d9ShSRsZ6t8TCwPaeDljKJjjlwIkCZh9HumK-uGUNIrlDyMECLtKwdEHH9B0dLymZGkiBQg3AxVhUa1obB2Wq3MBZeUfN2DvfPZv2PPR3uPvrVN3qyxozDjLo6hNYkWouNqUyiIgN8ZoXP-nZaj9y5uSrwydb8cpNXC_V1t-QFSL4yPwIOjo69yRQVar3r202g9gJql9Ou32qvlr_538abE8S72OCiffEvLFmZlIa66aJ6g0eBWh0WtjpK6kJkJX5YWvFpySW1hlwBQC5XBMqLF4wIgQpcsozIifmNjGf48l1jU42mASDRM0OjfC3pQnvb7Rd7pCZ36dZpWUEzFRmLBi2r-W2WGIGIRN766YIz8JyyG1A1c5c1Ng13PfpOFNLHhgDi8Fvfauab0TeZQ%3D%3D).
---
[**FIND MY VOTING LOCATION**](http://links.markronchetti.com/u/click?_t=b07bd752cdb64edc94e23391776d0f53&_m=f50b4166bf1a4fe1a0d5b9a1b2b91c3c&_e=8b44jEOYdjlkqGxF1KxxiuyFmmbhjB1jzejvnroigNbgIgfpPfM2GqNprATToxcmosYRPMRK9koEJCfvvPC9xysGMebj-_a5Lzb8Lp4jBc6DkJAkZWhlPZwOmx7aG6QaeWkpkVrlaPzVvaixLkzU24CDyjWi-fU8jaR3pkxgzVQ2ZLjsLY2TYpW1UB18KjNEVNOZQJmoOao2MV-K98eKqQ%3D%3D)

Thank you,

Mark Ronchetti

name: Josh Riley
subject: Thank you, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Riley for Congress
body:
I’ll have more to say in the coming days about what this campaign has meant to me, but I wanted to take just a moment now to say this

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54335691/378187142/-209395415?refcode=blu-jrfc-20221108-2-em&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNGQ1ZTFkMy1jOTVmLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNThkMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8zZU449g408NN6EWl-55tVkc9m1FKf4XQv387NnPHUM=)
---
| Hi Peter, it’s Josh Riley.

In just an hour, the polls will close and we will begin to see results for our race here in New York’s 19th Congressional District.

I’ll have more to say in the coming days about what this campaign has meant to me, but I wanted to take just a moment now to say this: I am incredibly grateful for all you have done. This campaign isn’t mine; it’s ours together, and I’m humbled to have you as part of the team.

Whether you voted for me, volunteered your time to talk to your neighbors, or financially supported the effort, you helped make this campaign a hopeful, grassroots movement for change. You met the moment by engaging in our Democracy at a time when it might have been easier to retreat from it.

I hope to have the honor of serving my home in Congress — and enlisting you as a partner in delivering positive change in Washington.

Thank you.

With gratitude & high hopes,

Josh Riley
---

clean_body: I’ll have more to say in the coming days about what this campaign has meant to me, but I wanted to take just a moment now to say this | = | Hi Peter, it’s Josh Riley. In just an hour, the polls will close and we will begin to see results for our race here in New York’s 19th Congressional District. I’ll have more to say in the coming days about what this campaign has meant to me, but I wanted to take just a moment now to say this: I am incredibly grateful for all you have done. This campaign isn’t mine; it’s ours together, and I’m humbled to have you as part of the team. Whether you voted for me, volunteered your time to talk to your neighbors, or financially supported the effort, you helped make this campaign a hopeful, grassroots movement for change. You met the moment by engaging in our Democracy at a time when it might have been easier to retreat from it. I hope to have the honor of serving my home in Congress — and enlisting you as a partner in delivering positive change in Washington. Thank you. With gratitude & high hopes, Josh Riley | = * | | Paid for by Josh Riley for Congress Josh Riley for Congress PO Box 6806 213 Tioga St Ithaca, NY 14851 United States | | ---|--- = If you wish to donate by check, you can make checks payable to Josh Riley for Congress and send to PO Box 6806, 213 Tioga St, Ithaca, NY 14851. name: Patty Murray
subject: I’m humbled to continue serving as your U.S. Senator
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
Thank you, Washington state!
#
Peter,
It is the honor of my life to be your voice in the U.S. Senate and I am humbled to serve another term representing the Evergreen State in the other Washington.
We got to today because of all of you. Because of people who talked to their neighbors and families about what is at stake in this election, knocked on doors, made phone calls, and donated to help us fight back against the onslaught of national GOP money. I’ve said from the start that the people of Washington state can always count on me to have their backs – and in this election, you all showed that you have mine too.
This election was a choice. And Washington state chose to protect a woman’s right to make her own health care decisions. You chose defending our democracy. You chose building an economy that works for everyone – not just giant corporations and billionaires. And you chose me – a mom, and now nana, in tennis shoes who has always and will always put the people of this state first in everything that I do.
So now, the work continues. All of the stories I heard from new friends and old faces while campaigning across the state have made me even more excited and motivated for the work ahead on everything from making child care affordable, lowering the costs of prescription drugs and health care, taking action on climate, getting our kids back on track, and so much more.
Again – thank you! I am grateful for your support in this race and look forward to our work ahead, together.
Patty Murray
**** ****

Peter, It is the honor of my life to be your voice in the U.S. Senate and I am humbled to serve another term representing the Evergreen State in the other Washington. We got to today because of all of you. Because of people who talked to their neighbors and families about what is at stake in this election, knocked on doors, made phone calls, and donated to help us fight back against the onslaught of national GOP money. I’ve said from the start that the people of Washington state can always count on me to have their backs – and in this election, you all showed that you have mine too. This election was a choice. And Washington state chose to protect a woman’s right to make her own health care decisions. You chose defending our democracy. You chose building an economy that works for everyone – not just giant corporations and billionaires. And you chose me – a mom, and now nana, in tennis shoes who has always and will always put the people of this state first in everything that I do. So now, the work continues. All of the stories I heard from new friends and old faces while campaigning across the state have made me even more excited and motivated for the work ahead on everything from making child care affordable, lowering the costs of prescription drugs and health care, taking action on climate, getting our kids back on track, and so much more. Again – thank you! I am grateful for your support in this race and look forward to our work ahead, together. Patty Murray ** ****=**** As Washington's senior U.S. Senator, Patty Murray is working to help families, solve problems, and defend our progressive values. PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY

name: Max Rose
subject: Thank you for everything.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Max Rose for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54337148/378202136/-992107949?refcode=ros_headerlogo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85MzE1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMmVkOGZkYi1mNDVmLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNThkMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2JeSQAF08MY7-Zq3iMwddnZm7OzKsRqOF0vyIwkwGsc=)

| | Peter, Tonight’s result wasn’t the outcome we hoped for and worked for, but as proud Americans, we respect the results of elections. There’s a lot of fear and concern about the future of our city, state, and country. For many, the past few elections have taken on life-or-death stakes with our rights, our well being, and our democracy being at risk in a way they haven’t been for a very long time. So when we fall short, I understand it can be heartbreaking and even frightening.**But this is not the time to give up or back down. One election alone does not define the trajectory of this country.** As long as we’ve been a country, there were politicians building their power on vitriol and division. And so long as they’ve existed, so too have there been people just like you - who rejected that kind of politics; who believed in America’s fundamental promise and potential. Let’s not kid ourselves: Democracy’s messy. Every inch of progress in this great nation has been preceded by false-starts, failures, and loss. If reaching what Dr. King called the Mountaintop was easy, we’d already be there. **The truth is, believing in and fighting for what America can and must be is not for the faint of heart. Yet, you’ve stepped up and fought alongside me every step of the way. Through the highs and lows, your support and faith in me has never wavered. I can never repay you for your trust in me.** Look - times are tough, but understand this: We will get through this economic crisis; crime will go down; we will find a way to repair the breach that exists between our fellow Americans. Those who say we haven’t been here before should pick up a textbook. The forces who would shackle us to our past; who would tear America apart if it meant holding on to power have won elections before and there will be times when they do so again. But it is in those moments when the best of America reasserts itself. Because of people like you - the ones who love this country - get back up off the ground, fight and put us back on the path to building the America we all know is possible: One where we are neighbors, not political combatants; where if you work hard; anything is possible; where our diversity is our strength, not a weakness. A just America; a safe America. Our America. And I’ll always be right alongside you fighting for it. Thank you from the bottom of my heart, Max Rose
---

body:
| | |
---
**EXCLUSIVE INVITATION:** You have been selected to represent Pennsylvania in our official Election 2022 Exit Poll.

Details are below; please read carefully. (If your email address is not [DPWILLIS67@GMAIL.COM](https://go.dscc.org/go/10960?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20221108-Kati-KatiExitPollRF-Pros2-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20221108-Kati-KatiExitPollRF-Pros2-sl1&akid=8564%2E9716520%2E8lFIx8), please exit this email immediately.)
With polls preparing to close across the country, we need to hear from confirmed voters IMMEDIATELY to determine if Democratic candidates have the support they need to defend our Senate majority.
**That's why we're conducting an URGENT digital exit poll, and we've chosen a select group of top supporters who we believe form a representative sample of the Democratic grassroots base. I'm pleased to inform you that you've been selected to participate in this emergency poll.**
USER ID: **9716520**
REASON FOR SELECTION:**Past Survey Responses**
ACTION REQUIRED: [**Accept Invitation to Exit Poll**](https://go.dscc.org/go/10960?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20221108-Kati-KatiExitPollRF-Pros2-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20221108-Kati-KatiExitPollRF-Pros2-sl1&akid=8564%2E9716520%2E8lFIx8)
I cannot overstate the importance of your response. With the Senate -- and the future of our health care, voting rights, and the Supreme Court -- being decided _as we speak,_ we need to know how our candidates are performing in all states.
But in order to collect accurate data, we need FULL participation. For that reason, **we ask that you prioritize completing and submitting your responses immediately.** Please, don't let us down when we need you most.
**[www.dscc.org/2022-Exit-Poll#9716520](https://go.dscc.org/go/10960?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20221108-Kati-KatiExitPollRF-Pros2-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20221108-Kati-KatiExitPollRF-Pros2-sl1&akid=8564%2E9716520%2E8lFIx8)**
With only HOURS left to save our democracy -- please, answer our exit poll right now.

Thank you,

Kati
DSCC

* If you've recently responded or done so with a different email address, thank you! Online records may not be up to date, but don't worry -- your responses have been recorded.
| |
* * *
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. clean_body: | | | EXCLUSIVE INVITATION: You have been selected to represent Pennsylvania in our official Election 2022 Exit Poll. Details are below; please read carefully. (If your email address is not , please exit this email immediately.) With polls preparing to close across the country, we need to hear from confirmed voters IMMEDIATELY to determine if Democratic candidates have the support they need to defend our Senate majority. That's why we're conducting an URGENT digital exit poll, and we've chosen a select group of top supporters who we believe form a representative sample of the Democratic grassroots base. I'm pleased to inform you that you've been selected to participate in this emergency poll. USER ID: 9716520 REASON FOR SELECTION:Past Survey Responses ACTION REQUIRED: I cannot overstate the importance of your response. With the Senate -- and the future of our health care, voting rights, and the Supreme Court -- being decided as we speak, we need to know how our candidates are performing in all states. But in order to collect accurate data, we need FULL participation. For that reason, we ask that you prioritize completing and submitting your responses immediately. Please, don't let us down when we need you most. With only HOURS left to save our democracy -- please, answer our exit poll right now. Thank you, Kati DSCC If you've recently responded or done so with a different email address, thank you! body:
Our team is fueled by grassroots supporters like you, and I’m so appreciative to have you in our movement.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54336292/378195270/2098061004?refcode=BLU-VFC-20221108-2-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWI3NzMwNy1jZTVmLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNThkMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fgJ6JlujnXhitUtDZA2mLSD3IEIA60IVCuB5tkWwgqA=)

| Peter, with the polls closing in just a few short hours, I wanted to reach out to you personally one last time. I am honored to be your Democratic nominee, and I’m ready to uplift the voice of every single North Carolinian on day one.

**From the bottom of my heart, thank you very much for your support.** Our team is fueled by grassroots supporters like you, and I’m so appreciative to have you in our movement to turn North Carolina blue and ensure our Democratic values are front and center.

Together, tremendous strides toward progress are possible.

Thank you,

Valerie Foushee

name: Maggie Hassan (NH)
subject: Team, I can't thank you enough
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
From day one, you have played a critical role in this campaign.
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54336322/378195420/-1829049351?refcode=mh-jtk2031-ot-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZWI3NzMwNy1jZTVmLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNThkMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c4YbOOT_Z5hrwRghygS0BONO5iAsWdEE5N320AZOzAo=)
---
Team –
The polls just closed in New Hampshire. Soon, we’ll know the result of everything we’ve been working towards for almost two years.
From day one, you have played a critical role in this campaign. So, while we wait, I wanted to take a moment to thank you.
Thank you to everyone who volunteered, donated, put up a sign, knocked doors, talked to a friend, or cast a vote. Thank you for stepping up time and time again to help our campaign when we needed it the most.
It’s been the honor of my life to serve New Hampshire. I wouldn't be where I am today without the incredible support of this grassroots team, and I need you to know that no matter what happens, I'm deeply grateful to have you by my side.
From the bottom of my heart, thank you.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

name: =?utf-8?Q?Andrea=20Hunley?=
subject: Andrea Hunley elected to State Senate District 46
body:
The votes are in and Andrea Hunley has won! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/e2536663cff9/vote-early-voting-has-started-16686844?e=d9ebccf591)
---
| |
---
| |
---
| Good evening to each of you,
**I am proud and humbled to officially announce that I am your District 46 Indiana State Senator.**
We did it!

I entered this race a year ago to represent you - my community- the people of Senate District 46 who need to be seen and who deserve to be heard.

Women, we see you.
And we stand with you to protect abortion rights, to protect your healthcare choices.
Seniors on fixed incomes, we see you.
Youth fighting for our climate, we see you.
Moms and allies fighting for common sense gun reform, we see you.
Friends in the LGBTQ community, we see you. I see you, and I am proud to stand with you. And you have shown up for me.
Thank you to everyone who knocked on doors, talked to voters, wrote postcards, volunteered at the polls, and of course to each of you who made Voting a priority. Continue to stay in touch, let me know what matters to you and where you need your voices lifted. And I will fight for you and a better quality of life - of access and fairness and opportunity - for each of you. I will continue to be that **Bold Voice and Proven Leader** you believe in.

Thank you!

Andrea Hunley
---

---
|

| | Peter, we wanted to say thank you for all of your hard work.

We would not be in a position where Georgia is competitive – where Georgia sent a Democratic President to the White House and two Democratic Senators to the U.S. Senate – without your hard work and support.

It might be a while until we get the full results from today’s election, and that’s a reflection of how far we’ve come. Until we proved the pundits wrong in 2020, it was unthinkable that Georgia would go blue – that it was a battleground state. Now, no one can treat Georgia as an afterthought.

It might be a while until we get the full results from today, but here’s what we know:
* Georgia CAN turn blue. With hard work and investment in our grassroots operation, we can make Georgia bluer.
* Georgia will continue to be one of the closest battleground states in the country, and the margin of victory in Georgia could be just a couple thousand votes.
* **Georgia will determine the winner of the 2024 presidential election.**

Georgia is only competitive because of _**you**_ – because voters, volunteers, and donors believed that Georgia could actually go blue.

Thank you for believing in us, standing with us, and investing in us as we work to turn Georgia blue.

– The Democratic Party of Georgia

name: Congressman Jim Banks
subject: We did it!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Conservatives Trust
body:
Thanks for all your support

| Dear patriot,

We did it. We won the race!

Thank you for your continued support throughout this tough election. With so many woke Democrats running for office, our country's future was on the line. Thanks to your help, we can now work to restore America First policies in Washington, D.C.

Every dollar helped us get to this victory. Without you, the work we do is meaningless. The real fight is just starting. Over the next years, I will work tirelessly to defend your freedom, secure our border, hold our government accountable, stop crime, end inflation, and protect your family.

I hope you'll stay invested during this journey so that we can restore Trump's legacy and put an end to Biden's disastrous agenda.

Sincerely,

name: Aaron E. - Campaign Manager
subject: It's voting time, Minnesotans!
body:
Are you prepped and ready?
Do you know what today is, friend?**It's Election Day, which means it's time to hit the polls and vote for Brad Finstad - a Congressman who's made a commitment to restore America.** [](https://finsb-finstadforcongress.cmail19.com/t/t-l-aktdidy-jrhhjlljll-r/) By now, I hope you have a concrete plan to get out and vote, especially with such heated races at stake. **If you don't have a plan, MAKE ONE ASAP!** The team has been pushing our most intense get-out-the-vote efforts leading up to this day. We have been sending last-minute texts, emails, ads, and even going door-to-door to speak with undecided voters.By making a voting plan right now, you can make sure these efforts don't go to waste!**First,[_find your nearest polling location_](https://finsb-finstadforcongress.cmail19.com/t/t-l-aktdidy-jrhhjlljll-y/).** You have until 8 PM to arrive and get in line to ensure your vote is counted.**Second,** reach out to family, friends, and coworkers who could use a ride to the voting booth - a good opportunity to share Brad's conservative message with voters right before they hit the voting booth.**Third,** rally behind all Republican candidates when you're casting your ballot. We need as many Republican victories as possible to get American back on track. Thank you for all your support throughout Brad's campaign. It's all led up to today as well as tomorrow morning... when we wake up and celebrate a Finstad victory![_**Search for polling locations and voter information.**_](https://finsb-finstadforcongress.cmail19.com/t/t-l-aktdidy-jrhhjlljll-t/) Thank you,

**Aaron E**
_Brand Finstad, Campaign Manger_ [](https://finsb-finstadforcongress.cmail19.com/t/t-l-aktdidy-jrhhjlljll-i/) [](https://finsb-finstadforcongress.cmail19.com/t/t-l-aktdidy-jrhhjlljll-d/) [](https://finsb-finstadforcongress.cmail19.com/t/t-l-aktdidy-jrhhjlljll-h/)[](https://finsb-finstadforcongress.cmail19.com/t/t-l-aktdidy-jrhhjlljll-k/) | | [Unsubscribe](https://finsb-finstadforcongress.cmail19.com/t/t-u-aktdidy-jrhhjlljll-u/)
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Congressman=20Troy=20Carter?=
subject: Still the Voice of the People
body:
When I won the special election 18 months ago, I said I wanted to go to Washington to represent New Orleans, River Parishes, and Baton Rouge. |
---
| | [ ](https://congressmantroycarter.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=47f144cfbca3f0c81de469f60&id=4a26876b3b&e=dd5c2df611)
---
| | Friend,

I must begin by thanking my family. My mother, who made me the person I am today. My wife, Ana, thank you for standing with me. My kids, Troy and Josh, I know it's not easy having a dad in public life. You make me so proud.

**To my endorsers, supporters, donors and staff, there are too many of you to thank individually, but that’s a great problem to have!** I promise I will get around to thank each and every one of you tonight.

When I won the special election 18 months ago, I said I wanted to go to Washington to represent New Orleans. To represent the River Parishes. To represent Baton Rouge. **TO BE THE VOICE OF THE PEOPLE.**
---
| [ ](https://congressmantroycarter.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=47f144cfbca3f0c81de469f60&id=6c2465c840&e=dd5c2df611)
---
| I’ve spent the last month talking about all the things we have accomplished together... and it is a lot...
---
| |
* Passed the Inflation Reduction Act to fight climate change and reduce healthcare costs
* Secured almost $2 billion in Hurricane Ida relief
* Record funding for HBCUs
* Requested/secured $31.5M in Community Project Funding for improved mental healthcare, STEM and pre-health advising services for students, public transportation, parks, an athletic stadium, and public health work in LA02. These will improve livability/wellness in our community.
* Advanced requests for $38M in FY 2022 Community Project Funds. These include a community pool in Cut Off, expanding the Cancer Center at UMC, equipping a STEM center, increasing job & apprenticeship programs, supporting survivors of domestic violence, & more
* Built a Community Lighthouse Microgrid Project
* Brought $7 billion in infrastructure investments to Louisiana
* Visits from the President, Vice President and over 10 members of the President’s Cabinet to Louisiana and the Second District to help elevate our community’s issues and experiences.
* My office closed over 1,000 constituent cases regarding issues with federal agencies, help save and retain millions of dollars for our LA-02 constituents.
* Secured an award of $7.62M in funding for Southern’s Ravine Protection project from the USDA.
* Passed the CHIPS Act to make America the leader in manufacturing semi-conductors
* Passed the Safer Communities Act
* Advocated for environmental justice improvements in EPA enforcement and air quality monitoring that were accepted and is being implemented by the agency
* Passed a bill to support small businesses as they compete internationally
* I introduced 15 pieces of legislation to the House of Representatives on issues relating to small businesses, economic development, cannabis and justice reform, environmental justice, and uplifting and protection our community’s cultural legacy.
* Protected toxic-exposed veterans
* Made Juneteenth a national holiday
* Passed the Emmett Till Anti-lynching Act

---
| That’s what we’ve done. **But today is about the future.** It’s about rolling up our sleeves and getting back to work.

**There is still so much to do.** Bring back the child tax credit. Raise the minimum wage. Transform energy production for the next 100 years. Ensure every child has a high quality education. Provide affordable healthcare for all.

Right now. Here. We are celebrating. It’s too early to tell how the rest of the country goes, but **I stand here ready to go back and continue to be the people’s voice in Washington and move this country forward. **
---
| Learn more at [CongressmanTroyCarter.com](https://congressmantroycarter.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=47f144cfbca3f0c81de469f60&id=09e4ac8d95&e=dd5c2df611).
---
| With Gratitude,
---
|
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/congressmantroycarter.com/voice-of-the-people?e=dd5c2df611)
---
| _Copyright © 2022 , All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Troy Carter For CongressPO Box 50730New Orleans, LA 70150
[Add us to your address book](https://congressmantroycarter.us7.list-manage.com/vcard?u=47f144cfbca3f0c81de469f60&id=7fa0cb497f)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://congressmantroycarter.us7.list-manage.com/profile?u=47f144cfbca3f0c81de469f60&id=7fa0cb497f&e=dd5c2df611&c=75b5a9e149) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://congressmantroycarter.us7.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=47f144cfbca3f0c81de469f60&id=7fa0cb497f&e=dd5c2df611&c=75b5a9e149).
---

name: JB Pritzker
subject: Couldn't have done it without you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by JB for Governor Email sent to:
body:
The results are in, and the people of Illinois have officially elected us to serve another term!
---
Friend – The results are in, and the people of Illinois have officially elected us to serve another term! To everyone who voted: **I can't thank you enough for the trust you've placed in Juliana and me to continue getting the job done for working families.** To all of you who've sent texts, made calls, and knocked on doors to get out the vote: I want you to know you've made a difference. You left it all on the line and the impact is clear for all to see. From fighting COVID-19 and protecting the right to choose, to passing a $15/hour minimum wage, defending access to the ballot, fixing our infrastructure, and expanding access to health care, we've saved lives and improved livelihoods since taking office. And that's just the tip of the iceberg – **I cannot wait to see all that we'll accomplish together.** Tonight, as always, I'm remembering my Mom. I told you four years ago about her struggle with alcoholism that ultimately took her life. I told you how the burden a person who loses a parent young carries is the weight of their parent's unlived years on their shoulders. _Never has that responsibility felt more important than it does tonight._ I've fought fights – for choice, for justice, for freedom – that my mother died thinking she had won. So I choose to keep up the fight, the fight for our state, the fight my mother never gave up on, the fight she left to me to finish. Forever grateful, JB
Paid for by JB for Governor Email sent to:

clean_body: The results are in, and the people of Illinois have officially elected us to serve another term! Friend – The results are in, and the people of Illinois have officially elected us to serve another term! To everyone who voted: I can't thank you enough for the trust you've placed in Juliana and me to continue getting the job done for working families. To all of you who've sent texts, made calls, and knocked on doors to get out the vote: I want you to know you've made a difference. You left it all on the line and the impact is clear for all to see. From fighting COVID-19 and protecting the right to choose, to passing a $15/hour minimum wage, defending access to the ballot, fixing our infrastructure, and expanding access to health care, we've saved lives and improved livelihoods since taking office. And that's just the tip of the iceberg – I cannot wait to see all that we'll accomplish together. Tonight, as always, I'm remembering my Mom. I told you four years ago about her struggle with alcoholism that ultimately took her life. I told you how the burden a person who loses a parent young carries is the weight of their parent's unlived years on their shoulders. Never has that responsibility felt more important than it does tonight. I've fought fights – for choice, for justice, for freedom – that my mother died thinking she had won. So I choose to keep up the fight, the fight for our state, the fight my mother never gave up on, the fight she left to me to finish. Forever grateful, JB Paid for by JB for Governor Email sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com * JB for Governor P.O. Box A3801 Chicago, IL 60690 United States

subject: FOR RELEASE: WESLEY HUNT WINS RACE FOR US CONGRESS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
WESLEY HUNT WINS RACE FOR US CONGRESS | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/1bda40a4b29d/for-release-wesley-hunt-wins-race-for-us-congress?e=6b59dbf13a)
---
| |
---
| | **For Immediate Release: November 8th, 2022
Contact: James Kyrkanides, Campaign Manager
Email: press@wesleyfortexas.com**
**For Release: Wesley Hunt wins race for US Congress in TX-38**
**Houston,****TX** \- Tonight, Wesley Hunt won the General Election in TX-38, winning 64% of all early votes cast. Wesley Hunt released the following statement:

_"Serving the people of Texas's 38th Congressional District will be the greatest honor of my life,"_**said Wesley Hunt.**_ The support our campaign received from every corner of the district has been overwhelming, and I am incredibly grateful to all my supporters for dedicating their time and resources to this extremely important cause.__”_

_“Now the important work of saving our country begins. The top priority of the 118th Congress should be to restore our energy independence, bring down the rising inflation that is crushing American families, secure our southern border, and make our nation a safer place to live. The American people have spoken, and they have overwhelmingly rejected the Biden Administration’s agenda and one-party Democrat rule in Washington,” _**said Hunt.**

_“We live in the greatest country in the world, and she’s worth fighting for. Only in America could the great-great-grandson of a slave, graduate West Point, serve our country, and now call himself Congressman-Elect._

_“To the people of Texas’ 38 th Congressional District, thank you for putting your faith in me, I will not let you down. We have a lot to accomplish and I’m eager to get started. God Bless you, God Bless Texas, and God Bless the United States of America.”_

Since launching his campaign last July, Wesley Hunt has raised nearly $6 million, knocked on over 200,000 doors, and received notable endorsements from President Donald Trump, TX-38 resident Senator Ted Cruz, Senator Tim Scott, and dozens of local elected officials and leaders, among others. After winning his General Election by 29%, Wesley Hunt has proven that he is a political force to be reckoned with.

###

| | Thank you, Alabama. Words cannot express the joy, awe, and gratitude I have today after having been elected to represent this great state. I started this journey to the U.S. Senate so I could fight for Alabama’s next generation, and don’t worry: **we’re getting to work tonight**. We couldn’t have done it without you. Whether it was a donation, door knocking, making phone calls, sending letters, and/or volunteering, grassroots supporters, like _you,_ made the difference in this Election! I would’ve never imagined that I, a public school girl from the Wiregrass, would get to **_represent Alabama_** and be **_your voice_** in Washington. It’s been a fight to the finish line and I know I couldn’t have done it without you. But, Peter, I also know the battle for America’s future isn't over. I’m more energized than ever to fight the reckless policies that are hurting working families. I’m ready to help small businesses and our economy thrive, to protect our values, and to work tirelessly to put our state FIRST. Tonight we press on in our battle to preserve the American Dream for generations to come! From the bottom of my heart: THANK YOU!
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Liz=20Dessauer?=
subject: Spartz Wins Re-Election
body:
Victoria Spartz wins re-election to Indiana's 5th Congressional District | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/spartzforcongress/spartzwinsdebate-15953684?e=57d5bacdc3)
---
| |
---
| | **Victoria Spartz Wins Re-Election to Indiana’s 5 th Congressional District**
---
| | **Muncie, IN** – Congresswoman Victoria Spartz released the following statement following her re-election to Indiana’s 5th Congressional District:

“ _I am honored to have earned a second term representing the people of Indiana’s 5th Congressional District, and am ready to continue delivering results for Hoosiers,_ ” said **Spartz**. “ _The radical policies and one-party Democrat rule in Washington have had crippling effects on our economy and national security, and we must now get back to work to govern our nation. We will continue fighting for small businesses, secure borders, smart energy policies, health care reform, and against out-of-control spending and corruption. We will continue fighting for Hoosiers and all Americans, and stop attacking the American Dream. I am proud to lead the charge, and grateful for the opportunity to serve.”_

Victoria Spartz is a businesswoman, CPA, former State Senator, farmer, wife, and mother of two daughters. Born in Soviet-occupied Ukraine, Victoria immigrated to the United States in 2000, putting down roots in Indiana, raising a family, starting businesses and giving back through public service. Victoria was first elected to Congress in 2020 and serves on the U.S. House of Representatives Judiciary and Education and Labor committees.
###
---
| | Contact: Liz Dessauer

clean_body: Victoria Spartz wins re-election to Indiana's 5th Congressional District | | | | | | | Victoria Spartz Wins Re-Election to Indiana’s 5 th Congressional District | | Muncie, IN – Congresswoman Victoria Spartz released the following statement following her re-election to Indiana’s 5th Congressional District: “ I am honored to have earned a second term representing the people of Indiana’s 5th Congressional District, and am ready to continue delivering results for Hoosiers, ” said Spartz. “ The radical policies and one-party Democrat rule in Washington have had crippling effects on our economy and national security, and we must now get back to work to govern our nation. We will continue fighting for small businesses, secure borders, smart energy policies, health care reform, and against out-of-control spending and corruption. We will continue fighting for Hoosiers and all Americans, and stop attacking the American Dream. I am proud to lead the charge, and grateful for the opportunity to serve.” Victoria Spartz is a businesswoman, CPA, former State Senator, farmer, wife, and mother of two daughters. Born in Soviet-occupied Ukraine, Victoria immigrated to the United States in 2000, putting down roots in Indiana, raising a family, starting businesses and giving back through public service. Victoria was first elected to Congress in 2020 and serves on the U.S. House of Representatives Judiciary and Education and Labor committees. | | Contact: Liz Dessauer liz@spartzforcongress.com | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2022 Victoria Spartz for Congress, All rights reserved.

subject: BREAKING: A victory for reproductive rights in Vermont

body:
This is a history-making victory for Vermont voters, who sent an unmistakable signal to an extremist-packed Supreme Court and obstructionist politicians: Vermonters are protecting abortion access in their state for good. | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54336664/378198038/765663662?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZGIzNzhjZS1kOTVmLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNThkMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NZ26JuPIjRW2IAgA5bwEpqmxgpiwXagBmp0PlqOaWEI=&emci=1bb2bef1-785f-ed11-819c-002248258d2f&emdi=fdb378ce-d95f-ed11-819c-002248258d2f&ceid=561582) | **We have exciting news tonight, team:_The Fairness Project-backed ballot measure to protect reproductive rights in the Vermont constitution has won by an overwhelming margin!!_** The result is a history-making victory for Vermont voters, who sent an unmistakable signal to an extremist-packed Supreme Court and obstructionist politicians: Vermonters are protecting abortion access in their state __for good.__ **This first-of-its-kind measure now makes Vermont the first state in the nation to explicitly protect reproductive rights in its state constitution and paves the way for other states to do the very same through ballot measures.** **[POWER OUR WORK →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54336665/378198039/-1935922940?refcode=E19378-20221108-VTWinsRR-SB-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZGIzNzhjZS1kOTVmLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNThkMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NZ26JuPIjRW2IAgA5bwEpqmxgpiwXagBmp0PlqOaWEI=)** When the Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_ earlier this year, we knew we had to work in every state possible to restore the protections of this landmark ruling. Our team identified Vermont as a crucial state for abortion access and partnered with grassroots organizers and activists at Vermont for Reproductive Liberty to win this historic measure. **Tonight’s results reflect the tireless work of pro-choice advocates from across Vermont stepping up to ensure word of this campaign spread to every corner of the state.** However, we know anti-choice extremists will see this victory in Vermont and use whatever means necessary to obstruct the codification of reproductive rights protections in their own states. Their attacks on our efforts will only intensify as we partner with organizers and activists in other states to put reproductive freedom measures on the ballot. [**We’re fighting back against anti-abortion extremists and doing everything we can to ensure reproductive freedom ballot measures win in 2023 and 2024. name: Team Patti
subject: Do you know how to cast your vote tomorrow?
body:
Only 24 hours left to flip the house
[](https://tompattiforcongresscd-09.cmail19.com/t/y-l-ntikhul-dlhtkukljd-r/) **Today's the day to FLIP THE HOUSE:** Here's what you need to know about voting in the 2022 General Election!Today is the day to vote in the 2022 General Election. Today we find out the future of California's 9th Congressional District. This election is critical to taking back the House and the choice could not be more clear. [](https://tompattiforcongresscd-09.cmail19.com/t/y-l-ntikhul-dlhtkukljd-y/) [FIND YOUR POLLING LOCATION](https://tompattiforcongresscd-09.cmail19.com/t/y-l-ntikhul-dlhtkukljd-j/) If you want to vote but are unsure where or how, you can visit the California Secretary of State website to find your location and what you need with you to cast your vote. [FIND YOUR POLLING LOCATION](https://tompattiforcongresscd-09.cmail19.com/t/y-l-ntikhul-dlhtkukljd-i/) Nancy Pelosi and her gang of radicals are becoming increasingly extreme and the only way to put a stop to their plans is to **VOTE** **REPUBLICAN**. Radical leadership has created an uncontrolled homelessness crisis, skyrocketing cost-of-living, and unsafe streets. But it's not too late, together we can shift California and return our great state to its glory days. [FIND YOUR POLLING LOCATION](https://tompattiforcongresscd-09.cmail19.com/t/y-l-ntikhul-dlhtkukljd-d/) It is vital that we every person get out and vote today. One vote can make the difference between further demise of our state and a free California that we dream of. **Visiting your local voting location is the best way to let Nancy Pelosi and her lackey, Josh Harder know that enough is enough.**[__**Today is our chance to change the course of Californian history, will you click here to find out how to cast your vote for Republican Tom Patti?**__](https://tompattiforcongresscd-09.cmail19.com/t/y-l-ntikhul-dlhtkukljd-k/) Thank you for your dedication to the California Dream,
Team Patti [DONATE NOW >>](https://tompattiforcongresscd-09.cmail19.com/t/y-l-ntikhul-dlhtkukljd-u/) [](https://tompattiforcongresscd-09.cmail19.com/t/y-l-ntikhul-dlhtkukljd-o/)[](https://tompattiforcongresscd-09.cmail19.com/t/y-l-ntikhul-dlhtkukljd-b/) | [Preferences](https://tompattiforcongresscd-09.updatemyprofile.com/y-ntikhul-145B0788-dlhtkukljd-n) | [Unsubscribe](https://tompattiforcongresscd-09.cmail19.com/t/y-u-ntikhul-dlhtkukljd-p/)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Julia=20Letlow=20for=20Congress?=
subject: Congresswoman Julia Letlow Wins an Overwhelming Victory in First Re-Election Campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Letlow for Congress
body:
https://lukeletlow.com/site/
FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
December 2, 2020
Former 5th District Candidates Coalesce Around Luke Letlow in Runoff
Start, LA – Former candidates who ran to represent Louisiana’s 5^th Congressional District, Allen Guillory, Matt Hasty and Phillip Snowden, joined together this week to announce their endorsement of Luke Letlow in the runoff election for Louisiana’s 5th Congressional District.

The candidates represent bipartisan support from across the district backing Letlow in the runoff. After meeting personally with Letlow, the three candidates noted that it was his strong commitment to work for all of the 5th District’s citizens that made him the clear choice in the runoff.

“I'm honored by the trust that these outstanding individuals have placed in me and I’m grateful for their support. They ran great campaigns and brought good ideas to the table. Since the beginning, our message has been about rising above politics and building consensus. I look forward to working with all of the candidates who stepped up to run in this election and beyond to move the 5th District forward,” said Luke Letlow.

“I prayed on it, and we going to support Luke Letlow. We have a lot in common, both of us have two kids, are married to our high school sweethearts, and are Christians. Together we can change things in our community,” said Allen Guillory.

“Luke is somebody who believes that the philosophies that we have must be driven by core values and not by partisanship or anything else that would put elections before the people,” said Matt Hasty.

“Our next congressman must be a strong advocate for our district, Louisiana, and the country. We must work hard to move roadblocks and give our people a fighting chance. Politicians with promises and claims do not build businesses or create jobs. The hard working, tax paying residents of the district create businesses and jobs. Louisiana’s 5^th Congressional District needs someone who understands commonsense and rational thoughts to remove roadblocks. I believe Luke Letlow can better achieve this endeavor versus his opponent and is the reason I endorse him. I have casted my vote for him and believe voters should too,” said Phillip Snowden.

About Luke Letlow:

Luke Letlow is a 9th generation Louisianian from Start, Louisiana who has dedicated his life to public service and worked to protect rural Louisiana’s way of life.

A lifelong Republican, Luke has worked alongside Congressman Ralph Abraham to make sure Washington listens to real people and has Abraham’s endorsement. Luke has served as Chief of Staff to Rep. Abraham throughout Abraham’s time in Congress.

Luke is running for Congress to be a conservative voice in Washington who will get results for Louisiana, work to defeat the radical socialists, and keep the economy moving forward.

Luke attended Ouachita Christian High School and received a B.S. from Louisiana Tech University in 2003. Luke and his wife, Dr. Julia Barnhill Letlow, are raising their two young children in Start, and they worship at Covenant Presbyterian Church (EPC) in Monroe.

###

CONTACT: press@LukeLetlow.com
318-350-6821

name: =?utf-8?Q?Leslie=20Rutledge?=
subject: Rutledge Elected Lieutenant Governor!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LESLIE RUTLEDGE FOR LT
body:
| | | |
---
|
---
Friends,

Because of your support, I was elected to become the next Lieutenant Governor of Arkansas! I am truly humbled that once again you have placed your trust in me to help lead Arkansas forward! Tonight’s victory is our victory and I’m honored to continue to serve our great State! God Bless,
Leslie
|
---
Rutledge released the following statement earlier: _Tonight, Arkansas voters made a historic decision by electing Leslie Rutledge, the State’s current Attorney General, to be the next Lieutenant Governor and Sarah Huckabee Sanders as Governor. Rutledge and Sanders will not only be the first women elected to these offices in Arkansas history, but together they will be the first women in the history of the United States to be independently elected to the offices of Governor and Lt. Governor of a state.

“I’m honored that Arkansans have again placed their trust in me for a third time to continue to lead our great State forward,” said Attorney General Rutledge. “This historic moment would not be possible without our Lord and Savior Jesus Christ along with the constant support of my family, friends, supporters, and the amazing staff of the Attorney General’s Office who work tirelessly on behalf of Arkansans everyday. I’m excited to see my longtime friend Sarah Huckabee Sanders follow in the footsteps of her father. I wish her and her new administration great success and I look forward to working with her in the days to come.” Rutledge additionally extended her congratulations to her successor, Attorney General-elect Tim Griffin, and to other fellow Republicans who won tonight.

Attorney General Rutledge, who is term-limited as attorney general, cleared a six-way primary race for Lt. Governor with 54% of the vote and raised over $2 million this cycle. As Arkansas's next Lt. Governor, Rutledge has pledged to continue promoting economic development and workforce education across the State. Rutledge was initially elected Attorney General in 2014, becoming The Natural State’s first Republican and first woman to ever hold the office. She was re-elected to the office in 2018._
|
---
