clean_body: | | | | | Friends, Because of your support, I was elected to become the next Lieutenant Governor of Arkansas! I am truly humbled that once again you have placed your trust in me to help lead Arkansas forward! Tonight’s victory is our victory and I’m honored to continue to serve our great State! God Bless, Leslie | Rutledge released the following statement earlier: Tonight, Arkansas voters made a historic decision by electing Leslie Rutledge, the State’s current Attorney General, to be the next Lieutenant Governor and Sarah Huckabee Sanders as Governor. Rutledge and Sanders will not only be the first women elected to these offices in Arkansas history, but together they will be the first women in the history of the United States to be independently elected to the offices of Governor and Lt. Governor of a state. “I’m honored that Arkansans have again placed their trust in me for a third time to continue to lead our great State forward,” said Attorney General Rutledge. “This historic moment would not be possible without our Lord and Savior Jesus Christ along with the constant support of my family, friends, supporters, and the amazing staff of the Attorney General’s Office who work tirelessly on behalf of Arkansans everyday. I’m excited to see my longtime friend Sarah Huckabee Sanders follow in the footsteps of her father. I wish her and her new administration great success and I look forward to working with her in the days to come.” Rutledge additionally extended her congratulations to her successor, Attorney General-elect Tim Griffin, and to other fellow Republicans who won tonight. Attorney General Rutledge, who is term-limited as attorney general, cleared a six-way primary race for Lt. Governor with 54% of the vote and raised over $2 million this cycle. As Arkansas's next Lt. Governor, Rutledge has pledged to continue promoting economic development and workforce education across the State. Rutledge was initially elected Attorney General in 2014, becoming The Natural State’s first Republican and first woman to ever hold the office. She was re-elected to the office in 2018. | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | | | PAID FOR BY LESLIE RUTLEDGE FOR LT. GOVERNOR P.O. BOX 144, LITTLE ROCK, AR 72203 | | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com Leslie Rutledge for Lt. Governor P.O. Box 144 Little Rock, Arkansas 72203 * USA

name: =?utf-8?Q?Nathaniel?=
subject: Thank You
disclaimer_text: paid for by Nathaniel Moran for Congress
body:
Wow! What a night! | | |
---
| | Friends,

Wow! What a night! I cannot thank you enough for placing your trust in me to go to Washington, D.C., and to represent each of the 766,987 citizens who live within the 17 counties in East Texas that comprise Congressional District 1. It's been a long journey since I grew up in that little mobile home on a Bible College campus outside Whitehouse, Texas. And now, it will be my honor to serve and represent so many friends, family, and neighbors- past, present, and future- in the United States Congress. It is genuinely humbling.

Kyna, our family, and I look forward to standing firm for your family. But, there is a tough and long fight ahead, and last night was just the beginning. Stand with us. **Let freedom ring!**
---
| |
---
|
With Deep Gratitude,
---
|
---
| Nathaniel Moran
Republican for U.S. Congress, TX-1

**Harriet Hageman wins, will fight for Wyoming and America First**
---
Republican Harriet Hageman tonight was elected as Wyoming’s lone member of the U.S. House of Representatives, capping a campaign in which she said the state needs someone in Congress to fight against the intrusive federal government.
Hageman issued the following statement:
“I am humbled and grateful for the confidence placed in me by the people of this great state. I am a 4th generation Wyomingite, I grew up on my family’s ranch outside Fort Laramie, and this state is in my blood. I know what it means to ‘Ride for the Brand’ and I will always stay loyal to the outfit that hired me – the citizens of Wyoming.
“The people of Wyoming made clear tonight that we’re not going to just sit and take it when the Biden administration drives our economy into a ditch, attacks the jobs in our resource industries, and meddles with every aspect of our daily lives. We’re sick of the Washington, D.C. elites caring about nothing but their own power, and we’re tired of having our voices ignored. When I get to Congress, I will put Wyoming and America first in all things, and I hope to join a strong, conservative Republican majority to set those priorities.” ###
---

clean_body: | | | | Harriet Hageman wins, will fight for Wyoming and America First Republican Harriet Hageman tonight was elected as Wyoming’s lone member of the U.S. House of Representatives, capping a campaign in which she said the state needs someone in Congress to fight against the intrusive federal government. Hageman issued the following statement: “I am humbled and grateful for the confidence placed in me by the people of this great state. I am a 4th generation Wyomingite, I grew up on my family’s ranch outside Fort Laramie, and this state is in my blood. I know what it means to ‘Ride for the Brand’ and I will always stay loyal to the outfit that hired me – the citizens of Wyoming. “The people of Wyoming made clear tonight that we’re not going to just sit and take it when the Biden administration drives our economy into a ditch, attacks the jobs in our resource industries, and meddles with every aspect of our daily lives. We’re sick of the Washington, D.C. elites caring about nothing but their own power, and we’re tired of having our voices ignored. When I get to Congress, I will put Wyoming and America first in all things, and I hope to join a strong, conservative Republican majority to set those priorities.” ### | | | | DONATE BY MAIL: Hageman for Wyoming P.O. Box 4157, Cheyenne, Wyoming 82003

I am so grateful for the opportunity to serve my country as the next Congressman for North Carolina's First Congressional District. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54336790/378199839/-102285132?refcode=fl_em_na_20221108thankyou1_dd_full_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjA4OWJkMC1lMzVmLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNThkMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yPbBuCzjMOXabJuevWXRzOReuQQyVuU2ieUcaLCTOU8=)

Hi Derek, it's Don Davis. I am so grateful for the opportunity to serve my country as the next Congressman for North Carolina's First Congressional District. I will do everything I can to protect Congressman G. K. Butterfield's legacy, expand on his progress, and improve the lives of eNC families. Thank you to everyone who pitched in to support the ongoing work of our organizers and more than 200 volunteers in every part of this district. We built a grassroots campaign to reach voters across NC-01, and our victory came from this hard work. I can't thank you enough for your support of my team. Last but certainly not least, I must thank my family—my wife, Yuvonka. I couldn't ask for a better partner to be running this race. To my sons, Ryan, Justin, and Kyler, I am so blessed to have you in my life, and I will make you proud. In Congress, I'll fight for every eastern North Carolinian. That includes ensuring that we do more to deliver for working families so they can thrive in this state. Thank you for everyone's sacrifice and willingness to fight the good fight. Thank you for letting me listen to, partner with, and deliver for this community. Congressman-Elect Don Davis | | Don Davis is a 5th generation North Carolinian, State Senator, veteran, and minister running for Congress in NC-01. Cook Political Report has ranked this race one of the tightest in the country.
**To keep the majority, Democrats need to win this seat.**

[](http://links.savecarolina.org/u/click?_t=13365b87b52649cc8d23e393a66fd89d&_m=bb4e0f9822294d689caa6e216dce0bee&_e=eceXVZuQnnwMTCxeUP3RM1WhDDTU_QgbuGuVdiDg_sCJloQtRGiLl4YZvjbQR18cNmxVuh6YNkUsVsTJfsjz75_A5SV3d9mES1psl40rASLa7ebpiq1QWze1M40q8gRVSXUpRh3PcSSnz5CFS5pgDo5OO8oWZ_7geDQ_-SLJd8n4hxfOf3Od-4iaUEulyQb_7Vl-zV6ROXvi7xMFpQ2A-UDdcfAv4JTUay1iGKl93avKp1eS7Qdahfq4KhazTaCmmlzElyOYGGROTJY9MtKudZSh9Ilu3Sc2NJ0stwMUxT3fkwm0_IBWNAoGWbXg1Yv-uSlEkW2Cgq3_JIEZVOS9Fsh-KvQ2q-GdloWHj3HiE6BN8RL3Byl3yw-UBB3Pb_Rbw1GYB0Kx-PsDXrrY5ismZ12DZD76utDCgVbeVT630ChcDEpvaMvS9kU-CnwUN57KmFritYINaQyS30Xdq3NcNLYqHrR2V64R65xlX2jP_3o%3D)
I am beyond grateful for your unwavering support throughout this election. **I mean it from the bottom of my heart when I say that we could not have done this without committed friends like you, Peter.**

Our victory tonight sends a clear message that North Carolinians are ready for a new direction in Washington. From an open southern border and rampant crime to skyrocketing inflation and crushing taxes, families everywhere are worse off under President Biden.

I pledge to fight the radical Biden agenda, defend conservative values, secure our southern border, stand with law enforcement, combat inflation, empower small businesses, fight for life, and protect your freedom.

Thank you for your support. You'll hear from me again soon, and I hope to hear from you too. I look forward to the journey ahead.

God Bless America,

body:
You made this possible.

| [](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=b7f3470b0c784dd3aebb06aa3c98b29f&_e=2Fr6GmIIjGC_8ZrdSuHUPxVWCyRzIJ33f2syAOXpZUDxlIH00uxFDznBtIUz3M3aQVMpBYQEmojQPk4pgEdNsQZNGD0YmpegscGdRxMuTL3gj01SBk3l1rEyfCaMgGlKTZdv4v5_VLkEb0PlcV1CiDPf06vcLl1HlPy88mshnTfZSyeL9RJdBxqs6Q_gf0vV9OkAIsscTHQt21bUGDnlozczHvLrW9heEa7kwEojLKk0z-hatjdONfuspv0hILqG0VgHBYeBr20RKtSt7zZg1MuktRkYDVTQFCjomUTvlKItLU8YCj3tnLBkFKlN4dbpQS-k3bxsXjvYV2PTwPJYD8fACnr3TJNZt6MQ-56oGdsba-RjIQX1i5Zem4LDRyBfrwPJbX9Ws6JdpAS_BMcNZBeTQL_MD5Bl8_VUE0DOCqTq9kQ_gAhNWzbzZ8WsAMakJ9FePK-Z5drDCO0GDEXLIDe2ZKgcOIE5C4bP3tACYtETpOign0bpPRJEXRuJnIFN)

Peter,

Tonight, we won for Ohio and all of America.

My mind is going a million miles an hour, and with everything racing through my head right now, I am completely overwhelmed with gratitude. So the one thing I have to say is, THANK YOU.

[](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=b7f3470b0c784dd3aebb06aa3c98b29f&_e=2Fr6GmIIjGC_8ZrdSuHUPxVWCyRzIJ33f2syAOXpZUDxlIH00uxFDznBtIUz3M3aQVMpBYQEmojQPk4pgEdNsQZNGD0YmpegscGdRxMuTL3gj01SBk3l1rEyfCaMgGlKTZdv4v5_VLkEb0PlcV1CiDPf06vcLl1HlPy88mshnTfZSyeL9RJdBxqs6Q_gf0vV9OkAIsscTHQt21bUGDnlozczHvLrW9heEa7kwEojLKk0z-hatjdONfuspv0hILqG0VgHBYeBr20RKtSt7zZg1MuktRkYDVTQFCjomUTvlKItLU8YCj3tnLBkFKlN4dbpQS-k3bxsXjvYV2PTwPJYD8fACnr3TJNZt6MQ-56oGdtgaxL1qM_4EbIHuLC95hlFyovZFTMWX1Y9lrPpCJ7Jc7AkJxEuvDWvleyoZaksLgFFYCcXmFAkrfE67UOa1XTxxgxiEgyKpKf7JxABRBQUyJLjwE_W0J6AiHntjGOHtcRUqavCDOD7yS4Vjz3jQcay)
We built this campaign from the ground up, and you helped me do it. The Establishment spent millions to defeat me, but you never wavered. I am so incredibly humbled and honored by all of your support.

_Hillbilly, author, Marine, entrepreneur -- and now, Senator. Who would've thought a hillbilly could one day be a U.S. Senator? Not me, never in my wildest dreams._

[](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=b7f3470b0c784dd3aebb06aa3c98b29f&_e=2Fr6GmIIjGC_8ZrdSuHUPxVWCyRzIJ33f2syAOXpZUDxlIH00uxFDznBtIUz3M3aQVMpBYQEmojQPk4pgEdNsQZNGD0YmpegscGdRxMuTL3gj01SBk3l1rEyfCaMgGlKTZdv4v5_VLkEb0PlcV1CiDPf06vcLl1HlPy88mshnTfZSyeL9RJdBxqs6Q_gf0vV9OkAIsscTHQt21bUGDnlozczHvLrW9heEa7kwEojLKk0z-hatjdONfuspv0hILqG0VgHBYeBr20RKtSt7zZg1MuktRkYDVTQFCjomUTvlKItLU8YCj3tnLBkFKlN4dbpQS-k3bxsXjvYV2PTwPJYD8fACnr3TJNZt6MQ-56oGdvC31zOVzxogAzuRbqDUdfAfZsY88nGdUV_Si5tUNnFREYLV4rF_NVs4mLx4he110zGLl0I--GVc1xTsSaTth-N9zJO8h0mzIR5M1_8CV85k1Qg-FUcrXSPaM4_ni4cFqYqsY62yZRxs_ZZGUeEp23p)
Growing up in Middletown, Ohio, my Mamaw taught me a lot. Tough love, discipline, resilience, and service, to name a few. It's time to get to work so I can pay it forward. I made you a lot of promises, and I intend to make good on those promises. I'm ready to give the people of Ohio a fighting chance.

[](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=b7f3470b0c784dd3aebb06aa3c98b29f&_e=2Fr6GmIIjGC_8ZrdSuHUPxVWCyRzIJ33f2syAOXpZUDxlIH00uxFDznBtIUz3M3aQVMpBYQEmojQPk4pgEdNsQZNGD0YmpegscGdRxMuTL3gj01SBk3l1rEyfCaMgGlKTZdv4v5_VLkEb0PlcV1CiDPf06vcLl1HlPy88mshnTfZSyeL9RJdBxqs6Q_gf0vV9OkAIsscTHQt21bUGDnlozczHvLrW9heEa7kwEojLKk0z-hatjdONfuspv0hILqG0VgHBYeBr20RKtSt7zZg1MuktRkYDVTQFCjomUTvlKItLU8YCj3tnLBkFKlN4dbpQS-k3bxsXjvYV2PTwPJYD8fACnr3TJNZt6MQ-56oGdusc8ZO1kgxV9muPbd9XqfugzWLg1w9u8AEaA79-xNwrSjwO1SAyA_5Q0vJVQEswWWtH-iJzfkxAPAVLvrXNb8LX9oOARB6LEPNradvEfvDjhjFwryI-Z0LUMccspkc4jjB3UUQWbEiKbIEXizj-o0R)
We're celebrating tonight, but the most challenging part is far from over. We've got a major obstacle ahead -- saving our democracy from the socialist agenda that's tearing us apart.

The day I'm sworn in is the day we stand up to Communist China, secure our Southern Border, and look out for the people left behind. It's not going to be easy, it's not going to happen in one day, and it's not going to happen if we don't work together.

[](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=b7f3470b0c784dd3aebb06aa3c98b29f&_e=2Fr6GmIIjGC_8ZrdSuHUPxVWCyRzIJ33f2syAOXpZUDxlIH00uxFDznBtIUz3M3aQVMpBYQEmojQPk4pgEdNsQZNGD0YmpegscGdRxMuTL3gj01SBk3l1rEyfCaMgGlKTZdv4v5_VLkEb0PlcV1CiDPf06vcLl1HlPy88mshnTfZSyeL9RJdBxqs6Q_gf0vV9OkAIsscTHQt21bUGDnlozczHvLrW9heEa7kwEojLKk0z-hatjdONfuspv0hILqG0VgHBYeBr20RKtSt7zZg1MuktRkYDVTQFCjomUTvlKItLU8YCj3tnLBkFKlN4dbpQS-k3bxsXjvYV2PTwPJYD8fACnr3TJNZt6MQ-56oGdtXEpNX9X4LMvfzMufYvqi6fygtOH_F94b-JTKn4mmZKbqqFbACz_htmTCVl1stVIMhpDJm-BoPMvxi7kFJBCRwbipAfITCjF7GiSuGpIXP1v5BZ4RmOP4ffDSzrW08_wBAhMz4wkuJFfpk_KLJXuAv)
It's so important that we reach across the aisle now, for a better tomorrow. One thing I will never do is leave anyone behind. We're working to improve the lives of every Ohioan and every American.

Thank you again for your support and commitment to our campaign. I am beyond excited for what's next.

[](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=b7f3470b0c784dd3aebb06aa3c98b29f&_e=2Fr6GmIIjGC_8ZrdSuHUPxVWCyRzIJ33f2syAOXpZUDxlIH00uxFDznBtIUz3M3aQVMpBYQEmojQPk4pgEdNsQZNGD0YmpegscGdRxMuTL3gj01SBk3l1rEyfCaMgGlKTZdv4v5_VLkEb0PlcV1CiDPf06vcLl1HlPy88mshnTfZSyeL9RJdBxqs6Q_gf0vV9OkAIsscTHQt21bUGDnlozczHvLrW9heEa7kwEojLKk0z-hatjdONfuspv0hILqG0VgHBYeBr20RKtSt7zZg1MuktRkYDVTQFCjomUTvlKItLU8YCj3tnLBkFKlN4dbpQS-k3bxsXjvYV2PTwPJYD8fACnr3TJNZt6MQ-56oGduSujH9AFmCQ1fiUvyo8_mTS-MxQ-8QIstnlp8j5qYFf7AoHlHsg1FjOQFcHeYbfWiWd-hpRxUi_qoN-wxMYFzLjDuL-riaHVV5_GX-nFwHxa2m81RGkgJkFtfX4aC2YXp--BqVScdXZeyrikDpoft2)
Without you, this victory wouldn't be possible.

God Bless,

JD Vance

**Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author.**
Ohio needs a true conservative in the U.S. Senate. It needs someone who understands how our
economic and government leaders conspire to make life harder for normal Americans.
Ohio needs JD Vance.

name: Betsy Johnson
subject: Thank you Oregon
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Run Betsy Run The Betsy Brigade needs you to recapture Oregon’s independent spirit
body:
[](https://www.runbetsyrun.com/?e=40b20d4397498f3af7dfb5987b4a98d3&utm_source=rbr&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=election_night_email&n=1) | Friend, When I chose to run for governor independent of any party, loyal only to Oregonians, I knew the odds were long. I didn’t care. I simply could not and would not give up on the state I love without one hell of a fight. And while the election outcome fell short of what we all wanted; I believe this campaign was a success. We made an impact. We sent a message that the majority of Oregonians, across party lines and no party at all, want a big change in our state. We sent the message that if you pursue ideological extremism and govern with arrogance and exclusion, a majority of Oregonians will rise up and push back. No matter who wins the election for governor, they should remember this message and govern for all of Oregon and all Oregonians regardless of zip code or party label. They should lead as an Oregonian first and as a Democrat or Republican second. Looking ahead, I intend to hold our elected officials accountable to their promises with no nonsense straight talk:
* Ending tent cities...putting cops and victims before criminals...and cleaning up our streets.
* Working harder at graduating kids from high school...than we do at legalizing dangerous drugs.
* Respecting jobs and job creators - whether you make wood chips, cow chips, computer chips, potato chips, or fish and chips.
* Making Oregon affordable once again for working families - the backbone of our state.

There are so many people to thank...every voter, volunteer and donor who had the courage to take a risk, not on me, but on Oregon...and to put our beautiful state ahead of party politics. Every dedicated Democrat and Republican, like Ted Kulongoski, Gordon Smith and Margaret Carter, and many others, who endorsed our campaign early on, showing us all how you can love Oregon more than any party label. Every Betsy Brigade volunteer in every county of our state...I will never forget your dedication and enthusiasm. And our terrific young campaign staff – you were awesome. Thank you for standing with me...we set out to change our state...and in the process...we also changed our state politics. In the end, campaigns shouldn’t simply be about the candidates...they should be about you. And our politics should be about how we work together to govern ourselves to make the lives of every Oregonian a little better each day. Those are the values my parents taught me...and why I will always believe in public service. Thank you from the bottom of my heart...see you down the road. Sincerely, Betsy
---
* * *
Paid for by Run Betsy Run The Betsy Brigade needs you to recapture Oregon’s independent spirit. But if you no longer want to receive emails from our campaign, you can update your email preferences or unsubscribe by [clicking here](https://www.runbetsyrun.com/unsubscribe?e=40b20d4397498f3af7dfb5987b4a98d3&utm_source=rbr&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=election_night_email&n=2). This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: Brenda Siegel
subject: The results are in
body:
| |
---
Friend, The results came in and it looks like Phil Scott will be the next Governor of Vermont. **** Democracy requires proper concessions, and I’d like to be the first to congratulate Governor Scott on winning a fourth term as Governor. He has shown an impressive bipartisan appeal, and l look forward to working with him to move Vermont forward. **** I’m proud of what we did together. I became the first bisexual woman and first single mom to be the Democratic nominee for Governor in Vermont’s history. One thing that stuck out to me throughout this race was how important it was. Not only that someone ran, but that person who did was someone with the knowledge, the experience, the guts and most importantly the lived experience to make clear what we face, what is going wrong and what work we all have to do to make it better. At some point in this campaign I said to my team. Let’s fight like hell to win, but also, let's fight like hell to win on the issues. Because losing on the issues is not an option. We 100% without fail won on the issues and we did not just win. We knocked that out of the park, beyond compare. What we have shown throughout this entire race is that Vermonters are worth fighting for and that there are a lot of wins, even in a long shot race. We ran an incredible, truly tireless (though we ARE tired), relentless, disciplined, tenacious campaign and we did absolutely everything that we could. We left ALL of it out of the field. I said over and over again throughout the race that this is a tough fight, but it is not even closest to the toughest I had to face in my life and I am still standing. And believe me when I say, I am still standing and ready to keep pushing forward. To those who are fearful of loss and so you don’t see the point in trying. We have to try. Please join me and all of us as we go forward. To all of you, who have to get up and fight anyways, even though it is hard. I see you and I will fight alongside you. I promise...I am going nowhere. To every Vermonter who said that I was their only hope, thank you...but that is not true. We are ALL each other's only hope. Together we have got this. Let’s keep moving. For my race, I am not gonna lie, This is a tough moment, but no way is it a loss. Just look at what we did together. It really is quite something. Thank you Vermont. And I am nowhere near done yet. In fact, I am only just getting started. I am incredibly thankful for every one of you who cast their ballots for me. Your support means the world to me. **** I will always treasure having the opportunity to speak with so many of you across the state about the issues that are impacting real Vermonters every day. **** I ran to fight alongside all of you: even if we didn’t see the result we wanted, we still have work to do to address our housing shortage, heal the overdose crisis, protect reproductive and civil liberties and take bold climate action. [I still need a little help making sure all of my hardworking staff gets paid what they’re owed. Anything you can give is greatly appreciated.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yx3cUQBGNTQ0X9M8L6qTDFU7Iynzl3_Afyky2941xwkiokSNZnd9liIwenGVg7m2URtnvDpWHuUvTYCfVc1g12iGXBHOtEcW8wNQEugJnG-pGi2AtLh53Wm2_yIMjp5FA4UH-GmX8eEledSEVCt209zZZ6meUsoUvofbclieHm6BSNU-mZT9GytIUGvXzcwgidckuNIALOdAC8g56VT7xITbNUhttVnPQFw-hXtuDm8CkKrx2v0AzN36iz9UXTMktBYehRH4xHBYyLr1W3TUIq/3r0/K0bL8hLDRGejEIQiL3D7Uw/h0/PJhkA3X0KoVOF7gQ6R7nYZQYuVaC8Kf1NXNL0m1AVIs)
---
Once again, I’d just like to thank you for everything you’ve done. You lifted me up and I will always be grateful. Thank you, Brenda Siegel
---

This is a MAJOR victory for higher wages! | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54336903/378200793/765663662?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzBmYjQzZC1lYjVmLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNThkMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pa73a5F7HWOOmaLtiNJj4hbLmbOq89CfQ76mtoS38QQ=&emci=d998aff2-755f-ed11-819c-002248258d2f&emdi=8c0fb43d-eb5f-ed11-819c-002248258d2f&ceid=561582) | Team, Nebraska voters made things crystal clear: A $15/hour minimum wage isn’t confined to coastal states — a livable wage is something voters from everywhere, of ALL parties, can get behind. **_Voters in Nebraska just approved the Fairness Project-backed ballot measure that will raise the minimum wage to $15/hour by 2026 with a yearly adjustment after that for inflation._** [POWER OUR WORK →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54336904/378200794/-1935922940?refcode=E19376-20221108-NEWinsRR-SB-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzBmYjQzZC1lYjVmLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNThkMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pa73a5F7HWOOmaLtiNJj4hbLmbOq89CfQ76mtoS38QQ=) This measure’s success has made history and means **1/5th of Nebraska’s workforce** — workers in roles like school aides, restaurant workers, home caregivers, and skilled assembly line workers — will benefit from a higher wage, child poverty will decline, _and so much more._ We know raising the minimum wage helps lift working people in America out of poverty. It’s why we partnered with a wide-ranging coalition of organizations and individuals across Nebraska to build awareness for this ballot measure campaign and turned out voters to support it. **Our work on passing minimum wage ballot measures has never been more important, team._And this victory brings our winning tally to NINE states where we’ve been able to help workers raise wages._** As the results from Nebraska show, working people in _every state_ need a livable wage. It’s an issue all voters across the political spectrum and socioeconomic status can get behind. And, friend — we’re committed to making it happen. [_**But we can’t do it without _you_ , team. If you can, will you donate today to help us run _and win_ more ballot measure campaigns to raise wages for working people in America?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54336905/378200795/-1935922940?refcode=E19376-20221108-NEWinsRR-SL-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzBmYjQzZC1lYjVmLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNThkMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pa73a5F7HWOOmaLtiNJj4hbLmbOq89CfQ76mtoS38QQ=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to the Fairness Project will go through immediately:_ | **[$15](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54336906/378200796/-1935922940?express_lane=true&refcode=E19376-20221108-NEWinsRR-EG-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzBmYjQzZC1lYjVmLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNThkMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pa73a5F7HWOOmaLtiNJj4hbLmbOq89CfQ76mtoS38QQ=)** | **[$25](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54336907/378200797/-1935922940?express_lane=true&refcode=E19376-20221108-NEWinsRR-EG-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzBmYjQzZC1lYjVmLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNThkMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pa73a5F7HWOOmaLtiNJj4hbLmbOq89CfQ76mtoS38QQ=)**

Voters in Nebraska just approved the Fairness Project-backed ballot measure that will raise the minimum wage to $15/hour by 2026 with a yearly adjustment after that for inflation. = This measure’s success has made history and means 1/5th of Nebraska’s workforce — workers in roles like school aides, restaurant workers, home caregivers, and skilled assembly line workers — will benefit from a higher wage, child poverty will decline, and so much more. We know raising the minimum wage helps lift working people in America out of poverty. It’s why we partnered with a wide-ranging coalition of organizations and individuals across Nebraska to build awareness for this ballot measure campaign and turned out voters to support it. Our work on passing minimum wage ballot measures has never been more important, team.And this victory brings our winning tally to NINE states where we’ve been able to help workers raise wages. As the results from Nebraska show, working people in every state need a livable wage. It’s an issue all voters across the political spectrum and socioeconomic status can get behind. name: Kelly Hall, Executive Director
subject: CHOICE WINS: Groundbreaking victories for reproductive rights in Vermont AND Michigan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Fairness Project The Fairness Project
body:
Not only have these two measures made history, but now the reproductive rights of millions of Michiganders and Vermonters will be explicitly protected in each state’s constitutions! | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54337050/378201547/765663662?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTE1MzQxYi1mMDVmLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNThkMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x5Bv80vpfkl2ZEBWRrl8iSVmW1vQ26nhIe7TJOimPJo=&emci=da44298d-7b5f-ed11-819c-002248258d2f&emdi=7515341b-f05f-ed11-819c-002248258d2f&ceid=561582) | **HUGE news out of Michigan:_The Fairness Project-backed ballot measure has WON, upending the 1931 abortion ban on the books and protecting reproductive freedom in the state _for good.__** Joining our Vermont campaign, which declared victory earlier tonight, our Michigan campaign is also making history. Now, the reproductive rights of millions of people in Michigan and Vermont will be explicitly protected in each state’s constitutions — **meaning _no attacks_ from the anti-choice minority will stand in the way of a person’s right to choose.** **Michigan and Vermont are the first states in the nation to protect reproductive rights in their constitutions. Passing these reproductive health ballot measures paves the way for other states to do the very same. ** **[POWER OUR WORK →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54337051/378201548/-1935922940?refcode=E19379-20221108-VTandMIWinsRR-SB-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTE1MzQxYi1mMDVmLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNThkMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x5Bv80vpfkl2ZEBWRrl8iSVmW1vQ26nhIe7TJOimPJo=)** We knew there was a real chance that this extremist-packed SCOTUS would overturn _Roe v. Wade_ this year, so our team identified Michigan as a crucial state to protect abortion access via ballot measure. _But when Roe fell, we knew we had to do more, so we teamed up with Vermont for Reproductive Liberty to do the same._ Partnering with grassroots organizers and activists in both states to launch and support campaigns provided the energy and drive to ensure the people’s will to see these measures on the ballot was successful. **Michiganders and Vermonters turned out in massive numbers to uphold the right of reproductive freedom for all. It’s a victory for direct democracy and the power of ordinary voters.** However, we know anti-choice extremists will see these key purple state victories and use whatever means necessary to obstruct the codification of reproductive rights protections in their own states. Their attacks on our efforts will only intensify as we partner with organizers and activists in other states to put reproductive freedom measures on the ballot. **[We’re fighting back against anti-abortion extremists and doing everything we can to ensure reproductive freedom ballot measures win in 2023 and 2024. Will you contribute now to supercharge our efforts and power our campaigns to victory?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54337052/378201549/-1935922940?refcode=E19379-20221108-VTandMIWinsRR-SL-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTE1MzQxYi1mMDVmLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNThkMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x5Bv80vpfkl2ZEBWRrl8iSVmW1vQ26nhIe7TJOimPJo=)** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to the Fairness Project will go through immediately:_ | **[$15](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54337053/378201550/-1935922940?express_lane=true&refcode=E19379-20221108-VTandMIWinsRR-EG-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTE1MzQxYi1mMDVmLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNThkMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x5Bv80vpfkl2ZEBWRrl8iSVmW1vQ26nhIe7TJOimPJo=)** | **[$25](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54337054/378201551/-1935922940?express_lane=true&refcode=E19379-20221108-VTandMIWinsRR-EG-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTE1MzQxYi1mMDVmLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNThkMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x5Bv80vpfkl2ZEBWRrl8iSVmW1vQ26nhIe7TJOimPJo=)**

name: Bryan Steil, Congressman
subject: Vote Today!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN, INC
body:
Friend, Election Day is finally here! Have you voted yet?
Hi Friend,It's Election Day. Get out and VOTE! Today is our chance to put Wisconsin and our country back on track.I just voted here in Janesville. Have you voted yet?**_Help me bring a[ Red Wave](https://email.bryansteil.com/t/j-l-vklllul-idtjvlhlh-r/) to Wisconsin by voting today! _**[Learn where to vote HERE.](https://email.bryansteil.com/t/j-l-vklllul-idtjvlhlh-y/)**_We can take back the House, Senate, and the Governor's seat. We must show up to the polls and vote Red down the ticket, especially Ron Johnson for Senate and Tim Michels for Governor._**Please encourage your family and friends to vote; if you haven't already, bring them to the polls!If you've already voted, please spread our message to your family, friends, and neighbors.I hope to see you at our Election Night Party at the Brat Stop in Kenosha tonight! Doors open at 8:00 PM. Thank you,Bryan
--
**Bryan Steil**
Congressman [Learn Where to Vote](https://email.bryansteil.com/t/j-l-vklllul-idtjvlhlh-j/) [](https://email.bryansteil.com/t/j-l-vklllul-idtjvlhlh-t/)[](https://email.bryansteil.com/t/j-l-vklllul-idtjvlhlh-i/)[](https://email.bryansteil.com/t/j-l-vklllul-idtjvlhlh-d/) [ Forward ](https://steilforwisconsininc.forwardtomyfriend.com/j-idtjvlhlh-C89B6A88-vklllul-l-k) | PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN, INC

We finally made it, Peter. Polls are officially closed, wrapping up one of the most historic midterm elections in a generation.

While we haven't crossed the finish line quite yet — counting the ballots will take a while and the race is still too close to call — you should take solace in the fact that your effort, energy, and determination has already made a _profound_ difference.

When the winner is announced, and **we officially flip CA-27 Blue,** it will be because of you and the hope and hard work you poured into it.

As votes are tallied, initial results confirm what we always anticipated — this race is going to be one of the closest in the country. The _thousands_ of doors you knocked, the _tens of thousands_ of phone calls you made, the _millions_ in grassroots money we raised is literally paying off right now. **And we didn't need a dime of corporate special interest money to get it done.**

**I couldn't be more proud of this incredible grassroots team.**

I know you're anxious to get results — trust me, I am too — I need you to keep fighting just a bit longer. Democracy only works when we fight hard to protect it, which is exactly what we need to do until **every single ballot is counted and every voice is heard.**

So, get some rest, Peter, you certainly earned it. We will fill you in as soon as our team has any updates.

From the bottom of my heart, thank you for everything.

— Christy

name: Joy Hofmeister
subject: Oklahoma still belongs to you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF JOY HOFMEISTER 2022 Friends of Joy Hofmeister 2022
body:
---
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54337077/378201661/1127668677?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTY0NTZmMC1mMDVmLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNThkMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nOSXudoqdJPDfGYrXN-xrv5xA4fWa8hYk-v5qUwfMf0=&emci=89d6639f-d85f-ed11-819c-002248258d2f&emdi=696456f0-f05f-ed11-819c-002248258d2f&ceid=13997030)
---
Peter,

Will Rogers, one of Oklahoma’s favorite sons, once said, "You've got to go out on a limb sometimes because that's where the fruit is."

I want to thank you all for going out on a limb with me. Even though the results were not in our favor tonight, never forget that your voice is necessary and important.

A few moments ago, I spoke with Governor Stitt and congratulated him on a second term. I also offered to work with him, in whatever capacity I'm able, for the good of the state we both love.

This hard-fought election has proven that Oklahomans with different political perspectives can carve a path built on common sense, respect for one another, and working hand-in-hand to get things done. These are the values you've shared with me as I've traveled across this state. And it's been the honor of my life to champion your values and believe with you in hope for change.

The disappointment we feel tonight will linger, but hope will resurface in the days ahead. And when it does, I invite you to join me in continuing the work to build the communities we all deserve.

This campaign was always about more than partisan politics. It was about hometowns and standing up for what is right. It was about reclaiming our state for our children, families and businesses. It was about putting Team Oklahoma first.

Tomorrow that journey continues anew.

Your state, your government does not belong to any one party or one politician. It still belongs to you.

Thank you for everything!

Sincerely,

Joy Hofmeister

name: Jocelyn Benson
subject: We won!
disclaimer_text:
Paid for by
Jocelyn Benson for Secretary of State
body:
Friend,

I may not be the first to tell you this good news, but I want to share how pleased I am to have been elected to serve another term as your secretary of state. Thank you Michigan! Because of you, not only can I continue working on your behalf, but more importantly democracy has prevailed!

In this election, democracy was on the ballot. Our right to vote was on the ballot. And tonight, democracy won here in Michigan because of you.
You showed the world that Michigan voters will vote for truth over lies. They will vote for facts over conspiracy theories. And they know the value of real results over empty promises.

There are still many races still to be called nationally – including many that are vital to preserving our democracy – but as we wait for those results, I want to reflect on what we have done together here in Michigan.

Democracy won tonight because of the thousands of people who supported this campaign, who knocked on doors or donated what they could to help us reach every citizen in this state with the clear and simple message: Democracy is on the ballot.

Democracy won tonight because we came together as Americans and Michiganders to stand for the basic ideals of our country - truth, equality, and the simple promise of one person, one vote.

Our victory is the result of Democrats, Republicans and Independents across our state making it clear that they want a government that works for everyone and a democracy where every vote is counted and every voice is heard.

Four years ago I stood before you as we envisioned a new day for democracy.

A day in which our government would work for everyone and our elections could be a model for the rest of the country. Thanks to the hard work of so many we have made that vision a reality.

In just four short years we completely modernized the Secretary of State’s Office, eliminating long waits at branch offices so you can be in and out in 20 minutes or less.

In just four short years we transformed our democracy, ensuring more Michigan citizens could vote and leading to the highest turnout elections in our state’s history.

So while I say, thank you to so many, I also must say that our work is not finished.

In the days and months ahead the future of our democracy will continue to face challenges from conspiracy theorists and election deniers who are not going away. They may refuse to acknowledge the true and accurate results of elections here in Michigan and around the country, or try to spread more lies and conspiracies and undermine the will of the people.

But know this: I will not back down. No matter how many threats, lies, deceit, false rhetoric or vitriol they throw at us, WE will not back down. And in the days, weeks, months, and years ahead, we are going to continue marching forward together.

Together, we will build on our successes and protect the voices of all voters. Together, we will defend our democracy in support of that basic promise that in America, every vote is counted and every voice is heard. We must always remember that truth is on our side, the law is on our side, history is on our side, and tonight, we learned once again that the will of the people is on our side.

So thank you, Michigan. Thank you for standing up for our democracy. Thank you for being in this fight.

Thank you!
-Jocelyn
[https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]

Jocelyn Benson for Secretary of State
PO Box 21368
Detroit, MI 48221
United States

name: Team Patti
subject: **REMINDER** Cast your vote TODAY!
body:
Today is the day to cast your vote and make your voice heard.
[](https://tompattiforcongresscd-09.cmail20.com/t/y-l-niyilul-dlhtkukljd-r/) **Reminder: Today's the day to FLIP THE HOUSE:** Here's what you need to know about voting in the 2022 General Election!Today is the day to vote in the 2022 General Election. Today we find out the future of California's 9th Congressional District. This election is critical to taking back the House and the choice could not be more clear. [](https://tompattiforcongresscd-09.cmail20.com/t/y-l-niyilul-dlhtkukljd-y/) [FIND YOUR POLLING LOCATION](https://tompattiforcongresscd-09.cmail20.com/t/y-l-niyilul-dlhtkukljd-j/) If you want to vote but are unsure where or how, you can visit the California Secretary of State website to find your location and what you need with you to cast your vote. [FIND YOUR POLLING LOCATION](https://tompattiforcongresscd-09.cmail20.com/t/y-l-niyilul-dlhtkukljd-i/) Nancy Pelosi and her gang of radicals are becoming increasingly extreme and the only way to put a stop to their plans is to **VOTE** **REPUBLICAN**. Radical leadership has created an uncontrolled homelessness crisis, skyrocketing cost-of-living, and unsafe streets. But it's not too late, together we can shift California and return our great state to its glory days. [FIND YOUR POLLING LOCATION](https://tompattiforcongresscd-09.cmail20.com/t/y-l-niyilul-dlhtkukljd-d/) It is vital that we every person get out and vote today. One vote can make the difference between further demise of our state and a free California that we dream of. **Visiting your local voting location is the best way to let Nancy Pelosi and her lackey, Josh Harder know that enough is enough.**[__**Today is our chance to change the course of Californian history, will you click here to find out how to cast your vote for Republican Tom Patti?**__](https://tompattiforcongresscd-09.cmail20.com/t/y-l-niyilul-dlhtkukljd-k/) Thank you for your dedication to the California Dream,
Team Patti [DONATE NOW >>](https://tompattiforcongresscd-09.cmail20.com/t/y-l-niyilul-dlhtkukljd-u/) [](https://tompattiforcongresscd-09.cmail20.com/t/y-l-niyilul-dlhtkukljd-o/)[](https://tompattiforcongresscd-09.cmail20.com/t/y-l-niyilul-dlhtkukljd-b/) | [Preferences](https://tompattiforcongresscd-09.updatemyprofile.com/y-niyilul-145B0788-dlhtkukljd-n) | [Unsubscribe](https://tompattiforcongresscd-09.cmail20.com/t/y-u-niyilul-dlhtkukljd-p/)

subject: GREAT news out of South Dakota
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Fairness Project The Fairness Project
body:
This victory means over 40,000 South Dakotans without coverage will now have access to health care! | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54337123/378201997/765663662?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWFjNDI2MS1mNDVmLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNThkMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=miMRbxh0uJov0Y-eUm-0qKYRpjWbkccpsbvB_R-fVrc=&emci=20ce39e3-755f-ed11-819c-002248258d2f&emdi=f1ac4261-f45f-ed11-819c-002248258d2f&ceid=561582) | Team, _**In a significant victory for affordable and accessible health care, South Dakota voters have overwhelmingly voted YES on the Fairness Project-backed ballot measure Amendment D, expanding Medicaid to the thousands of South Dakotans in need of this critical coverage!**_ This victory means over 40,000 South Dakotans without coverage will now have access to health care, bringing hundreds of millions of dollars back into the state to create more than 4,000 new jobs while protecting remote, rural hospitals. Our team worked with a broad coalition of local partners, including doctors, teachers, and farmers, to win this Medicaid ballot measure, despite strong opposition from obstructionist South Dakota politicians and outside special interest groups. The decision by South Dakotans to approve expanding Medicaid underscores the importance of proactively working in red states to help change the lives of working people in America. _This victory makes South Dakota the SEVENTH red or purple state where Fairness Project has successfully used a ballot measure to win Medicaid expansion when extremist officials refused to roll out lifesaving care to their constituents after the passage of the Affordable Care Act in 2009._ **[POWER OUR WORK →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54337124/378201998/-1935922940?refcode=E19377-20221108-SDWinsRR-SB-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWFjNDI2MS1mNDVmLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNThkMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=miMRbxh0uJov0Y-eUm-0qKYRpjWbkccpsbvB_R-fVrc=)** **However, the success in South Dakota is not the end of our work, team.** 11 states still remain in the fight to expand Medicaid to working people in America, so there is still much to do. clean_body: This victory means over 40,000 South Dakotans without coverage will now have access to health care! | | Team, In a significant victory for affordable and accessible health care, South Dakota voters have overwhelmingly voted YES on the Fairness Project-backed ballot measure Amendment D, expanding Medicaid to the thousands of South Dakotans in need of this critical coverage! This victory means over 40,000 South Dakotans without coverage will now have access to health care, bringing hundreds of millions of dollars back into the state to create more than 4,000 new jobs while protecting remote, rural hospitals. Our team worked with a broad coalition of local partners, including doctors, teachers, and farmers, to win this Medicaid ballot measure, despite strong opposition from obstructionist South Dakota politicians and outside special interest groups. The decision by South Dakotans to approve expanding Medicaid underscores the importance of proactively working in red states to help change the lives of working people in America. This victory makes South Dakota the SEVENTH red or purple state where Fairness Project has successfully used a ballot measure to win Medicaid expansion when extremist officials refused to roll out lifesaving care to their constituents after the passage of the Affordable Care Act in 2009. = However, the success in South Dakota is not the end of our work, team. 11 states still remain in the fight to expand Medicaid to working people in America, so there is still much to do. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to the Fairness Project will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you for supporting our most urgent work, Fairness Project Campaigns Team Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, our team at the Fairness Project has won 24 people-powered ballot measure campaigns since 2016, changing over 18 million lives by expanding health care, raising wages, guaranteeing paid leave, and ending predatory lending directly at the ballot box when politicians refuse to act. Your support allows us to make this progress possible.** = = Contributions or gifts to the Fairness Project are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions to the Fairness Project support its many efforts nationwide and any focus is at the Fairness Project’s sole discretion. Contributions will not necessarily be used to support activity in any one state. You can request to get only the most important emails from our team , or you can . name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: The most personal email I’ve ever sent you
body:
This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the
[View this message in your browser](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z81jsva9a04pbilbchpp1q0q2olflkuqp1dnrlu8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t56egn4tblm1on4t1kmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf8o5lmpir9dbgsarb4cpgc1rj1pb6c1hb1ptkcipj8ob0epgeddlgmqp72odgcurt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6cooj5ddks1rm2phh6apm2ptgmlin48d245p25oh4cdhmep74shhmcoj24no)
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvf21gv0q8nhft7robfhbatbhq6dt1elic09mjc8_rp22sh2s8i66or7cjie8or6c9h2bs)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation 's mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrgu1ci66kh2l3hsm8a0ehpnb03l8pq7qrn3ossg_rp22sh2s8i66or7cjie8or6c9h2bs)

**_Now I 'll share my story_... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking.

We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I've dealt with racism... _**I 've even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zme3jlqc84kdkj6f8ve61s3bqmib6ldrtbg67le0_rp22sh2s8i66or7cjie8or6c9h2bs)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I 'm not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT 's efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zg0qsjnksdplckv460mqitfrnt5sccnd88dsh7g0_rp22sh2s8i66or7cjie8or6c9h2bs)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmnkq5d5u5l382ubigbmcpc0op4pfek6i6jnn3n8_rp22sh2s8i66or7cjie8or6c9h2bs)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2e4637aaofq2tgn7fqadknbp7jrahvd19rhodu0_rp22sh2s8i66or7cjie8or6c9h2bs)

* **Teaching History: **Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation teach real American history by donating here >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z67mv5ng8v04ebjat3p2rkqbvbkqggkfe236p988_rp22sh2s8i66or7cjie8or6c9h2bs)

* **Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore.

The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. [_**Please support BLEXIT 's events and help us spread our message by donating here >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8aemugfe7m8d6mr6khhdmtvele2f47bpsu8oce0_rp22sh2s8i66or7cjie8or6c9h2bs)

What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor.

This is personal to me.

I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z86lhmshpvkft32qvqj9rt1n5s359kehnlnhfelo_rp22sh2s8i66or7cjie8or6c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2e2gosj8it62st1n3f5jseeq8bau8660ofrgllg_rp22sh2s8i66or7cjie8or6c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zt3c08jdvemhij8a1lmsjjjkb9ert21uco8tea1o_rp22sh2s8i66or7cjie8or6c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zu1p1e263cf6chnte66jrnbpco3bbtup568rlm7o_rp22sh2s8i66or7cjie8or6c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgrdicm4vrosshevvp2h78356bfpc3ii95r87o7g_rp22sh2s8i66or7cjie8or6c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1ao0m31rt438f5vhf8mnrtsabelvgpcm3jccpd0_rp22sh2s8i66or7cjie8or6c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zc1hsef6g6tqplfpm5smo2d6tmlhm3biqdt1asno_rp22sh2s8i66or7cjie8or6c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9v3um0i91loqptql9a78guq67ajib0oahdfkuk8_rp22sh2s8i66or7cjie8or6c9h2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkkivv7u6snpdl32ndk69nii98oj6j4nr7sf3g2o_rp22sh2s8i66or7cjie8or6c9h2bs)

This is my last message to you before you close this email.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment.

My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause.

[_**Please consider making the most generous donation you can today by clicking here.**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztcf4l0ko42c1hgnfsu01va049vq7khm4k5545r0_rp22sh2s8i66or7cjie8or6c9h2bs)

Thank you, Friend.

Candace Owens
President
BLEXIT Foundation
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Trumptrainnews, [please use this preferences page](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/prefs/9z2zb5oc4c0ug8sc97k1qjj43phg5p7ff54742r22bg).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zaafcmm91mhekdilihv04no8n2ohemt92tehah7g_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or3ctie9p33cph649fg)

name: American Briefing
subject: Lincoln’s secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Eucli
| | | This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zh3cp2o0lm5c043kuvq04to4gfgou7mlrsfdcaqo_rp22sh2s8i66or7cjie8or2cth2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zq9lds3autahb73pfqjesneqnt4bopvavusqfo8g_rp22sh2s8i66or7cjie8or2cth2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zqvnapl19iv3qrths4lufm7tabb1936f5rfkaor8_rp22sh2s8i66or7cjie8or2cth2bs)

clean_body: Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Eucli | | | This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | Dear Fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.” By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.” Through“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,” you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life. | | Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group. ** You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.** Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. | | | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. name: Matt Whitaker
subject: 50 FOIAs for the FBI
body:
| | | Peter, Former President Trump is going on the offensive and appears to be launching a full-scale fight against the Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI). We here at the America First Policy Institute are joining the fight. I'm sure you already know the backstory: The FBI recently raided former President Trump's home in what could be politically-motivated. This ordeal should paint a clear picture for us: The deep state is real, and we can't afford to sit around playing defense while the FBI raids a former President's home. **_We MUST go on the offensive._** [**And that 's exactly what I plan to do. Will you help me?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61826248:65P3m6GRN:m:1:3317145305:31979362ABB901075E96193408E0CAD2:r) _Our country is at risk of crumbling into a banana republic run by the most radical leftists in America and an invulnerable deep state. WE HAVE NO CHOICE BUT TO FIGHT BACK!_ When the news broke, our entire team sprung into action to respond. Within 48 hours, we filed more than 50 Freedom of Information Act requests to expose the Biden Administration and find out who knew what and when. But I assure you, the Department of Justice (DOJ) is not going to hand over information easily, and we may have to battle with the DOJ for months or even YEARS to uncover the truth fully. **We CANNOT sustain our efforts without you ... ** **[Will you chip in before it's to help ensure our efforts can continue?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61826248:65P3m6GRN:m:1:3317145305:31979362ABB901075E96193408E0CAD2:r)**[ ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61826248:65P3m6GRN:m:1:3317145305:31979362ABB901075E96193408E0CAD2:r) Let me back up. My name is Matt Whitaker... I was appointed acting United States Attorney General under former President Trump. In that role, I protected Law and Order both at home and abroad. Today I am Co-Chair of the Center for Law & Justice at the America First Policy Institute, where we strive to protect and preserve the rule of law in this great Nation. Together, we will fight back against the radical Left and end its unjust weaponization of the FBI. The team at America First Policy Institute is the best in the Nation, and we're ready to make a HUGE difference for our country--ESPECIALLY when it comes to uncovering the truth regarding the FBI raid. [**I hope you 'll consider sending in a donation of $25, $35, or $50 today. ** ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61826248:65P3m6GRN:m:1:3317145305:31979362ABB901075E96193408E0CAD2:r) Sincerely, Matt Whitaker Co-Chair, Center for Law & Justice America First Policy Institute P.S. We've seen it time and time again. Castro's Cuba. Stalin's Russia. Nazi Germany. Mao's China. Great nations fall to tyranny when governments weaponize law enforcement against patriots and political opponents. [**I 'll fight with every breath to make sure that America doesn't have the same fate. Will you? ** ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61826248:65P3m6GRN:m:1:3317145305:31979362ABB901075E96193408E0CAD2:r)
---
[**DONATE NOW!**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61826248:65P3m6GRN:m:1:3317145305:31979362ABB901075E96193408E0CAD2:r)
---
| | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61826248:65P3m6GRN:m:1:3317145305:31979362ABB901075E96193408E0CAD2:r)
---

name: Tom Brejcha
subject: 9 Felonies for Exposing Planned Parenthood
body:
I'm writing this letter to you today because, quite frankly, David Daleiden cannot.
Dear Friend, I'm writing this letter to you today because, quite frankly, David Daleiden cannot. You may remember David as the undercover journalist who spent 30 months investigating and capturing video evidence of Planned Parenthood 's top leadership --- medical directors, national program directors, even its Senior Director of Medical Services -- **callously negotiating the harvesting and sale of aborted baby body parts.** **And now, he’s been charged with nine bogus felonies.** **[Which is why I’m asking you to make an emergency donation to the DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND right away.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zc9loo2d6kbo1ndf42tqd15jse5aedu3ek7ml8fo_rp22sh2s8i66or7cjie8or6chh2bs)** You see, after David released the shocking videos of the illegal and disgusting actions of abortion executives, Kamala Harris, then California's Attorney General, colluded with Planned Parenthood to file felony charges against David... _**... Kamala Harris even ordered the California Department of Justice to raid David's home and confiscate his unpublished videos.**_ I won't sugarcoat it. If not cleared of these charges, David faces steep fines and years in state penitentiary and the consequences of being a convicted felon. While Kamala Harris --- a bought-and-paid-for ally of the abortion industry --- is sitting one heartbeat away from the presidency. That's the bad news. But here's the good news... David is fighting back. In fact, he's taking another opportunity to drag more of Planned Parenthood's dark criminality into the spotlight with two new federal lawsuits. That's right. The Thomas More Society has filed a federal civil rights lawsuit in California on behalf of David against former California Attorney General and now VicePresident Kamala Harris for prosecuting David in bad faith, twisting and perverting California's anti-eavesdropping law to persecute a citizen journalist because of his political views. Then the Thomas More Society filed a defamation (libel) lawsuit in federal court in New York against Planned Parenthood, which said David created a "fake" and "false" "smear campaign" against Planned Parenthood. In other words, the best defense is a good offense. The truth is we could no longer let David suffer such a trampling of his free speech and due process rights without a counterattack. The timing couldn't be more important. This is a critical opportunity to put Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and the rest of the abortion industry on trial for conspiring to silence David in order to cover-up their illegal activities. **[That's where your emergency donation to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND comes in --- by giving today you can stand with David in his hour of need.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zj7j284rpe2f22lha7t6ruh8mvvnj1ou18j14dvg_rp22sh2s8i66or7cjie8or6chh2bs)** The reality is. . . You couldn't be there when David entered the dark underbelly of the abortion industry --- sitting across the table from abortionists haggling over the price of baby body parts with cold-blooded clarity... "I want a Lamborghini." You couldn't be there as David saw with his own eyes the preborn children who had been killed with great precision and delicacy to preserve their organs for maximum profit. You couldn't be there when the videos were released and Kamala Harris and Planned Parenthood conspired to crush David with trumped up legal charges and an armed raid on his home in which they seized laptops, hard-drives, and recording equipment. And you couldn't be there with David (our criminal defense team was there) when he voluntarily appeared in both Texas and California for booking and processing --- fingerprinted and photographed for a mugshot like a common criminal. But, now, this is the reality... there is something you can do. **[You can make an emergency donation to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND to help vindicate this pro-life hero.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4s2l8ofiksmmrs4bvifrola8bpcc2eqvdlvorn0_rp22sh2s8i66or7cjie8or6chh2bs)** My name is Tom Brejcha. I'm the president and chief counsel of the Thomas More Society --- a not-for-profit law firm underwriting and helping to spearhead David's criminal defense. The Thomas More Society is proud to have defended many renowned pro-life and religious leaders in America's pro-life movement such as Joe, Ann, and Eric Scheidler, the Pro-Life Action League, Shawn Carney and 40 Days for Life, Abby Johnson, the Susan B. Anthony List, David Bereit, Lila Rose and Live Action, Students for Life, Sidewalk Advocates for Life, Created Equal, former Kansas Attorney General Phill Kline, the March for Life, and many more. Because when dark forces like Planned Parenthood unleash their full might to legally, financially, and personally destroy our clients --- **we fight back.** I have to tell you, despite all that David is facing, his spirits remain high. Of course, I've never known anyone in this kind of position who didn't feel an empty pit in his stomach. But David's not giving up. His willingness to fight back is a true profile in Pro-Life courage. Now I'll get right down to it... **We anticipate David's legal defense will cost us more than $6 million. That's right, SIX MILLION DOLLARS.** In addition to the criminal case and the new federal civil rights and defamation lawsuits, we're currently representing David in THREE other cases.
* The civil lawsuit filed by Planned Parenthood where we are appealing the jury's verdict, along with the judge's order permanently banning David from doing any more undercover journalism against Planned Parenthood. Recently, we posted a $700,000 appeal bond to keep Planned Parenthood’s nasty collection agents from harassing him with collection agents and even seizing his belongings. We’re fighting back, but we’ll need your help.

* The civil lawsuit brought by the National Abortion Federation and the "gag order" injunction that still prohibits David from releasing any more of his video evidence exposing Planned Parenthood's illegal fetal tissue business. And now, in light of the Planned Parenthood civil lawsuit, NAF has moved for summary judgment – they want a ruling against David without a trial at all!

* And finally, the civil lawsuit filed by Planned Parenthood personnel in federal court in Seattle, where we just achieved a victory for a second time on appeal, but it appears we may need at least a third victory on appeal before this case ends.

That's why David needs your financial support today. **[And that's why I'm praying you will donate $35 or more to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND right away.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1gsh48ee5kud2i80fjdjqlkhmk4mmish891tcu0_rp22sh2s8i66or7cjie8or6chh2bs)** I won't guess how much you're able to send today. Whether it's $35, $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, $1,000 or more... ... I will only say that time is of the essence. So I do ask that you make your donation as soon as you can. **This truly is a "David versus Goliath" type of battle --- with Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and the radical left arrayed against our "David."** It's a grave injustice that David is the one being hit with felony charges and massive civil penalties while Planned Parenthood (so far, at least) has gone unpunished. By clearing David of these charges... you and I can allow him to continue with his incredibly important lifesaving work. Remember, over 12 million people on YouTube alone watched the shocking footage he captured. Since that time, 26 states --- over half the country -- have moved to strip Planned Parenthood of taxpayer funding. It's no wonder Planned Parenthood and their allies want to destroy David. They'd love to see him rotting away in penitentiary rather than exposing their criminal and inhumane activities. You and I cannot let that happen. **[So please don't delay. Donate $35, $50, $100, or more to stand with David Daleiden today.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z51cvbkb6jbuh7968tedh41nsrr4fpih5cr97ss0_rp22sh2s8i66or7cjie8or6chh2bs)** I've asked my staff to let me know as soon as we get it so I can let David know that you're standing with him. I know he'll be deeply touched by your generous support. May God Bless You, Tom Brejcha
President & Chief Counsel P.S. Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and their allies want to destroy David. They'd love to see him rotting away in penitentiary rather than exposing their criminal, ghoulish activities. You and I cannot let that happen. Can I count on you to support the official criminal defense of David Daleiden? **[David is a pro-life hero. Will you make a generous donation to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND of $35, $50, $100 or more to stop this attempt to crush him?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmecjv0dgq5hneclei7vp124nlmt94f4a3078d5o_rp22sh2s8i66or7cjie8or6chh2bs)** [**DONATE**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdauj5ab8tk94k9hejj2o7ff5gl8rb57c1jovvso_rp22sh2s8i66or7cjie8or6chh2bs) [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zc9d5o5jup1ha8divn8dum8mhcd2iv5c8th6goh0_rp22sh2s8i66or7cjie8or6chh2bs) The Thomas More Society is a not-for-profit, national public interest law firm dedicated to restoring respect in law for life, family, and religious liberty. [Please consider supporting our efforts with a generous, tax-deductible donation.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zimr66j452kjb8arp3t8edhqcdtdfrr5m402a8i0_rp22sh2s8i66or7cjie8or6chh2bs) © Thomas More Society | [www.thomasmoresociety.org](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z922rtcskn9ddtp4rcdj0nvllv1ec8b8sej6d2q0_rp22sh2s8i66or7cjie8or6chh2bs)
309 W. Washington Street Suite 1250, Chicago, IL 60606
---

name: Brent Bozell
subject: BREAKING - FBI interfered with the 2020 election
body:
This is serious, and it confirms what we all know deep down - the FBI and deep state are actively involved in suppressing information online, including the Hunter Biden story before the 2020 election. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0086%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=Vr%2fO78RSbSs2CvaH22AVlQ&sysid=1)
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c49917%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=djf77PQz0nT4u3bfVVMOCQ&sysid=1)
Friend,

This is serious, and it confirms what we all know deep down - **the FBI and deep state are actively involved in suppressing information online, including the Hunter Biden story before the 2020 election.**

Read this paragraph from The Intercept article on the leaked documents. Tell me if your jaw doesn’t drop.

_“According to records filed in federal court, two previously unnamed FBI agents -- Elvis Chan, an FBI special agent in the San Francisco field office, and Dehmlow, the section chief of the FBI’s Foreign Influence Task Force -- were involved in high-level communications that allegedly “led to Facebook’s suppression” of the Post’s reporting.”_

I won’t rest until the media and their allies in the deep state are held accountable for the lies and suppression they committed in 2020.

As President of the Media Research Center, I am committing our resources to expose their fraud and corruption and bring them to justice for their crimes against the American people.

[_**I urgently ask for your help in our mission. Can you send a donation of $250, $100, $32, or even $12 today?**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c49918%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ToS%2frDk2OhROCMMixqm%2ffw&sysid=1)

[_**Donate $12**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c49919%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fqx%2f3xe6fEP92mjjbMAlOw&sysid=1)
[_**Donate Any Amount**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c49910%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IGUxR61qW%2f%2bWoB91csDEoA&sysid=1)

_**Here’s how MRC helped expose these new documents to the public**_**.**

I am proud to say the Attorney Generals of Missouri and Louisiana used our work at MRC in the lawsuit that revealed a vast “censorship enterprise” between Big Tech platforms and the federal government.

We are playing our part, and I hope you can join me in saving our country from these criminals.

And it gets worse...

It’s not just election interference. No. The federal government actively worked with social media to suppress information about COVID and the withdrawal from Afghanistan.

Basically, they suppress anything that goes against the leftwing narrative. And agents of our government are behind the scenes doing it.
