name: =?utf-8?Q?Haneefah?=
subject: Never Give Up!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hoosiers for Haneefah _
body:
| | | |
---
| | |
#### Announcement
**>From the Desk of Haneefah Khaaliq** Dear Hoosiers, I know that tonight’s results may have disappointed many of you, but you need to keep your heads up! Do you hear me? It’s time to rebuild, refocus, and start new. We need new people with fresh ideas to join us in this fight for democracy.

**The fight for women’s rights is just beginning. The fight for decent wages and healthcare to fight inflation never ends. The fight against gun violence and civil rights wages on!**

Candidates like Todd Young may have slipped through the cracks this time but trust me...this new term will not be pleasant for him because he’s just not fit for these changing times.

**We should never "get behind" candidates like him who don’t come with their own plan for education, the economy, immigration, or anything else...ones who never come to visit our cities and towns until it’s election time.**

If you are emotionally down, don’t stay there! Pick yourself back up and let's keep it moving! God bless you all!
**Now, here's what I need you to do right now: **
* Share this message with nine (9) of your friends and family. Choose three (3) of them to personally call and inform that the **_fight for democracy is never over_! **
* [Subscribe and follow me on social media](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=9b9030a58e&e=a49cb82bb3) where I'm active and live often. Share a post or two!

Visit [haneefahkhaaliq.org](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=080655759f&e=a49cb82bb3) and view my 33 national policies! I am Indiana. You are Indiana. Together, we are Indiana!

Sincerely,
Haneefah Khaaliq, Esq.
Former Indiana Candidate for U.S. Senate
---
|
---
I was a strong write-in candidate in the 2022 U.S. Senate race in Indiana. Check out my documentary [here](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=2c9981bdf5&e=a49cb82bb3)!
| [ ](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=1cc34c9135&e=a49cb82bb3)
---
Haneefah Khaaliq for U.S. Senate - Indiana 2022
|
---
| Want to volunteer with me? Sign up [here](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=92cb68cc0e&e=a49cb82bb3)!
Share this newsletter [sign-up form](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=627e8ac35e&e=a49cb82bb3) with friends!
---
|
---
|
---
|
### _What You Need to Do Now: _
* Take a deep breath. Breath again. Keep up the fight!
* Make sure your voter's registration remains current throughout the year by clicking [here](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=83fcc24484&e=a49cb82bb3). The next election cycle is always right around the corner! You must be a registered voter in order to participate.
* **Questions? Contact hoosiersforhaneefah@gmail.com or call or text 317-999-5592!**
* Check out and share my [social media](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=a413f149b7&e=a49cb82bb3) posts.

Visit haneefahkhaaliq.org for more information.

| | Peter,

Tonight, I have called Governor Tim Walz and conceded. From the beginning, we said we would trail-blaze the issues and give Minnesotans an alternative choice. We fell short of our goal, but I am immeasurably thankful for the relationships that formed and the passion of our supporters across the state. Thank you for your thoughts, your support, and your prayers!

In Freedom,

Dr. Scott Jensen

name: ICYMI News
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re lo
This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z49gh6md961dqvpel4umm0g2pghlbtimphbvo000_rp22sh2s8i66or7cjie8or3chh2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zp197mgi6mgt11g6ik5n0f1ksfpvr9c0drdns7p8_rp22sh2s8i66or7cjie8or3chh2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zuf01r6l8a31tjma6rli3t9qsj7li7blelc10cto_rp22sh2s8i66or7cjie8or3chh2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! name: Dr. Kim Schrier
subject: While we wait, let me say thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
I am feeling so encouraged by these results tonight, but this was always going to be a close race. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54337617/378202750/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNmI2NGZjNi1mYjVmLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDIyNDgyNThkMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mA1hMJLC4hIGUDrBMfJN_dZQivmbxLb3iT54jwAe_24=&emci=f7bc22b5-f45f-ed11-819c-002248258d2f&emdi=06b64fc6-fb5f-ed11-819c-002248258d2f&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter,

The election is officially over, and the results of our race here in Washington's 8th District are still too close to call.

While ballots are continuing to be counted, I wanted to take a moment to say thank you. To all the volunteers who doorbelled, made phone calls, hosted canvass launches, and contributed to this campaign, I am deeply grateful. To those who filled in the bubble next to my name on the ballot, I'm honored to have had your support as we worked to defend this House seat. I also want to thank the tremendous election workers who have been working so hard, with high turnout, to provide definitive results.

**I've taken nothing for granted. I am feeling so encouraged by these results tonight, but this was always going to be a close race. In the meantime we will continue to ensure that every vote is counted and everyone’s voice is heard.**

Regardless of the outcome, I am proud of what we've been able to accomplish. This campaign has been about a choice of who this district wants representing them in Congress, and my record speaks for itself on how hard I have worked for this district – traveling over 17,000 miles and holding 98 town halls to hear directly from my constituents. I've gone to bat for this district, and we've lowered prescription drug costs, provided COVID-19 relief, passed historic infrastructure and climate bills, and so much more.

Serving as your representative is the privilege of a lifetime. I am hopeful that when all is said and done, I will be able to continue to represent the 8th District in Congress.

Thank you,

Kim
| Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress

name: Lawrence W. Reed
subject: Who’s going to save future generations?
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61826272:6IZUm6GN6:m:1:3253819041:6441C8BCC418FDDB1C3FAE4C14BDD789:r)

Peter,

Politicians aren't going to save you.

The Swamp will not save the economy, abide by our Constitution, or restore our Republic.

Politicians come and go. We can't rely on them to protect our values.

**Restoring our Republic requires a citizenry who understands the principles of the Founding Fathers, capitalism, and our Constitution. **

We need institutions that defend liberty and free market economics to stop socialism and Marxism from taking over and killing America.

My name is Lawrence Reed, President Emeritus of the Foundation for Economic Education (FEE). I genuinely believe in reaching the next generation with the ideas of liberty and free-market economics.

But I could use your help to fund FEE's amazing educational programs.

[_**Peter, I know this is a lot, but I humbly ask you to chip in $25, $35, $50, or any amount today. Click here to send your gift >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61826272:6IZUm6GN6:m:1:3253819041:6441C8BCC418FDDB1C3FAE4C14BDD789:r)

I've set a goal to raise $15,000 before the end of the week so we can reach more high school students.

This year, our goal is to pass the ideas of liberty and free market economics to over 50,000 students through our program, FEE in the Classroom.

Here's how FEE in the Classroom works:

**FEE in the Classroom** is a unique program held in brick-and-mortar and virtual classrooms across the country that teaches young Americans the principles of free markets, individual liberty, and limited government.

_**This program uniquely challenges high school students to think outside the box to challenge the mainstream narrative.**_

In a single day, FEE's faculty of acclaimed instructors teach 75-300 students how the core principles of individual liberty and free market economics apply to their daily lives.

As thousands of American high school students come to understand the positive impact freedom has on their lives, their communities, and our country through FEE in the Classroom,**the most frequently asked question afterward is,_" why haven't I heard these ideas before?"_**

You and I both know why these students have never heard the ideas of liberty before: _America 's public schools don't teach our nation's founding principles anymore. _

But FEE is changing this - and we are doing it in classrooms across the country.

[_**Can you support this essential program and FEE 's efforts to defeat socialism in the classroom? Please donate today >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61826272:6IZUm6GN6:m:1:3253819041:6441C8BCC418FDDB1C3FAE4C14BDD789:r)

**That's not all FEE is doing. **

Peter, I'm excited to tell you that FEE is working with local and state education departments to teach high school teachers economics.

Our direct-to-student educational programs have a significant impact on the next generation, but relying on student programs alone won't be enough to keep socialism out of classrooms.

By training high school teachers, our message of liberty, personal responsibility, and free markets will reach tens of thousands of students each year!

If you're tired of politicians trying to "save" us, if you're ready to defend the values of liberty and free market economics, then I invite you to partner with FEE today. **Click below to send your gift.**

[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61826273:6IZUm6GN6:m:1:3253819041:6441C8BCC418FDDB1C3FAE4C14BDD789:r)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61826274:6IZUm6GN6:m:1:3253819041:6441C8BCC418FDDB1C3FAE4C14BDD789:r)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61826275:6IZUm6GN6:m:1:3253819041:6441C8BCC418FDDB1C3FAE4C14BDD789:r)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61826276:6IZUm6GN6:m:1:3253819041:6441C8BCC418FDDB1C3FAE4C14BDD789:r)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61826277:6IZUm6GN6:m:1:3253819041:6441C8BCC418FDDB1C3FAE4C14BDD789:r)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61826278:6IZUm6GN6:m:1:3253819041:6441C8BCC418FDDB1C3FAE4C14BDD789:r)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61826279:6IZUm6GN6:m:1:3253819041:6441C8BCC418FDDB1C3FAE4C14BDD789:r)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61826272:6IZUm6GN6:m:1:3253819041:6441C8BCC418FDDB1C3FAE4C14BDD789:r)

Thank you,

Lawrence W. Reed
President Emeritus

name: SmartAsset
subject: 7 Secrets Comfortable Retirees Know About Hiring a Financial Advisor
body:
Choosing a financial advisor is a major life decision that can determine your financial trajectory for years to come.
**7 Secrets Smart Professionals Use To Choose Financial Advisors**
**Choosing a financial advisor is a major life decision that can determine your financial trajectory for years to come.**
A 2020 Northwestern Mutual study found that 71% of U.S. adults admit their financial planning needs improvement. However, only 29% of Americans work with a financial advisor.1
The value of working with a financial advisor varies by person and advisors are legally prohibited from promising returns, but research suggests people who [**_work with a financial advisor_**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5kncvgc21ma5uue6r9hqbbp718olf2noadia38g_rp22sh2s8i66or7cjieaoj4cth2bs) feel more at ease about their finances and could end up with about 15% more money to spend in retirement.2
Consider this example: A recent Vanguard study found that, on average, a hypothetical $500K investment would grow to over $3.4 million under the care of an advisor over 25 years, whereas the expected value from self-management would be $1.69 million, or 50% less. In other words, an advisor-managed portfolio would average 8% annualized growth over a 25-year period, compared to 5% from a self-managed portfolio.3
[**_SmartAsset’s no-cost tool_**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgupchv3rg307o07oaok8mroe49becqs7p22d0d8_rp22sh2s8i66or7cjieaoj4cth2bs) simplifies the time-consuming process of finding a financial advisor. A short questionnaire helps match you with up to three fiduciary financial advisors that serve your area, legally bound to work in your best interest. The whole process takes just a few minutes, and in many cases you can be connected instantly with an advisor for a free retirement consultation.
Advisors are rigorously screened through our proprietary due diligence process.
Being aware of these seven common blunders when [**_choosing an advisor_**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z19ig9rdfv5hfmpk1prmparrvr3bvmb21mflcn3o_rp22sh2s8i66or7cjieaoj4cth2bs) can help you find peace of mind, and potentially avoid years of stress.
**1.****Always Hire an Advisor Who Is a Fiduciary**
By definition, a fiduciary is an individual who is ethically bound to act in another person’s best interest. Fiduciary financial advisors must avoid conflicts of interest and disclose any potential conflicts of interest to clients..
All of the financial advisors on SmartAsset’s matching platform are registered fiduciaries. If your advisor is not a fiduciary and constantly pushes investment products on you, [**_use this no-cost tool to find an advisor_**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2za97gq2tq85rnij4kfmq2r9ncjgp9e1eaivlq1vo_rp22sh2s8i66or7cjieaoj4cth2bs) who has your best interest in mind.
**2.****Don't Hire the First Advisor You Meet**
While it’s tempting to hire the advisor closest to home or the first advisor in the yellow pages, this decision requires more time. Take the time to interview at least a few advisors before picking the best match for you.
**3.****Don't Choose an Advisor with the Wrong Specialty**
Some financial advisors [**_specialize in retirement planning_**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zg4e6p1vv2ism4ij0d37bar8iqm9o51871vguu78_rp22sh2s8i66or7cjieaoj4cth2bs) , while others are best for business owners or those with a high net worth. Some might be best for young professionals starting a family. Be sure to understand an advisor’s strengths and weaknesses - before signing the dotted line.
**4.****Don't Pick an Advisor With an Incompatible Strategy**
Each advisor has a unique strategy. Some advisors may suggest aggressive investments, while others are more conservative. If you prefer to go all in on stocks, an advisor that prefers bonds and index funds is not a great match for your style.
**5.****Always Ask About Credentials**
To give investment advice, [**_financial advisors_**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z814uv4l8d7lp84qo3jf70n6r0qcumb0lstuljj8_rp22sh2s8i66or7cjieaoj4cth2bs) are required to pass a test. Ask your advisor about their licenses, tests, and credentials. Financial advisors tests include the Series 7, and Series 66 or Series 65. Some advisors go a step further and become a Certified Financial Planner, or CFP.
**6.****Understand How They are Paid**
Some advisors are "fee only" and charge you a flat rate no matter what. Others charge a percentage of your assets under management. Some advisors are paid commissions by mutual funds, a serious conflict of interest. If the advisor earns more by ignoring your best interests, do not hire them.
**7.****Hire a Vetted Advisor**
Chances are, there are several highly qualified financial advisors in your town. However, it can seem daunting to choose one.
Our no-cost tool helps make it easy to [**_find qualified financial advisors who serve your area_**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjab9oh582mft595iu1nn2gjt6f8nhhe6ej6h78g_rp22sh2s8i66or7cjieaoj4cth2bs). Now you can get matched with up to three fiduciary investment advisors that are vetted and subject to our due diligence criteria. The entire matching process takes just a few minutes.

[**_Get Your Free Financial Advisor Matches_**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zg3t929ajjuggqssoklba4o0dbmh815ug5jj9rg0_rp22sh2s8i66or7cjieaoj4cth2bs)

clean_body: Choosing a financial advisor is a major life decision that can determine your financial trajectory for years to come. 7 Secrets Smart Professionals Use To Choose Financial Advisors Choosing a financial advisor is a major life decision that can determine your financial trajectory for years to come. A 2020 Northwestern Mutual study found that 71% of U.S. adults admit their financial planning needs improvement. However, only 29% of Americans work with a financial advisor.1 The value of working with a financial advisor varies by person and advisors are legally prohibited from promising returns, but research suggests people who feel more at ease about their finances and could end up with about 15% more money to spend in retirement.2 Consider this example: A recent Vanguard study found that, on average, a hypothetical $500K investment would grow to over $3.4 million under the care of an advisor over 25 years, whereas the expected value from self-management would be $1.69 million, or 50% less. In other words, an advisor-managed portfolio would average 8% annualized growth over a 25-year period, compared to 5% from a self-managed portfolio.3 simplifies the time-consuming process of finding a financial advisor. A short questionnaire helps match you with up to three fiduciary financial advisors that serve your area, legally bound to work in your best interest. The whole process takes just a few minutes, and in many cases you can be connected instantly with an advisor for a free retirement consultation. Advisors are rigorously screened through our proprietary due diligence process. Being aware of these seven common blunders when can help you find peace of mind, and potentially avoid years of stress. 1.Always Hire an Advisor Who Is a Fiduciary By definition, a fiduciary is an individual who is ethically bound to act in another person’s best interest. Fiduciary financial advisors must avoid conflicts of interest and disclose any potential conflicts of interest to clients.. All of the financial advisors on SmartAsset’s matching platform are registered fiduciaries. If your advisor is not a fiduciary and constantly pushes investment products on you, who has your best interest in mind. 2.Don't Hire the First Advisor You Meet While it’s tempting to hire the advisor closest to home or the first advisor in the yellow pages, this decision requires more time. Take the time to interview at least a few advisors before picking the best match for you. 3.Don't Choose an Advisor with the Wrong Specialty Some financial advisors , while others are best for business owners or those with a high net worth. Some might be best for young professionals starting a family. Be sure to understand an advisor’s strengths and weaknesses - before signing the dotted line. 4.Don't Pick an Advisor With an Incompatible Strategy Each advisor has a unique strategy. Some advisors may suggest aggressive investments, while others are more conservative. If you prefer to go all in on stocks, an advisor that prefers bonds and index funds is not a great match for your style. 5.Always Ask About Credentials To give investment advice, are required to pass a test. Ask your advisor about their licenses, tests, and credentials. Financial advisors tests include the Series 7, and Series 66 or Series 65. Some advisors go a step further and become a Certified Financial Planner, or CFP. 6.Understand How They are Paid Some advisors are "fee only" and charge you a flat rate no matter what. Others charge a percentage of your assets under management. Some advisors are paid commissions by mutual funds, a serious conflict of interest. If the advisor earns more by ignoring your best interests, do not hire them. 7.Hire a Vetted Advisor Chances are, there are several highly qualified financial advisors in your town. However, it can seem daunting to choose one. Our no-cost tool helps make it easy to . Now you can get matched with up to three fiduciary investment advisors that are vetted and subject to our due diligence criteria. The entire matching process takes just a few minutes. body:
This is serious, and it confirms what we all know deep down - the FBI and deep state are actively involved in suppressing inform
[View this message in your browser](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1j8umpackqmjbt00j4em2g34mm3daf7ib1fda3o_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkhhm0o316gqb3d7jkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbp7cojhm9iecchj6aq78spl6hq61ojiespr0p30s5j78or0m2qe3dtgm5omctbn6v970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj664pbbd70etgmcc9n6kr3fc5lclp238h1e8he4933cdjm9p74cdgecoh5u)

Friend,

This is serious, and it confirms what we all know deep down - **the FBI and deep state are actively involved in suppressing information online, including the Hunter Biden story before the 2020 election.**

Read this paragraph from The Intercept article on the leaked documents. Tell me if your jaw doesn’t drop.

_“According to records filed in federal court, two previously unnamed FBI agents -- Elvis Chan, an FBI special agent in the San Francisco field office, and Dehmlow, the section chief of the FBI’s Foreign Influence Task Force -- were involved in high-level communications that allegedly “led to Facebook’s suppression” of the Post’s reporting.”_

I won’t rest until the media and their allies in the deep state are held accountable for the lies and suppression they committed in 2020.

As President of the Media Research Center, I am committing our resources to expose their fraud and corruption and bring them to justice for their crimes against the American people.

_**Here’s how MRC helped expose these new documents to the public**_**.**

I am proud to say the Attorney Generals of Missouri and Louisiana used our work at MRC in the lawsuit that revealed a vast “censorship enterprise” between Big Tech platforms and the federal government.

We are playing our part, and I hope you can join me in saving our country from these criminals.

And it gets worse...

Basically, they suppress anything that goes against the leftwing narrative. And agents of our government are behind the scenes doing it.

I couldn’t be more proud, but our work is only beginning. As the power shifts from news media to big tech, our mission will shift to make sure conservatives have a chance to win.

name: American Action News
subject: For a limited time
body:
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history.
This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6n2fp8p1vklldidnu0crfiph4a55sui7vip4jvg_rp22sh2s8i66or7cjie8or2cth2bs) Dear Fellow American, The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected you as well. Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is **flawed** and **outdated** —not adequate for the challenges of our time. How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges? Well, a few early champions of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—have given you the guide: _The Federalist Papers_. Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described _The Federalist Papers_ as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves. **So, I’d like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, “ _The Federalist Papers_ ,”on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.** _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It’s taught by Hillsdale’s knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles of liberty. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zluau3ni9p2g8rlc4g5qlc619k2jp5fd6mpbaih0_rp22sh2s8i66or7cjie8or2cth2bs) Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of **_“The Federalist Papers”_** on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won’t last long. Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ today: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zivlbuvquvlbn9aj3daht3bllg6d4hdid4ebljbo_rp22sh2s8i66or7cjie8or2cth2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: GET OUT & VOTE!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heidi for Governor
body:
It all comes down to today... let's do this, Colorado!
[](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qildkz-ttjjilthht-r/) Dear Peter, **TODAY IS THE DAY!** Today, I feel like we all put everything on the table and that we **LEFT NO STONE UNTURNED**. I am so grateful, from the bottom of my heart, for all the hard work YOU all have done to get me to this point. Thank you for believing in me and trusting me to lead this great state. Now it's time to make it official. Ready for a brighter future for Colorado? Join me in heading to the polls to make your voice heard if you haven't voted already! This election is going to be a pivotal one for our state. It's not enough just to vote. We need you to GET OUT THE VOTE! Remind your friends, neighbors, coworkers, and family to drop off their ballots or vote in person before 7 PM tonight.

Thank you for all your efforts to get out the vote and make your voice heard Colorado! We're taking our state back today. [](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qildkz-ttjjilthht-y/) **THANK YOU to all who came out for our LAST RALLY to Save Colorado!** It's been exciting to see so many Coloradans, not just show up at our events, but show up for their futures and our kids' futures by doing their part to get out the vote.It's Election Day! The momentum is HIGH and the energy from last night is carrying our movement into the polls. Let's SAVE COLORADO TODAY! [](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qildkz-ttjjilthht-j/) Make sure you encourage all of your friends and family to get out and vote. Polls are open until 7pm and it's not too late to register. All of your questions can be answered at **[GOVOTECOLORADO.GOV](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qildkz-ttjjilthht-t/)**!_Worried about election integrity? We need you to vote, or we won 't win. So, cast your own vote and help ensure that your vote - and every other Coloradan's vote - is protected._ **To report any concerns about election integrity, call the CO GOP Public Hotline Number: 303-345-0933.** LET THE COUNTDOWN BEGIN!Thank you from the bottom of my heart,Heidi [$10](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qildkz-ttjjilthht-i/) [$50](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qildkz-ttjjilthht-d/) [$100](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qildkz-ttjjilthht-h/) [Other](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qildkz-ttjjilthht-k/) [Volunteer](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qildkz-ttjjilthht-u/) Never miss a beat, follow me on social media! [](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qildkz-ttjjilthht-n/)[](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qildkz-ttjjilthht-p/)[](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qildkz-ttjjilthht-x/)[](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qildkz-ttjjilthht-m/)[](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qildkz-ttjjilthht-c/) | Heidi for Governor
PO Box 754
Fort Lupton, CO 80621 Paid for by Heidi for Governor. Registered agent: Sam Schafer. [Preferences](https://heidi4gov.updatemyprofile.com/i-qildkz-E8C3E4FD-ttjjilthht-q) | [Unsubscribe](https://heidi4gov.cmail19.com/t/i-u-qildkz-ttjjilthht-a/)

name: Chrissy
subject: Thank you so much, Derek
body:
Because yesterday you spoke loud and clear – today, I get to serve the people of PA-06 for two more years.
| | |
---
**Thank you, Derek.**
I am so proud to tell you that we won our election! Because the voters of PA-06 spoke loud and clear, I will have the opportunity to continue to serve the people of PA-06 for two more years.
I want to thank every single member of this team – whether you were on the ground knocking on doors, on call when we needed the resources to fuel our efforts, or on the phone talking to voters about our message of progress – _thank you_. This victory truly belongs to all of you because I wouldn't be here without your incredible support. So thank you for voting and making your voice heard.
I’ve always said, there’s work to be done. Thanks to your help, I will be able to keep working on what matters. I am so excited to get back to work and fight for the things we all care about: lowering costs, protecting reproductive rights, and building a future that works for everyone in PA-06.
Derek, I'm honored and grateful you voted to send me back to Congress.******I will do my best to work across the aisle and continue to pass legislation that will serve and prioritize the needs of every member of our district.** But I can't do this alone – the journey ahead is long, and I need you. I hope you let me know if there’s ever an issue weighing on your mind or a challenge your family needs help facing. I am at your service.
There’s work to be done – and I cannot wait to roll up my sleeves.

With deep gratitude, thank you again.

Chrissy
| Chrissy Houlahan for Congress
P.O. Box 222
Devon, PA 19333

name: Tom Brejcha
subject: 9 Felonies for Exposing Planned Parenthood
body:
I'm writing this letter to you today because, quite frankly, David Daleiden cannot.
Dear Friend, I'm writing this letter to you today because, quite frankly, David Daleiden cannot. You may remember David as the undercover journalist who spent 30 months investigating and capturing video evidence of Planned Parenthood 's top leadership --- medical directors, national program directors, even its Senior Director of Medical Services -- **callously negotiating the harvesting and sale of aborted baby body parts.** **And now, he’s been charged with nine bogus felonies.** **[Which is why I’m asking you to make an emergency donation to the DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND right away.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zf5mn82ejv01f4dangmq77sqtenthcdppumfd36g_rp22sh2s8i66or7cjieeo32cdh2bs)** You see, after David released the shocking videos of the illegal and disgusting actions of abortion executives, Kamala Harris, then California's Attorney General, colluded with Planned Parenthood to file felony charges against David... _**... Kamala Harris even ordered the California Department of Justice to raid David's home and confiscate his unpublished videos.**_ I won't sugarcoat it. If not cleared of these charges, David faces steep fines and years in state penitentiary and the consequences of being a convicted felon. While Kamala Harris --- a bought-and-paid-for ally of the abortion industry --- is sitting one heartbeat away from the presidency. That's the bad news. But here's the good news... David is fighting back. In fact, he's taking another opportunity to drag more of Planned Parenthood's dark criminality into the spotlight with two new federal lawsuits. That's right. The Thomas More Society has filed a federal civil rights lawsuit in California on behalf of David against former California Attorney General and now VicePresident Kamala Harris for prosecuting David in bad faith, twisting and perverting California's anti-eavesdropping law to persecute a citizen journalist because of his political views. Then the Thomas More Society filed a defamation (libel) lawsuit in federal court in New York against Planned Parenthood, which said David created a "fake" and "false" "smear campaign" against Planned Parenthood. In other words, the best defense is a good offense. The truth is we could no longer let David suffer such a trampling of his free speech and due process rights without a counterattack. The timing couldn't be more important. This is a critical opportunity to put Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and the rest of the abortion industry on trial for conspiring to silence David in order to cover-up their illegal activities. **[That's where your emergency donation to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND comes in --- by giving today you can stand with David in his hour of need.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zt8st14p96meh86anqgjtjv72cc6enqmvob9ibd8_rp22sh2s8i66or7cjieeo32cdh2bs)** The reality is. . . You couldn't be there when David entered the dark underbelly of the abortion industry --- sitting across the table from abortionists haggling over the price of baby body parts with cold-blooded clarity... "I want a Lamborghini." You couldn't be there as David saw with his own eyes the preborn children who had been killed with great precision and delicacy to preserve their organs for maximum profit. You couldn't be there when the videos were released and Kamala Harris and Planned Parenthood conspired to crush David with trumped up legal charges and an armed raid on his home in which they seized laptops, hard-drives, and recording equipment. And you couldn't be there with David (our criminal defense team was there) when he voluntarily appeared in both Texas and California for booking and processing --- fingerprinted and photographed for a mugshot like a common criminal. But, now, this is the reality... there is something you can do. **[You can make an emergency donation to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND to help vindicate this pro-life hero.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zbtclk0no46n2lblej6iq6mjudthjqqpa030l5qg_rp22sh2s8i66or7cjieeo32cdh2bs)** My name is Tom Brejcha. I'm the president and chief counsel of the Thomas More Society --- a not-for-profit law firm underwriting and helping to spearhead David's criminal defense. The Thomas More Society is proud to have defended many renowned pro-life and religious leaders in America's pro-life movement such as Joe, Ann, and Eric Scheidler, the Pro-Life Action League, Shawn Carney and 40 Days for Life, Abby Johnson, the Susan B. Anthony List, David Bereit, Lila Rose and Live Action, Students for Life, Sidewalk Advocates for Life, Created Equal, former Kansas Attorney General Phill Kline, the March for Life, and many more. Because when dark forces like Planned Parenthood unleash their full might to legally, financially, and personally destroy our clients --- **we fight back.** I have to tell you, despite all that David is facing, his spirits remain high. Of course, I've never known anyone in this kind of position who didn't feel an empty pit in his stomach. But David's not giving up. His willingness to fight back is a true profile in Pro-Life courage. Now I'll get right down to it... **We anticipate David's legal defense will cost us more than $6 million. That's right, SIX MILLION DOLLARS.** In addition to the criminal case and the new federal civil rights and defamation lawsuits, we're currently representing David in THREE other cases.
* The civil lawsuit filed by Planned Parenthood where we are appealing the jury's verdict, along with the judge's order permanently banning David from doing any more undercover journalism against Planned Parenthood. Recently, we posted a $700,000 appeal bond to keep Planned Parenthood’s nasty collection agents from harassing him with collection agents and even seizing his belongings. We’re fighting back, but we’ll need your help.

* The civil lawsuit brought by the National Abortion Federation and the "gag order" injunction that still prohibits David from releasing any more of his video evidence exposing Planned Parenthood's illegal fetal tissue business. And now, in light of the Planned Parenthood civil lawsuit, NAF has moved for summary judgment – they want a ruling against David without a trial at all!

* And finally, the civil lawsuit filed by Planned Parenthood personnel in federal court in Seattle, where we just achieved a victory for a second time on appeal, but it appears we may need at least a third victory on appeal before this case ends.

That's why David needs your financial support today. **[And that's why I'm praying you will donate $35 or more to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND right away.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2ztbtblv76u16noflcarstnpu0pvbu8u3r0io58j0_rp22sh2s8i66or7cjieeo32cdh2bs)** I won't guess how much you're able to send today. Whether it's $35, $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, $1,000 or more... ... I will only say that time is of the essence. So I do ask that you make your donation as soon as you can. **This truly is a "David versus Goliath" type of battle --- with Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and the radical left arrayed against our "David."** It's a grave injustice that David is the one being hit with felony charges and massive civil penalties while Planned Parenthood (so far, at least) has gone unpunished. By clearing David of these charges... you and I can allow him to continue with his incredibly important lifesaving work. Remember, over 12 million people on YouTube alone watched the shocking footage he captured. Since that time, 26 states --- over half the country -- have moved to strip Planned Parenthood of taxpayer funding. It's no wonder Planned Parenthood and their allies want to destroy David. They'd love to see him rotting away in penitentiary rather than exposing their criminal and inhumane activities. You and I cannot let that happen. **[So please don't delay. Donate $35, $50, $100, or more to stand with David Daleiden today.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z3pfkh9fjdngc9f5ecs4kn2dm4b950q76tfd7fvg_rp22sh2s8i66or7cjieeo32cdh2bs)** I've asked my staff to let me know as soon as we get it so I can let David know that you're standing with him. I know he'll be deeply touched by your generous support. May God Bless You, Tom Brejcha
President & Chief Counsel P.S. Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and their allies want to destroy David. They'd love to see him rotting away in penitentiary rather than exposing their criminal, ghoulish activities. You and I cannot let that happen. Can I count on you to support the official criminal defense of David Daleiden? **[David is a pro-life hero. Will you make a generous donation to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND of $35, $50, $100 or more to stop this attempt to crush him?](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z04mgoq7adc8f3frerre081i45pe35vn56slalbg_rp22sh2s8i66or7cjieeo32cdh2bs)** [**DONATE**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z6imc76qj453h1skmm6nc3efv4p1cqhbkr2rliqg_rp22sh2s8i66or7cjieeo32cdh2bs) [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z6m4gaslf875jg296sulv3fqavel1cc6p77fnp48_rp22sh2s8i66or7cjieeo32cdh2bs) The Thomas More Society is a not-for-profit, national public interest law firm dedicated to restoring respect in law for life, family, and religious liberty. [Please consider supporting our efforts with a generous, tax-deductible donation.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z23cu2ab5aocbcrk3n7372gnari9gkmigehumtsg_rp22sh2s8i66or7cjieeo32cdh2bs) © Thomas More Society | [www.thomasmoresociety.org](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zkjdoqdaj2ggdajsg18llg4b3rq3tkh4u11jiic0_rp22sh2s8i66or7cjieeo32cdh2bs)
309 W. Washington Street Suite 1250, Chicago, IL 60606
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Genesis 123 Foundation
subject: Will you help these Christians?
body:
Christians in Pakistan still desperately need our help.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61826918:6omwy6GpN:m:1:3331421248:A2709C6893A8A8BAABAF02B02E345E70:r "Headline") Dear Peter: The waters have receded in Pakistan from one of the worst floodings ever to hit their country. **But the Christians in Pakistan still desperately need our help.** Pakistan has been ravaged by record floods that have killed thousands and caused over $40 billion in damage. And while life is slowly getting back to normal in Pakistan, so is the persecution of the minority Christian population from the Moslem majority. And as a persecuted minority in Pakistan, Christians have been the most vulnerable to the after-effects of record flooding. The hungry Christians are also being offered food to deny their faith, and then mocked by the Moslems who are pretending to help them. **[We have an opportunity to be a light in the darkness of the Islamic Republic of Pakistan, providing relief to the Christian minority there. Please join me in providing supplies to those in need with your $25, $50, or $100 donation today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61826918:6omwy6GpN:m:1:3331421248:A2709C6893A8A8BAABAF02B02E345E70:r "We have an opportunity to be a light in the
darkness of the Islamic Republic of Pakistan, providing relief to the Christian minority there. Please join me in providing supplies to those in need
with your $25, $50, or $100 donation today.")** [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61826918:6omwy6GpN:m:1:3331421248:A2709C6893A8A8BAABAF02B02E345E70:r "Headline")It's easy to wonder why an Orthodox Jewish man writing from Israel of all places is asking for your help in a country that doesn't recognize Israel's right to exist. **It 's simple. When God commands us to be a blessing to the families of the world, He does not mean only in our own countries or only among our friends.** My Pakistani Christian friends have been loyal supporters of the Genesis 123 Foundation. They love, support, and pray for Israel. Unconditionally. And they are constantly under threat of discrimination or worse in a Moslem majority nation. **Even funds from NGOs sending aid to Pakistan have been kept from the Christians.** That's why it's vital we step up today to help these Pakistani Christians persevere in one of the worst monsoons ever to hit that country. **[The needs are great - food, shelter, hygiene kits, medicine, clothing, and more. We at the Genesis 123 Foundation are ready to step in and assist these persecuted Pakistani Christians, but we can't do it without your support of $50, $100, or $250 tax-deductible donation.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61826918:6omwy6GpN:m:1:3331421248:A2709C6893A8A8BAABAF02B02E345E70:r "The needs are great - food, shelter, hygiene kits, medicine,
clothing, and more. We at the Genesis 123 Foundation are ready to step in and assist these persecuted Pakistani Christians, but we can’t do it
without your support of $50, $100, or $250 tax-deductible donation.")** There's no more meaningful way for us, Jews and Christians, to stand together and affirm our faith than to help our persecuted Christian brothers and sisters in Pakistan, especially during this humanitarian crisis. **Proverbs 19:17 says:** | _Whoever is generous to the poor lends to the Lord, and he will repay him for his deed._
---
Please don't delay. The risk of famine and disease grows every day. **[Help us bless these Pakistani Christians with your donation today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61826918:6omwy6GpN:m:1:3331421248:A2709C6893A8A8BAABAF02B02E345E70:r "Help us bless these Pakistani Christians with your donation
today.")**
Thank you,
Jonathan Feldstein
President, Genesis 123 Foundation
| [BLESS THEM TODAY!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61826918:6omwy6GpN:m:1:3331421248:A2709C6893A8A8BAABAF02B02E345E70:r "BLESS THEM
TODAY!")
---

name: Kirsten Engel
subject: Election update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
https://www.engelforarizona.com/ [https://www.engelforarizona.com/]
Hi friend — I wanted to give you an update on our election.
As of now, we're still waiting for all the votes to be counted. This is an incredibly competitive district, and it may take several more days until we know the outcome.
What is most important is that every vote gets counted correctly and safely, no matter how long that takes.
We saw incredible turnout for this election, and we're hopeful that AZ-06 chose hope, progress, and common-sense today. I'll send along more updates as soon as we get more information.
Thank you for all your support and your patience in this process.
Have a good night!
— Kirsten

name: Team Diehl-Allen
subject: We gave it all we had.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Diehl for Massachusetts
body:
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014eWtTRoQdA5QMydPH9ODxDzKHvMya47_c2nYAGG63t8lMuWUaA3bHJxm-_uisx5DX6X1_OYY54oJH3PGPf47VUbx3u9tVLNlj9UvzhOdzNQGnkvb54MvxGTktJTx-P1MM-bCly2aUYnYiskUdFcSUYKSegCIX_sHOuDdL4kIclOukiiEWvS3SQ==&c=7QexECQ0-M213eDWZZ8AnCKclESIP6RKZ59OkyVRdc1Na6c-BA2UsQ==&ch=P1W2RoSsoxxBE4hobjzTi4faPXbZSXqu5cbOUloOOncKWGJfg7jBww==)
---
| Dear Friends,
Last night's election result certainly wasn't what we wanted. But, the people of the Commonwealth have spoken. I respect their choice and I ask everyone who supported me and Leah to give Governor-elect Healey the same opportunity for success that I would have asked had the shoe been on the other foot.
Despite the outcome, I am proud of the race we ran, highlighting the issues that are important to people across that state: Education, Healthcare, Energy and the Economy.
For a long time, Massachusetts has been a leader in all these fields, but we've become complacent and too dependent on directives from Washington.
Leah and I talked about restoring freedom through states rights and we have been passionate about giving you back control from a government that has become so big that it controls virtually every aspect of our lives.
It is my sincere hope that our new Governor will respect the desire of parents to have a stronger voice with their children's education...
... That she will understand that there is a breaking point with taxation - and we're there now - that will cause an even greater exodus of businesses and people to leave the Commonwealth.
... And I hope Governor Healey's administration will consider a more reasonable timeline for achieving renewable energy goals.
Too many households are at the economic breaking point for too long and it's up to Beacon Hill to deliver on their promises of safe and affordable communities, reliable transportation and educational opportunities that align with the modern workforce.
Though our campaign has ended, the work to create a better Massachusetts does not end.
Leah and I will do all we can to advance these goals and will support the next generation of leaders who want to make this state better, each and every day.
So I encourage all of you to stay in the fight; to remind our government officials that they are there to serve the people, and not the other way around.
We are so grateful for the tremendous support we received throughout this campaign.
To the thousands of volunteers across the Commonwealth who stood out with signs; knocked on doors; made phone calls; distributed lawn signs; and many other tasks - We thank you from the bottom of our hearts.
To our spouses - KathyJo and Ryan... Thank you for holding down the fort as we crisscrossed the Commonwealth.
To everyone who entrusted Leah and I to carry the message of freedom and opportunity, we can never repay you.
God bless you, God bless Massachusetts and God bless these United States of America.
---
|
---
---
| Paid for by Diehl for Massachusetts
---
---
| | | | | | | Diehl for Massachusetts | PO Box 60362, Worcester, MA 01606

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff.

name: justin paglino
subject: Keeping Hope Alive
body:
| Hello Peter,

As of this morning, it appears that I did not reach the 1% vote threshold I was hoping for to maintain the ballot line for the Connecticut Green Party in the 3rd Congressional District.

I want to thank those that invested money and/or effort into my campaign, particularly my wife Jill Alexandra and my treasurer Chris Reilly. I want to thank very person who expressed support, every person who voted for me, every person who believed in what I was trying to do, and am still trying to do.

Your support confirms to me that I am doing something worthwhile, that the future I am trying to bring into being is one that others believe in too. I still believe we can get there.

The fight continues, of course. Setbacks can contaminate us with discouragement, so we must remind ourselves not just why we fight, but why we must fight.

Here are some inspirational quotes I hope will bevy your own spirit of hope, resilience, and determination.

“Never forget that justice is what love looks like in public.”
— Cornel West

“Continue to speak out against all forms of injustice to yourselves and others, and you will set a mighty example for your children and for future generations.”
— Bernice King

“Ours is not the struggle of one day, one week, or one year. Ours is not the struggle of one judicial appointment or presidential term. Ours is the struggle of a lifetime, or maybe even many lifetimes, and each one of us in every generation must do our part.”
— John Lewis

“As my sufferings mounted I soon realized that there were two ways in which I could respond to my situation — either to react with bitterness or seek to transform the suffering into a creative force. I decided to follow the latter course.”
— Martin Luther King, Jr.

“Human progress is neither automatic nor inevitable... Every step toward the goal of justice requires sacrifice, suffering, and struggle; the tireless exertions and passionate concern of dedicated individuals.”
— Martin Luther King, Jr.

“The only way we'll get freedom for ourselves is to identify ourselves with every oppressed people in the world.”
— Malcolm X

“The world would be a paradise of peace and justice if global citizens shared a common definition of love which would guide our thoughts and action.”
— bell hooks

“Overcoming poverty is not a gesture of charity. It is an act of justice. It is the protection of a fundamental human right, the right to dignity and a decent life.”
— Nelson Mandela

“I am no longer accepting the things I cannot change. I am changing the things I cannot accept.”
— Angela Davis

“For it isn't enough to talk about peace. One must believe in it. And it isn't enough to believe in it. One must work at it.”
— Eleanor Roosevelt

“If you tremble with indignation at every injustice then you are a comrade of mine.”
— Ernesto Che Guevara

''Medicine is a social science, and politics is nothing but medicine on a large scale.'
-Paul Farmer
---

Ours is not the struggle of one judicial appointment or presidential term. Ours is the struggle of a lifetime, or maybe even many lifetimes, and each one of us in every generation must do our part.” — John Lewis “As my sufferings mounted I soon realized that there were two ways in which I could respond to my situation — either to react with bitterness or seek to transform the suffering into a creative force. I decided to follow the latter course.” — Martin Luther King, Jr. “Human progress is neither automatic nor inevitable... Every step toward the goal of justice requires sacrifice, suffering, and struggle; the tireless exertions and passionate concern of dedicated individuals.” — Martin Luther King, Jr. “The only way we'll get freedom for ourselves is to identify ourselves with every oppressed people in the world.” — Malcolm X “The world would be a paradise of peace and justice if global citizens shared a common definition of love which would guide our thoughts and action.” — bell hooks “Overcoming poverty is not a gesture of charity. It is an act of justice. It is the protection of a fundamental human right, the right to dignity and a decent life.” — Nelson Mandela “I am no longer accepting the things I cannot change. I am changing the things I cannot accept.” — Angela Davis “For it isn't enough to talk about peace. One must believe in it. And it isn't enough to believe in it. One must work at it.” — Eleanor Roosevelt “If you tremble with indignation at every injustice then you are a comrade of mine.” — Ernesto Che Guevara ''Medicine is a social science, and politics is nothing but medicine on a large scale.' -Paul Farmer | justin4all: The Committee to Elect Justin Paglino for US Congress, PO Box 74, North Branford, CT 06471, USA, 203-457-0052 |

name: Marcy Kaptur
subject: Thank you, Northern Ohio
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaptur for Congress **[marcykaptur
body:
I am honored to continue serving you in Congress. | |
---
Northwest Ohio is home to the hardworking folks who make, build, and grow America, and I am honored to continue serving you in Congress.

There has been too much division in our nation of late, and our focus must be on mending the fabric of our politics and our society. We are the United States of America - not the divided states of America. We are the red, white, and blue - not the red or blue. I pledge to be a voice and representative for all the people - Republicans, Democrats, and none of the above.

I will be a fighter for the working man and woman, the farmer in Defiance and the autoworker in Toledo, the police officer in Port Clinton, and the business owner in Fremont.

We have so much good we can accomplish when we come together. For the future of our great nation, I will work with anyone and everyone to put Northwest Ohio first.

Thank you for your support,

Marcy Kaptur
---

name: Gretchen Whitmer
subject: Thank you, Michigan
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GRETCHEN WHITMER FOR GOVERNOR **[gretchenwhitmer
body:
Holding this office is the honor of my life. | |
---
Thank you! This victory belongs to the Michiganders who made their voices heard in this election.

We are reminded that our governor’s office does not belong to any person or political party. It belongs to all of us, the people of Michigan. Holding this office is the honor of my life, and I am grateful to have the opportunity to keep getting things done with all of you.

**Now, I want to thank each one of you for helping me get here. Together, you formed a team that I knew always had my back.

Today, we celebrate. But tomorrow, we keep doing the work. While I am optimistic about our future, I know that progress is not inevitable. **

We know there are people out there who are trying to divide and distract us. They find problems more valuable than solutions. They are counting on your disengagement. They will make excuses, tell you some things can’t be solved. That our solutions are not worth it, too impractical, or too bold.

Let’s prove them wrong.

**Progress is hard, but we know that the only way to move forward is if we try.**

I promise to be a governor for ALL of Michigan. I promise to work with anyone to get things done and compete with everyone to move Michigan forward. I know what we are capable of when we work together.

Together, let’s build a Michigan worthy of our kids. I am so excited about the next four years.

Thank you,

Gretchen Whitmer
---

name: American Update
subject: Your invitation: National Survey on Socialism
body:
A few years ago, New York magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a “Great Reset” of our economy and our way of life. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0087%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=PW5qb%2fh6b3LIigLBDzDOHg&sysid=1)
| | | This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c49933%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7dzsWPfMJ0BNN1y8iS%2fhWQ&sysid=1)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York _magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a “Great Reset” of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ --Hillsdale College’s digest of liberty--author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as “‘capitalism with Chinese characteristics’--a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below.” Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for--and opposition to--socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c49934%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HpgdFz0uuwHyA5110vFBpQ&sysid=1)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages. ** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left’s “long march through the institutions”--including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory--which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race--are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale’s work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That’s why I need your thoughts quickly. ** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism **in the next five days**, **your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c49934%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HpgdFz0uuwHyA5110vFBpQ&sysid=1)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember--**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0087%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=PW5qb%2fh6b3LIigLBDzDOHg&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0087%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=PW5qb%2fh6b3LIigLBDzDOHg&sysid=1)

This is a result of the far-Left’s “long march through the institutions”--including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory--which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race--are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale’s work to reach and teach millions has never been more urgently needed. That’s why I need your thoughts quickly. By responding to the National Survey on Socialism in the next five days, your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to reach and teach increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” If you agree, please represent your state and take the National Survey on Socialism today. Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember--it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Josh Shapiro, Governor-Elect
subject: I am so proud to be your next Governor.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAPIRO FOR PENNSYLVANIA
body:
Together, we defended our right to choose, our right to love, our right to vote, and so much more in Pennsylvania.

Derek, **I am honored, humbled, and proud to serve as the next Governor of Pennsylvania.** If you take anything away from this email, let it be this: This would not have happened if you didn’t step off the sidelines, get in the game, and do your part. Whether you knocked doors, posted on Facebook, sent texts, invested in this campaign, talked to your friends and family, or just stayed up to date on the race – your work mattered, and it paid off big time. **Real freedom prevailed in Pennsylvania.** It was a long road to get to this point — but one that will make me a better Governor for all Pennsylvanians. After 13 months of campaigning, I stand before you humbled, honored, and ready to serve as Pennsylvania’s next Governor. Together, we proved that we can meet this moment. Though our politics are frayed and divided, we showed that we are strong enough to withstand this winter of darkness. That we can repair our politics and chart a path to a brighter tomorrow. We proved that democracy can defeat darkness. That equality will conquer extremism. That hope is stronger than fear. **This victory is a story of millions of Pennsylvanians taking off the red jersey and the blue jersey, and putting on the Pennsylvania jersey.** We stand here with a unique opportunity – not to retreat into our partisan corners, not to continue with business as usual in Harrisburg – but to step up together and meet this moment. It _won’t_ always be easy. We’re going to disagree, we’re going to get into arguments, but we’re going to stay true to our values _every single day_. So I stand before this Commonwealth hopeful – hopeful in our ability to work together and make life better for all 13 million Pennsylvanians. We will protect our democracy, keep abortion legal, expand economic opportunities, and make sure every Pennsylvanian has the chance to get ahead. This team means the world to me, and we can’t tell you how much it matters that we had your support during this tough race – and I hope you’ll always be a member of this community. We’ll be in touch over the coming weeks with more ways to get involved, stay up to date, and make your voice heard in Pennsylvania. Now, I hope you have the chance to celebrate – you truly earned it. Thank you so much for everything, Josh Shapiro
_Governor-Elect of Pennsylvania_ __ __ __ __ __ __

name: Lawrence W. Reed
subject: Who’s going to save future generations?
body:
Politicians aren't going to save you. The Swamp will not save the economy, abide by our Constitution, or restore our Republic.
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zmrc45jdhr2335fhtn4fnkeja0mgopu849cne2j0_rp22sh2s8i66or7cjieeo32cjh2bs)

Friend,

Politicians aren't going to save you.

The Swamp will not save the economy, abide by our Constitution, or restore our Republic.

Politicians come and go. We can't rely on them to protect our values.

**Restoring our Republic requires a citizenry who understands the principles of the Founding Fathers, capitalism, and our Constitution. **

We need institutions that defend liberty and free market economics to stop socialism and Marxism from taking over and killing America.

My name is Lawrence Reed, President Emeritus of the Foundation for Economic Education (FEE). I genuinely believe in reaching the next generation with the ideas of liberty and free-market economics.

But I could use your help to fund FEE's amazing educational programs.

[_**Friend, I know this is a lot, but I humbly ask you to chip in $10, $35, $50, or any amount today. Click here to send your gift >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zieglehg4gehu9o32b9od916n26vfpiibt74qllo_rp22sh2s8i66or7cjieeo32cjh2bs)

I've set a goal to raise $15,000 before the end of the week so we can reach more high school students.

This year, our goal is to pass the ideas of liberty and free market economics to over 50,000 students through our program, FEE in the Classroom.

Here's how FEE in the Classroom works:

**FEE in the Classroom** is a unique program held in brick-and-mortar and virtual classrooms across the country that teaches young Americans the principles of free markets, individual liberty, and limited government.

_**This program uniquely challenges high school students to think outside the box to challenge the mainstream narrative.**_

In a single day, FEE's faculty of acclaimed instructors teach 75-300 students how the core principles of individual liberty and free market economics apply to their daily lives.

As thousands of American high school students come to understand the positive impact freedom has on their lives, their communities, and our country through FEE in the Classroom,**the most frequently asked question afterward is,_" why haven't I heard these ideas before?"_**

You and I both know why these students have never heard the ideas of liberty before: _America 's public schools don't teach our nation's founding principles anymore. _

But FEE is changing this - and we are doing it in classrooms across the country.

[_**Can you support this essential program and FEE 's efforts to defeat socialism in the classroom? Please donate today >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zmnfsvhsgufk34dude0glk83nvum1ci81jh2gmrg_rp22sh2s8i66or7cjieeo32cjh2bs)

**That 's not all FEE is doing. **

Friend, I'm excited to tell you that FEE is working with local and state education departments to teach high school teachers economics.

Our direct-to-student educational programs have a significant impact on the next generation, but relying on student programs alone won't be enough to keep socialism out of classrooms.

By training high school teachers, our message of liberty, personal responsibility, and free markets will reach tens of thousands of students each year!

If you're tired of politicians trying to "save" us, if you're ready to defend the values of liberty and free market economics, then I invite you to partner with FEE today. **Click below to send your gift.**

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zlep17a23sb5i0hp6821f27500i64529ud1vresg_rp22sh2s8i66or7cjieeo32cjh2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zlgd5ghemr4mtn6coroiqh494b5tj9v8343e3d50_rp22sh2s8i66or7cjieeo32cjh2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zi18cri6tuhdac44coboldt759iao797h8ll11k8_rp22sh2s8i66or7cjieeo32cjh2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2za4af8980ee6oehugcrd57ogv6s3pjaf0gsi9tjg_rp22sh2s8i66or7cjieeo32cjh2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zm8gufkk3e0qe2vq8ifsagmpgvegdubjefd7i0qo_rp22sh2s8i66or7cjieeo32cjh2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ztpnqht8tp0bvimj9no8te4r3uqcj4p3fpfvola0_rp22sh2s8i66or7cjieeo32cjh2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zrsmu9cstnvit608m77sggnmc91iirjlfca8nbr0_rp22sh2s8i66or7cjieeo32cjh2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z47gkilu7c310u1eu0t0321lmescrmip8giuh70o_rp22sh2s8i66or7cjieeo32cjh2bs)

Thank you,

Lawrence W. Reed
President Emeritus

name: Herschel Walker
subject: We’re going to overtime
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks of this runoff campaign, so I need your help once again. |

---
Peter,

_**The fight for Georgia's Senate seat is going into OVERTIME.**_

**Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Tuesday, our Senate race is now heading to a RUNOFF on Tuesday, December 6th.**

It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks, so I need your help once again.

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff.

**[I'm going to beat Senator Warnock in this runoff, but I can't do it without the help of my top supporters on DAY ONE. Please donate $25, $50, $100, or any amount up to the limit of $2,900 to help us rebuild our campaign war chest so we can launch our advertising immediately!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61828496:618Lb6GNa:m:1:3253819041:E7FF04FC57E4B202C56578136964E58A:r)**

Everything is at stake in this runoff election, and we don't have a moment to waste. **[Will you rush in $5 or more in the next 30 minutes to be a DAY ONE runoff supporter?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61828496:618Lb6GNa:m:1:3253819041:E7FF04FC57E4B202C56578136964E58A:r)**

name: Brent Bozell
subject: BREAKING - FBI interfered with the 2020 election
body:
This is serious, and it confirms what we all know deep down - the FBI and deep state are actively involved in suppressing inform
[View this message in your browser](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zs9844rj1tiu5tvr605psu8l20ti0glee4c9r2k8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk4qj4ttkumqn4s9nmorb79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onkc5hm4d5lc9hm8s33c1q71cbm63hn6thn66oj0t3jelhreo3keiqn4shhmooreduie1p68dhgm9j74t1hepge1d3563gbacb4spj6cc9immqe0tr1cooj5cr66uobapbi46h22sh2s8i66or7cjie8or6cph2bs)
[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zb96m02dntv8e95e1nis2si28k2e9nh6t1qeqiu0_rp22sh2s8i66or7cjie8or6cph2bs)
Friend,

This is serious, and it confirms what we all know deep down - **the FBI and deep state are actively involved in suppressing information online, including the Hunter Biden story before the 2020 election.**

Read this paragraph from The Intercept article on the leaked documents. Tell me if your jaw doesn't drop.

_" According to records filed in federal court, two previously unnamed FBI agents -- Elvis Chan, an FBI special agent in the San Francisco field office, and Dehmlow, the section chief of the FBI's Foreign Influence Task Force -- were involved in high-level communications that allegedly "led to Facebook's suppression" of the Post's reporting."_

I won't rest until the media and their allies in the deep state are held accountable for the lies and suppression they committed in 2020.

As President of the Media Research Center, I am committing our resources to expose their fraud and corruption and bring them to justice for their crimes against the American people.

[_**I urgently ask for your help in our mission. Can you send a donation of $250, $100, $32, or even $12 today?**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zqm91ll28ih93knv8f9rpnj968jg139c4r859ppg_rp22sh2s8i66or7cjie8or6cph2bs)

[_**Donate $12**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zrvs7r4kinnhnhcebpmeavrc7nq7r0fi3lofmsn8_rp22sh2s8i66or7cjie8or6cph2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2za2sc08rnk7kd6h2l3m7pbgs9f0kc0l1vvg6mvtg_rp22sh2s8i66or7cjie8or6cph2bs)

_**Here 's how MRC helped expose these new documents to the public**_**.**

I am proud to say the Attorney Generals of Missouri and Louisiana used our work at MRC in the lawsuit that revealed a vast "censorship enterprise" between Big Tech platforms and the federal government.

We are playing our part, and I hope you can join me in saving our country from these criminals.

And it gets worse...

It's not just election interference. No. The federal government actively worked with social media to suppress information about COVID and the withdrawal from Afghanistan.

Basically, they suppress anything that goes against the leftwing narrative. And agents of our government are behind the scenes doing it.

[_**Donate $12**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zhcaafa6afu10u8qujqqb31kq7lk7d971elj4a20_rp22sh2s8i66or7cjie8or6cph2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zs07ja5nl15agcbj0bq49lrhfoplr3d8u71irtp8_rp22sh2s8i66or7cjie8or6cph2bs)

**I have a goal to raise $24,000 in the next 24 hours. Your support will be critical as we enter the next election and post-election news cycle. You can bet the radicals in power are already spinning their new narrative. I won 't let them off the hook. **

MRC's CensorTrack contains 3,800 verified cases of Big Tech censorship against conservatives! Our CensorTrack is helping to expose the big tech and Fed cooperation in censorship.

I couldn't be more proud, but our work is only beginning. As the power shifts from news media to big tech, our mission will shift to make sure conservatives have a chance to win.

[_**Can you urgently donate $12, $32, $100, $500, or even $1,000 today? I must reach this goal of $24,000 to expand our CensorTrack and media research.**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z9b559qcp7l8md6a5f2i6gmhbr88tgi7kll47nkg_rp22sh2s8i66or7cjie8or6cph2bs)

[_**Donate $12**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zf7o34p20ho3bjdprchrc2uhric08e8k23ead9lg_rp22sh2s8i66or7cjie8or6cph2bs)
[_**Donate $32**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zc6o8pelm9uckquc796lvtkmbr4foftvmapfjgn8_rp22sh2s8i66or7cjie8or6cph2bs)
[_**Donate $100**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z64vagvhlkuu03e2iui5tbv57mmha9l8gdpofcgo_rp22sh2s8i66or7cjie8or6cph2bs)
[_**Donate $120**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zoi3qjveebm9fqvvtqgmcb4r5q68ahd39qimuc88_rp22sh2s8i66or7cjie8or6cph2bs)
[_**Donate $320**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zgnrq6mad71tuuno1b9nl7ejldgarr677h9l9fno_rp22sh2s8i66or7cjie8or6cph2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zo2rbalo1vr3j595teghm97tvs54jij2fvavdbho_rp22sh2s8i66or7cjie8or6cph2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z16to0krue57cvgen0phphb7ltkelueuf8ssugv0_rp22sh2s8i66or7cjie8or6cph2bs)
[_**Donate $5,000**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z5dp0dmp74tq8ihbsghaiuhsqo09pdi1msisaft0_rp22sh2s8i66or7cjie8or6cph2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zm2gqneais7g0eflv195ta4k7cpcc4qr3otk2n50_rp22sh2s8i66or7cjie8or6cph2bs)

When the MRC was founded in 1987, over 75% of Americans trusted the left-wing media. Since then, MRC has successfully SHATTERED America's trust in the left-wing media -- over 90% of Americans state they DO NOT trust the media anymore.

I am confident we'll do the same to expose big tech censorship. Your support will make it possible.

Thank you,

Brent Bozell
Founder and President of MRC

_The mission of the Media Research Center is to create a media culture in America where truth and liberty flourish. The MRC is a research and education organization operating under Section 501(c)(3) of the Internal Revenue Code, and contributions to the MRC are tax-deductible._
