name: Seth Magaziner
subject: Thank you!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAGAZINER FOR CONGRESS
body:
Let me start by saying: thank you.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54348167/378256145/-1862136002?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTAxYzE4Yy00MDYwLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNGE2NTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tw4Icw-c8Afa5mGYxv_DUohstVt6UsotS59MbB3hEHM=&emci=54d08548-d45f-ed11-819c-002248258d2f&emdi=6901c18c-4060-ed11-ade6-14cb6534a651&ceid=15384964)
Peter,

Let me start by saying: **thank you.**

Our race has been called and it's official – I am honored to have the opportunity to represent the people of Rhode Island's 2nd District in Congress this January.

I can't thank you enough for your incredible support of this campaign. To everyone who volunteered, donated, or cast your vote to keep RI-02 blue: you're the reason we won this race.

Rhode Islanders sent a message loud and clear at the ballot box in favor of a pro-worker agenda, and against the extremism of Donald Trump and Kevin McCarthy. I look forward to fighting for every Rhode Islander in Congress, just as I've done as Treasurer.

I know our work is just beginning. We still have a long road ahead of us to protect Social Security and Medicare, defend abortion access, lower the cost of prescription drugs, transition to affordable clean energy, and more. I'm honored to have the opportunity to serve our district in Congress, and I'm ready to go to bat for the issues that matter most to us.

Thank you again for your support. It means the world to me.

Seth

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54348168/378256147/-915500772?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTAxYzE4Yy00MDYwLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNGE2NTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tw4Icw-c8Afa5mGYxv_DUohstVt6UsotS59MbB3hEHM=&emci=54d08548-d45f-ed11-819c-002248258d2f&emdi=6901c18c-4060-ed11-ade6-14cb6534a651&ceid=15384964) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54348169/378256148/-883321303?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTAxYzE4Yy00MDYwLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNGE2NTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tw4Icw-c8Afa5mGYxv_DUohstVt6UsotS59MbB3hEHM=&emci=54d08548-d45f-ed11-819c-002248258d2f&emdi=6901c18c-4060-ed11-ade6-14cb6534a651&ceid=15384964) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54348174/378256149/-108087027?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTAxYzE4Yy00MDYwLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNGE2NTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tw4Icw-c8Afa5mGYxv_DUohstVt6UsotS59MbB3hEHM=&emci=54d08548-d45f-ed11-819c-002248258d2f&emdi=6901c18c-4060-ed11-ade6-14cb6534a651&ceid=15384964)

body:
---
| | | | | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
|

| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE WEDNESDAY, NOVEMBER 9, 2022
BURT JONES STATEMENT ON WINNING GEORGIA LIEUTENANT GOVERNOR RACE
JACKSON, Ga. - Today, State Senator and Conservative businessman Burt Jones issued the following statement on his victory in the Georgia Lieutenant Governor's race:
---
|
---
| Burt Jones said, "What a great win! Jan and I are so grateful to the people of Georgia for their vote of confidence, and I am truly honored to be the next Lieutenant Governor of the great state of Georgia. Our campaign was successful because we ran a positive, truthful campaign focused on the issues that Georgians truly care about. Working together, we're going to deliver exactly what we campaigned on by cutting our state income tax and putting money back into the pockets of hardworking Georgians, improving our K-12 education system by empowering parents and teachers, standing with our law enforcement to reduce crime and protect Georgia families, and creating more opportunities for every person across our state.
Last but not least, thank you to everyone who volunteered for our campaign, who supported us, and who voted for us to make this win a reality. And for those who didn't vote for me-I promise to work every day to earn your support too. It's a great day for the state of Georgia, and we're going to work every day as your next Lieutenant Governor to keep making Georgia the best state to live, work and raise a family!"
---
| |
---
| To learn more about Burt's vision for Georgia - and to stay updated, sign up to volunteer, or get involved - visit [www.BurtJonesForGA.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Y7WF8zxBzSJf1s6eBsSm19oNhqgkhcAcOO6IvqGUggaFSlfLJfQBpjMAHeD6B6fJNePqQRxhKxWMJB6RLMSsnDZRYL7JMJHne7Dr-vthraDJVPqGEL9-lgzasCPYer2lUhwNDVh3L99SgXb_p2VJ0g==&c=xsPvncbshAcGP_Ie3VOtHs3bxAKJ6NxC4m1UmgKqmzNHZGb0qmedxA==&ch=c5LSJ51Rw_9ILLrYYMV5UpxPBuHT2OUj4ND2qAe7xLY9QxZVm-miMQ==) and follow us on [Facebook](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Y7WF8zxBzSJf1s6eBsSm19oNhqgkhcAcOO6IvqGUggaFSlfLJfQBpjMAHeD6B6fJtTcVhur8g9YZuTp7xwYBQ_HoUamRwt4pKoetZIvPTiwcaCne5s0I67s8eG0nZpLA5aOApFljbHkI7aS4mN_kXLVFk_EeXWnqyNvwzNZWjcw=&c=xsPvncbshAcGP_Ie3VOtHs3bxAKJ6NxC4m1UmgKqmzNHZGb0qmedxA==&ch=c5LSJ51Rw_9ILLrYYMV5UpxPBuHT2OUj4ND2qAe7xLY9QxZVm-miMQ==), [Twitter](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Y7WF8zxBzSJf1s6eBsSm19oNhqgkhcAcOO6IvqGUggaFSlfLJfQBpjMAHeD6B6fJG1F1kNCOqhCS4Sc71WKrPpE0jyvn8t1zuOZGzozLHwV_BmDS7FIOo4SF4UPyPyu7Dc-BRvr4oaG3ZxIHs0_Zw3AY_P2JvGX2&c=xsPvncbshAcGP_Ie3VOtHs3bxAKJ6NxC4m1UmgKqmzNHZGb0qmedxA==&ch=c5LSJ51Rw_9ILLrYYMV5UpxPBuHT2OUj4ND2qAe7xLY9QxZVm-miMQ==), and [Instagram](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Y7WF8zxBzSJf1s6eBsSm19oNhqgkhcAcOO6IvqGUggaFSlfLJfQBpjMAHeD6B6fJgiZeJZ08aOB7DOc-QgDhGOx16i3qN8d-WZLdC5Uf5VCXJK0MMUsGm0XTpZ1Be4DjRhLQ4cTLsFWXrXv1Llwydjt994oUocMl&c=xsPvncbshAcGP_Ie3VOtHs3bxAKJ6NxC4m1UmgKqmzNHZGb0qmedxA==&ch=c5LSJ51Rw_9ILLrYYMV5UpxPBuHT2OUj4ND2qAe7xLY9QxZVm-miMQ==).

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: FWD: OVERTIME
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Team Graham, Inc
body:
Herschel is ready to go into overtime, but he needs you on his team. |
Fellow American - **Herschel Walker knows what it's like to go into overtime.**

Every liberal in the country will be coming after Herschel during this runoff. We need to step up in a big way to help him win so we can flip this seat.

Millions more will be spent to hold this seat for Raphael Warnock on top of the $101 million he's already raised from liberal donors all over the country.

**[Please see Herschel's email below and step up to help him launch his ads immediately.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61086887:sHrIpNDNZ:m:1:877327319:9552725D7A194265BFAE9814381AEEE6:r)**

Thanks,

Lindsey Graham

* * *

**From:** Herschel Walker
**Date:** Wednesday, November 9, 2022 at 7:12 AM
**Subject:** OVERTIME
---

---
Fellow American,

_**The fight for Georgia's Senate seat is going into OVERTIME.**_

**Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Tuesday, our Senate race is now heading to a RUNOFF on Tuesday, December 6th.**

It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks, so I need your help once again.

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff.

**[I'm going to beat Senator Warnock in this runoff, but I can't do it without the help of my top supporters on DAY ONE. subject: Only 2 hours left to vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
body:
It's not too late to make your voice heard!
[](https://fitzs-scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-akjljul-yuhdluddtl-r/) **We only have two hours until polls close, Peter!**_If you haven't voted yet, what are you waiting for?_ Republican turnout is key to bringing the Red Wave to Wisconsin!If we want to turn our state and nation around, it will take every voter to make it happen. **Polls close at 8 PM, so there's still time for you to make your voice heard!**👇👇 [_**Click below to find your polling location!**_](https://fitzs-scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-akjljul-yuhdluddtl-y/)** ** 👇👇 [Find Your Polling Location | Click Here](https://fitzs-scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-akjljul-yuhdluddtl-j/) [Click Here for General Election Information](https://fitzs-scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-akjljul-yuhdluddtl-t/) If you received a ballot in the mail, you can still drop it off at your polling location. If you plan on voting in person, make sure you bring a valid photo ID and are in line by 8 PM! As long as you are in line by then, you will be guaranteed an opportunity to vote.**_Don't wait! Make a plan now, bring your friends and family, and cast your vote for Republicans up and down the ballot!_** Thank you,

subject: BREAKING - FBI interfered with the 2020 election
body:
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=260afe78328a4ac9aa5871166ef3e675&_e=Qo86iWhRkn0O5vPoSJzVWGdpuO4wZeBMVq-BqDOjZKkWdzP_951CR4zECw9uwQDjsCyR7_QgyFAjYwSIESx_E21dCB8vTV5sbYBvTEK-wTL8pFpCik6JJn9JnFEKlE_hgiyQJVTp5NjicuBuXimf8iXOal8DwQXgxxhLaNMe-K0Zj9VAGJmFShRanOExd0c6Pt34D8RLEsrpTQ9iQZp4PQnrsGWOlJ-RDkcUcSO_aN_VEs9g0eB9rp0binmU9EnZ8ILq-FeUtabw1hB2HGsvdQ%3D%3D)

name: Tony Vargas
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony Vargas for Congress
body:
|

| | Friend, thank you for believing in me and supporting my vision for this district. This campaign has always been about giving a voice to working families and uniting our community. Throughout my career, I’ve worked across the aisle to help parents, seniors, and students, and I will continue that fight in the Nebraska Legislature. I am the son of immigrants who came here with nothing and sacrificed so much for our family. My parents worked hard so my brothers and I could get an education and decide what we wanted for our lives. That’s why I work as hard as I possibly can, every day, so that people can have that same opportunity. I know the challenges facing Nebraskans right now because I’ve lived them -- the difficulty to find affordable housing, and to pay for groceries, gas, childcare, and medical bills. And while this wasn’t the outcome we’d hoped for, our work is not going to stop today. I will continue to serve. >From the bottom of my heart, thank you. Tony
---
|
* * *

name: Lawrence W. Reed
subject: Who’s going to save future generations?
body:
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=09ea4b4cccad42e4a1a4183cb178ac08&_e=q0WSZIBpxbRM4Oo5zacA9rJNBbolwU05Vwcz7jTCAiE6clB6u4MsblGLM0pbwCudkgyGbsiooNQOMsvuMNVmvI_vEdhv-K9r4LA7MCobQSaYNnZJOJxAJCY5SSzJCGQ_03JFU9sSj-mFsiO8evKqEOntHGFrGoRXzv9YyGs3hdRCtV5YnL0ksR8xR0PH2NCgtUZ1qrJcKN1yL82sd--bUTQdJhAoIy9lJAo1DGhZwE17bhEAfQ0WcbqIDwBpfo7TLjPBuarJlCdZwcofrCZxA28oerGJStDt2qIpNlyJnQ2KFTX_cyd8hrluw3kjeJJE)

Friend,

Politicians aren't going to save you.

The Swamp will not save the economy, abide by our Constitution, or restore our Republic.

Politicians come and go. We can't rely on them to protect our values.

**Restoring our Republic requires a citizenry who understands the principles of the Founding Fathers, capitalism, and our Constitution. **

We need institutions that defend liberty and free market economics to stop socialism and Marxism from taking over and killing America.

My name is Lawrence Reed, President Emeritus of the Foundation for Economic Education (FEE). I genuinely believe in reaching the next generation with the ideas of liberty and free-market economics.

But I could use your help to fund FEE's amazing educational programs.

[_**Friend, I know this is a lot, but I humbly ask you to chip in $10, $35, $50, or any amount today. Click here to send your gift >>>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=09ea4b4cccad42e4a1a4183cb178ac08&_e=q0WSZIBpxbRM4Oo5zacA9rJNBbolwU05Vwcz7jTCAiE6clB6u4MsblGLM0pbwCudkgyGbsiooNQOMsvuMNVmvI_vEdhv-K9r4LA7MCobQSaYNnZJOJxAJCY5SSzJCGQ_03JFU9sSj-mFsiO8evKqEEmSNSDdqmpLS3TgZtmCaPbCLl1o_Gf0nLjRYZDnpnYG9fJibzYLArId16yco1M60iIQfwdCanGWleW511Sx5_SCmAuWXv_FFlRSVaLkiut86iymrGFkYrnlrVpWSLX9i7sxj0NaSV6UrAg_pNfzRDPKJYsiMDSORq1SkFAbA_go)

I've set a goal to raise $15,000 before the end of the week so we can reach more high school students.

This year, our goal is to pass the ideas of liberty and free market economics to over 50,000 students through our program, FEE in the Classroom.

Here's how FEE in the Classroom works:

**FEE in the Classroom** is a unique program held in brick-and-mortar and virtual classrooms across the country that teaches young Americans the principles of free markets, individual liberty, and limited government.

_**This program uniquely challenges high school students to think outside the box to challenge the mainstream narrative.**_

In a single day, FEE's faculty of acclaimed instructors teach 75-300 students how the core principles of individual liberty and free market economics apply to their daily lives.

As thousands of American high school students come to understand the positive impact freedom has on their lives, their communities, and our country through FEE in the Classroom,**the most frequently asked question afterward is,_" why haven't I heard these ideas before?"_**

You and I both know why these students have never heard the ideas of liberty before: _America 's public schools don't teach our nation's founding principles anymore. _

But FEE is changing this - and we are doing it in classrooms across the country.

[_**Can you support this essential program and FEE 's efforts to defeat socialism in the classroom? Please donate today >>>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=09ea4b4cccad42e4a1a4183cb178ac08&_e=q0WSZIBpxbRM4Oo5zacA9rJNBbolwU05Vwcz7jTCAiE6clB6u4MsblGLM0pbwCudkgyGbsiooNQOMsvuMNVmvI_vEdhv-K9r4LA7MCobQSaYNnZJOJxAJCY5SSzJCGQ_03JFU9sSj-mFsiO8evKqEDHwEBDAEk2KI-4q9IsBR9Fc05mi_Tfs9gyxVy0HCQKIX_7-Lp1uu4LyyVnMyuzmKRhwKdxyDFQ3yhmXkiUuUNd_iDMXMm8XbvKs110xaMpvlVMVX_BKVqvI-uuBxTWYsmrhPz4cXeTkvsC_7vf0CdTi4F0gHbNQNriA5WvcwPjK)

**That's not all FEE is doing. **

Friend, I'm excited to tell you that FEE is working with local and state education departments to teach high school teachers economics.

Our direct-to-student educational programs have a significant impact on the next generation, but relying on student programs alone won't be enough to keep socialism out of classrooms.

By training high school teachers, our message of liberty, personal responsibility, and free markets will reach tens of thousands of students each year!

If you're tired of politicians trying to "save" us, if you're ready to defend the values of liberty and free market economics, then I invite you to partner with FEE today. **Click below to send your gift.**

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=09ea4b4cccad42e4a1a4183cb178ac08&_e=q0WSZIBpxbRM4Oo5zacA9rJNBbolwU05Vwcz7jTCAiE6clB6u4MsblGLM0pbwCudkgyGbsiooNQOMsvuMNVmvI_vEdhv-K9r4LA7MCobQSaYNnZJOJxAJCY5SSzJCGQ_4AfpJhckjQrEsORaEsCNyM4Q95FTBMpJfOzgRUUkewOq83QacBuW8_pT5u8Nh5i4dB8rKmkMed9_2iqJeUrA0wqe_pQGeP7VeVLw3ybI2IHvRzIJRCmLZ5uHRYqRQ_OkjtDXyZbn-FwE-_gEI2Xre6xzW4KsMfYl4KmrYyfV4atrbxDpf4pGFi9jli6qEpxy)

name: SmartAsset
subject: 7 Secrets Comfortable Retirees Know About Hiring a Financial Advisor
body:
**7 Secrets Smart Professionals Use To Choose Financial Advisors**
**Choosing a financial advisor is a major life decision that can determine your financial trajectory for years to come.**
A 2020 Northwestern Mutual study found that 71% of U.S. adults admit their financial planning needs improvement. However, only 29% of Americans work with a financial advisor.1
The value of working with a financial advisor varies by person and advisors are legally prohibited from promising returns, but research suggests people who [**_work with a financial advisor_**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=77fa0297ff3b4069b1d2be963e5db6ba&_e=i2lVrzZqMPzsNUthK-KVf6yWs-lKTT8joYW4MOKmKaEELBYftERa2hEV0YznzpRHknRmaOEkD-iuWRIPgfQ7h8FnIrK2ZQB0pjaSap6f6CdX_h45jqpFfV8rxZnVmydwmIGPK4PupN3MRfcAqXIQV2hjih1EHH0V-FOMk_iCIH0uSENT3LpOGKrzui0MQIGaf5RhBfVdknF8xFoOtXupbLqFNbzLArokkPd0T5-0L3gNZxCnSgseAJCZsKEU-hhYP2E0VRHvhgqd3lGBm8sE3jgsx_nP_JmXEj5ShSDmIlJgafyuz-SCY4pmQNghkjcsQwCEsoYEdoqETr4v73ZBRw71wlF63APZMmPD-DI2LLuZSngaIeADYj_2XdyOLfhTYkv58-ZCxffqgQ4wMCkluCzx8HLtoSOLHR5GEEabLLuDpGDzwrCUFLJ30hLsQPyn) feel more at ease about their finances and could end up with about 15% more money to spend in retirement.2
Consider this example: A recent Vanguard study found that, on average, a hypothetical $500K investment would grow to over $3.4 million under the care of an advisor over 25 years, whereas the expected value from self-management would be $1.69 million, or 50% less. In other words, an advisor-managed portfolio would average 8% annualized growth over a 25-year period, compared to 5% from a self-managed portfolio.3
[**_SmartAsset 's no-cost tool_**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=77fa0297ff3b4069b1d2be963e5db6ba&_e=i2lVrzZqMPzsNUthK-KVf6yWs-lKTT8joYW4MOKmKaEELBYftERa2hEV0YznzpRHknRmaOEkD-iuWRIPgfQ7h8FnIrK2ZQB0pjaSap6f6CdX_h45jqpFfV8rxZnVmydwmIGPK4PupN3MRfcAqXIQV2hjih1EHH0V-FOMk_iCIH0uSENT3LpOGKrzui0MQIGaf5RhBfVdknF8xFoOtXupbLqFNbzLArokkPd0T5-0L3gNZxCnSgseAJCZsKEU-hhYP2E0VRHvhgqd3lGBm8sE3jgsx_nP_JmXEj5ShSDmIlJFF4E2B2cTA2h4L-OJXGO_aosp430DSKDunTEiCNIZHKuddVgiu1bE7iukyztXFp8RsGqkHE9LLdJQvfOwGg_M9v_NgMDqeggmT_TMjXNnjq2loYWpeGrxcBQCLJhHl-JcALtldNdzvjUwi56EHInO) simplifies the time-consuming process of finding a financial advisor. A short questionnaire helps match you with up to three fiduciary financial advisors that serve your area, legally bound to work in your best interest. The whole process takes just a few minutes, and in many cases you can be connected instantly with an advisor for a free retirement consultation.
Advisors are rigorously screened through our proprietary due diligence process.
Being aware of these seven common blunders when [**_choosing an advisor_**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=77fa0297ff3b4069b1d2be963e5db6ba&_e=i2lVrzZqMPzsNUthK-KVf6yWs-lKTT8joYW4MOKmKaEELBYftERa2hEV0YznzpRHknRmaOEkD-iuWRIPgfQ7h8FnIrK2ZQB0pjaSap6f6CdX_h45jqpFfV8rxZnVmydwmIGPK4PupN3MRfcAqXIQV2hjih1EHH0V-FOMk_iCIH0uSENT3LpOGKrzui0MQIGaf5RhBfVdknF8xFoOtXupbLqFNbzLArokkPd0T5-0L3gNZxCnSgseAJCZsKEU-hhYP2E0VRHvhgqd3lGBm8sE3jgsx_nP_JmXEj5ShSDmIlISZssuLT0QmlYB1XIu7cAr_0bceEJnlVkXHoU1INvNzEX7oTZWSxc-iuuc3Mx1BGu04V0hRund02oZEeeqfvqxbaatBoPU_v1tARBcHbV5yC9F1x7A4Gc2GW4ygv2_7gkVg8tJvdbdm_O5zsV34MVF) can help you find peace of mind, and potentially avoid years of stress.
**1.****Always Hire an Advisor Who Is a Fiduciary**
By definition, a fiduciary is an individual who is ethically bound to act in another person's best interest. Fiduciary financial advisors must avoid conflicts of interest and disclose any potential conflicts of interest to clients..
All of the financial advisors on SmartAsset's matching platform are registered fiduciaries. If your advisor is not a fiduciary and constantly pushes investment products on you, [**_use this no-cost tool to find an advisor_**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=77fa0297ff3b4069b1d2be963e5db6ba&_e=i2lVrzZqMPzsNUthK-KVf6yWs-lKTT8joYW4MOKmKaEELBYftERa2hEV0YznzpRHknRmaOEkD-iuWRIPgfQ7h8FnIrK2ZQB0pjaSap6f6CdX_h45jqpFfV8rxZnVmydwmIGPK4PupN3MRfcAqXIQV2hjih1EHH0V-FOMk_iCIH0uSENT3LpOGKrzui0MQIGaf5RhBfVdknF8xFoOtXupbLqFNbzLArokkPd0T5-0L3gNZxCnSgseAJCZsKEU-hhYP2E0VRHvhgqd3lGBm8sE3jgsx_nP_JmXEj5ShSDmIlKWv19lo-3M4m7169Bx1scblLRdR59ZnabZkGKLK-kk85VseJmElCCICvH5um-UhGBdmDHOkUG6TJzGgNAD6ZNN4Vcn7e-77Kc4CFHHVgTUXpSJhl2J3GG3BkSma6pw1ISs6eWLEX_j71gRD5lnW--J) who has your best interest in mind.
**2.****Don't Hire the First Advisor You Meet**
While it's tempting to hire the advisor closest to home or the first advisor in the yellow pages, this decision requires more time. Take the time to interview at least a few advisors before picking the best match for you.
**3.****Don't Choose an Advisor with the Wrong Specialty**
Some financial advisors [**_specialize in retirement planning_**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=77fa0297ff3b4069b1d2be963e5db6ba&_e=i2lVrzZqMPzsNUthK-KVf6yWs-lKTT8joYW4MOKmKaEELBYftERa2hEV0YznzpRHknRmaOEkD-iuWRIPgfQ7h8FnIrK2ZQB0pjaSap6f6CdX_h45jqpFfV8rxZnVmydwmIGPK4PupN3MRfcAqXIQV2hjih1EHH0V-FOMk_iCIH0uSENT3LpOGKrzui0MQIGaf5RhBfVdknF8xFoOtXupbLqFNbzLArokkPd0T5-0L3gNZxCnSgseAJCZsKEU-hhYP2E0VRHvhgqd3lGBm8sE3jgsx_nP_JmXEj5ShSDmIlI6We8Zyj2bE1BS8ozv3hC_uSwVolIX7cNXGF5dY_uCMmcSltovBVQR00s0UNL6yG-TrSRd8bf1OdX11OuHBcS-n2kVYGJjAgMkgFP6LXP5iCWsODjNace_gaOvu6yCqtsObl-RvxJZB8IpQSp9rhbG) , while others are best for business owners or those with a high net worth. Some might be best for young professionals starting a family. Be sure to understand an advisor's strengths and weaknesses - before signing the dotted line.
**4.****Don't Pick an Advisor With an Incompatible Strategy**
Each advisor has a unique strategy. Some advisors may suggest aggressive investments, while others are more conservative. If you prefer to go all in on stocks, an advisor that prefers bonds and index funds is not a great match for your style.
**5.****Always Ask About Credentials**
To give investment advice, [**_financial advisors_**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=77fa0297ff3b4069b1d2be963e5db6ba&_e=i2lVrzZqMPzsNUthK-KVf6yWs-lKTT8joYW4MOKmKaEELBYftERa2hEV0YznzpRHknRmaOEkD-iuWRIPgfQ7h8FnIrK2ZQB0pjaSap6f6CdX_h45jqpFfV8rxZnVmydwmIGPK4PupN3MRfcAqXIQV2hjih1EHH0V-FOMk_iCIH0uSENT3LpOGKrzui0MQIGaf5RhBfVdknF8xFoOtXupbLqFNbzLArokkPd0T5-0L3gNZxCnSgseAJCZsKEU-hhYP2E0VRHvhgqd3lGBm8sE3jgsx_nP_JmXEj5ShSDmIlKE2u1MmvogiMkyhaJg_hTyCIOHpkRVVLSbCdGmiifUZI5La2E-1t-5-OlkY50bH3KH6G_lmrsv4nHViw59Sdc7lk5d0he6fGrzooN78X3zTLM2mBUekJDMjbYntdX0A8UjlcZcGil7hGx9kTvJ0tq8) are required to pass a test. Ask your advisor about their licenses, tests, and credentials. Financial advisors tests include the Series 7, and Series 66 or Series 65. Some advisors go a step further and become a Certified Financial Planner, or CFP.
**6.****Understand How They are Paid**
Some advisors are "fee only" and charge you a flat rate no matter what. Others charge a percentage of your assets under management. Some advisors are paid commissions by mutual funds, a serious conflict of interest. If the advisor earns more by ignoring your best interests, do not hire them.
**7.****Hire a Vetted Advisor**
Chances are, there are several highly qualified financial advisors in your town. However, it can seem daunting to choose one.
Our no-cost tool helps make it easy to [**_find qualified financial advisors who serve your area_**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=77fa0297ff3b4069b1d2be963e5db6ba&_e=i2lVrzZqMPzsNUthK-KVf6yWs-lKTT8joYW4MOKmKaEELBYftERa2hEV0YznzpRHknRmaOEkD-iuWRIPgfQ7h8FnIrK2ZQB0pjaSap6f6CdX_h45jqpFfV8rxZnVmydwmIGPK4PupN3MRfcAqXIQV2hjih1EHH0V-FOMk_iCIH0uSENT3LpOGKrzui0MQIGaf5RhBfVdknF8xFoOtXupbLqFNbzLArokkPd0T5-0L3gNZxCnSgseAJCZsKEU-hhYP2E0VRHvhgqd3lGBm8sE3jgsx_nP_JmXEj5ShSDmIlJtTpBEax131PQS051A-sTwOeBcwViwHK4py7THI6nlpYaLEKbZcrtGCcoKzqAL7E7iRlq9r4XmQ--jAQlVG8ziDl9fRWnKp9kn_odl4CqD5bCNysP3qP5Cwf3CAerEkBKoFy0RQt9gJ0mjKgfZi8k2). clean_body: 7 Secrets Smart Professionals Use To Choose Financial Advisors Choosing a financial advisor is a major life decision that can determine your financial trajectory for years to come. A 2020 Northwestern Mutual study found that 71% of U.S. adults admit their financial planning needs improvement. However, only 29% of Americans work with a financial advisor.1 The value of working with a financial advisor varies by person and advisors are legally prohibited from promising returns, but research suggests people who feel more at ease about their finances and could end up with about 15% more money to spend in retirement.2 Consider this example: A recent Vanguard study found that, on average, a hypothetical $500K investment would grow to over $3.4 million under the care of an advisor over 25 years, whereas the expected value from self-management would be $1.69 million, or 50% less. In other words, an advisor-managed portfolio would average 8% annualized growth over a 25-year period, compared to 5% from a self-managed portfolio.3 simplifies the time-consuming process of finding a financial advisor. A short questionnaire helps match you with up to three fiduciary financial advisors that serve your area, legally bound to work in your best interest. The whole process takes just a few minutes, and in many cases you can be connected instantly with an advisor for a free retirement consultation. Advisors are rigorously screened through our proprietary due diligence process. Being aware of these seven common blunders when can help you find peace of mind, and potentially avoid years of stress. 1.Always Hire an Advisor Who Is a Fiduciary By definition, a fiduciary is an individual who is ethically bound to act in another person's best interest. Fiduciary financial advisors must avoid conflicts of interest and disclose any potential conflicts of interest to clients.. All of the financial advisors on SmartAsset's matching platform are registered fiduciaries. If your advisor is not a fiduciary and constantly pushes investment products on you, who has your best interest in mind. 2.Don't Hire the First Advisor You Meet While it's tempting to hire the advisor closest to home or the first advisor in the yellow pages, this decision requires more time. Take the time to interview at least a few advisors before picking the best match for you. 3.Don't Choose an Advisor with the Wrong Specialty Some financial advisors , while others are best for business owners or those with a high net worth. Some might be best for young professionals starting a family. Be sure to understand an advisor's strengths and weaknesses - before signing the dotted line. 4.Don't Pick an Advisor With an Incompatible Strategy Each advisor has a unique strategy. Some advisors may suggest aggressive investments, while others are more conservative. If you prefer to go all in on stocks, an advisor that prefers bonds and index funds is not a great match for your style. 5.Always Ask About Credentials To give investment advice, are required to pass a test. Ask your advisor about their licenses, tests, and credentials. Financial advisors tests include the Series 7, and Series 66 or Series 65. Some advisors go a step further and become a Certified Financial Planner, or CFP. 6.Understand How They are Paid Some advisors are "fee only" and charge you a flat rate no matter what. Others charge a percentage of your assets under management. Some advisors are paid commissions by mutual funds, a serious conflict of interest. If the advisor earns more by ignoring your best interests, do not hire them. 7.Hire a Vetted Advisor Chances are, there are several highly qualified financial advisors in your town. However, it can seem daunting to choose one. Our no-cost tool helps make it easy to . Now you can get matched with up to three fiduciary investment advisors that are vetted and subject to our due diligence criteria. The entire matching process takes just a few minutes. name: Reverend Mark Holland
subject: Our work is not done
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Holland for Kansas
body:
| Unfortunately, we did not win. We knew this was a possible outcome when we got into the race over a year ago. We knew we were taking on a big-name incumbent. We knew he started the race with $4 million. We knew it was a midterm election. We knew it was Kansas.

We also knew it was the right thing to do. We knew it was possible. We knew we were up to the task.

I want to thank each of you who donated, called, texted, knocked doors, sent postcards, and most of all: Voted! This is a tribute to all of you who believed in what is possible. You believed in what is right.

Our work is not done. We will take some time to regroup and see what needs to be done next. It took years to flip Georgia and Arizona. We will do the work. Democracy matters.

Thank you from the bottom of my heart. I am honored and humbled to have served as your Democratic Nominee for U.S. Senator in Kansas.

Sincerely, Mark
---

subject: We’re going to a runoff
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:

Fellow American,

_**The fight for Georgia's Senate seat is going into OVERTIME.**_

**Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Tuesday, our Senate race is now heading to a RUNOFF on Tuesday, December 6th.**

It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks, so I need your help once again.

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff.

**[I'm going to beat Senator Warnock in this runoff, but I can't do it without the help of my top supporters on DAY ONE. name: ConservativeFWD on behalf of Hillsdale College
subject: C.S. Lewis like you’ve never seen him before
body:
C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history.
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zo8b1afr5prsdslevfev053e9csrnoletuaip680_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t56ej3fctmekp76t1heipnacpne4pqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65spimho77chhm3j64ohnmjh6bdpn6pjj2tj6mso74stgm9qmfcph6him9o3gsdrjfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3cup70pjkcipm0ptnc1j72c5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash1k8gn48n24hhm6o70chg61o73c8iv0)
*Sponsored Message*
[](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z8fnk43kaelelt63i780r68ibr098a064k7alnpg_rp22sh2s8i66or0s1i60o70sdh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I'm writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News _because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--like our free online courses. _ _ And though we're best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author--C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **"[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zv1avqe4jca1r75levopjtv3uva9v4b5jhia9pbg_rp22sh2s8i66or0s1i60o70sdh2bs)" **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That's why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **"[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z92q0upasvi7pbn65in9o99qdccr77749r9n80mo_rp22sh2s8i66or0s1i60o70sdh2bs)," **we've received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis' writings. [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z89a6n6bgmdqfvn7mi70iqcgbp8cs8jp3o0kp0u8_rp22sh2s8i66or0s1i60o70sdh2bs) We've also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I'm pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **"[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zv5868g8vojer6jag41v3isgotjucihhq5kvem0o_rp22sh2s8i66or0s1i60o70sdh2bs)"** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won't last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z7h7aqs0udeqdfeg6qjdo7uad6eo3bl0eg25u7u0_rp22sh2s8i66or0s1i60o70sdh2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray, '01 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College

You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of "" on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won't last long. name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: About Last Night... | Trump Or Desantis | My Interview w/The Queen Of Disinformation
body:
Last night, we did not have the "Red Wave" across the country that many of us were hoping for. However, we did have pockets of hope ( like New York o
| | |
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15355936.8889.1.0139ade0b16691a49b30540f9a383905)
---
Last night, we did not have the "**Red Wave** " across the country that many of us were hoping for. However, we did have _pockets of hope_ ( like New York of all places) and still are awaiting the results of key races in Arizona & Georgia. Our nation is **deeply divided** and **extremely polarized**. The hope of America is _not_ a political candidate or party but the **Lord Jesus Christ**. However, this does not mean that we do not engage in the realm of politics. It is beyond important that we bring our faith into the political arena to help **SAVE AMERICA**. With the disappointing performances of many Republicans last night, **President Trump** has come under fire from **Fox News** analysts and **social media influencers** on Twitter. Many are pushing for Ron Desantis over Donald Trump in 2024. My opinion is that we stay unified behind **Donald Trump for 2024.** He was the greatest President of our lifetime and already has four years of experience in DC. I am concerned about the _lack of loyalty_ shown by Ron Desantis. If it were not for Donald Trump in 2018 pulling Desantis across the finish-line, he would have never been Governor of Florida in the first place. If the rumors are true that next week Trump will announce his run for POTUS in 2024, I believe **we need to rally behind him** as a unified force to take back the White House in 2024. Between then and now it is **imperative** that we continue to pray for our nation and live out our faith in our every day lives to impact those around us. **America needs a spiritual awakening and it will begin with the people of God.** Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer Follow me on [TruthSocial](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15355936.8890.1.b3ba50bc7b354441fb12048df5e6f35b), GAB, [Facebook](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15355936.8891.1.aa553942de8d988ebdb56e16ee8418d2), [Instagram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15355936.8892.1.0dddea9d80186757f855e3feea47a1af), [Twitter](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15355936.8893.1.5b1ea268f098dc28caf0b70b9900b465), [Telegram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15355936.8894.1.eba63a2d014aa4de519b90cf62de357a), GETTR & [YouTube](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15355936.8895.1.9dc2583e084fd40b028416b75e23965e)). [www.jacksonlahmeyer.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15355936.8896.1.032e5b22c0a1cb93c6170c4f7bbeae24)

## The Queen Of Disinformation
---
Today, I just released **episode 5** of my new show "[Unfiltered w/Jackson Lahmeyer](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15355936.8898.1.8c33cf05dc17cc78faf05272a3225a3c)" On this show, I interview the **"Queen of Disinformation"** according to the Biden Regime who labeled her one of the twelve largest influencers spreading disinformation on social media. On this episode, **Charlene Bollinger** and I discuss what has been happening in our world for the last two years and what the answer to win the war is. Be sure to subscribe to my [YouTube channel](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=15355936.8899.1.000fdf7ac62865e39cb87bf8ad2a60d5) to be notified each week of the newest episode. name: Derek Kilmer
subject: From the bottom of my heart, thank you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Grateful to you for having my back
Peter,

I'm going to let you in on a little secret...every Election Day, before going to bed, I write a note to my kids. I try to put into context, for them, what has happened. And I try to help them understand why I continue to do the work that I'm doing.

This year, as I wrote to them, I shared that elections - and campaigns - are about choices. Do we choose unity or division? Do we push for progress or political point-scoring? Do we take a positive high-road or a negative low-road? Do we demonstrate civility?

I'm humbled that the voters of Washington's 6th District chose to re-elect me. I'm grateful for the choice they made. But even though it was my name on the ballot, their choice was about all of us. It was about the future we want - not just for my kids but for our entire country.

My most important message to my kids - and to you - is simple: THANK YOU!

This morning, I'm feeling a sense of gratitude to every one of you who lent your time, your hard-earned dollars, and your effort to help give me the opportunity to serve as your representative for another term. I'm feeling honored and humbled that I once again can be your voice in our nation's capital.

Obviously, we will have our work cut out for us. But here's my commitment, Peter, I'll keep fighting for an economy that works better for everyone, so that no matter where you live or the circumstances you were born into - you have a shot. I'll keep working to protect working people and to ensure people in our country have affordable healthcare. I'll keep fighting to defend Social Security and Medicare. I'll keep fighting to defend our democracy and protect voting rights. I'll keep fighting to defend clean air and water and to take action to combat the climate crisis. And I'll keep fighting to defend every woman's right to make her own personal health care decisions without the interference of politicians.

Right now, it's still too soon to determine if we successfully defended our Democratic majorities in the House and Senate. No matter what happens, I will never stop fighting to make our government and economy work for the American people. That is the promise of our democracy.

**While we have a lot of work to do - at the present moment - I want to express how thankful I am to this grassroots team for all you've done to support me and our campaign. The road ahead may be challenging, but I am grateful to be traveling it with each of you by my side. **

Thanks again for your support - and as always, it's an honor to represent you.

Derek

P.S. We will be picking up signs over the next week. If you have one or have picked one up that we can come get, just let us know!

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/RcuovhdvvOhIKiKePtdKYyytUnmsaYzJEE1m6bQ-dGg=/rK0ArOkVrDWc9ef_MqcsheZXor3aj--ofF6kQA5bY48=) | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/RcuovhdvvOhIKiKePtdKYyytUnmsaYzJEE1m6bQ-dGg=/THQc6QfXrqNVr2UJMJu2q4vpAtvsc6Gri-ekN3-1pHw=)
---|---

---

PO Box 1381
Tacoma WA 98402 United States

Our digital program helps us reach folks with the latest updates. But, if you'd rather not hear from our team, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/RcuovhdvvOhIKiKePtdKYyytUnmsaYzJEE1m6bQ-dGg=/KsvMfKngXi0E7xx97oJEsSGgDavKwA5uYenFvIn6Tqw=).

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff.

body:
VICTORY!
| | | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NEGcDV970w6FnShBh4WksYeeQftNm7d6P7cTPM-DKQGOlx9jU1QAQoass3xG_C9nBPdcmkdyHO4uPzOgnppqXVZgJnehf2917TBNDMO0vumglQQhPBj5_xKLFge6FSfDw24OFg1nBu8J9-3QFbVWjk3I9_XhQ5It&c=VAbRo6Yd1B-DoMeynaDWLwu_q7wv4wU-X-PN1_W2kL-ydeoNXXUe9A==&ch=iY3aVWac33jMK0wCx_RgJhi-HyJaZAxRfxKgpXK8MfkZVqKa4aVv4Q==)
---
| Friend
I am honored to continue serving as your representative here in Florida's 3rd Congressional District. This win is the result of months of hard work by so many people, and I am grateful for each and every person who made this victory possible.
This election was a critical one as we fight to take our country and our House back. Conservatives this cycle have proven to the American people that we're prepared to put our nation back on the right path by strengthening our economy and lowering inflation, securing our borders, restoring the rights of parents, and stopping the rampant crime plaguing our communities nationwide.

clean_body: VICTORY! | | | | | == | Friend I am honored to continue serving as your representative here in Florida's 3rd Congressional District. This win is the result of months of hard work by so many people, and I am grateful for each and every person who made this victory possible. This election was a critical one as we fight to take our country and our House back. Conservatives this cycle have proven to the American people that we're prepared to put our nation back on the right path by strengthening our economy and lowering inflation, securing our borders, restoring the rights of parents, and stopping the rampant crime plaguing our communities nationwide. | == | I'm eternally grateful to all of our supporters, campaign volunteers, and our hardworking team who made this victory possible. I also send congratulations to my colleagues who have been re-elected and the new Republican Members-elect who will join us in Washington in January. Friend here's to a new era of leadership! name: Mike Thompson
subject: Thank you Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress unsubscribe: https://support
body:
# [#]
Peter,

Thank you to everyone who voted in the Midterm Election yesterday, and especially to those who voted to re-elect me.

Serving the people of the district where I was born, grew up and raised my family is the greatest honor of my life. I am humbled and honored to have earned the trust of our district to represent our community in Congress. Please know that I will continue to work tirelessly to ensure our district is the best place in the nation to raise a family, start a business, and retire with dignity.

Although I am deeply saddened to no longer represent the communities of Benicia, Crockett, Hercules, Martinez, Pinole, Rodeo, and Vallejo, I will continue advancing policies that bolster our newly numbered Fourth District in the United States Congress.

Once again, I am humbled to have earned your trust to represent our community and I look forward to bolstering the middle class, lowering the cost of housing and health care, addressing our climate crisis, and keeping our communities safe.

Sincerely,

Mike Thompson

name: Herschel Walker
subject: OVERTIME
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks of this runoff campaign, so I need your help once again. |

---
Peter,

_**The fight for Georgia's Senate seat is going into OVERTIME.**_

**Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Tuesday, our Senate race is now heading to a RUNOFF on Tuesday, December 6th.**

It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks, so I need your help once again.

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff.

**[I'm going to beat Senator Warnock in this runoff, but I can't do it without the help of my top supporters on DAY ONE. Please donate $25, $50, $100, or any amount up to the limit of $2,900 to help us rebuild our campaign war chest so we can launch our advertising immediately!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61827022:6g2jo6GNy:m:1:3369487795:130257B09308EA25DE78074754328945:r)**

name: Josh (personal)
subject: WE WON!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [#]It’s official: we’ve won NJ-5!

This is the culmination of so much hard work from everyone on our team. >From the campaign staff to the volunteers to grassroots supporters, to every single person who turned out and voted for me — this is because of you.

Together, we’ve beaten back extremism. Together, we rejected partisanship and unified behind a vision of problem-solving and making a difference for New Jersey families.

There’s only one thing left to say: Thank you. This is your win, and I owe each and every one of you an enormous debt of gratitude. You made this possible.

But we can’t stop now. There’s still more work to be done, and our problems didn’t vanish just because an election went our way. So tonight, we celebrate, and tomorrow, we get right back to work solving the problems of our community.

Thanks again for all you’ve done.

Yours,

Josh
Josh Gottheimer represents New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District. Josh is in Congress to fight for lower taxes and Jersey Values. He’s working across the aisle to find real solutions for New Jersey families and is actively fighting against the ideological gridlock in Washington. Herschel Walker and far-Left Democrat Senator Raphael Warnock is going to a RUNOFF.

name: Casey DeSantis
subject: Thank you, Florida
body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window.
https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=de41402db0a3014bc547421ccda2fec5a47703ace4e234848ef9355a3646303f676ccab62f731356e0cd7affa43030834626227d5047a6ecb6911af0f114f04fc7e6dc91db27e34cfc3d138310bc3041

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=8220c9bfa8074033089926bfa1db5f8fac065ac6cf8c35f666d05d4a83b18e7db991d77b9ec700117e1581b4d45e650f885ca6b711fbd87b79cbca32d1e5098f

Peter, thank you.

Words cannot express the gratitude I have for the support you have shown our Governor over the past few years.

When Ron first came into office, there were nearly 300,000 more registered Democrat voters than Republicans in Florida.

Now, four years later, registered Republicans in Florida outnumber Democrats by more than 300,000.

Throughout this campaign, we’ve worked together to share the message of our Freedom Agenda to Floridians across the state.

Because of the help from supporters like you, we were able to knock on more than 2 million doors.

We mobilized 1.1 million Mamas for DeSantis, marking the largest parent-led initiative in Florida's history.

And last night, we re-elected our Governor by a historic margin.

None of these accomplishments would be possible without supporters like you.

You are the heartbeat of the fight to Keep Florida Free, and the reason why our Governor fights tirelessly for our state.

Thanks to your help and your vote, we will continue our fight to keep Florida the freest state in the nation.

We’ve accomplished a lot the past four years: securing parental rights, keeping our communities safe by upholding the rule of law, and rejecting woke indoctrination in the classroom. But our fight has only just begun.

Last night’s tremendous win is just the catalyst for what’s in store for Florida’s future.

Governor DeSantis will continue fighting for the people of this state the same way he fights for our family.

He will not back down in his resolve for Florida to remain a bastion of freedom in our country.

Because of my husband's leadership over the past four years, Florida is the best place to raise a family, run a business, and educate your children. We are committed to keeping it that way.

In Florida, freedom is here to stay.

Thank you again for your support.

Together, we kept Florida free, and together, we will continue putting common sense over nonsense, liberty over lockdowns, and freedom over fear.

Sincerely,

Casey DeSantis

Paid by Ron DeSantis, Republican, for Governor.

301 W. Platt Street Suite 345 Tampa, FL 33606

name: Full Mag News
subject: Victor Davis Hanson on DVD
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=56ba0762f7604bea92afdfe83af2bf45&_e=rXEhlNTtFRxnHQCW_9Yz0jWIRwr2xIZVscDeBrNGG3TWggALJzvjP8EJpYmqP5NaEAJo_AuCRN5biPv7udT9c_nE8eiKkZ9sKre9p1VPWjmHWu4tQMTPFtqsc4EcsF6hGS5YvIlPuIw0PyL4--mpg9Y6Immq8ShYp0dNpSeWiJutl7NILAiwFf2n8Nzr-ThDPp2ndq-6ieX0tpp9hRVrUJ51ZqOaDbQmSPpd62cduZmTdZeQbLSEL1srvPIf3AnAVjRFsaPuNFPoBz7skBn6s4wCB_Jky8IT0Q6ySyHFV2Z6vnibDlRaAluQxwTyB43tgEABIWwsIi7BYUpJuS8CjGxbWZ_0eTDQPz_L4Z2wdPfwjSml-0DiTD3TgNmUaddFIeMI0GEdP3tKLCVGCWdMUQ%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled "The Second World Wars." Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. clean_body: Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled "The Second World Wars." Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here's a secure link to reserve your copy of "The Second World Wars " on DVD: Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College Sent to Full Mag News subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

body:
Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD | | | This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f08bb8abeaca465d80a6045e952c0ee2&_e=gt3AMG8UkSnfXv21JmCYawbbEUOYjzHG8GZHqMLabhVKUViDcjF9ZrrOO4zPga_dXjE4T1nCYmBw45xthsVwKorySTP3XEByhOfVQu8ssIv0kG3caJXF3NaP1Kc8dGbcu_kelIlHWhLpMaPTTxfHX-aYw3HSTMqUyyGZkCVtn442Wx3yNJBPI6mVRVLO1mtE6Rw-C-ItBKpTVR2bw1F0V_CPB4M39K02_eFXY9nY8wedUPgmB0Bwjn6DVOttk9_dsJh1E5ATeRQpAEdvojPQqUL1Rjr3iDi5fl4nJ_6QnQ51BvY-QKlfCLaiFO8iAgjU2Gq2CtCOgdYT2OBXrixpAPYKup4ufn6HPqTjC9BCBJb6CAlrF8No61HKZhoaRO2SUMDjcc5VlgVjjhylrqAd_g%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f08bb8abeaca465d80a6045e952c0ee2&_e=gt3AMG8UkSnfXv21JmCYawbbEUOYjzHG8GZHqMLabhVKUViDcjF9ZrrOO4zPga_dXjE4T1nCYmBw45xthsVwKorySTP3XEByhOfVQu8ssIv0kG3caJXF3NaP1Kc8dGbcu_kelIlHWhLpMaPTTxfHX-aYw3HSTMqUyyGZkCVtn442Wx3yNJBPI6mVRVLO1mtE6Rw-C-ItBKpTVR2bw1F0V_CPB4M39K02_eFXY9nY8wedUPgmB0Bwjn6DVOttk9_dbayRPacU3HhROeztQ-FD3AaevPwg1BTUO0GPBjG6zIO4hNhvnNwvCkOCeFVClZ6_UGrM9z19Fok2qMPNEavhr2Ye6qKSPk_ixww4RNVEKVce5t8xWTg6HBRrX9bRUbZbuX7r_54mWf1UJVrWsD096g%3D%3D) I hope you're having a great day so far. Today, I'm writing to let you know that we've produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our "Constitution 101" course, and I'd like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College's world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. "Constitution 101" is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f08bb8abeaca465d80a6045e952c0ee2&_e=gt3AMG8UkSnfXv21JmCYawbbEUOYjzHG8GZHqMLabhVKUViDcjF9ZrrOO4zPga_dXjE4T1nCYmBw45xthsVwKorySTP3XEByhOfVQu8ssIv0kG3caJXF3NaP1Kc8dGbcu_kelIlHWhLpMaPTTxfHX-aYw3HSTMqUyyGZkCVtn442Wx3yNJBPI6mVRVLO1mtE6Rw-C-ItBKpTVR2bw1F0V_CPB4M39K02_eFXY9nY8wedUPgmB0Bwjn6DVOttk9_diajf8Qa0r6fzeGHpCDH3W_pfTYE4F2FpjE_2eLhX90JGPDUuHFwDkZiBXKdXsGfkrIxIVTzFJsN3C3dz_nOvy0IAGxBDB_a93yHs5luHCGAqL7kLmcvxNYS77yugGjK51elwjdm6zB6qv6_q8CXJ9Q%3D%3D) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new "Constitution 101" DVD box set are limited, so I hope you'll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth--Defending Liberty since 1844

name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: The most personal email I’ve ever sent you
body:
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=675fcb0e9eb44c4c9b8f458c9d8ac236&_e=4_tqV-iILV211_VG3uri61JwBLzPRd3oIyyVOgaccV9Mqv5SYtYNy78S-OmaMPnxNIPVTDvhUFjQsyxoLZNxG3MOZe6eu2pWgKQC4b-FWNvBDjGD30tmOvkGwDExgVeD1K6QJ3K7ZrkYNZkbJtsrBc-4r7lnplD4oIZTs1ccdjTSxkxhiwByKexXuWzmQpxPsLF9NfgdFgztZI4r8x6-zP92IFMVriYCwiNFb_FwvAmbTlPwcDdpo4pta20a76hdAeOycXUWgXvfbK5oC2Wmjuj5qx_QePQ2pmMAiRGxQ-U%3D)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation 's mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=675fcb0e9eb44c4c9b8f458c9d8ac236&_e=4_tqV-iILV211_VG3uri61JwBLzPRd3oIyyVOgaccV9Mqv5SYtYNy78S-OmaMPnxNIPVTDvhUFjQsyxoLZNxG3MOZe6eu2pWgKQC4b-FWNvBDjGD30tmOvkGwDExgVeD1K6QJ3K7ZrkYNZkbJtsrBW4A2TIuxoO7hb3bdCQHeybH33JdzL-yrf31o5wV31BrUMHFs5jvFJyCaoaHBB16DosJswFGYOPNwMtBp-jWcv_BmwOS0ElaqVMzli3pCJh8nYYtAkjXTRWe5SsJ7BZUifU98l4GMY7OJBF66h0srNM%3D)

**_Now I 'll share my story_... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking.

We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I've dealt with racism... _**I 've even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=675fcb0e9eb44c4c9b8f458c9d8ac236&_e=4_tqV-iILV211_VG3uri61JwBLzPRd3oIyyVOgaccV9Mqv5SYtYNy78S-OmaMPnxNIPVTDvhUFjQsyxoLZNxG3MOZe6eu2pWgKQC4b-FWNvBDjGD30tmOvkGwDExgVeD1K6QJ3K7ZrkYNZkbJtsrBV3DVQzNrYdj--0W0sCaDpP5psIDQrUdZ5EKIa-zGt4gQvOU78dS12Qd3A0Z-5pk0sBTqBQsSSthXhzTMbfbV2ZmO2QXHWcxJRaAg5kan9OHkNsLmoHcnm0urVDWv36oCilPNJ4BrHMxuv5q9TxE01E%3D)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I 'm not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT 's efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=675fcb0e9eb44c4c9b8f458c9d8ac236&_e=4_tqV-iILV211_VG3uri61JwBLzPRd3oIyyVOgaccV9Mqv5SYtYNy78S-OmaMPnxNIPVTDvhUFjQsyxoLZNxG3MOZe6eu2pWgKQC4b-FWNvBDjGD30tmOvkGwDExgVeD1K6QJ3K7ZrkYNZkbJtsrBVZEoGXvEEf2b31soylJko8WQ_lv9lJ5ASJHrXhlQD8sMyNp0R5rmkTwkaIUzp9jECyyqAqGoLmeuG4W5PR8xxFmBEJLUf7pySzdhDy6rqw4oCoejiMgc9-aSpe3BC4W9p3_7IHbQUUZNRkKEQSDe-I%3D)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=675fcb0e9eb44c4c9b8f458c9d8ac236&_e=4_tqV-iILV211_VG3uri61JwBLzPRd3oIyyVOgaccV9Mqv5SYtYNy78S-OmaMPnxNIPVTDvhUFjQsyxoLZNxG3MOZe6eu2pWgKQC4b-FWNvBDjGD30tmOvkGwDExgVeD1K6QJ3K7ZrkYNZkbJtsrBaAfgrzPXkP2YSl-okfAgClOqN1Cuiaz2cAz50_Q6ip5TZ7zfxgj4HiPsQkxelWVcRJnZ6Dqk7HzmUSDfGscChXVwKZWKRpbT5dPqhYbSGZsztEUyV8w5G2BXZQEtqI89N80b2LVgSq92YsYtub271A%3D)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=675fcb0e9eb44c4c9b8f458c9d8ac236&_e=4_tqV-iILV211_VG3uri61JwBLzPRd3oIyyVOgaccV9Mqv5SYtYNy78S-OmaMPnxNIPVTDvhUFjQsyxoLZNxG3MOZe6eu2pWgKQC4b-FWNvBDjGD30tmOvkGwDExgVeD1K6QJ3K7ZrkYNZkbJtsrBbZZTUn5K6Kfd623i6r7oif76qta_v71OFyUmX1wLxKRM99ggZPZzh7PFPOEKLJHKiYvFVKq7vFFt_oMwxrxB4xNe8XPKJR-__zk72tEIS8MKxpcKZ0dvEscb66bIXpuzbGbD6B1HJY3V4SI7328V2I%3D)

* **Teaching History: **Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation teach real American history by donating here >>>**_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=675fcb0e9eb44c4c9b8f458c9d8ac236&_e=4_tqV-iILV211_VG3uri61JwBLzPRd3oIyyVOgaccV9Mqv5SYtYNy78S-OmaMPnxNIPVTDvhUFjQsyxoLZNxG3MOZe6eu2pWgKQC4b-FWNvBDjGD30tmOvkGwDExgVeD1K6QJ3K7ZrkYNZkbJtsrBaIg-e3WYTeT6LSppueN_it41Hsf0khrcfYUk8-fqAXd1uP19EyKYIW6aZG2PNrBbHsFDSyf3L5NtFxNXp2CvF11PmxCzVSGkSqMuNQiv9Tl8hPrw3VrYItKTHz6d7HL-QYBPKLuGPtpX3CrfM2q0OQ%3D)

* **Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore.

The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. [_**Please support BLEXIT 's events and help us spread our message by donating here >>>**_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=675fcb0e9eb44c4c9b8f458c9d8ac236&_e=4_tqV-iILV211_VG3uri61JwBLzPRd3oIyyVOgaccV9Mqv5SYtYNy78S-OmaMPnxNIPVTDvhUFjQsyxoLZNxG3MOZe6eu2pWgKQC4b-FWNvBDjGD30tmOvkGwDExgVeD1K6QJ3K7ZrkYNZkbJtsrBdpLDGFwZ99Qx8lPz9AwYvMKeDU5tqklJGJ7DtYpWWk4kbeAazOVV4EuvmED_aYDN4lI8peAwZFt8ZL22m1oddEzzeR6P38P6SNSqs86oFh6BXx162ICsQGy5_TSkiAwjwlh6BEUGjPsABzoRZePSxU%3D)

What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor.

This is personal to me.

I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today:

clean_body: Friend, This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation. For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop. In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities. Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture. Now I 'll share my story... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities. Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking. We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals. This is WRONG. I've dealt with racism... I 've even received death threats. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable. But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up. I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters. I am breaking the rules. It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... I 'm not doing that. You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country. So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss). When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing. Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for: School Choice: Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools. The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. Criminal Justice Reform: The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities. Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message. Entrepreneurship: I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire. BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. Teaching History: Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore. The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor. This is personal to me. I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot. Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today: This is my last message to you before you close this email. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment. My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause. Thank you, Friend. Candace Owens President BLEXIT Foundation Sent to Conservative Liberty Wire subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

_**The fight for Georgia's Senate seat is going into OVERTIME.**_

**Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Tuesday, our Senate race is now heading to a RUNOFF on Tuesday, December 6th.**

It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks, so I need your help once again.

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff.

**[I'm going to beat Senator Warnock in this runoff, but I can't do it without the help of my top supporters on DAY ONE. | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54355996/378288067/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MTMxNDRiMy01NDYwLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNGE2NTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QtRtRlREhb2EFtTHYgrrlJWKGjLdOhMb_IPXOqXu3nM=&emci=6e8a20f7-a45f-ed11-819c-002248258d2f&emdi=513144b3-5460-ed11-ade6-14cb6534a651&ceid=9494239)
---

| | **This seat belongs to the voters, and I am humbled that they entrusted me with its care for two more years.** Serving my family, friends and neighbors in Northwest Washington, where I was born and raised, is a great privilege - one I do not take lightly. Because of you, I will have the opportunity to continue protecting and building upon the successes of the current Congress: to lower prescription drug costs for seniors and deliver lower copays for seniors using insulin; to protect Social Security and Medicare; to fund law enforcement and expect accountability; to fight climate change; and to ensure the Bipartisan Infrastructure Law helps us build a cleaner and greener transportation system for everyone. But before I get to work, I want to pause and thank everyone who made this campaign a truly grassroots effort. To all of my supporters: a heart-felt thanks for making calls and doorbelling all year. As always, **you are the heartbeat of the campaign.** To the campaign staff and interns out each day rain or shine, in the heat and the cold, thank you for all you do. Thank you to my spouse, Tiia, for her support, for putting in a few miles herself at the doors, and for her vote. Thank you. This success would not be possible without all these hardworking, dedicated people, all of whom do not get enough praise or appreciation for what they do. **And although we are celebrating the success of our grassroots campaign, it is evident by the results unfolding across the country that there is a lot of work to do to protect the progress we have achieved in Congress and for democracy itself.** We now turn to the hard work: of denying the election deniers any oxygen for their twisted conspiracies; of showing how big of a lie the Big Lie is; and of continuing the fight for voting rights throughout our country. It looks like we have our work cut out for us, but no party will deny the people their democracy. Ever. _Rick_ |
---|---|---

| | Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen.

name: Karen Bass
subject: As we wait for the votes to be tallied…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KAREN BASS FOR MAYOR 2022 – GENERAL
body:
The ballots are still being counted, but here’s what we know:

Hey there,

Los Angeles showed up to the polls yesterday in force, but the votes are still being counted.

**We may not know the final election results for a few days, but we do know what Angelenos want.**

I heard voters loud and clear over the last 400+ days of this people-powered campaign: Angelenos want to house people — immediately — and solve the root issues of L.A.’s homelessness crisis. They want their neighborhoods to be safer and more affordable. People want an economy that works for everyone — where more communities can reap the benefits of one of the biggest economies in the world.

As we wait for the results, I want to assure you that **I’m ready to roll up my sleeves and get to work.** But first, we must ensure that every vote is counted.

It's the honor of my life that so many Angelenos put their faith in me and our campaign. To everyone who worked, volunteered, donated, and voted — thank you.

**Together, we’re going to build a brighter future for L.A.**

-Karen

PAID FOR BY KAREN BASS FOR MAYOR 2022 – GENERAL

777 S Figueroa St
STE 4050
Los Angeles, CA 90017
United States

clean_body: The ballots are still being counted, but here’s what we know: Hey there, Los Angeles showed up to the polls yesterday in force, but the votes are still being counted. We may not know the final election results for a few days, but we do know what Angelenos want. I heard voters loud and clear over the last 400+ days of this people-powered campaign: Angelenos want to house people — immediately — and solve the root issues of L.A.’s homelessness crisis. They want their neighborhoods to be safer and more affordable. People want an economy that works for everyone — where more communities can reap the benefits of one of the biggest economies in the world. As we wait for the results, I want to assure you that I’m ready to roll up my sleeves and get to work. But first, we must ensure that every vote is counted. It's the honor of my life that so many Angelenos put their faith in me and our campaign. To everyone who worked, volunteered, donated, and voted — thank you. Together, we’re going to build a brighter future for L.A. -Karen PAID FOR BY KAREN BASS FOR MAYOR 2022 – GENERAL Paid for by Karen Bass for Mayor 2022 - General 777 S Figueroa St STE 4050 Los Angeles, CA 90017 United States Additional information is available at . | | ---|---|--- We rely on this email to communicate with this grassroots team, but if you no longer want to receive our emails, please .

name: Bonnie Watson Coleman
subject: A sincere thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bonnie Watson Coleman for Congress
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54356352/378290051/1328194270?refcode=BWC_EM_ST_WL_20221109_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWI5MTFjNy01NjYwLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNGE2NTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cgvzjbWs1Cb6QXZ5DboncebbNGA-bB7Ok76C22ocmOY=&emci=e45f5938-5360-ed11-ade6-14cb6534a651&emdi=f1b911c7-5660-ed11-ade6-14cb6534a651&ceid=30096098) | Folks,

Thank you to everyone who took the time to exercise their voting rights yesterday.

Thanks to you, I’ve been re-elected to serve in the House of Representatives. Words cannot describe how thankful I am for your consistent support. It’s an honor to serve this community I love.

I'm proud of everything I’ve been able to accomplish over the last term and now I am blessed to have the opportunity to serve this district again including some new towns.

There is a lot on my plate — issues like economic development, climate change, women’s rights, affordable housing, and so much more for New Jersey’s 12th Congressional District and beyond.

I am humbled to have gained your trust in representing our community once again and look forward to all the changes we’ll continue making.

Thank you again and now I’m ready to get back to serving the people who put me here.

Sincerely,

Bonnie

---
* * *

---
Bonnie Watson Coleman represents New Jersey's 12th district in Congress. She is a strong fighter for progressive values and has dedicated herself to the service of her community.
