name: Firearm Upgrades
subject: Senate calls Code Red on this threat
body:
It seems Big Tech is intent on turning the whole internet woke...
---
| We get this question a lot...
---
| We are a community of gun-loving Americans. We hope you stick around but remember you can [unsubscribe](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/6233/6374453/e5969cab1c1c7405e120f8c090bf700d86d89da4/9cc5e0e179af6d27dba1b65e3e3047d5453dd587) here at any time. "Upgrade Your Gear, Not Your Budget" November 9th, 2022
* * *
|
##
Is Big Tech censoring an imminent attack on American patriots?

You’ve probably already noticed them de platforming patriots.

They banned Trump from Twitter and Facebook.

They tore Parler from the internet.

And they’re even silencing everyday Americans.

It seems Big Tech is intent on turning the whole internet woke.

And muzzling anyone with a patriotic opinion.

But do they have an even more sinister agenda?

[The Committee on Homeland Security recently declassified a shocking report.](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/6233/6374453/f3ffbb483b5a4c795e067f0aa407e99787fafdb1/9cc5e0e179af6d27dba1b65e3e3047d5453dd587)

This reveals Big Tech could be doing way more than demolishing the First Amendment.

[](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/6233/6374453/f3ffbb483b5a4c795e067f0aa407e99787fafdb1/9cc5e0e179af6d27dba1b65e3e3047d5453dd587)

It seems they’re actually withholding lifesaving information from you and I.

The declassified report contains a chilling warning:

A disastrous attack on patriots is imminent.

And I’m not talking about a head cold invented by the powers that be.

I’m talking about a single catastrophic event that will target American patriots.

Leaving us without power, gas, food, water, telephone, internet.

It could make every single patriot an outcast from society, scrambling to survive.

Many of us could die in the wake of this event.

And, if reports are correct, this event could happen within weeks.

But if you search the internet or social media for warnings I’m almost certain you won’t find anything.

That’s why I’m sending this alert.

Because one brave patriot has found a way around Big Tech's censorship.

He’s created a short video exposing the truth about this upcoming attack.

But since this message runs on their systems, it could be blocked at any moment.

That’s why I urge you to watch his short video to protect yourself and your family.

Then tell everyone you know about this.

[Watch the shocking report](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/6233/6374453/f3ffbb483b5a4c795e067f0aa407e99787fafdb1/9cc5e0e179af6d27dba1b65e3e3047d5453dd587)
##
~Firearm Upgrades

name: Greg Landsman, Congressman-elect
subject: You made this victory possible
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Landsman for Congress P
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54339399/378219369/-1334107482?refcode=header-img&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTAyYjE2ZS0yZTYwLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNGE2NTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Eu_5uy_EjIq5P5Me94RfjPJtlDe1qu_vfnNdasWb1VQ=)
---
Friend,

**We did it.

The votes are in, and thanks to your support, I was just elected as the next Congressman for Ohio’s 1st Congressional District.**

Thank you for believing in our vision, showing your support, and making your voice heard loud and clear.

**We sent a message tonight that folks here are done with the chaos and extremism.** That we are demanding an economy that works for everyone, and we’re not standing for attacks on our democracy. That we will not let folks like Chabot take us backward any longer.

**We won this race, but the fight for our future doesn’t end tonight.**

That’s why we won’t give up the fight to protect our democracy.

It’s why we won’t give up the fight to protect our fundamental freedoms.

And it’s why we won’t give up the fight to build an economy that actually works for working people and not just for the rich and powerful.

**This is the right fight. And it will remain the right fight. I wouldn’t want to be in this fight with anybody else.**

Thank you from the bottom of my heart,

Greg Landsman
Congressman-elect
Ohio’s 1st Congressional District
| | Paid for by Landsman for Congress P.O. Box 413, Cincinnati, OH 45201
www.landsmanforcongress.com

name: Elaine Luria
subject: My sincerest gratitude
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elaine for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54339439/378219527/-2135409409?refcode=lur_template_logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzAyYjE2ZS0yZTYwLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNGE2NTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CWwt2Tc7pHkIeyZ-PViV2AX2nrMUzOB9oEMPCu3_iLI=)

| | Folks, thank you for being by my side throughout this race. I offered my congratulations to Jen Kiggans and wished her the best of luck in her new role as representative of Virginia’s 2nd District. Of course, we hoped the outcome of this race would be different, but conducting a smooth and peaceful transfer of power is what matters most to me. I decided to run for Congress five years ago because our democracy was under attack from within. Defending it has been at the center of all three of my campaigns, and it’s been my top priority in Congress. And though it may not have been enough to get me re-elected, I’m proud that I’ll be able to look my daughter in the eye and tell her that I stepped up when my country needed me most. Our work is far from over, and we can’t let this loss weaken our resolve to keep fighting to defend the democratic values we hold dear. Most of all, though, I want to share my appreciation for everything you’ve done for our campaign and for Coastal Virginia. This campaign rested on the shoulders of so many wonderful, kind, generous people whose time and contributions made it all possible. I’m so lucky to have had this team by my side. I hope, at the end of the day, it will be said of this team that we took action instead of sitting in silence. That we fought hard, but never lost sight of our integrity, our honor, or our duty to our country. Thank you for everything. My sincerest gratitude,
Elaine Luria
---

name: Kadida Kenner
subject: Pennsylvania understood the assignment!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project_
body:
Our democracy lives on.

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54357055/378292154/-1069438538?refcode=EM_FR_221109Understood_N_KK_90DO_8_G_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE2MjU5MWJjLTU4NjAtZWQxMS1hZGU2LTE0Y2I2NTM0YTY1MSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=h2U-xzV3ej8agUx5lGmOU9_1NWh0D9vQFDwrSkRgin0=)
| Fellow activist,

There are still many races to be settled, but one thing is clear: Pennsylvania’s youth, immigrants, Black, Indigenous, and other people of color showed up for our democracy and two crucial candidates! [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54357056/378292155/-1069438538?refcode=EM_FR_221109Understood_N_KK_90DO_8_G_N_G1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE2MjU5MWJjLTU4NjAtZWQxMS1hZGU2LTE0Y2I2NTM0YTY1MSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=h2U-xzV3ej8agUx5lGmOU9_1NWh0D9vQFDwrSkRgin0=) Thanks to their turnout, there was zero ambiguity left for Trump and his allies to jump in and “challenge” our election results. As of this morning, even Dr. Oz has conceded the Senate race.

That’s an **amazing** win for our democracy.

**[Fellow activist, these results didn’t come out of nowhere. They’re the payoff of long-term, 365-days-a-year powerbuilding — and we still have a long way to go to truly secure Pennsylvania and solve our underrepresentation crisis. Can you commit to a monthly recurring donation today to help ensure we have the funding to keep up our work year-round?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54357057/378292156/-1069438538?refcode=EM_FR_221109Understood_N_KK_90DO_8_G_N_L1&recurring=auto&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE2MjU5MWJjLTU4NjAtZWQxMS1hZGU2LTE0Y2I2NTM0YTY1MSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=h2U-xzV3ej8agUx5lGmOU9_1NWh0D9vQFDwrSkRgin0=)** [DONATE MONTHLY](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54357058/378292157/-1069438538?refcode=EM_FR_221109Understood_N_KK_90DO_8_G_N_B1&recurring=auto&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE2MjU5MWJjLTU4NjAtZWQxMS1hZGU2LTE0Y2I2NTM0YTY1MSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=h2U-xzV3ej8agUx5lGmOU9_1NWh0D9vQFDwrSkRgin0=) Like I told ABC’s Devin Dwyer yesterday — **live on national television** — this year we registered **_20,000_** Pennsylvanians to vote in the midterm elections, despite an all-time high of voter apathy. Voters rejected abortion bans, attacks on voting, hateful division and empty promises on crime and inflation.

That’s a permanent expansion to Pennsylvania's electorate, and we’re just getting started.

We will continue this work and expand on our 2022 success day after day and year after year until the 1.7 million Pennsylvanians who are eligible to vote but not voting join the electorate.

**[Fellow activist, this year’s election is proof of the rewards that come from expanding Pennsylvania’s electorate, but we can’t get complacent. There are still many gains to be made and competitive elections to come. Will you start a monthly donation right now to ensure we have the funds to keep up our momentum through the “off-cycle” and periods of low attention?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54357059/378292158/-1069438538?refcode=EM_FR_221109Understood_N_KK_90DO_8_G_N_L2&recurring=auto&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE2MjU5MWJjLTU4NjAtZWQxMS1hZGU2LTE0Y2I2NTM0YTY1MSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=h2U-xzV3ej8agUx5lGmOU9_1NWh0D9vQFDwrSkRgin0=)** [DONATE MONTHLY](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54357060/378292159/-1069438538?refcode=EM_FR_221109Understood_N_KK_90DO_8_G_N_B2&recurring=auto&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE2MjU5MWJjLTU4NjAtZWQxMS1hZGU2LTE0Y2I2NTM0YTY1MSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=h2U-xzV3ej8agUx5lGmOU9_1NWh0D9vQFDwrSkRgin0=) In solidarity,

Kadida Kenner
Chief Executive Officer
_The New Pennsylvania Project_ [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54357061/378292160/-1069438538?refcode=EM_FR_221109Understood_N_KK_90DO_8_G_N_G1&recurring=auto&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE2MjU5MWJjLTU4NjAtZWQxMS1hZGU2LTE0Y2I2NTM0YTY1MSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=h2U-xzV3ej8agUx5lGmOU9_1NWh0D9vQFDwrSkRgin0=) | _The New Pennsylvania Project was founded in May 2021 to expand Pennsylvania’s electorate, so it reflects the Commonwealth’s demographically changing population. In the next four years, NPP will engage and empower young residents and those living in underrepresented immigrant communities and communities of color. We register communities to vote, provide civic education about the issues that matter in their neighborhoods, and mobilize Pennsylvanians to vote in every election._ _[**______**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54357062/378292161/-1069438538?refcode=EM_FR_221109Understood_N_KK_90DO_8_G_N_BIO&amount=40&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE2MjU5MWJjLTU4NjAtZWQxMS1hZGU2LTE0Y2I2NTM0YTY1MSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=h2U-xzV3ej8agUx5lGmOU9_1NWh0D9vQFDwrSkRgin0=)**[DONATE MONTHLY](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54357063/378292162/-1069438538?refcode=EM_FR_221109Understood_N_KK_90DO_8_G_N_BIO&recurring=auto&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE2MjU5MWJjLTU4NjAtZWQxMS1hZGU2LTE0Y2I2NTM0YTY1MSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=h2U-xzV3ej8agUx5lGmOU9_1NWh0D9vQFDwrSkRgin0=)**_

clean_body: Our democracy lives on. = | Fellow activist, There are still many races to be settled, but one thing is clear: Pennsylvania’s youth, immigrants, Black, Indigenous, and other people of color showed up for our democracy and two crucial candidates! = Thanks to their turnout, there was zero ambiguity left for Trump and his allies to jump in and “challenge” our election results. As of this morning, even Dr. Oz has conceded the Senate race. That’s an amazing win for our democracy. = = Like I told ABC’s Devin Dwyer yesterday — live on national television — this year we registered 20,000 Pennsylvanians to vote in the midterm elections, despite an all-time high of voter apathy. Voters rejected abortion bans, attacks on voting, hateful division and empty promises on crime and inflation. That’s a permanent expansion to Pennsylvania's electorate, and we’re just getting started. We will continue this work and expand on our 2022 success day after day and year after year until the 1.7 million Pennsylvanians who are eligible to vote but not voting join the electorate. = = In solidarity, Kadida Kenner Chief Executive Officer The New Pennsylvania Project = | The New Pennsylvania Project was founded in May 2021 to expand Pennsylvania’s electorate, so it reflects the Commonwealth’s demographically changing population. In the next four years, NPP will engage and empower young residents and those living in underrepresented immigrant communities and communities of color. We register communities to vote, provide civic education about the issues that matter in their neighborhoods, and mobilize Pennsylvanians to vote in every election. = PA ELECTION DATES : 2023 GENERAL ELECTION: November 7, 2023 || || || New Pennsylvania Project PO Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. to receive fewer emails from us. to stop receiving any fundraising emails from us. The New Pennsylvania Project is a 501(c)(4). Contributions are not for charitable purposes and are not tax deductible. | Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: It’s official: control of the Senate is once again going to hang on the results of a runoff in Georgia. The Warnock campaign spent everything they had trying to win this race, and now the firehose of SuperPAC money that defeated Tim Ryan will get trained on Georgia’s runoff. We only have a month, Peter, there’s no time to lose.
body:
The Senate comes down to this.
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tca850160-873f-40ed-a923-a668b605f5f9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| | | Peter, **_Well, I know one thing, there sure as hell wasn't anything resembling a red wave last night. a red puddle? Nope. A Blue Crush is a better way to put it._** **[And now it's time to finish it off with a U.S. Senate win for Raphael Warnock!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T25c0e76f-efe3-4f49-8726-88a34787a27f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **_On election day, Democrats picked up a Senate seat in Pennsylvania. As of this moment, we've held every governorship, and may even pick one up in Arizona! We flipped the state senate and state house in Michigan, where we held onto the governorship and will have a governing majority! We did the same in Minnesota. This is huge news for abortion rights, voting rights, gun safety and so much more!_** **_While it hurt that Tim Ryan lost under a flood of $50 million in SuperpAC spending from a billionaire who wants to live forever (Peter Thiel) and a snapping turtle (Mitch McConnell), we picked up a House seat and held onto two other swing House seats in Ohio. It also hurt we barely lost Senate seats in North Carolina (Cheri Beasley) and Wisconsin (Mandela Barnes). _** **_It looks like we'll hold the Senate...though now is where it comes down to us. As Shakespeare once wrote, "once more unto the breach, dear friends." As both incredible public servant, Rapael Warnock leads lunatic, Herschel Walker, by just under 1%, that's good news! But, Georgia, in another anachronism of its Jim Crow past, requires candidates to get over 50% or there is a run off between the top two. That is where we're headed, with an election on December 6th._** **_Obviously there are two Democrats in the Senate who like to preen and howl, and are not always willing to support us when we need it. So we need EVERY. SEAT. WE. CAN. WIN. Also, Herschel Walker held a gun to his wife's head and threatened her life, stalked another woman forcing her to report him to the police, while Raphael Warnock is an inspiration who preaches from the podium once occupied by Martin Luther King, Jr. _** [**So can you join with Blue Amp Action to donate $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can afford to Senator Raphael Warnock, so that he can come out victorious and we have another Democratic Senator to fight for our democracy and progressive ideals in the Senate?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbf1f007d-ae22-40fc-b780-a6dae4d78c5d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **Thank you for all you have done and continue to do. Our fight goes on.** Cliff
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| | | | | | [**Re-elect Sen. Raphael Warnock**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7fca9ff7-10fb-488a-b227-5be641b7da08/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. —
_You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. body:
Can you come?
[](https://link.nucleusemail.com/f/a/J0oCHIkzgCGZNdjnI7uS0A~~/AATY9gE~~)

[](https://link.nucleusemail.com/f/a/nywqf17QcFGism114HdLvQ~~/AATY9gE~~)

Friend,

I have an exciting announcement that I can't wait to share with you on November 15th.

**I 'm going to announce something HUGE at MAR-A-LAGO, and I want YOU to be there.**

**[ENTER HERE>>](https://link.nucleusemail.com/f/a/AyKdkrbjEtXAAT72HauZzA~~/AATY9gE~~)**

_This announcement will perhaps be the most important speech given in the history of the United States of America. And YOU could be there with me, Friend._

**All you have to do is contribute $45 or more, and you 'll automatically be entered to be the VERY FIRST PERSON to meet ME in Mar-a-Lago after my BIG ANNOUNCEMENT. **_This offer is exclusive to my most LOYAL supporters_ , like YOU, so DON'T share this with anyone else.

**[Please contribute $45 or more TODAY to be automatically entered to win a trip to join me in MAR-A-LAGO on November 15th.>>](https://link.nucleusemail.com/f/a/cvcZTvX_n2hFVZwRkTIdSQ~~/AATY9gE~~)**

This will be the trip of a lifetime, Friend. You'll never forget this.

If you win, my team will cover your flight and hotel, AND you'll get to bring a guest of your choice. _We 'll even take a photo together to remember this day forever. My favorite part._

_After I give my BIG ANNOUNCEMENT, I want to talk to YOU. Please don 't wait to enter._

**[Contribute ANY AMOUNT RIGHT NOW to win this once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to meet your favorite President on what will be a HISTORIC DAY.](https://link.nucleusemail.com/f/a/FTfNubY7HJrlOY6ToZxSDw~~/AATY9gE~~)**

Donald J. Trump
45th President of the United States

Herschel Walker is headed for the _**toughest battle yet**_ - a runoff against radical Dem Raphael Warnock. This race will decide Senate control and Democrats are willing to spend whatever it takes to boost Warnock.

name: Nikki Budzinski
subject: A historical moment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki For Congress Nikki for Congress
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54358671/378298088/-927342243?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDc2M2YzYy01ZDYwLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNGE2NTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZGi4A2hyCBEqIbyka4MUDqG9U5Z-o83VQOYxsPI0bAY=&emci=6cd2b71e-b55f-ed11-819c-002248258d2f&emdi=1d763f3c-5d60-ed11-ade6-14cb6534a651&ceid=13891387)
Friend, last night was a historic moment for our campaign. I am honored to be elected the first woman to represent Illinois’ 13th District in Congress.

An incredible staff, an army of volunteers, and countless supporters made this possible. Together, we showed that we could win by talking about the issues that matter most to the people of Central and Southern Illinois – like lowering costs, ensuring fair wages and safe places to work, and making sure families have a chance to get ahead.

Now it’s time to roll up our sleeves and fight for what we believe in. I’ve spent my entire career bringing people together, and I’m committed to continue reaching across the aisle to build a brighter future for all communities throughout IL-13.

Again, thank you for making this possible and for believing in me. Your friendship and support allowed us to have this historic moment, and I’m forever grateful.
All my best, Nikki | Paid for by Nikki For Congress Nikki for Congress
PO Box 5171
Springfield, IL 62705
United States

Democrat Nikki Budzinski is running for Congress in Illinois' 13th District. This district is currently in Republican hands, and is by far one of the most competitive in the entire country.

Nikki has spent her life fighting for workers and working families by strengthening unions nationwide, and she was instrumental in passing a $15 minimum wage in Illinois while working as a senior advisor for Governor JB Pritzker. Most recently, Nikki served in President Biden's administration in the office that implemented the American Rescue Plan.

Nikki believes in the American Dream and will bring people together to level the playing field and rebuild the middle class so families have a shot to get ahead.

name: Dan Goldman
subject: Today, we celebrate. Tomorrow, we get to work.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York
body:
Dan Goldman for New York [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/94087/images/dsg_logo.png]
Peter,

It’s truly humbling to wake up this morning as the next Congressman for New York’s 10th Congressional District.

I can’t thank you enough for your support from the very beginning. Our journey together is one I will never forget, and this moment would not have been possible without every single one of you doing your part to realize our shared pragmatic and progressive vision for New York and America.

This race was also a victory for all of us who refuse to let authoritarian forces undermine our democracy and the rule of law.

I ran because I knew that New York needed a representative who would bring a new, creative approach to Congress — to deliver equal access to opportunity for everyone in our community, and to protect our democracy.

Today, I’m celebrating that all our hard work and commitment to this belief brought us to this moment.

But there is much work to be done.

Every one of us must recommit to staying engaged in this fight — to acknowledge the stakes and stand strong together against the rising tide of fascism that has infected the Republican Party.

I take heart in knowing that our ideals, our hope, and our faith in one another will always triumph over lies, fear, and division.

So today, we celebrate. But tomorrow, we get to work.

Thanks for committing to stand with me in the fight ahead.

Dan
Dan Goldman for New York
PO BOX 3306
New York, NY 10008
United States
dangoldmanforny.com [https://www.dangoldmanforny.com/] | info@dangoldmanforny.com [info@dangoldmanforny.com]

subject: Tell Trump what a loser he is (add your message now!)
body:
| | | | |
---

name: Jasmine Beach-Ferrara
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jasmine Beach-Ferrara for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54340286/378222667/459488397?refcode=jas_headerlogo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDVmNTg0OS0zNDYwLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNGE2NTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-gOwn36AFJtc0GlUCj_FZsTCmavYklXdAsNMcPxLNwo=)

| | Peter, Over the past 20 months, we’ve poured our heart and soul into this campaign. Every conversation had, and every dollar raised, allowed us to make an impact in NC-11. We didn’t accept a dime of corporate PAC money, yet we ran the largest field operation _ever_ seen in WNC history, working shoulder-to-shoulder with local and state candidates and county parties. We led North Carolina as the district with the highest early vote turnout, and we inspired folks who were never politically engaged before to get involved in this election. I decided to run for Congress because Western North Carolina is my home. I was tired of seeing right-wing extremism divide our community, and I knew others were tired of it, too. **And despite coming up short in the end, we gave this campaign everything we had._I truly could not be more proud of what we have done together._** I called Chuck Edwards to congratulate him on this victory and I wish him and his family the best moving forward. While the results of this election demonstrate that there is still so much work to be done to bridge the divides in our politics and our country, the impact our campaign made makes me more hopeful than ever about what is possible here in WNC as we move forward. I want to thank every single supporter, new and old, who has been all in with us during this race. I also can’t thank my campaign team enough for their hard work, the countless volunteers who went out of their way to show up, and the voters who made their voices heard. Although our campaign is coming to an end, the fight for a better Western North Carolina and a better country continues. We still have so much work to do to improve healthcare access, defend our basic rights, create a better future for our kids, and so much more. But for now, I want you to know how proud I am of all we’ve accomplished together. Thank you for being all in with us every step of the way, Jasmine
---

name: Wade Herring
subject: Thank you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wade Herring for Congress
body:
https://www.wadeherringforcongress.com/ [https://www.wadeherringforcongress.com/]
Peter,
I want to again express how grateful I am for your support and the support of everyone who joined our movement to elect real representation and bring change to our community.
Yesterday, the people of the First District of Georgia re-elected Representative Buddy Carter to represent them in the United States House of Representatives.
While this is obviously not the result we wanted, I am beyond proud of what our team was able to accomplish. I am thankful for my campaign staff and all of the volunteers who worked so hard on this campaign. I am grateful to everyone who contributed time and money to make this campaign possible.
We ran a community-focused campaign, to inspire others to lead us in the future. Going forward, I will continue serving our community and work for a better and stronger Georgia.
Let us remember to be hopeful, truthful, kind, rational, unifying, and optimistic for the future.
Thank you & onwards,
Wade Herring

body:
Friend, I'm honored to continue fighting for you in Congress| | | [](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=396cb76e209547d68d896ceaf0217f5c&_e=m1QYGE94GaEDvKi3prDZXN5cRS9OM7ob-EaDVJ6b8Um3jkmOkJbMzwoUamQN7YVnlMojHh_kST83Pt_ZKawkJlo4CL4DjuarEuWZSShXinqS3VXD0hDj2tTeg6eooRCbmv6UJ-OnA9Y9FCZ6GfnCynB03v8RIknCs1BVelGwfMI-kL8nyvAeZHRaFaHC2w6wSaeg1_bcTID5od_lWPaukw%3D%3D)

Friend, the results are in... **WE WON IL-16!**
---
[](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=396cb76e209547d68d896ceaf0217f5c&_e=m1QYGE94GaEDvKi3prDZXN5cRS9OM7ob-EaDVJ6b8Um3jkmOkJbMzwoUamQN7YVnLwbfBQYHqAyHiTq70I0d8bOY3YG_qQ0AB3pqAWyaW8GD7ziWZQx6Ul_iQLgVoau_MRGxJqKRw4DyVsf-sWNLu61Vh5k7rGEuIfXqrXVEtZHVeYocYizjKY5BSu8fpuPicE2Fy5t1Vs-jpFCHxc-5VA%3D%3D)
---
I'm writing to thank you for all your hard work and support in my campaign for IL-16. You are the reason I am able to serve as your voice in Congress! I sincerely appreciate and thank you for **your generosity** , **your time,** and, _most importantly_ , **your vote!** I'm honored to continue fighting for you in Congress – we've got a lot of work ahead of us, but I know with you by my side, we can get it done. Thank you, Darin LaHood
---

name: Mariannette Miller-Meeks
subject: We did it!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Miller-Meeks for Congress
body:
Thank you

| [ ](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=064ee09be98b4f4691fca2fbce5608da&_e=Ejrt9tTsTc5AZTcHslnXjHRXL_sYN4TcZf1Use9l5kXQqnK0q-BNp8gZuZ0hTH9rcQx6DzSdnh1n8nyPvitFZezBvqVaaWPhEu9FJsLoiUFyyUdSVyynsk65ipL4dDmvIUK-W7QalGi9FFNcsskzNNttBk8vq2TX9uLCt3U12pazZEwayuT5dUuQ6R850lmv7PPAQFKaEOtGyqyqqPC4FjEvKuN1BqE3iKbG1O1agOlhSSA0-lR5tavUDzyN6yJmdxXLZ-marE2pk3usHqTHHQcVPfZnoF4MKtYNqDxrKWW5CuZOsoXoZDNu4vfOnGnD-tAo1AAhmddxyRhOFy0JjWkKZA2mLFMCraLAHpu6AWc_BegdJQ03phlCNOTHqsYwFXOV1YUXlNGaAfd9kXO-vNnK0La7ltu8wS7raj9L7PPjhQumuwfxOrWooaxBZMhcjFDr36PQrA5nS7RB3luMxg%3D%3D)

---
Friends,

We did it.

WE WORKED **TOGETHER** AND **WON IOWA’S 1ST DISTRICT!**

It is an honor to be re-elected as your Congresswoman. Together, we made a statement that the people of our district are sick and tired of the destructive policies coming out of Washington, D.C.

I could not have made it this far without each and every one of you supporting me along the way. It has been a challenging campaign, but you all believed in me and worked so hard for this victory.

_**Now, we have the opportunity to REBUILD Iowa and America.**_

I will represent each of you to the utmost of my ability and continue to work day and night for Iowa AND America. Without your support, this would never have been possible. Because of you, we showed the nation that America stands for FREEDOM!

Thank you again for your commitment to this country and your support. Let’s get to work.

God bless Iowa, and God bless America,

[](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=064ee09be98b4f4691fca2fbce5608da&_e=Ejrt9tTsTc5AZTcHslnXjHRXL_sYN4TcZf1Use9l5kXQqnK0q-BNp8gZuZ0hTH9rcQx6DzSdnh1n8nyPvitFZezBvqVaaWPhEu9FJsLoiUFyyUdSVyynsk65ipL4dDmvIUK-W7QalGi9FFNcsskzNNttBk8vq2TX9uLCt3U12pazZEwayuT5dUuQ6R850lmv7PPAQFKaEOtGyqyqqPC4FjEvKuN1BqE3iKbG1O1agOlhSSA0-lR5tavUDzyN6yJmdxXLZ-marE2pk3usHqTHHQcVPfZnoF4MKtYNqDxrKWW5CuZOsoXoZDNu4vfOnGnDtaUkfGBobeP93yI1VWW0CnpoB76eEkiQ1sqRuxZs1hkIadnx-04QQo2lYsfdLqEcojaDaDeLKfhxFlT1hCm4rT9p3oSBjzt4Gj0HkqkhsXo8ItzdnI-YIn_BLmg6aH_fiR6LeOzIcOkIxU0Q2IBALw%3D%3D)

clean_body: Thank you | Friends, We did it. WE WORKED TOGETHER AND WON IOWA’S 1ST DISTRICT! It is an honor to be re-elected as your Congresswoman. Together, we made a statement that the people of our district are sick and tired of the destructive policies coming out of Washington, D.C. I could not have made it this far without each and every one of you supporting me along the way. It has been a challenging campaign, but you all believed in me and worked so hard for this victory. Now, we have the opportunity to REBUILD Iowa and America. I will represent each of you to the utmost of my ability and continue to work day and night for Iowa AND America. Without your support, this would never have been possible. Because of you, we showed the nation that America stands for FREEDOM! Thank you again for your commitment to this country and your support. Let’s get to work. God bless Iowa, and God bless America, Congresswoman Miller-Meeks | Paid for by Miller-Meeks for Congress Miller-Meeks for Congress P.O. name: Andrew Garbarino
subject: Thank you, Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GARBARINO FOR CONGRESS |
body:
We owe this all to you.| | |
---
Peter, The votes are in and I’m happy to say... **WE WON!** Because of grassroots supporters like you, Peter, we were able to come together and defend Long Island’s conservative values. Thank you to every single person who voted, donated, door knocked, and phone banked on my behalf. **_I couldn’t have done it without you!_** I’m excited to continue working on behalf of the people of Long Island. Thank you again,Andrew Garbarino

body:

Peter,

_**The fight for Georgia's Senate seat is going into OVERTIME.**_

**Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Tuesday, our Senate race is now heading to a RUNOFF on Tuesday, December 6th.**

It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks, so I need your help once again.

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff.

**[I'm going to beat Senator Warnock in this runoff, but I can't do it without the help of my top supporters on DAY ONE. Please donate $25, $50, $100, or any amount up to the limit of $2,900 to help us rebuild our campaign war chest so we can launch our advertising immediately!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61828452:6DiMI6GqN:m:1:3373497171:867DB262965DAE01BB1ACDC4A25CCFDF:r)**

Despite my opponent spending over $101 MILLION in the general election, Raphael Warnock could not win the support of a majority of Georgians as an incumbent senator. It is time for a change!

Everything is at stake in this runoff election, and we don't have a moment to waste. **[Will you rush in $5 or more in the next 30 minutes to be a DAY ONE runoff supporter?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61828452:6DiMI6GqN:m:1:3373497171:867DB262965DAE01BB1ACDC4A25CCFDF:r)**

Herschel Walker

I have an exciting announcement that I can't wait to share with you on November 15th.

**I'm going to announce something HUGE at MAR-A-LAGO, and I want YOU to be there.**

**[ENTER HERE>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61829705:6vjqI6GN8:m:1:3253819041:9A2ADAED3E392D1E5F4B9D9A575B1B66:r)**

name: Emilia Sykes
subject: the highest honor of my life
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emilia Sykes for Congress
body:
Thank you, thank you, thank you. It is an honor to write to you as the Congresswoman-elect for Ohio’s 13th Congressional District. I am truly humbled that the people of my community have entrusted me to serve.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54363419/378304545/-1743402759?refcode=em_res_2022.11.09_b1_es_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzhkYTcxNy02MjYwLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNGE2NTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kulh1ZdPanUlyNmx0pyeztddKwNIcEntUGLx_AapQoQ=)
Family, friends, neighbors, and members of this incredible people-powered team —

Thank you, thank you, thank you.

**It is an honor to write to you as the Congresswoman-elect for Ohio’s 13th Congressional District.** I am truly humbled that the people of my community have entrusted me to serve.

This win belongs to all of us. Because Northeast Ohioans have always been – _and always will be_ – at the heart of our movement. We’re here right now because each and every one of you – every person who donated, everyone who contributed their time and energy into this campaign, every voter who showed up to send a loud and clear message about the kind of leadership our community deserves.

But let me be clear: Whether you voted for me, voted for my opponent, or chose not to vote at all, I want you to walk away from tonight knowing that I will always be in your corner. In me, you have a listener, a fighter, and someone that will always carry your voice with them.

_**Because that’s the type of representation Northeast Ohio deserves.**_

From day one in Washington, I’ll get to work fighting to lower costs, expand affordable healthcare, defend Social Security, bring more good-paying union jobs back home, defend a woman’s right to choose, and make the day-to-day just a little bit easier.

So while we may have passed the finish line – and brought home a win for the Birthplace of Champions – _today is only the beginning._

From the bottom of my heart, thank you for believing in me. I’ll spend everyday fighting to make you proud. Let’s get to work.

Thank you,

Emilia
---

**A native of Akron, Ohio, Emilia Sykes has deep roots fighting for Ohioans. She learned from a young age how to use her voice and the power of the people to create change.** **As the _State Representative for Akron_ and _Ohio's State House Minority Leader_ , _Emilia cut through the divisiveness to deliver results_.**

[**Can we count on you to chip in a few dollars to Emilia's campaign?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54363422/378304546/-1743402759?refcode=em_res_2022.11.09_b1_es_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzhkYTcxNy02MjYwLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNGE2NTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kulh1ZdPanUlyNmx0pyeztddKwNIcEntUGLx_AapQoQ=) | [**DONATE »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54363426/378304547/-1743402759?refcode=em_res_2022.11.09_b1_es_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzhkYTcxNy02MjYwLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNGE2NTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kulh1ZdPanUlyNmx0pyeztddKwNIcEntUGLx_AapQoQ=)

name: Patty Pansing Brooks
subject: Now is not the time to hang our heads.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PATTY FOR CONGRESS
body:
These results aren’t what we’d hoped for, but I still feel incredibly blessed.

|
---
| | Dear friend, While the results of the NE-01 Congressional Election aren’t what we’d hoped for, I’m _truly_ overwhelmed with gratitude. It’s a humbling experience to have so many people put their trust in me to get our state on a better, kinder path to progress. Whether you read my emails, told a friend about my campaign, volunteered, made a donation, voted, or cheered me on from afar, I want you to know that this campaign would never have been possible without **you**. We always knew this election cycle would be tough under these extraordinary circumstances — including an unprecedented special election back in June — but despite all the chaos, you have stood firmly by my side using your grassroots power to get us to this point. From the bottom of my heart, _thank you for fighting alongside me._ **Friend, I want to remind you that now is not the time to hang our heads.** Together, we have accomplished _incredible_ things: Because of your work, our district has mobilized the strongest support of any Democratic candidate here in CD1 since _**1964**_ — that’s _huge._ And it’s a testament to the amazing people who have put so much time and effort into this campaign. This run for Congress has always been about service, and I am ready to serve wherever I am needed. For now, that’s right here in our community. And I will continue to put my time, my energy, and my love into making this community one of the strongest in our beautiful state. From the bottom of my heart, _thank you for sticking by my side for the past year._ I feel blessed beyond measure to have the best grassroots team in Nebraska. Looking forward with hope, Patty 💜
---

_**The fight for Georgia's Senate seat is going into OVERTIME.**_

**Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Tuesday, our Senate race is now heading to a RUNOFF on Tuesday, December 6th.**

It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks, so I need your help once again.

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff.

**[I'm going to beat Senator Warnock in this runoff, but I can't do it without the help of my top supporters on DAY ONE. name: Jett Ettinger
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ETTINGER FOR CONGRESS
body:
ETTINGER FOR CONGRESS

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54365185/378305261/1425682023?refcode=header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzMwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTA2YzQ0NS02MzYwLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNGE2NTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KNRNyIN6nbSltkatJDh5iCuIhJSCHryi4oPLY0kAxDw=)
Hi friend,

Well, last night was not the result any of us were hoping for. As our great team huddled past midnight, we were trying to understand why the margin widened so much since August. The advantage of incumbency? A different national mood? General election voters having different priorities than those who vote in August too?

In the light of morning, my thoughts are different. The margin really does not matter. Our younger son Jay played football for Austin High School a dozen years ago. His junior year team was pretty decent, but senior year was really tough—no wins, including getting blown out on their Homecoming night. Does that mean it wasn’t worth being on the team? Of course not. It’s about competing, putting yourself out there, and working in close collaboration with others toward a common goal. He experienced all of that, and so have we over the past eight months.

One of the best aspects of running for this office has been getting to know literally hundreds of dedicated folks—fellow candidates, team members, door-knockers, donors, meet-and-greet hosts and attendees, parade marchers... you name it. We worked hard together toward an important cause, and I believe that by running a decent, respectful, and fully competitive campaign, we made a difference. My sincere thanks to each and every one of you for your tireless efforts.

Finally, I have already been asked by a few folks whether I might run again next time. I want to let you know that the answer is no. We gave it a major shot in terms of time, effort and finances, and came short not once but twice. It will be someone else’s turn next time. By running for office, I also created significant disruptions to my business boards, non-profit boards, and teaching collaboration at the U of M. I owe them clarity that they will not again have to worry about finding backstops or replacements for me.

Thank you again to my family, my team, my supporters, and the 100,000+ voters in southern Minnesota that put their faith in me.

With gratitude,
Jeff Ettinger
|
| PAID FOR BY ETTINGER FOR CONGRESS
---
ETTINGER FOR CONGRESS
PO BOX 741
AUSTIN, MN 55912 If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/bZNdCLHN3U6-JEeTcmffwg2?unsubscribedata=HKk1kf%2Fr7shTXQH%2BKkoOAP8zejwvM3iWtYzDofT3NWV2uoS2dlljX5zRryDUjA5dwMS%2Ft8%2B7%2BJZXq2yI9qbOCZxKgnWJLJrSWx3eHuLQNaQ%2B25DHkKIhBX0bVBsA96tBJhoHm86qjh9AoJEj95DDCeJZJ0Xqvxa3ldh4OIytwoau0TQiVAZBuGmQ1k4RMb0XW%2BQtWuWRwJoI0oXDibjzRHCMwBIuBySZMRf9dp%2FnXho6UyD5QvUY%2BD5ekIFn6rpIv5UcUr9IOhzGS038JutUZqtoRl0hFRR%2BM%2BJcwjjSm7onF%2B%2BAS5ihreiK3n3HTXs07JT1HTSkXkgsnZAhzqO674kPqeTwliag0DUsjgqCxKxEDqmRJKVPorFNvFK4rGevRTawYUs%2FtBxdYaZPh9GVDO2LIYrEMac%2FFeJoNX%2BXpBw%3D).

subject: Victory in VA-02!

body:
Friends, I'm reaching out to all of you to share in the excitement that tonight's victory in Virginia has brought us. Congratulations to Yesli Vega, Hung Cao, and Jen Kiggans for stepping into the ring and taking the shots from the liberal l
| | |
---
| | [](https://j0l1y7h.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fbrycereeves.com/1/010001845cc46578-9e2edd01-b01b-41d4-a920-30419468d3fd-000000/x5WLxb_qBnNo8trwJDZeOQnz2DE=295)
---
| |
---
| Friends, I'm reaching out to all of you to share in the excitement that tonight's victory in Virginia has brought us. Congratulations to Yesli Vega, Hung Cao, and Jen Kiggans for stepping into the ring and taking the shots from the liberal left. It's time to take back our country, and we are one step closer with today's victories in VA-02 and across the rest of the nation.
---
| | |
---
| Last year we saw our Commonwealth elect a Republican Governor, Lieutenant Governor, and Attorney General. This year might not have been the Red Wave that some expected, but we have still won a key battle. This isn't the time for complacency, though; now is the time to set our sights to next year, when we will have the opportunity to take back the Virginia State Senate from the Democrats. As the Senate Minority Whip, I implore you to take this momentum and keep on running.
---
| | |
---
| I know it can be tiring, one election after the next. Despite how weary or hopeless we may feel sometimes, for the sake of our children and the next generation, I will never lose sight of that shining city on the hill that President Reagan spoke so fondly of.
---
| | |
---
| My sincerest honor and respect to Yesli Vega, Jen Kiggans, and Hung Cao for being the tip of the spear and leaving it all on the field of battle. All three of them know exactly what it takes to serve their country, their constituents, and to lead our Commonwealth and our nation towards a brighter future. Congratulations on your hard-earned victory, Congresswoman-elect Jen Kiggans! Yours in Service, Bryce E. ReevesSenator17th Senatorial District
---

name: Herschel Walker
subject: OVERTIME
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
It’s going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks of this runoff campaign, so I need your help once again.
It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks of this runoff campaign, so I need your help once again. |

---
Fellow American,

_**The fight for Georgia's Senate seat is going into OVERTIME.**_

**Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Tuesday, our Senate race is now heading to a RUNOFF on Tuesday, December 6th.**

It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks, so I need your help once again.

name: Chairwoman Swecker
subject: Thank You, Virginia Democrats
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www
body:
Our successes last night are owed to Democrats like you.

|
---
Derek, Last night, we saw uplifting and inspiring Democratic successes across the Commonwealth. From Arlington to Fredericksburg to Roanoke to Coastal Virginia, grassroots Democrats like you have helped us paint Virginia blue. Because of your support, we outperformed expectations in VA-10 and VA-07, two of the most competitive districts in the entire country. We have you to thank for helping to re-elect Congresswoman Spanberger and Congresswoman Wexton. After a tough redistricting we knew that re-electing Congresswoman Elaine Luria was going to be a challenge, but we’re so proud of her and the great race she ran. We will take a few days to regroup and begin our focus on 2023 - to retake the House and grow our numbers in the Senate. With your help, I know we can do it! Thank you - thank you - thank you! Susan Swecker

name: Maggie Toulouse Oliver
subject: We did it!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Maggie_
body:
This victory would have never been accomplished without you.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54367202/378306816/-532505380?refcode=EM_C_221109Win_E_MTO_FULL_6_NG_TESTA_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDI3OTEwYy02NTYwLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNGE2NTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lM0UD-DCxfAg3sySZT2g8Gu7hGOItihFgS6XZF_OpFM=)
We did it, team, and all I can say is THANK YOU!

**My team and I are beyond thrilled to announce that New Mexicans have elected me to serve another term as Secretary of State.**

This is a huge win for our democracy. Just this year, New Mexico was infiltrated with an obscene amount of conspiracy theories and misinformation about our elections by far-right extremists. Our democracy was truly on the line this election.

Despite all of this, strong supporters of democracy like you came through. New Mexicans value our secure, accessible, and transparent election system, and we have seen that firsthand today.

I cannot thank you enough for your continuous support and dedication throughout this year. Through the ups and downs, good times and bad, you all stuck with us – and our state came out of it stronger than ever. We have always been able to rely on our supporters, and I never had a doubt in my mind that you would rise to the challenges this year brought us.

Once again, thank you so much for everything you have done. This victory would have never been accomplished without you. I am honored to keep fighting for you in office every day. Because our state works better when everyone has a voice, and I will always make that my priority.

Thank you,

Maggie

_Friends of Maggie
PO Box 473
Albuquerque, NM 87103
United States_

__ | _Paid for by Friends of Maggie_
---
__
__Contributions or gifts to Friends of Maggie are not tax deductible.__

It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks of this runoff campaign, so I need your help once again. | Fellow American, The fight for Georgia's Senate seat is going into OVERTIME. Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Tuesday, our Senate race is now heading to a RUNOFF on Tuesday, December 6th. It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks, so I need your help once again. We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff. Despite my opponent spending over $101 MILLION in the general election, Raphael Warnock could not win the support of a majority of Georgians as an incumbent senator. It is time for a change! Everything is at stake in this runoff election, and we don't have a moment to waste. Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. name: Doug White
subject: Thank you, Central Washington
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DOUG WHITE FOR CONGRESS
body:
| |
---
First, I want to thank the committed supporters like you who knocked on doors, put up yard signs, shared our posts on social media, and chipped in a few dollars here and there in our race. We could not have come this far without you.

While we came up short in this election, it’s clear that our focus on results for Central Washington resonated with voters.

It was a strong campaign that united many people up and down the district. It gave new ideas and fresh hope to many. But most importantly it energized the political spirit and people showed up to volunteer, support and vote.

It sometimes seems that change happens in a day, but under further review it becomes clear that only through dedicated work over long periods does the opportunity for change emerge.

We have set a pace for change and committed ourselves to it. Yesterday was not the day, but that day is close and we will be ready.

Until then, I am proud of the race we ran and I congratulate Dan Newhouse on his re-election.

Thank you again for all your work on this campaign. It has truly meant the world to me.

All my best,

– Doug

| PAID FOR BY DOUG WHITE FOR CONGRESS
---
Doug White for Congress
PO Box 9674
Yakima, WA 98909
United States

Doug White is running to represent Washington’s 4th Congressional District in Congress..

**I'm going to announce something HUGE at MAR-A-LAGO, and I want YOU to be there.**

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: It’s all thanks to you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
https://martinheinrich.com/ [https://martinheinrich.com/]

Folks —

Over long days in long weeks in long months, you have lifted up our values and fought for our future.

Nationally, the election results are still streaming in. There’s some we know and a lot we don’t.

Let’s start with our major wins in New Mexico. I’m thrilled that nearly all of the candidates I endorsed, supported, and campaigned with have won!

Congratulations!
Melanie Stansbury, 1st Congressional District
Teresa Leger Fernandez, 3rd Congressional District
Michelle Lujan Grisham, Governor
Maggie Toulouse Oliver, Secretary of State
Raul Torrez, Attorney General
Joseph Maestas, State Auditor
Constitutional Amendment #1, Funding for Early Childhood Education
Javier Martinez, NM HD-11
Day Hochman-Vigil, NM HD-14
Cynthia Borrego, NM HD-17
Gail Chasey, NM HD-18
Janelle Anyanonu, NM HD-19
Meredith Dixon, NM HD-20
Liz Thomson, NM HD-24
Eleanor Chavez, NM HD-26
Marian Matthews, NM HD-27
Pamelya Herndon, NM HD-28
Joy Garratt, NM HD-29
Natalie Figueroa, NM HD-30
Angelica Rubio, NM HD-35
Nathan Small, NM HD-36
Joanne Ferrary, NM HD-37
Tara Jaramillo, NM HD-38
Susan Herrea, NM HD-41
Kristina Ortez, NM HD-42
Andrea Romero, NM HD-46
Doreen Gallegos, NM HD-52
John Allen, Bernalillo County Sheriff
Barbara Baca, Bernalillo County Commission District 5
Kim Stewart, Dona Ana County Sheriff
Christopher Schaljo-Hernandez, Dona Ana County Commission District 1
Shannon Reynolds, Dona Ana County Commission District 3
Ray Trejo, Luna County Commission District 1
Katherine Bruch, Sandoval County Commission District 1
F.R. Bob Romeo, Taos County Commission District 1
Ronald Mascarenas, Taos County Commission District 5
Robert Lara, 3rd Judicial District Court Judge

Across the state, New Mexicans proved we know the value of early childhood education and care. We secured the sustainable funding our kids need with the passage of Constitutional Amendment #1 — thanks to the Vote YES for Kids movement.

And we won’t stop pulling for our friends whose races haven’t been called yet.

But here’s what we don’t need an election to tell us:

We are a country of people who love our country.

We are committed to giving our children the future they deserve. We want to be united, not divided. We want real solutions, not scare tactics.

And here’s what I can promise you:

I will keep investing in our people and our communities — in real solutions and in our future.

We already have all the potential we need in our classrooms, homes, and gathering places across New Mexico.

Together we can create a future that is as boundless as our skies, as majestic as our mesas, and as welcoming as our communities.

It’s the honor of my life to serve you and this beautiful place we call home.

Let’s keep fighting for New Mexico and this great country of ours!

Thank you for all you do,

Martin

Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. We secured the sustainable funding our kids need with the passage of Constitutional Amendment #1 — thanks to the Vote YES for Kids movement. And we won’t stop pulling for our friends whose races haven’t been called yet. But here’s what we don’t need an election to tell us: We are a country of people who love our country. We are committed to giving our children the future they deserve. We want to be united, not divided. We want real solutions, not scare tactics. And here’s what I can promise you: I will keep investing in our people and our communities — in real solutions and in our future. We already have all the potential we need in our classrooms, homes, and gathering places across New Mexico. Together we can create a future that is as boundless as our skies, as majestic as our mesas, and as welcoming as our communities. It’s the honor of my life to serve you and this beautiful place we call home. Let’s keep fighting for New Mexico and this great country of ours! Thank you for all you do, Martin Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. If you would like to stay in touch but receive fewer emails from us, click here [] . If you would like to unsubscribe from emails altogether, click here [] . Martin Heinrich for Senate PO Box 25763 Albuquerque, NM 87125 United States

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: Thank You, Northwest Florida!
body:
| | | |
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001p-LiFzvD13fwyP9Z55ogaaT-19D9DNpHQNO54Dnf_mpd-dpyGL9xJAx1wxP6MXOkC_pBrsAEg7z4QTkJsbfM4Q2sezVhu1PIK00Wts9So24bfHu23vR_InN6Hb1Oy4zU_Hp2f8ABPoE=&c=FTvoMfj1zYzP5DojkQxff-8ybghUv7vxReJ5av-xqKdLYwiqhX0sjQ==&ch=vTnjT11WHo-F2VyTSb5lXux9nHP0QDIiUGaFRopfc36m0vQARm3nYQ==)
---
| Peter,
I wanted you to hear it directly from this Florida Man...
THANK YOU for once again giving me the honor to serve you and fight for your interests in the Swamp!
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001p-LiFzvD13fwyP9Z55ogaaT-19D9DNpHQNO54Dnf_mpd-dpyGL9xJAx1wxP6MXOkC_pBrsAEg7z4QTkJsbfM4Q2sezVhu1PIK00Wts9So24bfHu23vR_InN6Hb1Oy4zU_Hp2f8ABPoE=&c=FTvoMfj1zYzP5DojkQxff-8ybghUv7vxReJ5av-xqKdLYwiqhX0sjQ==&ch=vTnjT11WHo-F2VyTSb5lXux9nHP0QDIiUGaFRopfc36m0vQARm3nYQ==)
---
| Northwest Floridians are some of the most patriotic, God-fearing, Ultra MAGA Americans in the entire country, and it is an honor to have all of you as my bosses.
I'm grateful to this entire team for every single dollar that was contributed, every volunteer hour that was spent, every bit of helpful information you gave, and every moment that you invested in this fight.
Because we just delivered another incredible victory - and we did it all without a single red cent from the Swamp lobbyists and corporate PACs that corrupt our politics! It wouldn't have been possible without YOU, Peter!
I'm ready to lead the charge for America First in the upcoming 118th United States Congress.
And it's all because of YOU that I get the chance.
So thanks for once again proving that we are the strongest political force in the entire COUNTRY! Let's go get 'em!!!

For Florida and America,

name: Sean Patrick Maloney
subject: thank you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SEAN PATRICK MALONEY FOR CONGRESS
body:
Derek, before I say anything else, I want to simply say thank you.

The past two years haven’t been easy, yet you’ve supported me every step of the way.

While last night’s election results might not have gone the way we hoped, we still have so much to be proud of.

Right now, our Democrats are defying expectations from coast to coast -- thanks to supporters like you.

I know that together, we’ll have many more victories to come.

I couldn’t have run this race without you -- and even in defeat, I’m so grateful.

From the bottom of my heart -- thank you,

Sean

| | | PAID FOR BY SEAN PATRICK MALONEY FOR CONGRESS

subject: Victory, Friend!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Grassley Committee, Inc
body:
You made it happen 👋

| [ ](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=900b28bd2ca84446a8cff8fd5be701d1&_e=oHlrSV5-yi29qc5QCivIqIoeeebDgmPs9POf4Zv8ZloGeK4k7-a_1o4uycv5uFvVXvsz64iNJCdaYaMOjaltiblYw8SmVuYmlK1350BqC24OHjUbCyQzW8R6xArAkMEawrFjeRm5J8ql_r5n-U2h-sEq8w8QvstTlHK_WqD_emuVRHuvBOZKm5CoFhXlMjhUO5UlLm5uy1-7zFaBcWclyxK1FCyp4oJUuWm4sopstjwXYkSdHHZ5SOcYWmw6Nk-u-4v880zF1LbwIXm6X-1r30UNb2KKO0HmxBIsbdSHcDyIXaWP3nw_XWq1mqf7NdW4DkvmMF8x0poDRRAE7fDMi7YrYWb_Bbk7TdzF6DT4mR_UdVLYd2se4Oy-aM6UOv0txOgoFbFKviRa6Es1LgFvO-DMVLHDPlUUJ5U6IoTbeZkQlyjX2986dMUaGLE3cp3h_HSGoZQPuh0J38SROC68_Rl3_aPNXLP3l5o5it4z_-8%3D)

We did it, Friend.

Thanks to your hard work and support, we've won the U.S. Senate election in Iowa.

From the bottom of my heart, I thank you for all that you have done. All the doors knocked, all the voters called, and all the $5, $10, and $20 donations have led us to this point. YOU are the reason we won this election.

**Now it 's time for the real challenge. **

In the Senate, I will continue my fight for you. I will hold the administration accountable, fight for our farmers, put the brakes on reckless spending that's fueling the high cost of living, make our streets safe, secure our border, and stop the left's radical agenda.

I will always fight for you, keeping you in the loop every step of the way. I hope to continue hearing from you as your senator. But you can rest easier now that America is back on the right track.

Thank you. I couldn't have done this without your continued support.

God Bless You, and God Bless America,

[](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=900b28bd2ca84446a8cff8fd5be701d1&_e=oHlrSV5-yi29qc5QCivIqIoeeebDgmPs9POf4Zv8ZloGeK4k7-a_1o4uycv5uFvVXvsz64iNJCdaYaMOjaltiblYw8SmVuYmlK1350BqC24OHjUbCyQzW8R6xArAkMEawrFjeRm5J8ql_r5n-U2h-sEq8w8QvstTlHK_WqD_emuVRHuvBOZKm5CoFhXlMjhUO5UlLm5uy1-7zFaBcWclyxK1FCyp4oJUuWm4sopstjwXYkSdHHZ5SOcYWmw6Nk-u-4v880zF1LbwIXm6X-1r30UNb2KKO0HmxBIsbdSHcDyIXaWP3nw_XWq1mqf7NdW4fTmYdqxg3Y863BaUjjmGwFj5UfrgTSrnMONqPx9VJXzQwP4tp-zj3rIaYmsa0yjWPc6zw4adDJXexqW0KMEw7_N1rmApRefeP6NSrTn1Aqt8zhTaYUf46JIYV-YwJfpHojWAbKDb5379oDLSxcIYm_JIknYvqsRdyU-WahbkOHs%3D)

name: Sen. Heidi Campbell
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Campbell for Congress
body:
https://www.voteheidicampbell.com/ [https://www.voteheidicampbell.com/]
Dear Peter,
Although the results last night weren’t what we worked for, I am so proud of our team and the race we ran. When the GOP supermajority in the state legislature split Nashville between three gerrymandered congressional districts, we knew we couldn’t take this sitting down.
We put together one of the strongest congressional campaigns Tennessee has seen in recent years in a matter of weeks. Over the course of the seven months between announcing the campaign and the election, we knocked on thousands of doors, made thousands of phone calls and raised more than $1 million to launch multiple TV ads.
I met amazing people, from Lebanon to Lewisburg, who believe in democracy and working together to solve problems. While last night was disappointing, we cannot allow ourselves to grow cynical. The work must continue to restore our democracy and protect our freedom.
I am so grateful for my amazing campaign staff, the hundreds of volunteers who helped us knock doors, send texts, and make phone calls, and for the nearly 4,000 people who donated to our efforts. I will truly never forget the words of encouragement from so many people across the district.
Most importantly, I am thankful for my family. As many of you know, in the waning days of this campaign my husband, Andrew, was diagnosed with Stage 4 cancer. We were overwhelmed by the compassion shown to our family from friends and supporters like you.
Once again, thank you for your support, your votes, and your kindness. The work continues!
My best,
Heidi Campbell

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
I have been re-elected because of you | | |
---
Friends — thank you. Thank you for the support and commitment that you have given me, both during this campaign and throughout my public service. **Because of your efforts, I am proud to say that I have been re-elected to the United States Senate.** I want to thank Don Bolduc for a hard-fought campaign and for his service to our country. We have our differences, but we share a love of our country. To the people of New Hampshire, thank you for the trust that you have once again placed in me. I promise you that I will keep working every day to serve you faithfully, to listen to you, and to work with you to address the challenges facing your families, our state, and our nation. Here in New Hampshire, Granite Staters put aside partisanship and work together every day to solve problems. Six years ago, I promised you that I would follow your example in Washington, and that is what I have worked to do, day-in and day-out, as your Senator. And by following that example, we have shown what is possible when we come together to find common ground and deliver results. When Granite Staters told me their stories of receiving outrageous surprise medical bills, I got to work to take on the entire health care industry and end this practice. Working across the aisle, I helped negotiate and pass the bipartisan infrastructure law that is rebuilding our roads and bridges and bringing high-speed internet to our communities. But there is more to do to build an economy that works for everyone – to help families and small businesses with the costs that they face, to foster innovation, to invest in our workforce and to ensure that we make more things in America. I have worked on commonsense ways to lower costs – taking on Big Pharma and Big Oil to lower energy and prescription drug costs and by bringing supply chains back to America. Of course, in order to have an economy that works, we have to be safe. The safety of our citizens and our nation is always government’s first responsibility. And I will keep working to support our brave men and women of law enforcement and to keep our country and communities safe. And a strong and safe economy must also keep its promises, especially to seniors whose hard work sets the foundation for the next generation. New Hampshire’s seniors deserve the full benefits that they have earned. That’s why I will work to protect and strengthen Social Security and Medicare. And a strong country and prosperous economy cannot relegate women to second-class citizenship, so I will always keep fighting to protect a woman’s fundamental freedom and to block any attempts to ban abortion nationwide. There is so much more work that we need to do to help Granite Staters and all Americans thrive. I am deeply honored to have the opportunity to continue working to do so. Thank you again to the people of New Hampshire for the great trust that you have once again bestowed upon me. I will work every day to honor it. With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: Eric Lynn
subject: Thank you for everything, friend.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ERIC LYNN FOR CONGRESS
body:
Eric Lynn for Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP24/1/93680/images/lynn-email-logo.png]
Hi team,

I started my campaign for Florida's 13th congressional district to represent my hometown and to protect Americans and our democracy. Those values fueled my start in public service and will continue to be my priority.

Unfortunately, the results of the midterm election show that my campaign was not able to overtake my extremist Republican opponent, Anna Paulina Luna, at the ballot box, especially after the illegally gerrymandered district gave her and the Republicans an 11 percent swing from the 2020 boundaries.

These are difficult results to hear, and I know many of my supporters and voters across the country are saddened and deeply worried by another district flipping red this election season. It is worrisome and deeply concerning that Pinellas will now be represented by an extremist like Luna.

Yet, this election was about more than just me and my opponent. It was about fighting for progress not hate, inclusion not discrimination, and democracy not dictatorship. Those goals don't end here, and I will continue to be in that fight.

I am so proud of everyone in Pinellas who showed up at the polls, knocked on doors, called their friends and neighbors, contributed to our campaign and did whatever they could to protect our community from an extremist Republican takeover. I believe in the work that we accomplished during this campaign.

I'll still be standing with you shoulder to shoulder, fighting for the issues that we all care about: an economy that works for everyone and worker's rights, reproductive health, our environment and climate action, improved education, veterans’ support, and protecting our democracy.

Thank you for your support throughout this campaign, and let's continue fighting.

With my deepest appreciation,

Eric Lynn
Eric Lynn is a former Senior Advisor to President Obama, national security expert, small business owner, community advocate, and St. Petersburg Native who is ready to lead Pinellas County forward. Empathic, passionate, and pragmatic, Eric knows how to get the job done in Washington on day one.
FIGHT ALONGSIDE ERIC LYNN [https://ericlynnforcongress.com/]

| | | Peter, From the bottom of my heart, I want to thank you.

You have given your all during this election season, and we would NEVER be where we are today without your help.

Thanks to you, we were able to elect incredible conservatives across America.

I can’t wait to get to work with our new Republican members to get our great country back on track.
---

---

Col. Mike Waltz
Special Forces Green Beret
U.S. Congressman (FL-6)

name: Kyrsten Sinema
subject: More ground to cover
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sinema for Arizona
body:
|
#
---
Team, I want to thank each and every one of you who took time out of your busy lives to vote in yesterday’s election. In our democracy, voting is how we make our voices heard. It will likely take a few more days for some races in Arizona and across the county to be called and results finalized, so let’s be patient and remember that this is how our democratic process works. While we wait for final results, I hope you’ll take a minute to complete our November Priorities Survey. Regardless of the final outcome, once the elections are called I’ll continue to work on the issues that matter most to you and your family. **In these last months of the year, we have a lot more ground to cover and I want to make sure we tackle your priorities first.** Will you share what’s on your mind in our priorities survey? [**Please take a couple of minutes to complete our November Priorities Survey, and let me know what’s top of mind for you and your family.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54379793/378317879/-791617984?refcode=AU_KLS_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20221109_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84OTMxNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjUxNTI5Ni02ZDYwLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNGE2NTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZP9BLmcuMYwEK-UQ7CzVDeb6vWHVbEMUXoyx6TidgiQ=&emci=094c1790-6d60-ed11-ade6-14cb6534a651&emdi=62515296-6d60-ed11-ade6-14cb6534a651&ceid=2415496) | [TAKE OUR SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54379794/378317880/-791617984?refcode=AU_KLS_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20221109_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84OTMxNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjUxNTI5Ni02ZDYwLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNGE2NTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZP9BLmcuMYwEK-UQ7CzVDeb6vWHVbEMUXoyx6TidgiQ=&emci=094c1790-6d60-ed11-ade6-14cb6534a651&emdi=62515296-6d60-ed11-ade6-14cb6534a651&ceid=2415496)

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: first and foremost
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
| | |
---
Hi, friend – I know it was a long night last night, but I just had to update you about where things stand.

First and foremost, thank you for getting us to this point. None of this would be possible without this incredible grassroots team behind me. **But as of right now, our race is too close to call.**
I won my last election by a razor-thin margin, so I know what it's like to double down, stay hopeful, and allow our democracy to do its job. Whether it’s later today, or tomorrow, or four weeks from now, we will hear from the people of Georgia, the people who who have given me this great honor of representing you in the Senate, and we will move forward together. But I also know we can't leave _anything_ to chance – and with a race this close and this important, we must do everything in our power to make sure every last vote is counted.

**I've asked a lot from you already, friend, but I need you with me again: **[Will you chip in $5 right now – anything you can spare makes a huge difference – so we can ensure EVERY eligible vote is counted? I know with your support we can keep Georgia and the Senate blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54350530/378264706/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5055-fr-nd&recurring=0&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjZhYTA1Zi00MzYwLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNGE2NTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=icUgIlcGXqhXamcCbEY4q49eBtryZABUKtu0lWX3oBs=)
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54350531/378264707/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5055-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjZhYTA1Zi00MzYwLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNGE2NTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=icUgIlcGXqhXamcCbEY4q49eBtryZABUKtu0lWX3oBs=)
---
Thanks so much – I'll be in touch with more soon. Keep the faith.

– Rev. Raphael Warnock

name: Herschel Walker
subject: This race isn’t over
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
It’s going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks of this runoff campaign, so I need your help once again.
It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks of this runoff campaign, so I need your help once again. |

---
Fellow American,

_**The fight for Georgia's Senate seat is going into OVERTIME.**_

**Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Tuesday, our Senate race is now heading to a RUNOFF on Tuesday, December 6th.**

It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks, so I need your help once again.

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff.

**[I'm going to beat Senator Warnock in this runoff, but I can't do it without the help of my top supporters on DAY ONE. name: Aadland For Colorado
subject: Thank You
body:
| | | |
---
---
|
---
---
| "It has been a distinct honor to strive to represent you, and I will always cherish the memories and relationships that we built together over the past year and a half. I am humbled by the great privilege of running for high office in the greatest country on earth; it could not have come to fruition without Divine guidance, the extraordinary support of my loving wife Megan and three amazing kids, cherished friends, a world-class campaign team, generous donors and an army of courageous volunteers who left absolutely everything on the field to win this election for God and Country. Words cannot fully express the extent of my heartfelt gratitude for the enormous generosity of time, talent and treasurer contributed to this campaign.
Though I share with you hurt and disappointment, we have done something special together as a grassroots campaign that never strayed from its principles of truth, compassion, unity, and freedom. I am deeply proud to have shared such crucial work for our country's future with you, and our impact has been significant.
This is not the end, our work is not over, for those things we hold dear must be constantly guarded and fought for; thus, I will reflect and pray to soon find another path of service, keeping ever in mind Colorado, the United States of America, and the will of the Creator. Thank you again and God bless America!"
---
|
---
|
---
---
---
|
---
---
|
---
---

It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks of this runoff campaign, so I need your help once again. | Fellow American, The fight for Georgia's Senate seat is going into OVERTIME. Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Tuesday, our Senate race is now heading to a RUNOFF on Tuesday, December 6th. It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks, so I need your help once again. We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff. Despite my opponent spending over $101 MILLION in the general election, Raphael Warnock could not win the support of a majority of Georgians as an incumbent senator. It is time for a change! Everything is at stake in this runoff election, and we don't have a moment to waste. Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Sent to Conservatives Give subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Eric Sorensen
subject: We won!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Eric Sorensen for Illinois
body:
| | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zSJ2-Su0o8Ni7LeDh2MrPPUvpXBRo6wFsFkfdA82RDzFQIzSqBtPLJyFcDxkf8ctYq__wnUIW5ki97Ka5mWXv7gp7t2s-w8TULaGxv_bERNmjcnTobCBnB7aGnwjReWI7Qefm_43Zp_1Hn6eAhpn8r7kg3fmzKipF1CSIBA8NZTOGCBne25R2cQzVndS4c9t2CToROajbkW9WpjTWicJp8HcTlQxYdPO6OkF-P0Ly-JbmwnWncJCNB6VDVCytQyA_GdFPrIVYKqZd-q7NM1ee3/3r0/NzK9RTivSaqe42V_wwtEww/h0/Tq0wPcgimk_HicsZlaz67UvFE1uO-6s3Q06CBICJIHM)
---
We did it, Peter.

**Ballots have been counted, and I'm proud to announce that I am officially your Congressman-Elect in Illinois’ 17th Congressional District!** Earlier this morning, my opponent Esther King called to concede the race. She ran a hard-fought campaign, and while we didn't agree on the issues, this was about serving our community. I want to commend and thank her for running.
I'd like to extend a huge thank you to the thousands of grassroots supporters across Central and Northwest Illinois who are a part of our team. To the volunteers, donors, staff members, and our incredible friends in organized labor: **YOU are the reason this we won this race.** And to my family -- who have supported me the entire way – I couldn't have done this without your love and support. From day one, this was about electing a representative who was known and trusted. It was about protecting our democracy and securing reproductive rights. It was about making sure that our IL-17 communities remain sustainable for future generations. This place is special and it’s going to be represented by someone who’s spent nearly their entire life living, working, and engaging in our community. **Someone who you know will be a good neighbor!** We have a lot of work ahead of us, and if last night's election results were any indication, it's clear that our community (and country) still believes in our democracy and is ready start grappling with the real issues we face. Rest assured that I will work on your behalf every single day as your
Congressman, and I'm humbled to have you at my side. Thank you, Eric Sorensen
Congressman-elect, Illinois' 17th District
---
