name: Sarah Longwell
subject: Democracy won last night
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican Accountability PAC Inc
body:
|
---
> _We thought you might want to see this special message from our friends at Republican Accountability PAC._
Friend,

Wow. What else can I say? Last night proved something I’ve been saying for a long time—candidate quality matters. Republicans who thought they could go full MAGA were given a rude awakening that most Americans don’t want to be represented by conspiracy theorists and election deniers. While results are still coming in for some key races, one thing is clear: **there was no red wave, and it’s because the MAGA wing of the GOP is too extreme and dishonest for our democracy.** We couldn’t have done it without you. It was your voices that made all the difference. As we take in the good news, this isn’t a time to get complacent. Some of the worst election deniers may have gone down, but there are others who are following Trump’s lead in contesting their races. Future crops of election deniers will gear up to run again. And there’s no telling what Trump himself will do. **But we’ll make sure that the next time the MAGA extremists try to threaten our democracy, they’ll remember this moment.** I know you’ll be there with us. Sarah Longwell Treasurer, Republican Accountability PAC

clean_body: | We thought you might want to see this special message from our friends at Republican Accountability PAC. Friend, Wow. What else can I say? Last night proved something I’ve been saying for a long time—candidate quality matters. Republicans who thought they could go full MAGA were given a rude awakening that most Americans don’t want to be represented by conspiracy theorists and election deniers. While results are still coming in for some key races, one thing is clear: there was no red wave, and it’s because the MAGA wing of the GOP is too extreme and dishonest for our democracy. We couldn’t have done it without you. It was your voices that made all the difference. As we take in the good news, this isn’t a time to get complacent. Some of the worst election deniers may have gone down, but there are others who are following Trump’s lead in contesting their races. Future crops of election deniers will gear up to run again. And there’s no telling what Trump himself will do. But we’ll make sure that the next time the MAGA extremists try to threaten our democracy, they’ll remember this moment. I know you’ll be there with us. Sarah Longwell Treasurer, Republican Accountability PAC | Republican Accountability Project, 925 15th Street NW, Washington, DC 20005 Paid for by the Republican Accountability PAC Inc. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Matthew Diemer
subject: Not the result we wanted
body:
| |
---
Peter, The results came in and it looks like Max Miller will be our next representative. **** I hope Max takes this responsibility and uses it to unite not divide, put women’s rights and workers first, and bring manufacturing back to Ohio. **** I am incredibly thankful for every one of you who cast their ballots for me. Your support means the world to me. **** I’m proud of what we did together. We ran an underdog campaign based on the ideals of representation and serving this district. I will always treasure having the opportunity to speak with so many of you across our community about the issues that are impacting real Ohioans every day. **** This is a tough moment, but no way is it a loss. Just look at what we did together. Together, we have shown throughout this race that ordinary Ohioans are worth fighting for. We showed that standing for our democracy is essential today. And we gave a voice to Americans who are tired of partisan politics and the status quo. From the bottom of my heart, I want to thank you for all of your support during this race. You lifted me up and I will always be grateful.
---
Sincerely, Matthew Diemer
---
|
---
Diemer for Congress P.O. body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/7993?t=1011&akid=3710%2E5885482%2EtrxfwP ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

Our Revolution has been mobilizing voters
all cycle to keep the Senate under Democratic control. We won in
Pennsylvania, where John Fetterman beat Trump darling Mehmet Oz in a tight
race!

However, our work is not done.

This morning, the Georgia Secretary of State announced that the Senate
race in Georgia is going to a runoff election.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/7993?t=1012&akid=3710%2E5885482%2EtrxfwP ]This race, less than one month from today, is now urgent. We know we
can win when we do the work and organize, but we need your help. Rush a
donation here to support our Georgia groups doing the voter turnout work
necessary to help Senator Raphael Warnock win this runoff!

Georgia is likely to decide which party controls the Senate in 2023 and
beyond. If we want to have an opportunity to continue pushing Democrats to
do better, we need to make sure Senator Raphael Warnock wins re-election.

In the 2020 runoff, we raised voter turnout by 11% per voter contact,
powering Senator Warnock to victory despite massive billionaire spending
against him.

We can do this. We won in Pennsylvania by relentlessly focusing on
organizing, and with you with us, we're about to do it again.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/7993?t=1013&akid=3710%2E5885482%2EtrxfwP ]Can we count on you to be a founding donor to our Georgia runoff fund?

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to
Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/7994?refcode=OR_EM_FR_25SP_20221109_1_1&t=1014&akid=3710%2E5885482%2EtrxfwP ]CHIP IN $10 NOW » [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/7995?refcode=OR_EM_FR_25SP_20221109_1_1&t=1015&akid=3710%2E5885482%2EtrxfwP ]CHIP IN $18 NOW »

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/7998?refcode=OR_EM_FR_25SP_20221109_1_1&t=1018&akid=3710%2E5885482%2EtrxfwP ]CHIP IN $250 NOW » [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/7999?refcode=OR_EM_FR_25SP_20221109_1_1&t=1019&akid=3710%2E5885482%2EtrxfwP ]CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT »

If we work together, we will overcome the MAGA propaganda and billionaire
cash flooding the airwaves with attack ads.

That means organizing around the economic issues that matter to working
people and overcoming systemic voter suppression designed to shut us out
of the political process.

That's what Our Revolution does, and we're only able to do it with your
support.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/7993?t=1020&akid=3710%2E5885482%2EtrxfwP ]Help us scale up our organizing in Georgia by pitching in here. All of
America is watching this runoff, and too much is at stake to fall short.

In solidarity,

Our Revolution

body:

Fellow American,

_**The fight for Georgia's Senate seat is going into OVERTIME.**_

**Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Tuesday, our Senate race is now heading to a RUNOFF on Tuesday, December 6th.**

It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks, so I need your help once again.

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff.

name: Dan Kildee
subject: We did it!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dan Kildee
body:
| Team —

We did it! A little while ago, I received a call from Paul Junge conceding the election.

Thank you to mid-Michigan voters for placing their trust in me to be their voice in Congress. I am eager to put this hard-fought campaign behind us and focus on the work ahead for Midland, Bay, Saginaw, Tuscola and Genesee Counties.

To all of our supporters and volunteers who were with us every step of the way — Thank you! We truly couldn’t have achieved this victory without you.

As your Member of Congress, I will always try to lower the temperature in our political discourse, find common ground between parties, and just focus on delivering results for mid-Michigan.

I was born and raised in this district and will always passionately fight for our communities. I promise to always do what’s right for mid-Michigan, even if it means taking on members of my own party.

Today, we celebrate a hard-fought campaign victory. But, tomorrow, we get right back to work for mid-Michigan's working families!

Sincerely,

Dan Kildee

---

* * *
Congressman Dan Kildee – a Flint native – is proud to represent mid-Michigan. As a Democratic party leader, Dan is fighting hard to ensure every American has access to quality health care, clean water and a good-paying job. The path to protect the Democratic majority in the House runs right through the Midwest, and Dan is dedicated to protecting and electing Democratic candidates. But we can’t do it without you! name: Ron Wyden
subject: Thank you. For everything.
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54382608/378325950/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjljNjAzYy03NTYwLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNGE2NTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o-0qt5fAlfbads0GjGT8OKET777CC21UAKD_DrlwwFU=&emci=4640fa47-6660-ed11-ade6-14cb6534a651&emdi=ef9c603c-7560-ed11-ade6-14cb6534a651&ceid=9818364)
---

| | I'm honored. **Thanks to your grassroots energy and with the support of Oregonians far and wide, we won this race.** First of all, _thank you. For everything._ I'm eager to continue our work in the Senate. While many important elections are still undecided, both here in Oregon and nationally, the big takeaway from last night is that the American people continue to reject MAGA extremism in every form. Last night was a strong rebuke of Republicans' attempts to turn back the clock on our constitutional rights and an even stronger endorsement of the progress Democrats have made on lowering costs for families, tackling the climate crisis, and creating good-paying jobs. **While not every race went the way that we wanted it to, no matter what happens next, our movement will continue to be a voice for the people of Oregon** — fighting for affordable health care, clean energy, affordable housing, reproductive freedom, and much more. Representing Oregon in the Senate is the honor of my lifetime. We've made big steps to tackle the challenges facing Oregon families, and there's more work to do. Let's carry this momentum into the coming days, weeks, and months as we continue the fight. Thank you, _Ron_ |
---|---|---

clean_body: | | | | I'm honored. Thanks to your grassroots energy and with the support of Oregonians far and wide, we won this race. First of all, thank you. For everything. I'm eager to continue our work in the Senate. While many important elections are still undecided, both here in Oregon and nationally, the big takeaway from last night is that the American people continue to reject MAGA extremism in every form. Last night was a strong rebuke of Republicans' attempts to turn back the clock on our constitutional rights and an even stronger endorsement of the progress Democrats have made on lowering costs for families, tackling the climate crisis, and creating good-paying jobs. While not every race went the way that we wanted it to, no matter what happens next, our movement will continue to be a voice for the people of Oregon — fighting for affordable health care, clean energy, affordable housing, reproductive freedom, and much more. Representing Oregon in the Senate is the honor of my lifetime. We've made big steps to tackle the challenges facing Oregon families, and there's more work to do. Let's carry this momentum into the coming days, weeks, and months as we continue the fight. Thank you, Ron | ---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate. | This email was sent by Wyden for Senate P.O. name: =?utf-8?Q?Phil=20Scott?=
subject: Thank you!
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/philscott/thank-you-b3a44jhsir?e=19cebfe173)
---
| |
---
| | First of all, I want to thank the people of Vermont for their faith in me.

I also want to thank all those who stepped up across the state to run for office - win or lose.

As I know all too well, it’s not easy to put yourself out there, but it’s so important for our democracy.

So, I thank my opponent and every candidate for giving voters a choice and helping to demonstrate the importance and integrity of this peaceful process.

I’ve been fortunate to have won my share of stock car races over the years and when I was in victory lane, I’d get all the accolades.

But I’d remind them it wasn’t just me. I’d never be in a position to win without my crew putting in the hours and the hard work to get the set up right, so I’d have a car I could win with.

The same goes for my current job.

I’ve been so blessed to have a talented group of people around me, my Cabinet, staff, and supporters like you.

Everything we’ve accomplished over the last six years is the result of our work together.

I’m very proud of the progress we’ve made, but there’s still a lot more work to do.

I was reminded of that during our traditional “14 County Tour” the day before the election.

Visiting every single county, more than 500 miles in one day, always puts things into perspective.

It reinforces what we know: Just how beautiful our state is and how much it has to offer.

But also, how much work there is to do in order to make sure every family, in every county, in every corner of our state has the tools it needs to be successful too.

In that 14 hours, we saw that far too much of Vermont has been left behind.

So, we need to be willing to do the hard work to level the playing field so we’re helping the communities that need us the most and so we aren’t pushing them further behind.

This is something we’ve been focused on over the last six years, and with the support of Vermonters from across the state, my team and I will continue making this a priority and get back to work.

Because Vermonters spoke loudly and clearly.

They want their leaders to focus on the economy, affordability and protecting the vulnerable.

They want centrist moderation and balance.

They want us to be able to debate the issues with civility, seek consensus where possible, compromise when necessary, and agree to disagree when no compromise can be found.

They don’t expect me to be a rubber stamp for the legislature, just like they don’t want the legislature to blindly go along with whatever we put forward.

They want a steady, balanced government with less partisanship because that’s what gives them the best results.

I believe the majority of Vermonters when it comes down to the problems they want to be solved, don’t really care about the labels.

They just want results.

They want us to put our work ahead of politics.

I think that’s where most Vermonters and Americans really are. They’re in the middle.

Unfortunately, the fringe coalitions on the right and left are driving the parties further and further apart and they get the most attention.

You know, that’s probably why some people say I’m too liberal, while others think I’m a secret hard-core conservative.

Some people say they won’t vote for me because I have “R” next to my name and others call me a RINO.

But the fact is, these labels come from a small number of people on the right and left who don’t want to compromise.

They’d rather focus on the issues that divide us rather than those that unite us.

We’ve got to stop this never-ending cycle in order to move our state and country forward.

Think about it.

Would you ask your neighbor who they voted for before offering to lend a helping hand in their time of need?

When we sit down to watch a game or a NASCAR race, we don’t know - nor do we care - whether the players, team members, or drivers are Republicans or Democrats.

We need to view each other as people first.

We need to judge people by their decency, their kindness, their generosity - not labels.

Because I believe, though we may not agree on every issue, the vast majority of people are good.

They want to make a difference in their communities. They want to make things better for their kids, family, and friends.

And as elected officials, we need to make the people we serve our priority.

It’s up to us to treat each other with respect and dignity, live up to the responsibility we’ve been given, and remember that our children are watching and some of them want to be just like us!

>From the bottom of my heart, thank you, Vermont, for the faith you have once again placed in me.

I’ll work every single day to get the results you deserve, by listening, learning, and leading - and always putting people before politics.
---

clean_body: | | | | | | | First of all, I want to thank the people of Vermont for their faith in me. I also want to thank all those who stepped up across the state to run for office - win or lose. As I know all too well, it’s not easy to put yourself out there, but it’s so important for our democracy. So, I thank my opponent and every candidate for giving voters a choice and helping to demonstrate the importance and integrity of this peaceful process. I’ve been fortunate to have won my share of stock car races over the years and when I was in victory lane, I’d get all the accolades. But I’d remind them it wasn’t just me. I’d never be in a position to win without my crew putting in the hours and the hard work to get the set up right, so I’d have a car I could win with. The same goes for my current job. I’ve been so blessed to have a talented group of people around me, my Cabinet, staff, and supporters like you. Everything we’ve accomplished over the last six years is the result of our work together. I’m very proud of the progress we’ve made, but there’s still a lot more work to do. I was reminded of that during our traditional “14 County Tour” the day before the election. Visiting every single county, more than 500 miles in one day, always puts things into perspective. It reinforces what we know: Just how beautiful our state is and how much it has to offer. But also, how much work there is to do in order to make sure every family, in every county, in every corner of our state has the tools it needs to be successful too. In that 14 hours, we saw that far too much of Vermont has been left behind. So, we need to be willing to do the hard work to level the playing field so we’re helping the communities that need us the most and so we aren’t pushing them further behind. This is something we’ve been focused on over the last six years, and with the support of Vermonters from across the state, my team and I will continue making this a priority and get back to work. Because Vermonters spoke loudly and clearly. They want their leaders to focus on the economy, affordability and protecting the vulnerable. They want centrist moderation and balance. They want us to be able to debate the issues with civility, seek consensus where possible, compromise when necessary, and agree to disagree when no compromise can be found. They don’t expect me to be a rubber stamp for the legislature, just like they don’t want the legislature to blindly go along with whatever we put forward. They want a steady, balanced government with less partisanship because that’s what gives them the best results. I believe the majority of Vermonters when it comes down to the problems they want to be solved, don’t really care about the labels. They just want results. They want us to put our work ahead of politics. I think that’s where most Vermonters and Americans really are. They’re in the middle. Unfortunately, the fringe coalitions on the right and left are driving the parties further and further apart and they get the most attention. You know, that’s probably why some people say I’m too liberal, while others think I’m a secret hard-core conservative. Some people say they won’t vote for me because I have “R” next to my name and others call me a RINO. But the fact is, these labels come from a small number of people on the right and left who don’t want to compromise. They’d rather focus on the issues that divide us rather than those that unite us. We’ve got to stop this never-ending cycle in order to move our state and country forward. Think about it. Would you ask your neighbor who they voted for before offering to lend a helping hand in their time of need? When we sit down to watch a game or a NASCAR race, we don’t know - nor do we care - whether the players, team members, or drivers are Republicans or Democrats. We need to view each other as people first. We need to judge people by their decency, their kindness, their generosity - not labels. Because I believe, though we may not agree on every issue, the vast majority of people are good. They want to make a difference in their communities. They want to make things better for their kids, family, and friends. And as elected officials, we need to make the people we serve our priority. It’s up to us to treat each other with respect and dignity, live up to the responsibility we’ve been given, and remember that our children are watching and some of them want to be just like us! From the bottom of my heart, thank you, Vermont, for the faith you have once again placed in me. I’ll work every single day to get the results you deserve, by listening, learning, and leading - and always putting people before politics. | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2022 Phil Scott for Vermont, All rights reserved.

name: Richard Walker
subject: Doctor indoctrination
body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61825757:Jgn7-6GEN:m:1:3373497171:E9FDFED48B51879465D9EE4E57D785D1:r)

Peter,

For hundreds of years, doctors have vowed to _" fulfill, to the best of my ability and judgment, this covenant: I will respect the hard-won scientific gains . . . and gladly share such knowledge as is mine with those who are to follow."_

The Hippocratic oath has stood as a guideline for physicians caring for their patients.

_**But now it 's being replaced. . . **_

The medical establishment is losing trust because they've abandoned the principles of the doctor-patient relationship.

Let me introduce myself. I am Richard Walker, Executive Director at the Benjamin Rush Institute (BRI). I've set a goal to raise $50,000 before the end of November to help medical students resist wokeness in medical schools.

[_**This is your chance to reverse the decay of the doctor-patient relationship. Can I count on you to donate $10, $35, $50, or any amount today? Click here to send your gift >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61825757:Jgn7-6GEN:m:1:3373497171:E9FDFED48B51879465D9EE4E57D785D1:r)

The University of Minnesota is now having its medical students swear an oath to:

_" Honor all Indigenous ways of healing that have been historically marginalized by Western medicine" and fight "white supremacy, colonialism, [and] the gender binary."_

**They are basically indoctrinating new doctors into the cult of Critical Race Theory (CRT).**

BRI is fighting to help medical students overcome the push toward socialized, CRT-focused healthcare.

[_**Your generous donation helps BRI chapters educate medical students, re-focus healthcare policy on inviolate doctor-patient autonomy, and create a lasting legacy of healthcare freedom and medical excellence. Click here to show your support >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61825757:Jgn7-6GEN:m:1:3373497171:E9FDFED48B51879465D9EE4E57D785D1:r)

Most medical students today rarely receive instruction about healthcare policy. If they do, however, the focus overwhelmingly promotes a government-mandated, insurance company approach to healthcare. And the pressure from some of their peers can be even worse.

_They rarely -- if ever -- encounter a voice promoting free enterprise and the sanctity of the patient-doctor relationship._

**BRI fills the gap in schools where free enterprise healthcare policy discussions are under-represented or even entirely absent.**

BRI's Chapters give medical students a place to learn how a free enterprise healthcare policy can deliver affordable, quality medical care to their patients.

**We hold events every year and expose thousands of medical students to free-market healthcare policy solutions.**

Your support helps us show the next generation of medical students how they can protect the doctor-patient relationship as the primary means of delivering quality medical care. Donate by clicking any amount below.

[_**Donate $35 >>> **_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61825758:Jgn7-6GEN:m:1:3373497171:E9FDFED48B51879465D9EE4E57D785D1:r)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61825759:Jgn7-6GEN:m:1:3373497171:E9FDFED48B51879465D9EE4E57D785D1:r)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61825760:Jgn7-6GEN:m:1:3373497171:E9FDFED48B51879465D9EE4E57D785D1:r)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61825761:Jgn7-6GEN:m:1:3373497171:E9FDFED48B51879465D9EE4E57D785D1:r)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61825762:Jgn7-6GEN:m:1:3373497171:E9FDFED48B51879465D9EE4E57D785D1:r)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61825763:Jgn7-6GEN:m:1:3373497171:E9FDFED48B51879465D9EE4E57D785D1:r)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61825757:Jgn7-6GEN:m:1:3373497171:E9FDFED48B51879465D9EE4E57D785D1:r)

Thank you,

Richard W. Walker
Executive Director
Benjamin Rush Institute

name: Patriot Marketplace
subject: C.S. Lewis like you’ve never seen him before
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| [](http://trk.patriotmarketplace.-83cqg)Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I'm writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News _because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty-like our free online courses. _ _ And though we're best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author-C.S. Lewis.In fact, our free online course, **"[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](http://trk.patriotmarketplace.-W33Ulw1w)" **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That's why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **"[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://trk.patriotmarketplace.)," **we've received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis' writings.[](http://trk.patriotmarketplace.)We've also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I'm pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **"[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://trk.patriotmarketplace._JpzOiVhE6GZ2WLpg)"** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won't last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last:[**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](http://trk.patriotmarketplace.-A) Warm regards, Bill Gray, '01Vice PresidentNational Donor OutreachHillsdale College
---

name: Caroline Colarusso for Congress
subject: Thank You, I am Grateful
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Caroline Colarusso for Congress
body:
Our Message Mattered
| | |
---
|
---
---
| Thank You for Your Commitment to Our Campaign
---
| | [Help With Campaign Debt](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015Oqn4qvLvsN5_AoE3G1DkTbYcXhV_6H3ErT65K-JLCgAk3woMCSzsqMP7bnrIFFm0_UxRs5p9DDNm3YJQqHfn323ifydiSCgEgz6wz0t4f3MAuChWkiuphmPUTwd2m2R4F6WiZqP0VE2pB2upuTz68p37vE2uKbiykpjsFWeqL88UXSs3Af5tVc7R-kLgfOryehraxY31oK2lsl8kn44lxlaoF8Qw7DzIj_Mss-Qe4Dy02bVINruiAFX_Md-CQys4xWE43HRa8Pdx2VKFJTK0fKAPN9VEf8rAlxY2osMwT0CI0EFMdm_31mPJyNGFTQNleXkzNOTaAnJhGla81QD8vVH60_aqWjaorLWtHCir50_YCERJz-ZDEBAAMSPRA5rkAIbAD1ZrI8=&c=JvHsYak1wFKJbaiFZ2bDvBee8-SvVPrSI_FF7EWjvs_-eKaKI6IKpA==&ch=gO5qGECawPEPyDPVBjGRG8zpcOJPnhmyE2Y4HZsSzxEZk2E7L9Lhkg==)
---
Friends,
From the day I threw my hat into the ring we knew we had a serious fight on our hands. Nevertheless, we put one foot in front of the other and we persevered. That was because of the support and encouragement of many of you.
Looking back at these last months, I am deeply grateful for all of you, your hard work, your support and your commitment to helping in any way you can.
As we all take a step away from campaign activities, the nightly news, and courageous conversations with friends and coworkers, I would like you to know that I have a grateful heart. Each day campaigning was an amazing experience, it was fun. It was not burdensome to me at all, I enjoyed meeting people and sharing our vision to improve our state and our country.
I believe we are in serious trouble in America; however, despite our results I am delighted that the Republicans in House of Representatives in Congress will be able to block the Biden agenda and elect a new Speaker. Although small, we played a part in that. Our message mattered.
During the campaign the cost of everything had gone up substantially and I have taken on campaign debt that needs to be paid. If there is any way you can help one more time by donating, I would really appreciate it. We ran this campaign on a shoestring budget, but now I need to raise the funds to pay off this debt.
I am planning on sending out an email to each of you tomorrow after I take a break today. I would like to be able to provide some much-needed insight for all of us. I wish to share my perspective and thoughts for us ponder. I am also reviewing the election data and would like to provide some analysis as to that data as well. As soon as that is analyzed I will share it also with you.
I am deeply proud of the campaign we ran. Our values and principals did not waiver. Please join me in praying for America. We must leave our children and grandchildren the same beautiful country we had the honor of growing up in.
Stand Firm, Never Quit. We Live to Fight Another Day.
With Much Appreciation, Caroline

Paid for by Caroline Colarusso for Congress
---
| [Help With Campaign Debt](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015Oqn4qvLvsN5_AoE3G1DkTbYcXhV_6H3ErT65K-JLCgAk3woMCSzsqMP7bnrIFFm0_UxRs5p9DDNm3YJQqHfn323ifydiSCgEgz6wz0t4f3MAuChWkiuphmPUTwd2m2R4F6WiZqP0VE2pB2upuTz68p37vE2uKbiykpjsFWeqL88UXSs3Af5tVc7R-kLgfOryehraxY31oK2lsl8kn44lxlaoF8Qw7DzIj_Mss-Qe4Dy02bVINruiAFX_Md-CQys4xWE43HRa8Pdx2VKFJTK0fKAPN9VEf8rAlxY2osMwT0CI0EFMdm_31mPJyNGFTQNleXkzNOTaAnJhGla81QD8vVH60_aqWjaorLWtHCir50_YCERJz-ZDEBAAMSPRA5rkAIbAD1ZrI8=&c=JvHsYak1wFKJbaiFZ2bDvBee8-SvVPrSI_FF7EWjvs_-eKaKI6IKpA==&ch=gO5qGECawPEPyDPVBjGRG8zpcOJPnhmyE2Y4HZsSzxEZk2E7L9Lhkg==)

_**The fight for Georgia's Senate seat is going into OVERTIME.**_

It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks, so I need your help once again.

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff.

**[I'm going to beat Senator Warnock in this runoff, but I can't do it without the help of my top supporters on DAY ONE. Please donate $5, $10, $34, or any amount up to the limit of $2,900 to help us rebuild our campaign war chest so we can launch our advertising immediately!](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zu0cnt3rn0gig173ts8dq3beviv393gq0sbk9ba8_rp22sh2s8i66or0s1j60pj4cth2bs)**

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Catherine Cortez Masto’s campaign spent everything supporters like you sent them, working to get their message out and make sure voters got to the polls. Now that the count is so close, they’re going to have to keep paying staff and lawyers to make sure state officials count every proper vote. Can you help today?
body:
Count every Nevada vote
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9f135b8d-f792-4323-b94b-a2ea6241fdff/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|

| |

| | | | | Peter, **_The elections are mostly over, except for a few run-offs and recounts. And we are so proud of the role we played in helping bring about not a Red Wave, but a Blue Crush!_** **But Republicans are Republicans, meaning they'll do everything they can do try and deny us victories we've earned by tossing out votes wherever they think they can get away with it.** **[To ensure Republicans won't and can't steal this election, can you give $5, $10 or whatever you can afford so we can make sure Senator Cortez Masto has the resources necessary for staff and lawyers during any counting or recounting process?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T63c21437-9eb4-4a25-8596-9cd15636cef7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **_That is why in the closest Senate race in the country--Senator Catherine Cortez Masto in Nevada--we need to help ensure every vote is counted to make sure she wins if she got more votes--and we're hearing from multiple inside sources that is what they expect._**
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**Count Every Nevada Senate Vote**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6a50ec3c-bb8d-41c3-8f20-b80f0e3277d4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. name: Herschel Walker
subject: We’re not done yet
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks of this runoff campaign, so I need your help once again. |

---
Peter,

_**The fight for Georgia's Senate seat is going into OVERTIME.**_

**Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Tuesday, our Senate race is now heading to a RUNOFF on Tuesday, December 6th.**

It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks, so I need your help once again.

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff.

**[I'm going to beat Senator Warnock in this runoff, but I can't do it without the help of my top supporters on DAY ONE. Please donate $25, $50, $100, or any amount up to the limit of $2,900 to help us rebuild our campaign war chest so we can launch our advertising immediately!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61831717:Jbig-6GvN:m:1:3331421248:E633F914DB6BE76299C86EBCC0A8E662:r)**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61831717:Jbig-6GvN:m:1:3331421248:E633F914DB6BE76299C86EBCC0A8E662:r)
[** RUSH $25 -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61831718:Jbig-6GvN:m:1:3331421248:E633F914DB6BE76299C86EBCC0A8E662:r)
[** RUSH $50 -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61831719:Jbig-6GvN:m:1:3331421248:E633F914DB6BE76299C86EBCC0A8E662:r)
[** RUSH $100 -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61831720:Jbig-6GvN:m:1:3331421248:E633F914DB6BE76299C86EBCC0A8E662:r)
Despite my opponent spending over $101 MILLION in the general election, Raphael Warnock could not win the support of a majority of Georgians as an incumbent senator. It is time for a change!

Everything is at stake in this runoff election, and we don't have a moment to waste. **[Will you rush in $5 or more in the next 30 minutes to be a DAY ONE runoff supporter?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61831717:Jbig-6GvN:m:1:3331421248:E633F914DB6BE76299C86EBCC0A8E662:r)**

Thanks,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61831717:Jbig-6GvN:m:1:3331421248:E633F914DB6BE76299C86EBCC0A8E662:r)

Herschel Walker

name: Alex Padilla
subject: THANK YOU, California!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
I am humbled and honored by the trust you’ve placed in me to continue to serve California in the U.S. Senate.
#

THANK YOU, CALIFORNIA!
I am humbled and honored by the trust you’ve placed in me to continue to serve California in the U.S. Senate. **It has, and will continue to be, the honor of a lifetime.**
This victory belongs to every single Californian who believes in the American Dream, and who believes in fighting to keep that dream alive.
Now, there are still a lot of races around the country that are too close to call and we don’t know what the final outcomes will be.
But no matter what, one thing is clear: we’ve got a hell of a fight on our hands.
I want you to know, as your Senator, I’m ready to lead that fight.
I know California is ready to lead that fight.
And I know YOU are ready to lead that fight — because it’s in our DNA.
We’re going to lead this fight to ensure that every family has a fair shot and every worker can count on a good-paying job – a good-paying UNION job!
The fight to make sure our parents and our grandparents can count on the Social Security and Medicare benefits that they worked so hard for their entire lives.
To lower costs for families and ensure that corporations pay their fair share.
To take on Big Oil and save our planet from the catastrophic effects of climate change.
To ensure that we lift up our immigrant communities instead of using them as political pawns.
To fight to protect a woman’s fundamental right to make decisions about her own body, and her own future.
And we’re going to lead the fight to defend democracy — a point of pride for me as your former Secretary of State.
California showed the nation what’s possible when you stand on the side of democracy.
When other states rolled back voting rights, we strengthened them.
When they made it harder to vote, we made it easier.
We enfranchised millions.
And we made our elections the most secure and inclusive in the nation and achieved the largest voter turnout that this state has ever seen.
THAT’s how California leads.
Now imagine the kind of future we could build if we increased access to the ballot for every American...
There’s no question that the values we fight so hard for — equality, justice, and opportunity for all — would triumph.
And they MUST triumph – this is a fight that we cannot lose.
So today, as other states across the nation may elect candidates who campaign on lies, who campaign on voter suppression, and who attack our free and fair elections — California is electing leaders who STAND UP for truth;
Who stand up for voting rights;
Who stand up for democracy.
I promise that as long as I have the privilege of representing you in the Senate, I will not waver in protecting and defending our democracy.
I will fight every single day, to safeguard the democratic principles and institutions that our country was built on.
We don’t say it enough.
America is great.
Our democracy is sacred.
The American Dream is sacred.
Together, we’re going to defend it.
Together, we’re going to build a better future for the 40 million people who call California home.
From our valleys to our coasts to our deserts to our mountains, we’re going to show the nation — and the world — how California leads.
Thank you. God Bless You. And God Bless the United States of America.
Sen. Alex Padilla

**[DONATE](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/553?c0=ap-em-nov22.HCgwe-&refcode=em221108-1-90&t=1&akid=1133%2E159979%2E_0lKyV)**

Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=2&akid=1133%2E159979%2E_0lKyV)

name: Eric Swalwell
subject: Where we stand
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Nov2022-FR-November?refcode=E17393-20221101-headerfooter-header-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Nov2022-FR-November?refcode=E17393-20221101-headerfooter-header-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25]
Friends, our team is beyond grateful for the overwhelming support we received yesterday. Thank you for your confidence in me and for sending me back to Congress to fight for you!

Not only that, but we did what every pundit and critic said was impossible: We stopped a red wave in its tracks and brought home wins for progressive issues and Democratic candidates up and down the ballot.

While control of Congress is still up for grabs, this means the majority of voters heard our message. Democrats get things done for everyday Americans while Republicans push their hateful, extremist agenda.

None of this would be possible without your generous support, and we’re so grateful to have you on our team.

The midterms are still far from over. But win or lose, this election year should be a major lesson that the polls, pundits, and conventional wisdom is BS.

My team and I will keep watching to see where the fate of the House lands and keep you updated about the next steps in our fight for democracy.

Thank you again,

Eric

name: Scott Gryder
subject: Gryder Falls Just Short
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SCOTT GRYDER FOR CONGRESS**
body:
| | |
---
| | **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE:** November 9, 2022**CONTACT:** Gabriella Shanahan, [gabriella@scottgryder.com](mailto:gabriella@scottgryder.com)
---
**Gryder Falls Just Short**
---
**Oswego, Ill.** – The Associated Press has officially called the race in IL-14 for Rep. Lauren Underwood. After a hard-fought campaign, Kendall County Board Chairman Scott Gryder fell just short of the win. After the verdict, Gryder released a statement: “To the people of the 14th – thank you. The result is not what we hoped for, but I will be forever grateful and proud of this campaign and the 14th District of Illinois. I am humbled by the time, money, and energy so many of you sacrificed to make this campaign possible, and I am truly honored to have been able to get to know so many of you hardworking Illinoisans along the campaign trail and hear your stories. To my family who has cheered me on from the start – thank you for everything. Because of your support and encouragement, there was never a doubt in my mind that this race was worth the fight. We may have come up short, but this is only the first battle. Our next task is to ensure that Lauren Underwood hears the voice of our district and represents it well. Ms. Underwood: we need lower costs, reduced inflation, less crime, and more opportunity for every single one of us in the 14th. Your job as our representative is to stand up for policies that empower us and promote our individual freedom, not policies that hold us back. Rest assured, we will not stop fighting until America’s promise of freedom and opportunity for all has been restored to the 14th. Now let’s get back to work.” ###
---

name: Tom Malinowski
subject: Note from Tom:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom Malinowski for Congress
body:
we have everything to be proud of

As a diplomat in the Obama administration, Tom Malinowski stood up to dictators overseas. Now experts say his re-election could be THE deciding race for control of the House this year. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://act.malinowskifornj.com/p/Bix_Do8Sr0m0vj5sQl0SCA2?unsubscribedata=Yh3p3rLfwMO0WOF%2Bu9q55f06O42kqsp00XnHm70VyOaH39cPeywxq5YpNwfIaRqVO7ZCjlEhG6Q2FMtWAY3VLto4BUsBgMPTX38DNhJRDOQzzgUB9ivlEn9SjE0ASAvqQbDhekNAhznYjqx%2B61zy0dl4K2%2Bjry%2B1XGg80hdIBAUVqqIw8E2XIJZwQybU%2FZblGeyIYRVsqKFq2gJ3JUNo3g5WcJCehjeVlyTco4Im3IWPc8pt%2FOTCapKQVNsv0krLqk3UjuReH66%2BB2h%2Bj3ocktPD%2FcljMAIoV4b17exUb0qgL2FxqFMnIrDJXcMitGhFf19B9yI87Jd27qZxnskncGYlR6q2Fl5qvzmiAWMOkGJmKTU1EtkqYGIkOXRpJIn4Haf4%2FsqGFSRaMqHV83nNhpEgLozS6H3KxYum9paT2ZNW0fjSGvzbTOICY7VFHDvh)
---
| |
---
Dear friends,

I’m writing to thank you from the bottom of my heart for all you did to help me represent the 7th District these last four years, and for your incredible help in our campaign this year. It did not end as we had hoped. But we have everything to be proud of and hopeful about.

This was a campaign of people and principles. It was, as in my other races, built from the grass roots up and spoke directly to the concerns and hopes of the thousands of people I met along the way. We did this the right way — by respecting the voters, answering their questions, and telling them what I stood for and hoped to achieve.

I am very proud that we did as well or better this time around than we did in 2020 in the communities I've represented these last four years, and I expect the results to tighten further as all votes are counted. In other words, despite all the challenges of running this year, and the untold sums spent by the outside groups campaigning against me, we continued to gain ground with the voters we had. Unfortunately, our new district proved too much of a hurdle to overcome.

While I would obviously have preferred to have won, yesterday was still a good day for our country. I’m gratified that in state after state, Americans chose moderation over MAGA, while passing referenda protecting a woman’s right to choose.

Our democracy and our freedoms are in stronger shape today than many predicted. The victories you helped us win in the last few years, from infrastructure, to health care, to fighting climate change, are more secure. And the work we’ve done together in the 7th District will be the foundations for many victories to come.

— Tom
* * *

| Paid for by Tom Malinowski for Congress
---
Tom Malinowski for Congress
P.O. Box 263
Somerville, NJ 08876
United States
---

name: Rev. Raphael Warnock
subject: the fight continues
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
| | |
---
Friend, I just want to say _thank you. _

Because of the strength of our grassroots movement, we've come one step closer to making history yet again here in Georgia. And we've shown the country that our fight for progress isn't over.
**We know we can win this – we have done it before! But I've always been honest with you, so I’ll do so again: we've got an incredibly tough fight ahead. We poured every cent we had into getting this far – which means we're now back to square one.** With all eyes on Georgia, the GOP is gearing up to flood us with millions in attack ads, and we need to refill our campaign.
That's why I'm asking directly: [Will you give $5 right now to kickstart this critical next phase and power our reelection campaign to victory?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54355243/378284830/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5049-fr-nd&recurring=0&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDk5OWZhMy01MDYwLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNGE2NTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IL-SZXuLcnVY4bdv8OMgvSEFDQapyu2EHizihC6NpNc=)
When we launched this campaign, we knew it wouldn't be easy. The GOP has been coming after me with everything its got since the beginning, and they haven't let up since.
Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the entire Republican establishment have spent millions to prop up my opponent, Herschel Walker, and defeat me. And they're about to spend a whole lot more to definitively turn Georgia red.
That's why taking our foot off the gas is simply not an option. **We're in a position to win this race – but not without grassroots support. **
**With time running out before our crucial midnight deadline, we're falling short of the $500,000 we need to kickstart this runoff election, so I'm personally asking: [Will you chip in $5 or more right now to help me defeat Herschel Walker and keep Georgia blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54355244/378284832/-58337752?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5049-fr-nd&recurring=0&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDk5OWZhMy01MDYwLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNGE2NTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IL-SZXuLcnVY4bdv8OMgvSEFDQapyu2EHizihC6NpNc=)**
Thank you for your support.

– Rev. Raphael Warnock
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://action.warnockforgeorgia.com/p/UBjz5MzSPkqVKiEwLzz2KA2?unsubscribedata=kuH2jRUsixw%2B1pgQE0Litx2jsIF1deuEELSSJ40oIItE41i8Fs6Ab5BuK3cCslJ1isrPJnK8pJBStOWiTrVkrnchb72a2UzvA73NZEwlX07VbAb1fSvTGt99gDfr6CuDFPQSOOVsodX5f5xWjgsX185xWZjWsYQewapswDS0Wkgwq5454lMUCH9zw8St46lL1UaUSG8ACnHTWHURGHQ0PrXY%2FpuBVqIm7BJMr04uLQ2JPZYxye2U5EnRsQnoVwGjlBEv8zcR%2B6tjoJBE35ZW3qVZ3DYUIU17h073RwfcmV%2B%2FOOxBfp5ErTqk6xhgW%2BUcWNMWhYxZhZzTMlWa4Czc%2FXaPgqyPvxXXgb5RRLqhXpxMWIIIHmeszqLx6fi59WNhMy4o%2BUpPYKEWPWOSbfl6IaaTdCxCQOORa%2BlcCew5cbM%3D) For your reference, any donor history or identification in this message reflects what we have on file for the email address [dpwillis67@gmail.com] to which this message was sent. name: Rochelle Garza
subject: We didn’t get the outcome we were hoping for, but I’m still so grateful to have been in this fight with you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rochelle Garza for Texas
body:
Thank you. | Hi team, We fought, but we came up short. Friend, we only made it this far because of people like you. It has been the honor of a lifetime to campaign for the future of our great state. I am so proud of everything we have accomplished together. Together, we nominated the first Latina for Texas AG, won a 5-way primary, and handily won a runoff election. Although the final result is not what we wanted, our race outperformed all other statewide contests — showing that women CAN win and deserve investment as candidates. **Friend, we aren’t done here. I am _not_ giving up on Texas, and I hope you won’t either.** I promise that I will not stop advocating with you until our reproductive rights are restored, our civil rights are protected, and our elected officials are accountable to us, the people. Thank you, again, for all you’ve done and for all your support. \- Rochelle
---

Paid for by Rochelle Garza for Texas
---

name: Herschel Walker
subject: We’re going to overtime
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
It’s going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks of this runoff campaign, so I need your help once again.
It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks of this runoff campaign, so I need your help once again. |

---
Fellow American,

_**The fight for Georgia's Senate seat is going into OVERTIME.**_

**Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Tuesday, our Senate race is now heading to a RUNOFF on Tuesday, December 6th.**

It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks, so I need your help once again.

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff.

**[I'm going to beat Senator Warnock in this runoff, but I can't do it without the help of my top supporters on DAY ONE. Fellow American,

_**The fight for Georgia's Senate seat is going into OVERTIME.**_

**Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Tuesday, our Senate race is now heading to a RUNOFF on Tuesday, December 6th.**

It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks, so I need your help once again.

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff.

**Peter,** we did it! Thank you so much to everyone who voted, volunteered, donated, and supported in any way they could. Your support means the world to me! It will be the honor of my lifetime to represent you in Washington. **I promised one thing throughout this entire campaign: to be your champion in DC. body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54383648/378331777/1642521363?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjQ0YjUzMy03YzYwLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNGE2NTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1dHLRRR4KpAglSlCWrXBbileQhPXaVJCSvdPfMSB9TQ=&emci=2f39528a-7660-ed11-ade6-14cb6534a651&emdi=eb44b533-7c60-ed11-ade6-14cb6534a651&ceid=26261389)
---

| | It's always humbling to see my name on a ballot. Serving the district where my parents raised my sister and I, where I did my K-12 education in our excellent public school system, and now where I'm raising my boys and sending them to school has been the honor of my life. I'm honored and feel incredibly privileged to have been elected to serve this district in Congress for another two years. **Last night, we showed that democracy – building a grassroots movement one person at a time through humility, service, and compassion – is strong in New Jersey.** And that's because folks like you showed up, knocked doors, made calls, checked in with friends and family, donated hard-earned dollars, stayed informed, and most of all, _voted._ **So, thank you.** I look forward to fighting to continue bringing down health care costs, getting our infrastructure investments on track, and working toward a politics that is rooted in service and civility. Humbly, _Andy_ |
---|---|---

| | Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress.

_I still believe in the Promise of America._ _I am eternally grateful to those who helped me in every conceivable way: from the people I did not know who hugged me at the polls in New London or those like the congregants at the Hispanic Church in Reading who told me that they were praying for me and my family, to the hundreds & hundreds who donated their time, treasure and talent; and, last but not least, to my campaign team & super-volunteers, and my family who worked with me from day one until the end._ _Americans are hurting financially, feeling insecure at home and when they go shopping; anxious about their children’s future—and, we are, sadly, a deeply divided nation. Many of us have very different goals; different priorities and different values—let alone policy disagreements._ _Yet, what we do have in common is that we are unified because we do not feel good about the way things are—and, we do not like the angry, divisive tone in politics, in government and in our daily lives—where too many are focused on the battle and not the solution. If we can agree that we want to repair our shared anger and feeling of being powerless, that would be a good place to start—if, we want to put our children in a chance to succeed, to do better than us._ _I congratulate Congresswoman Houlahan on her re-election. Congresswoman, this fall during the campaign, you spoke about being bipartisan; securing our border; making us energy independent; and, standing-up to President Biden when necessary—along with your personal philosophy and priorities. In the coming days and months, when you are out and about at festivals and fairs, at schools and fire stations please listen to our neighbors, expressing their fears about border security, and our need for true energy independence, and their anxiety due to inflation and the sinking economy. Many voters embraced your message about bipartisan solutions. I respectfully ask that you carry that message forward._ _My campaign discussed the many policy failures—but, more importantly, offered a path forward; and, offered Hope built-on our shared problems and CommonSense solutions. I will continue to work for these solutions as a private citizen—urging those we elected to be bold, engaged and to be both listeners as well as leaders._ _As a citizen, community leader, dad and softball coach, I’ll do my best to continue to be part of the solution—to offer CommonSense solutions to our kitchen-table problems._ _For our nation, for ourselves and for our children, I still believe in the Promise of America. With eternal gratitude and hope, I am. _ _Sincerely yours,_ _GUY _
---

name: President Jessica Post
subject: As of 12:00pm
body:
My team and I have had a long night, but I wanted to email you with a short update. | | |
---
| | It’s DLCC President Jessica Post here. My team and I have had a long night, but I’m coming to you with some great news! As of 12:00pm today, State Democrats have:
* **FLIPPED three chambers to Democratic control – the Minnesota Senate, Michigan House, and Michigan Senate – creating two new Democratic trifectas in critical states!**

* **Won must-hold Democratic trifectas** in Colorado, Maine, and New Mexico – some of our top targets this year!

* **Protected the veto power of two Democratic governors in key states** – Wisconsin and North Carolina – giving them a critical tool to fight back against extreme Republican legislation.

These victories were only possible thanks to you and this grassroots team. We were able to make targeted investments in campaigns, knock on over a million doors, and get organizers on the ground to turn out swing voters. **And it worked – thanks to you we were able to defend and pick up key chambers that will protect the future of voting rights, abortion access, and more.** [But ballots are still being tabulated in some of our most competitive states and we must make sure every last vote is counted. clean_body: My team and I have had a long night, but I wanted to email you with a short update. | | | | | It’s DLCC President Jessica Post here. My team and I have had a long night, but I’m coming to you with some great news! As of 12:00pm today, State Democrats have: FLIPPED three chambers to Democratic control – the Minnesota Senate, Michigan House, and Michigan Senate – creating two new Democratic trifectas in critical states! Won must-hold Democratic trifectas in Colorado, Maine, and New Mexico – some of our top targets this year! Protected the veto power of two Democratic governors in key states – Wisconsin and North Carolina – giving them a critical tool to fight back against extreme Republican legislation. These victories were only possible thanks to you and this grassroots team. We were able to make targeted investments in campaigns, knock on over a million doors, and get organizers on the ground to turn out swing voters. And it worked – thanks to you we were able to defend and pick up key chambers that will protect the future of voting rights, abortion access, and more. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | We bucked the conventional wisdom that says the president’s party can’t win in midterm elections. You made this possible – and I’m incredibly grateful for your support.** Thank you for all you’ve done and for all you’ll do. Best, Jessica Jessica Post, DLCC President | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Now that Josh Shapiro has been declared the winner, we can rest a little easier knowing that our democracy, our reproductive rights, our access to the ballot box, and all our freedoms are safe.

name: Sen. Catherine Cortez Masto (D-NV)
subject: Too close to call – we need to count every last vote, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
| | |
---
Friend,
Nevada’s Senate race is too close to call, and with control of the Senate still up for grabs, I need your immediate support. I appreciate everything you've done for this campaign – and for the hard-earned, grassroots dollars you've already invested. **But now, I've got to make the most important ask I ever have of you:[Will you split a donation of $5 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and Jacky Rosen's so we have the resources to count every vote and defeat our election-denying opponent?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54384195/378334054/-375078852?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2215-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDU3ZDRiYy03ZTYwLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNGE2NTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W-s3s9g07SLRVpodKCHC-mxiG5qMRz0dyYI9VqJ1Di8=)**
My opponent, Adam Laxalt, led Donald Trump's efforts to overturn Nevada's election results in 2020. This time around, he has once again indicated he will challenge the integrity of our free and fair election.
With Laxalt still commanding the backing of McConnell and his allies – to the tune of more than **$55 million** already spent in this race – it is crucial we have resources of our own to fight their anti-democracy tactics and ensure every last vote is counted.
But friend, our grassroots campaign spent every last dollar just to get through Election Day – because our race was one of the most expensive in the whole country. **Today, we start from scratch, which is why we've set an** emergency $500,000 goal.
[**Please: Can you split $5 between my campaign and Jacky Rosen's right now to get us started so we have the resources to count every last vote in our must-win race?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54384196/378334055/-375078852?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2215-bu-nd&recurring=0&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDU3ZDRiYy03ZTYwLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNGE2NTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W-s3s9g07SLRVpodKCHC-mxiG5qMRz0dyYI9VqJ1Di8=)
Thank you so much.

_¡La lucha sigue!_ The fight continues!
Catherine
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.rosenfornevada.com/p/lu4OBSNc3UKuSuNlvLb3Zg2?unsubscribedata=dZPWhBnUXwKY8tC7GZkNhioX9LEHRPr8yr0KFyIO4Pwpr3hkc0kzUavXOT9K0gQjmJjabOwZe5I%2FvttkHFyraNxTclP2EKod8hXdnuSGoBhhfjQdtv04nkfL3oU3BOXdw%2FENcNnNpDXp4sazKsRKl0gDFQRRs0GuXsg%2BMpELFSlCF7WcPahwzJ%2FReEVY%2BT2svpO92Ciq4BtMZzBV0qqQMbPretHDm4knoIQQvHoCyO5%2BdOb0WRNMLhk1nViOWdM2tE%2FQ1k7SbZQg6urN%2BemUcaXs2De7AUojbf4%2B7oVszaXXa4ir9GNMLso97Rf8oii921cs6PxXYom4saSyLKcPXZDZqhR8SkfAhZEwowNqGx5i0K22An4HNwShRo5qVMYXnOl0mkr6Qfe68BqDAYFASqnX2iJ7UciDSG4HXR3c8Ro%3D) Contributions to Rosen for Nevada are not tax deductible. | | Paid for by Rosen for Nevada

name: All of us at TNDP
subject: Our hard work really paid off!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Tennessee Democratic Party
body:
This isn’t the end, but it’s a major win.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54384375/378334972/1141538894?refcode=EM_C_221109Results_E_AllTNDP_Full_3_G_TESTA_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzMxNzgyMS04MDYwLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNGE2NTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UDpid9QlGqoMRjITo414wqKQsKcFCcLOtom1GuWX_80=)
Hi Peter,

We want to start off by saying thank you so much for all your support. With your help, **we protected every Democratic incumbent and strengthened our caucus with new members after the worst gerrymandering our state has ever seen.** On top of that, we are excited to congratulate all our Election Day winners!

We are proud of what we accomplished this year, but our work is far from over. We have a long way to go before we can restore reproductive rights, fully fund our public schools, and make Tennessee work for working families. We must continue to build Democratic strength to move Tennessee forward.

This is a major win in the fight for a better Tennessee, and we are just getting started.

From the bottom of our hearts, thank you.

All of us at TNDP
The Tennessee Democratic Party works to elect Democratic candidates who believe that all Tennesseans deserve a better future no matter who you are, what you look like, where you live, who you love, or how you pray. We’re committed to registering 200,000 new voters ahead of the 2022 elections. Given what’s at stake, we can’t afford to miss our chance.

**Can you help Take Back Tennessee by giving monthly?******

name: Sara Jacobs
subject: I am honored
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
Last night, San Diego showed that they want a leader who doesn't settle for the way things have always been done.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54384483/378335444/-2130083693?refcode=BLU-SJC-20221109-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YjY5ZDQzZC04MTYwLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNGE2NTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B1mPs_frKTKgmm9GwElFkoWmATFF1IgX9OsOe-V9MGE=)
---
| Yesterday, San Diegans showed that they want a leader who doesn’t settle for the way things have always been done. From Day One of my re-election campaign, I focused on hearing from my current constituents and meeting the vibrant, new communities in CA-51 to earn their support. I am honored to win the continued trust of our community and am immensely grateful to everyone who joined our campaign.

We are at a pivotal moment for our country, and if we’re going to address the most pressing issues of our time and fight against the threats to our democracy and our bodily autonomy, we need more young voices in Washington ready to work on our oldest problems in a new way – and I’m so excited that so many of them were elected last night.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54384484/378335445/-2130083693?refcode=BLU-SJC-20221109-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YjY5ZDQzZC04MTYwLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNGE2NTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B1mPs_frKTKgmm9GwElFkoWmATFF1IgX9OsOe-V9MGE=)
Representing San Diego over the past two years has been the honor of my life and it’s a responsibility I don’t take lightly. I couldn’t be more excited to keep fighting for a future that works for all of us – a future with affordable child care, support for our military families, common-sense gun safety laws, lower costs for hardworking San Diegans, and where the right to an abortion is once again the law of the land.

I’m so grateful for the support of this grassroots network. Thank you for always having my back.

Sincerely,

Sara

name: Liz Mathis
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Liz Mathis for Congress
body:
Hi Peter,

I want to begin by saying thank you. To all the volunteers who knocked on doors, made phone calls, hosted canvass launches, and donated, and to anyone who simply cast your ballot in this election: I'm honored to have had your support. The results of our race are in, and while this was not the outcome we had worked for, your support throughout this campaign has meant so much to me.

This campaign has been about a choice of who this district wants representing them in Congress, and I'm proud of the work I've done to deliver for Iowans. My record speaks for itself. I’ve worked across the aisle, for families and children, to decrease costs for all Iowans – from farmers to small business owners to hardworking families. Throughout my years in the Iowa legislature, we've lowered prescription drug costs, provided COVID-19 relief, passed three bipartisan mental health bills, and created the Children’s Mental and Behavioral Health System.

I know there is still more work to be done. And I'm disappointed not to be going to Congress to advocate for the issues that matter most to Iowans. Although not as a congresswoman, I’ll continue to do all I can to continue serving Iowans. And, I wish Ashley Hinson success as she heads back to Washington to serve Iowans. Thank you again for your support, Peter.

And as you know (because we’ve told you before), campaigns aren’t cheap to run. We have bills to pay and paychecks for our staff for their hard work. We created a Shutdown Fund to help with these costs as we wrap up this campaign. Can you help us? Here’s the link to donate what you can: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lm-nov22-em-results-thanks

Thank you,
Liz

Liz Mathis is running to represent Iowa's 2nd Congressional District. To learn more, please visit LizMathis.com. [https://lizmathis.com]

Paid for by Liz Mathis for Congress

Liz Mathis for Congress
PO Box 2370
Cedar Rapids, IA 52406
United States

If you'd only like to receive our most important email updates, you may click here [https://act.lizmathis.com/a/less-emails] to request fewer emails from Liz's campaign. clean_body: Hi Peter, I want to begin by saying thank you. To all the volunteers who knocked on doors, made phone calls, hosted canvass launches, and donated, and to anyone who simply cast your ballot in this election: I'm honored to have had your support. The results of our race are in, and while this was not the outcome we had worked for, your support throughout this campaign has meant so much to me. This campaign has been about a choice of who this district wants representing them in Congress, and I'm proud of the work I've done to deliver for Iowans. My record speaks for itself. I’ve worked across the aisle, for families and children, to decrease costs for all Iowans – from farmers to small business owners to hardworking families. Throughout my years in the Iowa legislature, we've lowered prescription drug costs, provided COVID-19 relief, passed three bipartisan mental health bills, and created the Children’s Mental and Behavioral Health System. I know there is still more work to be done. And I'm disappointed not to be going to Congress to advocate for the issues that matter most to Iowans. Although not as a congresswoman, I’ll continue to do all I can to continue serving Iowans. And, I wish Ashley Hinson success as she heads back to Washington to serve Iowans. Thank you again for your support, Peter. And as you know (because we’ve told you before), campaigns aren’t cheap to run. We have bills to pay and paychecks for our staff for their hard work. We created a Shutdown Fund to help with these costs as we wrap up this campaign. Can you help us? Here’s the link to donate what you can: Thank you, Liz Liz Mathis is running to represent Iowa's 2nd Congressional District. To learn more, please visit LizMathis.com. name: Giffords
subject: Gun safety was a TOP 5 issue for voters yesterday
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We thought it important to share two important observations with you today
#

Friends -
While we are still sorting out the results of the election, we thought it important to share two important observations with you today;
First, a number of our gun safety candidates won big last night, including in races where we spent significant resources, thanks to you.
Second, gun safety was one of the top issues on the minds of voters yesterday—one that undoubtedly favored Democrats.
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-nov22-rec.ke3bCU&refcode=em221109-1-30&t=1&akid=2732%2E3935704%2EMg6bx3)
That’s higher than issues like education, protecting our democracy and even COVID-19.
These are the kinds of numbers that generate momentum and action in Congress and legislatures across the country.
They are also the results of almost a decade of sustained movement-building on the issue of gun safety.
So we know you’re tired from the last election, but today we are asking you to make a LONG-TERM commitment to Giffords. What do you say?
[**Can you please make a $5 monthly recurring contribution to Giffords PAC today? When you see that donation hit monthly, know you are making a lasting impact on the gun safety debate.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14456?c0=giffords-em-nov22-rec.uV6gdS&refcode=em221109-1-30&t=2&akid=2732%2E3935704%2EMg6bx3)
_If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your $5 monthly contribution instantly:_
**[CONTRIBUTE $5](https://go.giffords.org/go/23444?c0=giffords-em-nov22-rec.Ly33GQ&refcode=em221109-1-30&t=3&akid=2732%2E3935704%2EMg6bx3)**
Thank you,
The team at Giffords PAC

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=2732%2E3935704%2EMg6bx3) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: We’ve got an incredibly tough fight ahead
body:
Derek, I just want to say thank you.
| | |
---
Derek, I just want to say _thank you._
Because of the strength of our grassroots movement, we've come one step closer to making history yet again here in Georgia. And we've shown the country that our fight for progress isn't over.
**We know we can win this – we have done it before! But I've always been honest with you, so I’ll do so again: we've got an incredibly tough fight ahead. We poured every cent we had into getting this far – which means we're now back to square one.** With all eyes on Georgia, the GOP is gearing up to flood us with millions in attack ads, and we need to refill our campaign.
That's why I'm asking directly: **[Will you split $5 between me and Rep. Chrissy Houlahan right now to kickstart this critical next phase and power our reelection campaign to victory?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54384644/378336731/-2006147215?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk772-bu-nd&recurring=0&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMmIyMTAzYi04MjYwLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNGE2NTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RvY-9LIQKWRHXFXsERZRPF2LHjgbCm5Pgcg7f_iD_qY=)**
When we launched this campaign, we knew it wouldn't be easy. The GOP has been coming after me with everything its got since the beginning, and they haven't let up since.
Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the entire Republican establishment have spent millions to prop up my opponent, Herschel Walker, and defeat me. And they're about to spend a whole lot more to definitively turn Georgia red.
That's why taking our foot off the gas is simply not an option. **We're in a position to win this race – but not without grassroots support.**
**With time running out before our crucial midnight deadline, we're falling short of the $50,000 we need to raise by midnight tonight, so I'm personally asking:[Will you split $5 or more right now between me and Chrissy to help me defeat Herschel Walker and keep Georgia blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54384647/378336734/-2006147215?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk772-bu-nd&recurring=0&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMmIyMTAzYi04MjYwLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNGE2NTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RvY-9LIQKWRHXFXsERZRPF2LHjgbCm5Pgcg7f_iD_qY=)**
Thank you for your support.

– Rev. Raphael Warnock
| Chrissy Houlahan for Congress
P.O. Box 222
Devon, PA 19333
United States Emails are a crucial way for us to stay in touch with our top supporters; however, we understand if you need a break from political emails right now.
