body:
| | | Dear Peter, We have the key to stop our children from being corrupted by the radical Left in our schools -- and I need your immediate help to win... [**That 's why I'm asking you to make an emergency donation of $35 or more today.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61825706:JofDK6GWN:m:1:3331421248:0C23F8FB727D20A1E88BD0A767D30F0D:r) We recently filed suit against a school AND the activists pretending to be teachers to make them pay for what they're doing to our young and vulnerable children. Because the ONLY way we're going to stop them -- is to make these extremists pay for their crimes... And that's exactly what our landmark lawsuit does! Let me quickly give you the details in case you missed us while we were on **Laura Ingraham** 's great **Fox News **show talking about our case: Jessica Konen, the mother of an innocent 12-year-old girl, was called into her daughter's school and told that her daughter was now a "boy". She found out that her young daughter had been groomed into believing she was "transgender" and "bisexual"... Her impressionable daughter didn't even know these words until they were forced on her by these radicals. The school then pushed Jessica's innocent daughter to create a whole new identity -- complete with a new boy's name, new pronouns and had her use a different bathroom... They also created a "Gender Support Plan" and ordered the faculty to use her new name and pronouns -- all without her mother's knowledge! **And Jessica had no idea because her young daughter was told NOT to tell her mother since she couldn 't be "trusted"****.**
* These people are not real teachers.
* They're not concerned with teaching our children to read...
* They're not concerned with teaching our children math and arithmetic...
* They're not concerned with teaching history...

They want to indoctrinate an entire generation of children to reject their parent's values and embrace their radical Left-Wing propaganda -- and we have to stop them. [**That 's why I'm asking you to rush in your donation of $35 or more to help us stop these child groomers now. **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61825706:JofDK6GWN:m:1:3331421248:0C23F8FB727D20A1E88BD0A767D30F0D:r) After all this, Jessica did what any good mother would do and questioned the principal about what was happening to her young daughter at school... ... And what happened next? Child Protective Services was called to her house and "interviewed" her children! This grooming is happening behind closed doors in classrooms across the country... And it's happening in secret so parents, grandparents and the community don't know what's going on. Jessica's innocent daughter is just one of the countless victims -- and if we don't act, there will be more and more every day... Since we announced our lawsuit **The Ingraham Angle** , tons of concerned parents, grandparents and teachers have reached out to us. It's horrible and sickening that this is happening, but we have to stop it... And our lawsuit is the key. Political pressure and new laws will not work -- we must drag these radical activists and schools into court and make them pay. That's why our lawsuit names the individual "teachers" \-- we must hold **them** accountable... Only when these extremists are scared of being dragged into court and are forced to pay will they stop. Make no mistake -- if we win this landmark case every single one of these so-called teachers will take notice. They will think of the consequences before pushing their radical agenda on our vulnerable children... [**So please, join me today with a donation of $35 or more to fund our lawsuit to protect our kids from out of control leftist teachers.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61825706:JofDK6GWN:m:1:3331421248:0C23F8FB727D20A1E88BD0A767D30F0D:r) But to stop them, we need to win this case... And if you can give more today - $50, $100, $250 or more - I will use it to protect our children and our constitutional rights from these radical Left extremists. But, whatever amount you can send, I ask that you rush it in right away. And please know that here at the Center for American Liberty we don't just file lawsuits - we **WIN** them!! We recently won three major victories for religious liberty before the U.S. Supreme Court and we're fighting Big Tech and the politicians who are conspiring to silence and destroy conservatives... But this case to stop these extremists from corrupting and damaging our innocent children is too important to lose. And the only way to stop them is to make them know we're going to make them pay for their actions... [**So please, join the fight today****with your emergency tax-deductible donation of $20, $35, $50, $100 or more today.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61825706:JofDK6GWN:m:1:3331421248:0C23F8FB727D20A1E88BD0A767D30F0D:r) We're ready to go to the mat to win this case, but we can't do it without you. Thank you in advance for your support. Sincerely,
---
| |
---
Harmeet K. Dhillon

subject: I owe it all to you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for Congress Wiley Nickel for Congress
body:
We won one of the most competitive races in the country last night! And you had a direct hand in determining the outcome. All cycle, the choice was clear. A step forward or a step back. The 13th District chose to move forward and fight for the working people of North Carolina. I’m so proud to be writing you this email as your new Representative. | | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54384838/378337415/1668440331?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWE1MThiZC04MjYwLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNGE2NTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qzRO2KrjWBMTnr0YCpF7fy9fEOKsKBL-JaQgKiISgV8=&emci=4558aabe-cd5e-ed11-819c-002248258d2f&emdi=7ea518bd-8260-ed11-ade6-14cb6534a651&ceid=28008880) Team, We won one of the most competitive races in the country last night! And **you** had a **direct hand** in determining the outcome. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54384839/378337416/1886754337?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWE1MThiZC04MjYwLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNGE2NTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qzRO2KrjWBMTnr0YCpF7fy9fEOKsKBL-JaQgKiISgV8=&emci=4558aabe-cd5e-ed11-819c-002248258d2f&emdi=7ea518bd-8260-ed11-ade6-14cb6534a651&ceid=28008880) All cycle, the choice was clear. A step forward or a step back. _**The 13th District chose to move forward and fight for the working people of North Carolina.**_ I’m so proud to be writing you this email as your new Representative. I had long dreamed of representing my community in Washington, and now I’m excited that I can bring your concerns to the table. We stood up to extremism. We stood up to the far-right. We stood up for our democracy and the rights of all Americans. I’m so proud of the work we’ve done and the work we will do in the next few years. Thank you for standing with me and putting your faith in me to represent you in Washington. All my best, Wiley [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54384840/378337417/1886754337?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWE1MThiZC04MjYwLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNGE2NTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qzRO2KrjWBMTnr0YCpF7fy9fEOKsKBL-JaQgKiISgV8=&emci=4558aabe-cd5e-ed11-819c-002248258d2f&emdi=7ea518bd-8260-ed11-ade6-14cb6534a651&ceid=28008880) Follow Wiley Online: **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54384841/378337418/-1444907082?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWE1MThiZC04MjYwLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNGE2NTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qzRO2KrjWBMTnr0YCpF7fy9fEOKsKBL-JaQgKiISgV8=&emci=4558aabe-cd5e-ed11-819c-002248258d2f&emdi=7ea518bd-8260-ed11-ade6-14cb6534a651&ceid=28008880) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54384842/378337419/-1837090549?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWE1MThiZC04MjYwLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNGE2NTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qzRO2KrjWBMTnr0YCpF7fy9fEOKsKBL-JaQgKiISgV8=&emci=4558aabe-cd5e-ed11-819c-002248258d2f&emdi=7ea518bd-8260-ed11-ade6-14cb6534a651&ceid=28008880) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54384843/378337420/-768311352?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWE1MThiZC04MjYwLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNGE2NTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qzRO2KrjWBMTnr0YCpF7fy9fEOKsKBL-JaQgKiISgV8=&emci=4558aabe-cd5e-ed11-819c-002248258d2f&emdi=7ea518bd-8260-ed11-ade6-14cb6534a651&ceid=28008880)** Paid for by Wiley Nickel for Congress Wiley Nickel for Congress

name: Michelle Lujan Grisham
subject: We can't thank you enough
disclaimer_text: Paid for by New Mexicans for Michelle, John Wertheim, Treasurer
body:
From the bottom of my heart, I want to say thank you for your commitment and belief in this campaign.
| | |
---
Peter – from the bottom of my heart, I want to say thank you for your commitment and belief in this campaign. Because of you, we have four more years of progress ahead of us:
* Four more years of **rebuilding** our beloved state

* Four more years of fighting for **students and educators**

* Four more years of fighting for **climate action**

* Four more years of fighting for the well-being and prosperity of **working families**

Every single action mattered – each supporter, every donation, and every door knock all added up to keep New Mexico blue, Peter. In the face of a hateful political movement, we said _no_ to extremists who want to ban abortion, _no_ to politicians trying to ruin our free and fair elections, and **_hell no_ to Trumpism.**
Last night, we proved that New Mexicans don't turn our backs on people who are different than us. We don't use lies and ugly emotions to turn groups against each other. **We help our neighbors, look out for our communities, and love one another – especially when times are hard.**
I couldn't be more proud of this movement, Peter.**** We've already made incredible accomplishments over the last four years – from reducing unemployment to taking bold action on climate change – and now, there's an even brighter future ahead.
Over the next four years, **it is my mission to guarantee the next half a century is the best in New Mexico history.** You have my word: I won't quit until New Mexico is No. 1 in education, public safety, and opportunity – because that's who we are. That's the New Mexico I believe in.
All of this progress will be possible because people like you stepped up to contribute to this campaign, Peter. I can't thank you enough for your support – and I'm ready to get to work to deliver on my promises.

With deep gratitude,

Gov. Lujan Grisham
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/sfqyJbcdG0CqssOMlyXdkQ2?unsubscribedata=fM%2FmUPu%2B3EuoFm1wBG3hHfCWjI3e9IzQu7%2FcOTC%2B6CyLZg5bLeAhiQQ8xwUkq9kmmz14UsS6dILPVzQlhPSayVcVIPViM4wke%2FvI5b3rFEzvYSsXZN0bxrUFlZBGA65BUVBMQydEDUTUuh72L9PCz8EohiZ9R9G9BsT2DfGO5Exkd5e062M64ojoGkjCy6TCp00wCro0KnVPvQRAW%2Bck0rPqvZUTh92CCK3U%2Fi7lRKjr6%2F89GE50OtmG1GuPGlmenW%2FwmQu%2FNlVY9%2BX2ipx6OvUrIKcPHImKchw3yBknAqdgjLsrIz87l7VzOyaRQULVdSHjJFSstUQ7xylm9CG9KdAy5L7iFxwNqVO6KHEmzhkJ8UX%2FOfES%2Fjiatr6woPaC8QUA5qLs3hqmPEvetjyjk%2FjfxWUB8mr3tNcEVK7AQlwAm9GqEtgO5rjZ859msayR) | | Paid for by New Mexicans for Michelle, John Wertheim, Treasurer

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: Important midterms update (please read)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Off the Sidelines PAC
body:
Friends,
Let me start by saying this: We have a _lot_ to celebrate today.
**Tuesday was a _fantastic_ night for women governors across the country.** My dear friend Kathy Hochul was elected the first woman governor of New York State! And Governors Gretchen Whitmer in Michigan, Michelle Lujan Grisham in New Mexico, Janet Mills in Maine, and Laura Kelly in Kansas have all been re-elected—with several more races considered too close to call.
**John Fetterman flipped Pennsylvania’s Senate seat blue, and we re-elected Senator Maggie Hassan in New Hampshire.** These two victories give us a huge boost in the fight to retain Senate control. And while Cheri Beasley in North Carolina, Val Demings in Florida, Mandela Barnes in Wisconsin and Tim Ryan in Ohio fell short, they each ran history-making campaigns—and have bright futures ahead of them.
**Many, many House races are still too close to call—and control of the House has yet to be decided.** With your support, Off the Sidelines candidates like Rep. Sharice Davids in Kansas and Rep. Lauren Underwood in Illinois won seriously tough re-election fights. The “red tsunami” that MAGA Republicans predicted is nowhere to be found.
Still—we have a lot of work left to do.
**My friends, Senators Raphael Warnock and Catherine Cortez Masto, are neck-and-neck in the two Senate races that will determine our majority. Catherine’s race is too close to call, and Raphael’s is headed to a runoff. They both need a major surge in grassroots support to ensure that every vote is counted.**
**[I promised them this team could raise $30,000 by midnight _tonight_ to send critical resources to Nevada and Georgia, and to save our Senate majority. Please—will you chip in $5 right now to ensure that EVERY eligible vote is counted?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54385070/378338627/1267515314?refcode=2022_11_09_RWCCM_ND&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWY5MTUzZS04NDYwLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNGE2NTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gKTenikaVzRXLq-ZlJRi23rLHWjWhOKaIjMfZlmM_SE=)**
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54385072/378338631/1267515314?refcode=2022_11_09_RWCCM_ND&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWY5MTUzZS04NDYwLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNGE2NTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gKTenikaVzRXLq-ZlJRi23rLHWjWhOKaIjMfZlmM_SE=)**
Thank you for stepping up now—we’re down to the wire and your support could make-or-break these two critical races.
More soon,
Kirsten

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwab for SOS, Matthew Goddard, Treasurer
body:
I am humbled to serve as your Kansas Secretary of State for another four years | | | |
---
| | |
---
| Friends,

With great humility, I extend my gratitude for your prayers, friendship, and vote.

It has been my honor to serve as your Kansas Secretary of State for the past four years, and I am grateful for the opportunity to serve a second term.

To my friends, family, and volunteers, thank you. Your support has been invaluable, and I could not have done this without you.

>From our family to yours, thank you.

-Scott
---

name: Adam Frisch
subject: Last night was a vote against hate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Adam for Colorado
body:
Last night, we made history. I can’t thank you enough for your support. We are still waiting for every vote to be counted, but the lead we hold this morning is because of the support of each and every one of you. From the bottom of my heart, I want to offer you my deepest appreciation. | | | [](https://links.adamforcolorado.com/u/click?_t=7e272b1bd9c74d2e84d4e4fa6ac8f7de&_m=c6de630cb19c4a29a814c9f8eb0f9c01&_e=f2cIvIsRnmdigMi-NeGlC6ATUmaG81VtMNQy4zHJgq2HMUH_YX4YCt6qHMn9TWJsWJ2LjUCT96g4MKCSCEQexhFTwdTQ6L5VPL7WzafN0SR5MR2gJ0ty4aY6xWRfRd-i19G4lm7pnpIf_0x6kik1vwYrVOxJHFtF_aN4miMQHZ4Ap5z9Bv8tvjpZPYOPIJQWv4IW-1cnlQcgXTyht_WKRt9UfsehAzDj-q3CSexUscidhVaVY_g13boM2GtOco1_d6wQ60u35bfE3kAugsxjEmGvd000oJDCG6Iasi9LKpuakHnsDTzi5gnP8uMWUXsT9PYtVdk5qcyWeGUZadctMTfZ1AVEfPcLeFq_Iie4kAQ44EJMMf9uHKkvGq9D_qpKVO_H4H68Zi8zTP2p1LTTkwR7lxWaH92vo0tGk9G-ARE%3D)Folks,**Last night, we made history. I can’t thank you enough for your support.** We are still waiting for every vote to be counted, but the lead we hold this morning is because of the support of each and every one of you. From the bottom of my heart, I want to offer you my deepest appreciation.We entered this race in February with the intention of giving Colorado a representative that will actually work for the district and the people. We traveled 23,000 miles, made hundreds of thousands of calls, spoke to as many voters as possible, and yes, we flooded your inboxes as well. But it worked, and now we are one step closer to beating Lauren Boebert.We still have a lot of work ahead as ballots are still being counted. It is my deepest honor to have received so much support from the people of Colorado’s wonderful 3rd district.It took a village, lots of hours, and lots of organizing, but we believe all of the hard work will pay off. None of this would have happened without you.Hopefully, soon Coloradans and Americans alike can breathe a sigh of relief knowing that there is one less extremist in office.We will keep you updated as the vote counting continues. Please [visit our website](https://links.adamforcolorado.com/u/click?_t=7e272b1bd9c74d2e84d4e4fa6ac8f7de&_m=c6de630cb19c4a29a814c9f8eb0f9c01&_e=f2cIvIsRnmdigMi-NeGlC2vgSbdopXbGHscvED_otcFDHnqsZoNSNQIe_r4m4y1qxVD0wVWeEqkd1I0JIF_OFeYS1yFzeylomqVV_0emnPWV0YuXQFTvBtcbN3dkkRc6_GW4Qo3PpOOkuk7MXl7ABj7BQ7A_A2uWc6jNa2Hp1qNeLksfV2MlxVGjb7Xa4C3AP8jcWrKdcgmdOBOxNIarSg%3D%3D) to learn more.Thank you for everything.– Adam
* * *
**Follow Adam Online:**[](https://links.adamforcolorado.com/u/click?_t=7e272b1bd9c74d2e84d4e4fa6ac8f7de&_m=c6de630cb19c4a29a814c9f8eb0f9c01&_e=f2cIvIsRnmdigMi-NeGlC9SkyOXm9aCqSMihv7fRkosvZZaxTGmxINwm00lo4zHARnGF6V6MAfEr56Rf5NeqJgg3yJtCmkzHhZZP_loh54VkKUzqLB16xmMe3thrx5B8vMTHV_dRNx5gL6b8YsGz6Ln5XSH-bAi3W_J34bZqGwiG4ziU7_dcJXe9lg3kWzy-MpVfNbCZX-s2n_h9KmUQBbc1QN8_fQV_OHS7kRZJ7l0%3D) [](https://links.adamforcolorado.com/u/click?_t=7e272b1bd9c74d2e84d4e4fa6ac8f7de&_m=c6de630cb19c4a29a814c9f8eb0f9c01&_e=f2cIvIsRnmdigMi-NeGlC5Is_wocsSnxiKzM86mqCzps7XylRWWzEMncZWc3DHojYAmzMlrVlqFG6czkzbs93Ddn06xP2paIEHSSBE50EXq3xo8iDLJfL2f_KM2ph-qkWrt2wl81Y-EjzpmhBvlSz6rWrDGCDBA23kXr3RiEIbg-hntXw7aVoZD8QdDbHSFGYYDaUod_ox9dqb4oJ83B9A%3D%3D) **[**UNSUBSCRIBE**](https://links.adamforcolorado.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=7e272b1bd9c74d2e84d4e4fa6ac8f7de&_s=c6de630cb19c4a29a814c9f8eb0f9c01&_t=FGJKkNLBj2mKRgJ6qqxyLHJBKdJQiXs-vU886kJQT2y7aYQG0-JB6WVrnxIRvOwfp3zXdjrsZG01lWvZ71d-X5hOGnKL47B-9zW6Y4wuwvs%3D)** Paid for by Adam for Colorado

name: Will Rollins
subject: While we are waiting, I want to say thank you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Will Rollins for Congress
body:
| | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xuP4UNAfuIdgf22n0Ftd4m0_BbVvHVk3qE5r94fY5NYXEHYnx-lIeuafcdoUTl41Z3_a4ThdcOO31q0Hm9sinTEQZj9hPpX6vtAeR7UU4IgafaM84_IRVxsWBie5NaIi2qtpMhHGhg_fzHa-MvnDbTUrYz60B89sTn4_4Met-96-gxoRtPkNI24DYsWl26q5EWUVFZg6SHgTVV_KacoJRCAWkzURcuSogHbaxLS7CdPGKKKO_gek7QkiT3Fa2pcstHsWVpkRFCfcdWgJfg1tdf_Z7jroxBosNWrG0bYfQ-AdPXfFfeXao9yCsx1un5DC0XJuRXfQx63To_Uk8hqRkieVIHfuywfGYbkbwKi_AalQ/3r0/ctxGFy4_QCOsyXg9NdjBJA/h0/V_kSCvoJHwSIxL6NkujAASVHrqdmXDiZ-afHlCQCyNo)
---
Peter, Polls are closed and ballots are now being counted in the race CA-41. While we wait for the results, I want to take a moment to say **thank you.** Whether you knocked on doors, made phone calls, talked to your friends and neighbors about our campaign, or contributed a donation -- you made this campaign possible and are why we are on the cusp of making history in this race. While this is going to be a close race, I am encouraged by the early results – here at home and across the country. Voters are sending a clear message rebuking far-right extremism, and I remain hopeful that we will send that same message here in CA-41. In the meantime, I’m committed to making sure that every vote is counted fairly and that all of our voices are heard. Regardless of what happens, I am incredibly proud of what we accomplished together. Thanks again, and we’ll continue to keep you updated as ballots come in. Will Rollins
---
|
---
Democrat Will Rollins is a former national security and counter-terrorism prosecutor running for Congress in California's 41st Congressional District. [](jaymestevensonforcongress.com)
---
Dear Friends & Supporters,
The voters have spoken here in the 4th Congressional District and I congratulate Jim Himes on a successful re-election.
I’m deeply grateful to my family and everyone who invested time, energy and funding in my campaign and to my talented, passionate team who believed deeply in our mission. We may not have won this race but our winning comes from the incredible people we’ve met and the thoughts, ideas and stories we’ve shared. I’ve listened. I see you.
For any successful candidate, winning comes with great responsibility not only to those who voted for you but also to those who didn’t. The best leaders reflect on what isn’t working for the voters they lost and try to do better. Democracy isn’t simply about serving the winning majority...it’s about re-balancing after the election so that everyone benefits from the decisions and outcomes of those who have earned the privilege to lead.
Our nation remains more divided than ever. I’m calling on our newly elected/re-elected leaders to bridge the political divide to help heal our nation. We need you to make America safer and more affordable; to partner with parents to ensure our children get the education they deserve; to make legal immigration a priority; to protect our environment while accepting that energy must remain affordable for families and businesses and to recognize that a strong Democracy requires a free and unbiased media, valuing different perspectives and showing up for everyone you serve.
Onward,

---
---
Jayme Stevenson
---

clean_body: | | | | I’m deeply grateful to my family and everyone who invested time, energy and funding in my campaign and to my talented, passionate team who believed deeply in our mission. We may not have won this race but our winning comes from the incredible people we’ve met and the thoughts, ideas and stories we’ve shared. I’ve listened. I see you. jaymestevensonforcongress.com Dear Friends & Supporters, The voters have spoken here in the 4th Congressional District and I congratulate Jim Himes on a successful re-election. I’m deeply grateful to my family and everyone who invested time, energy and funding in my campaign and to my talented, passionate team who believed deeply in our mission. We may not have won this race but our winning comes from the incredible people we’ve met and the thoughts, ideas and stories we’ve shared. I’ve listened. I see you. For any successful candidate, winning comes with great responsibility not only to those who voted for you but also to those who didn’t. The best leaders reflect on what isn’t working for the voters they lost and try to do better. Democracy isn’t simply about serving the winning majority...it’s about re-balancing after the election so that everyone benefits from the decisions and outcomes of those who have earned the privilege to lead. Our nation remains more divided than ever. I’m calling on our newly elected/re-elected leaders to bridge the political divide to help heal our nation. We need you to make America safer and more affordable; to partner with parents to ensure our children get the education they deserve; to make legal immigration a priority; to protect our environment while accepting that energy must remain affordable for families and businesses and to recognize that a strong Democracy requires a free and unbiased media, valuing different perspectives and showing up for everyone you serve. Onward, Jayme Stevenson | | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" ---|---|--- Jayme Stevenson 1326 Post Road, Fairfield, 06824

name: Fair Fight
subject: Stacey Abrams and Raphael Warnock
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight PAC, www
body:
Our mission has never been more urgent now that Raphael Warnock is headed for a runoff in less than one month.

Fair Fight |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54385715/378341483/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20221109_f_rr_v1s3_i&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNWZmZDY3My04OTYwLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNGE2NTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G0rT1oJbWZH3XVbWbcGoqYrrXc8sIgpCaARBfuxyDT0=&emci=7a0520ef-8760-ed11-ade6-14cb6534a651&emdi=05ffd673-8960-ed11-ade6-14cb6534a651&ceid=1037277)

| | We want to start by saying thank you. We are humbly grateful to you — our friends, partners, and supporters. We stand, we fight, and we persist in the movement alongside you. Your passion, commitment, ideas, financial support, and tireless efforts keep our movement to protect the freedom to vote going. We know you are all experiencing a range of emotions today following the loss of the Georgia governor’s race. Stacey Abrams’ campaign and the unprecedented coalition she has built have represented hope that Georgia and our nation will live up to their promise, which we one day will. At the same time, we are heartened by the many pro-democracy election wins across the country. Stacey’s legacy — her fight, grit, resilience, and commitment to caring for Georgians, particularly people of color, young voters, the disability community, and others who have been historically left out — remains at the heart of our mission here at Fair Fight. **Because of her, Georgia voters are plugged in and committed to participating in our democracy. Because of her — and because of people like you who kept pressing on after 2018 — we flipped two Georgia Senate seats, we cinched the victory for President Joe Biden and Vice President Kamala Harris, and we’re on the verge of re-electing Senator Raphael Warnock. This is no time to give up hope.** The results of one election are never the full measure of our impact. Despite an onslaught of anti-voter threats leading up to yesterday, our organization has put in place key voter protection infrastructure that helped protect our right to vote during this election, and will build to safeguard democracy for the long haul. Together, we can keep making sure that more Georgia voters can make their voices heard in our democracy — and our mission has never been more urgent now that Raphael Warnock is headed for a runoff in less than one month. The people of Georgia and voters across the country still need us to have their backs and to help them vocalize their power. [_**Will you chip in $20 or any amount you can to help Fair Fight turn out eligible voters during the runoff, make sure they’re able to cast their ballots, have those ballots counted, and send Raphael Warnock back to the Senate?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54385716/378341484/-941199594?amount=20&refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20221109_f_rr_v1s3_i&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNWZmZDY3My04OTYwLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNGE2NTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G0rT1oJbWZH3XVbWbcGoqYrrXc8sIgpCaARBfuxyDT0=) Let’s get this done, The Fair Fight Team | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54385717/378341485/-941199594?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20221109_f_rr_v1s3_i&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNWZmZDY3My04OTYwLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNGE2NTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G0rT1oJbWZH3XVbWbcGoqYrrXc8sIgpCaARBfuxyDT0=)

name: Bill Pascrell
subject: We won and I'm so grateful to you, friend.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pascrell for Congress, Inc
body:
We couldn't have done it without you. We have a lot of work to do. | | | Hi friend, I want to personally express my gratitude for your support. I am extremely proud and humbled that you have sent me back to Congress. With so much work left to do, I'm feeling more energized than ever to tackle these challenges head on. But, let me be clear: we won this race because we had people like you show up and chip in to hold our seat. With your support, we were able to send out thousands of yard signs, text messages, and volunteers who went door-to-door to reach voters. **We have a lot to celebrate, friend.** Our win this week was a victory for every person in our district who wants the economy to work for everyone. It was a win for every person who wants a voice in their medical decisions, instead of letting politicians decide for them. **Winning the election isn't the end of our fight — we still have a long road ahead of us.** Over the next two years, we'll need to be even more vigilant about the attacks on our democracy. I will do everything in my power to hold troublemakers accountable and call them out. I'm committed to that fight, and I'm confident that you are too. **Today, let's celebrate our win, and congratulate each other for the months of hard work and dedication. Tomorrow, let's dig in and keep the momentum going.** Thank you for your support, team. – Bill
---

The toughest member of Congress is progressive New Jersey fighter Bill Pascrell. Bill is leading our battle to protect Social Security and Medicare. Bill wants to rebuild New Jersey's aging roads, bridges, and tunnels. clean_body: We couldn't have done it without you. We have a lot of work to do. | | | Hi friend, I want to personally express my gratitude for your support. I am extremely proud and humbled that you have sent me back to Congress. With so much work left to do, I'm feeling more energized than ever to tackle these challenges head on. But, let me be clear: we won this race because we had people like you show up and chip in to hold our seat. With your support, we were able to send out thousands of yard signs, text messages, and volunteers who went door-to-door to reach voters. We have a lot to celebrate, friend. Our win this week was a victory for every person in our district who wants the economy to work for everyone. It was a win for every person who wants a voice in their medical decisions, instead of letting politicians decide for them. Winning the election isn't the end of our fight — we still have a long road ahead of us. Over the next two years, we'll need to be even more vigilant about the attacks on our democracy. I will do everything in my power to hold troublemakers accountable and call them out. I'm committed to that fight, and I'm confident that you are too. Today, let's celebrate our win, and congratulate each other for the months of hard work and dedication. Tomorrow, let's dig in and keep the momentum going. Thank you for your support, team. – Bill The toughest member of Congress is progressive New Jersey fighter Bill Pascrell. Bill is leading our battle to protect Social Security and Medicare. Bill wants to rebuild New Jersey's aging roads, bridges, and tunnels. And Bill Pascrell is our strongest advocate for tax fairness and restoring the state and local tax deduction for our middle-class families. Thanks for having Bill's back! Prefer to donate by mail? Make checks payable to Pascrell for Congress P.O. Box 100 Teaneck, NJ 07666

name: Team AOC
subject: Alexandria’s decisive victory
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
We did it.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20221109-3601-header&t=1&akid=3601%2E2526796%2Emqlp_h)
We did it.
Despite a MAGA Republican challenger, we re-elected Alexandria to Congress with a groundswell of support. With most of the results in, we’re currently leading with over 70% of the vote!
Most deep blue seats don’t run real campaigns during the general election. But we put our movement’s values and vision into practice. We didn’t take our community for granted. Together, we:
* Knocked on over 18,500 doors
* Called over 57,900 voters
* Organized over 1,780 volunteers
* Combated rampant Spanish-language disinformation with a first-of-its-kind WhatsApp program and a six-figure Spanish ad program
* And so much more...

And we’re not going to stop now. We’ll be out there next year, in a non-election year because the work of community-building transcends elections. It always has.
**You didn’t donate to our campaign this election cycle. And we understand – there were a lot of competitive races across the country. But we’re asking now if you can commit to supporting the work that also has to happen in the off year.**
Too many politicians just show up before Election Day. That doesn’t foster trust in our democracy. It hurts voter turn-out and breeds cynicism. That’s why we commit to being in the community year-round and showing up in lots of ways – from organizing tutoring programs, to door-knocking for the Census and leading trainings on how to organize a union in your workplace.
But to do that work, we need your help. We didn’t raise as much money this election cycle as we did two years ago, so we have some ground we really need to make up. And how much we raise in these next few weeks is really going to determine the programming we can commit to next year.
[We hope you will contribute to keep our campaign organizing in the off year. As long as our democracy is threatened, we have the obligation to do everything we can.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20221109.e9rqvp&refcode=em20221109-3601-P_FND_EGR_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3601%2E2526796%2Emqlp_h)
With infinite gratitude,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20221109?refcode=em20221109-3601-P_FND_EGR_GFM&t=3&refcode2=3601_2526796_mqlp_h&akid=3601%2E2526796%2Emqlp_h)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20221109-3601-P_FND_EGR_GFM&t=4&akid=3601%2E2526796%2Emqlp_h)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=5&akid=3601%2E2526796%2Emqlp_h) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=6&akid=3601%2E2526796%2Emqlp_h) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=7&akid=3601%2E2526796%2Emqlp_h)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. clean_body: We did it. We did it. Despite a MAGA Republican challenger, we re-elected Alexandria to Congress with a groundswell of support. With most of the results in, we’re currently leading with over 70% of the vote! Most deep blue seats don’t run real campaigns during the general election. But we put our movement’s values and vision into practice. We didn’t take our community for granted. Together, we: Knocked on over 18,500 doors Called over 57,900 voters Organized over 1,780 volunteers Combated rampant Spanish-language disinformation with a first-of-its-kind WhatsApp program and a six-figure Spanish ad program And so much more... And we’re not going to stop now. We’ll be out there next year, in a non-election year because the work of community-building transcends elections. It always has. We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff.

name: Marisa Wood
subject: Thank you, friend
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54386394/378347247/883924314?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YmM5MjA3NS04YjYwLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNGE2NTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2G8G3v0Zn26Q-eQpNNCOQrLE6G3VbgX-TMZRGGC-qmc=)
Thank you, friend. While last night’s results weren't what we hoped for, I am so proud of the team and campaign we built together. I can’t put into words just how grateful I am for all of the hard work every single one of you put into this campaign. **Against all odds, we built a grassroots coalition that accomplished so much, and I am proud of the integrity of the campaign we ran.** We participated in dozens of events across the district and won support from every background -- LGBTQ+ leaders, farmers and ranchers, labor leaders, educators, and so many more. I ran for Congress because we deserve a representative in Washington who understands what working families in this district go through. **I will continue to fight to make sure we have good jobs and wages, our communities are safe, and no one is treated like a second-class citizen in a first-world country. ** We set out to prevent Kevin McCarthy from becoming Speaker of the House, and while we came up short of defeating him in this deep-red district, the American people sent him a resounding message last night that we _will_ stand up to his extremism, his attacks on our democracy, and defend our right to choose. **McCarthy thought he was going to walk into the Speaker’s office. Voters had other ideas, and I’m pleased to see that his plans to hold the gavel are now in jeopardy. ** Thanks again, friend. Whether you voted for me, donated, or simply cheered us on, it was an honor to run for this seat. We left it all out on the field, and I couldn’t be prouder. Forever grateful, Marisa Wood

P.S. -- unfortunately, we still need some help covering the cost of expenses and paying off final bills. A contribution today would be greatly appreciated. | **[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54386395/378347248/1933492892?refcode=em-11.9.22-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YmM5MjA3NS04YjYwLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNGE2NTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2G8G3v0Zn26Q-eQpNNCOQrLE6G3VbgX-TMZRGGC-qmc=)**

Marisa Wood is a public school teacher and Democrat running a historic campaign to unseat GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy in California's 23rd District. 2022 is our best shot in decades to finally defeat McCarthy. name: Mandela Barnes
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mandela Barnes for Wisconsin
body:
#
Friends -
Wisconsin, I cannot thank you enough.
I want to thank my parents, who have been my biggest supporters. I wouldn’t be here today without their hard work, which gave me the opportunity to become Lt. Governor and run this campaign.
And I want to thank the volunteers who have knocked on doors, made phone calls, sent those texts, and given everything they had. Thank you for your refusal to settle for the status quo and your commitment to fighting for better.
I got into this race in July of last year because I believe that the American Dream – the one that gave me the opportunity to stand before you – is worth protecting. I believe that our workers and our family farmers and our children's futures are worth fighting for.
I got into this race because I believe in the Wisconsin promise of a fair shot at success. Whether you’re a dairy farmer in Monroe or a thrift store owner in Superior or a kid born on the corner of 26th and Locust in the heart of Milwaukee.
And I believe in that promise today more than I ever have before.
I’ve had a chance to talk to Senator Johnson to congratulate him on his win. And I told him the same thing that I’ve been saying since the start of this campaign.
I reminded him that this isn’t about red or blue, or left or right. This is about ensuring that every Wisconsinite, from every ZIP code, from every background has the chance to achieve their dreams – big or small.
Whether that dream is being able to send your kid to a quality public school knowing they’ll come home safely at the end of the day.
Or having the funds to start that small business that you’ve been thinking about for years now.
Or passing your family farm down to your children knowing they won’t be saddled with debt or left to pick up the pieces after another extreme weather event.
And I also told Ron Johnson I’d continue working to help make our state into what I know it can be.
Because while things may not have gone the way we had hoped last night, I still believe that better is possible, and I am in this for Wisconsin. I am in this for every person in this room and for the community that raised me into the person I am today.
I am in this for people like my grandparents – a union steelworker and a school cafeteria worker – who worked their whole lives to lay a foundation for me. My story should never be the exception, it should be the rule.
I am in this for the auto workers in Racine who have been on strike for the last 6 months, standing shoulder to shoulder to fight for fair pay, benefits, and health care.
I am in this for my friends John and Lauren, and so many others like them who have worked their entire lives to earn Social Security.
And I am in this for our kids who should know that opportunity is within reach, and that they can do anything they set their minds to.
We have so much more to do, and I am ready to work with Senator Johnson and Senator Baldwin and Governor Evers and our representatives at every level of government to rebuild our middle class and bring opportunity back to this state.
I know you’re disappointed. I am, too. But more than that, I am determined.
Now is not the time for us to tune out. Now is the time for us to double down. To show up like we’ve never shown up before, and make sure that Ron Johnson and every political leader knows they answer to every person in Wisconsin – not just the people who voted for them.
I am so grateful to have had this opportunity. Over the past year and a half, I’ve had the chance to travel to every part of this state. It’s been a real privilege to hear your stories and have the important conversations about how we can improve the quality of life for everyone across Wisconsin.
And whether or not we always saw eye to eye, I can’t tell you what it means to me that you gave me a chance.
Because I do believe that there is so much more that unites us than divides us – and all it takes is us reaching out and talking to each other to bridge that divide.
We knew this fight wasn’t going to be easy – hardly anything worth fighting for is easy. But I’m standing here today ready to jump back in. I’m ready to keep going. Because I know that we’re still in this together – and that’s all I’ve ever needed.
In these tough fights, I’m often reminded of a Bible verse I’ve carried with me throughout this campaign:
_"Consider it pure joy, whenever you face trials of many kinds, because the testing of your faith produces perseverance."_
And together, we’re going to continue to persevere.
We’re going to organize for better, we’re going to fight for better, and one day soon, we’re going to achieve better.
Thank you so much for this opportunity.
Let’s move forward together, Wisconsin.
Mandela

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=4081%2E196590%2EdE85sk). I wouldn’t be here today without their hard work, which gave me the opportunity to become Lt. Governor and run this campaign. And I want to thank the volunteers who have knocked on doors, made phone calls, sent those texts, and given everything they had. Thank you for your refusal to settle for the status quo and your commitment to fighting for better. I got into this race in July of last year because I believe that the American Dream – the one that gave me the opportunity to stand before you – is worth protecting. I believe that our workers and our family farmers and our children's futures are worth fighting for. I got into this race because I believe in the Wisconsin promise of a fair shot at success. Whether you’re a dairy farmer in Monroe or a thrift store owner in Superior or a kid born on the corner of 26th and Locust in the heart of Milwaukee. And I believe in that promise today more than I ever have before. I’ve had a chance to talk to Senator Johnson to congratulate him on his win. And I told him the same thing that I’ve been saying since the start of this campaign. I reminded him that this isn’t about red or blue, or left or right. This is about ensuring that every Wisconsinite, from every ZIP code, from every background has the chance to achieve their dreams – big or small. Whether that dream is being able to send your kid to a quality public school knowing they’ll come home safely at the end of the day. Or having the funds to start that small business that you’ve been thinking about for years now. Or passing your family farm down to your children knowing they won’t be saddled with debt or left to pick up the pieces after another extreme weather event. And I also told Ron Johnson I’d continue working to help make our state into what I know it can be. Because while things may not have gone the way we had hoped last night, I still believe that better is possible, and I am in this for Wisconsin. I am in this for every person in this room and for the community that raised me into the person I am today. I am in this for people like my grandparents – a union steelworker and a school cafeteria worker – who worked their whole lives to lay a foundation for me. My story should never be the exception, it should be the rule. I am in this for the auto workers in Racine who have been on strike for the last 6 months, standing shoulder to shoulder to fight for fair pay, benefits, and health care. I am in this for my friends John and Lauren, and so many others like them who have worked their entire lives to earn Social Security. And I am in this for our kids who should know that opportunity is within reach, and that they can do anything they set their minds to. We have so much more to do, and I am ready to work with Senator Johnson and Senator Baldwin and Governor Evers and our representatives at every level of government to rebuild our middle class and bring opportunity back to this state. I know you’re disappointed. I am, too. But more than that, I am determined. Now is not the time for us to tune out. Now is the time for us to double down. To show up like we’ve never shown up before, and make sure that Ron Johnson and every political leader knows they answer to every person in Wisconsin – not just the people who voted for them. I am so grateful to have had this opportunity. Over the past year and a half, I’ve had the chance to travel to every part of this state. It’s been a real privilege to hear your stories and have the important conversations about how we can improve the quality of life for everyone across Wisconsin. And whether or not we always saw eye to eye, I can’t tell you what it means to me that you gave me a chance. Because I do believe that there is so much more that unites us than divides us – and all it takes is us reaching out and talking to each other to bridge that divide. We knew this fight wasn’t going to be easy – hardly anything worth fighting for is easy. But I’m standing here today ready to jump back in. I’m ready to keep going. Because I know that we’re still in this together – and that’s all I’ve ever needed. In these tough fights, I’m often reminded of a Bible verse I’ve carried with me throughout this campaign: "Consider it pure joy, whenever you face trials of many kinds, because the testing of your faith produces perseverance." And together, we’re going to continue to persevere. We’re going to organize for better, we’re going to fight for better, and one day soon, we’re going to achieve better. Thank you so much for this opportunity. Let’s move forward together, Wisconsin. Mandela

body:
We’re all still sorting out the results from the election, but we wanted to share some initial thoughts on what we’re seeing.
#
Derek -
We’re all still sorting out the results from the election, but we wanted to share some initial thoughts on what we’re seeing.
But first, it’s important to note that VoteVets is immensely proud of the work we did this cycle. We played an absolutely critical role in a number of the House victories everyone is celebrating today:
Races like Abigail Spanberger, which was an enormous victory for us. Elissa Slotkin in Michigan, Chrissy Houlahan in Pennsylvania, Mikie Sherrill in New Jersey, Patty Murray in Wisconsin where we spent $600,000 late to shore her up.
And the list goes on. All totaled, VoteVets was one of the largest outside spending organizations of the entire cycle — and we were able to go into races and states most progressive organizations can’t.
None of that happens without you.
It just doesn’t.
Not only do we spend significant sums of money on these races, but we are unique in that we are one of the only outside organizations where the majority of donations come from individuals like you.
So thank you.
But now we’ll have a number of races to defend, races that are still out where we’re worried Republicans may cry fraud — especially in Arizona.
That’s why we’re asking — one more time:
[**Can you please make a $3 contribution to VoteVets today? We’ll put this donation to work elevating the voices of those who served to protect our democracy against those who try to cast doubt on results in the days ahead.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-nov22.YYvGrB&refcode=em221109-1-15&t=1&akid=7131%2E3013755%2Epd52kW)

body:
Please update your record immediately:
| | |
---
**EXCLUSIVE INVITATION:** You have been selected to represent Pennsylvania in our official Post-Election 2022 Exit Poll.

Details below -- please read carefully. (If your email is not [DPWILLIS67@GMAIL.COM](http://go.dscc.org/go/10964?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20221109-ActionNeeded-DemExitPoll-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20221109-ActionNeeded-DemExitPoll-Pros-sl1&akid=8580%2E9716520%2E1HV0N4), please exit this email immediately.)
Team -- Election Day was yesterday, and votes are still being counted across the country. But right now, we still don’t know if enough Democratic voters made it to the polls to defend our razor-thin majority.
We need to know where to send resources in this historically important post-election period, but to do that, we MUST have a representative sample of what turnout looked like across the country.**You’re our best hope to gather this pivotal information -- so please, will you take our EMERGENCY Post-Election Exit Poll?**
USER ID: **9716520**
REASON FOR SELECTION:**Past Survey Responses**
ACTION REQUIRED: [**Accept Invitation to Exit Poll**](http://go.dscc.org/go/10964?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20221109-ActionNeeded-DemExitPoll-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20221109-ActionNeeded-DemExitPoll-Pros-sl1&akid=8580%2E9716520%2E1HV0N4)
As a top supporter, it’s important that you and you alone use this customized link to the survey. We’ll be monitoring results very closely, but keep in mind that the Exit Poll closes at midnight.
**We have just a few more hours to gather this key information -- click here to help:**
**[www.dscc.org/2022-Exit-Poll#9716520](http://go.dscc.org/go/10964?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20221109-ActionNeeded-DemExitPoll-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20221109-ActionNeeded-DemExitPoll-Pros-sl1&akid=8580%2E9716520%2E1HV0N4)**
With the Senate majority -- and President Biden’s entire agenda -- on the line, we’re so grateful for your help.

Thank you,
Team DSCC

* If you've recently responded or done so with a different email address, thank you! Online records may not be up to date, but don't worry -- your responses have been recorded.
| |

The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. | | It was a strong campaign that united many people up and down the district. It gave new ideas and fresh hope for many. But most importantly it energized the political spirit and people showed up to volunteer, support and vote. It sometimes seems that change happens in a day, but under further review it becomes clear that it is only through dedicated work over long periods does the opportunity for change emerge. We have set a pace for change and committed ourselves to it. Yesterday was not the day, but that day is close and we will be ready.Thank you to everyone.
---

subject: VICTORY!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Salazar for Congress
body:
I couldn’t have done it without YOU.
|
---
Peter,
---
The race here in Florida’s 27th Congressional District has officially been called in our favor.
---

---

_I’m honored to serve you in Congress for another 2 years._
---
Thank you for everything, Peter. This victory would have never been possible without your support.
---
_YOU are the heart and soul of the grassroots movement, and I’m so grateful for every single patriot who fought tirelessly alongside me._
---
Tomorrow, we’ll get to work getting America back on track. But tonight, I hope you’ll take a moment to enjoy this hard-fought victory.
---
You deserve it, Peter.
---

Thank you again for all your support,
---
---
María Elvira Salazar
Florida’s 27th Congressional District
---
Paid for by Salazar for Congress
---
PO Box 3725 West Flagler St. #281 Miami, FL 33134
---
This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Please do not reply to this email as this address is not monitored.
We believe that email is a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters, but you can click [here](https://links.salazarforflorida.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=693dccc005624731a29983963c1367ea&_s=2aa5df8b27944e38a3b6bc490ecac94a&_t=WIkp7YvXFjLeA96dQyeXS40V0mYQQSI7rRBzjzSa-lMgqHEXRspPM6xNpVypOYnWNH7rZbAhVUa4lFDviCBY8pB02dfxgWeJsnM33ekxuLA%3D) if you would like to unsubscribe from these messages.

name: Herschel Walker
subject: OVERTIME
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
It’s going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks of this runoff campaign, so I need your help once again.
It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks of this runoff campaign, so I need your help once again.
|

Fellow American,

_**The fight for Georgia's Senate seat is going into OVERTIME.**_

**Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Tuesday, our Senate race is now heading to a RUNOFF on Tuesday, December 6th.**

It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks, so I need your help once again.

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff.

**[I'm going to beat Senator Warnock in this runoff, but I can't do it without the help of my top supporters on DAY ONE. clean_body: It’s going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks of this runoff campaign, so I need your help once again. It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks of this runoff campaign, so I need your help once again. | Fellow American, The fight for Georgia's Senate seat is going into OVERTIME. Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Tuesday, our Senate race is now heading to a RUNOFF on Tuesday, December 6th. It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks, so I need your help once again. We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff. Despite my opponent spending over $101 MILLION in the general election, Raphael Warnock could not win the support of a majority of Georgians as an incumbent senator. It is time for a change! Everything is at stake in this runoff election, and we don't have a moment to waste. Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Nevada’s Senate race is too close to call and with control of the Senate still up for grabs, I need your immediate support. My opponent, Adam Laxalt, led Donald Trump's efforts to overturn Nevada's election results in 2020. This time around, he has once again indicated he will challenge the integrity of our free and fair election.

With Laxalt still commanding the backing of McConnell and his allies – to the tune of more than $55 million already spent in this race – it is crucial we have resources of our own to fight their anti-democracy tactics and ensure every last vote is counted.

But Peter, our grassroots campaign spent every last dollar just to get through Election Day – because our race was one of the most expensive in the whole country. **Today, we start from scratch, which is why we've set an emergency $500,000 goal. Please: **[Can you split $10 between my campaign and UniteDemocrats right now to get us started so we have the resources to count every last vote in our must-win race? »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54367280/378306859/-1604482708?amount=10&refcode=UD_20221109_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM0Y2ZhY2U1LTY0NjAtZWQxMS1hZGU2LTE0Y2I2NTM0YTY1MSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ybqtl5-qGbXfNHt1124HGiARNcScEu9byS1TN-ZpknY=)

clean_body: | Peter, Nevada’s Senate race is too close to call and with control of the Senate still up for grabs, I need your immediate support. I appreciate everything you've done for this campaign – for the hard-earned, grassroots dollars you've already invested. But now, I've got to make the most important ask I ever have of you: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Catherine Cortez Masto and UniteDemocrats will go through immediately: | = = = My opponent, Adam Laxalt, led Donald Trump's efforts to overturn Nevada's election results in 2020. This time around, he has once again indicated he will challenge the integrity of our free and fair election. With Laxalt still commanding the backing of McConnell and his allies – to the tune of more than $55 million already spent in this race – it is crucial we have resources of our own to fight their anti-democracy tactics and ensure every last vote is counted. But Peter, our grassroots campaign spent every last dollar just to get through Election Day – because our race was one of the most expensive in the whole country. Today, we start from scratch, which is why we've set an emergency $500,000 goal. Please: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Catherine Cortez Masto and UniteDemocrats will go through immediately: = = = Thank you so much. ¡La lucha sigue! The fight continues! name: John Fetterman
subject: It’s official, Derek
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Your support helped power us to this historic victory.
#
It’s official, Derek.
**I’M THE NEXT U.S. SENATOR FROM PENNSYLVANIA!!!!! 😭😭**
I am *so* deeply grateful for each + every one of you who’ve had my back over the last two years.
Whether you showed up to knock doors, donated to an email like this one, or even just shared about our campaign with your friends + family, your support helped power us to this historic victory.
This campaign has been about fighting for every person who’s gotten knocked down and had to get back up + every community who’s had to build themselves back up.
I’m proud of what we ran on in this race: From protecting a woman’s right to choose to raising the minimum wage to fighting for the union way of life to making more things in America + standing up to corporate greed.
**This was a race for the future of every community across PA.**
For every person or small town that’s felt left behind.
For every job that’s been lost or factory closed.
For every person who works hard and still can’t get ahead.
Twenty years ago, I came to Braddock to start a GED program. And I’ve spent the last two decades fighting for forgotten communities like it because I still believe that no one deserves to be abandoned. **Every community matters.**
It’s been a tough race. It was the most competitive race in the country, and we ran one hell of a campaign – all while I was recovering from a stroke.
**They spent $100 MILLION to tear us down, but we came out on top.** And I’m *so* proud of everything we’ve accomplished.
So from me, Gisele, Karl, Gracie, August, Levi + Artie: Thank you, thank you, THANK YOU!
We couldn’t have done this without your help,
❤️ John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania
Pennsylvania’s next U.S. Senator-Elect

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20221109-8125-footer&t=1&refcode2=8125_434096_ew1gUn&akid=8125%2E434096%2Eew1gUn)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=8125%2E434096%2Eew1gUn)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=8125%2E434096%2Eew1gUn)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Kelly Hall, Executive Director
subject: Recapping last night’s HISTORIC ballot measure wins >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Fairness Project The Fairness Project
body:
2022 was the year that voters from across party lines came together and used ballot measures to decisively pass progressive policies that will better the lives of millions of people in America. | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54370890/378308585/765663662?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzJkMmRiNS02NzYwLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNGE2NTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UZw3_RNIL0s0iNz_kN1aPCQMxBQXmd30mteN8GyWi8U=&emci=967d80b9-4b60-ed11-ade6-14cb6534a651&emdi=3c2d2db5-6760-ed11-ade6-14cb6534a651&ceid=561582) | Team: All I can say is **wow**. I think it’s safe to say last night’s results weren’t what anyone had expected. And while the control of Congress is yet to be decided, _one thing_ is certain: **2022 was the year that voters from across party lines came together and used ballot measures to _decisively_ pass progressive policies that will better the lives of millions of people in America. ** **Because that’s what we do.** When politicians are stuck in gridlock or ignore the needs of their constituents, Fairness Project is here to fight alongside voters and win the change they need. _And that’s exactly what we did._ [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54370891/378308586/1511290073?refcode=E19394-20221109-NovPostElection-graphic-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzJkMmRiNS02NzYwLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNGE2NTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UZw3_RNIL0s0iNz_kN1aPCQMxBQXmd30mteN8GyWi8U=) Voters in **Arizona** overwhelmingly came together to protect their homes and cars from predatory medical debt traps.
Voters in **Nebraska** came together to raise the minimum wage to a life-changing $15/hr.
Voters in **South Dakota** came together to help the 40,000 state residents without coverage gain access to Medicaid.
And voters in **Michigan** and **Vermont** made history by winning the first-ever ballot measures to restore the protections of _Roe v. Wade_ and protect their reproductive rights for good. **We are SO proud of each of these campaigns** and grateful to our bones for the hardworking volunteers, staff, and supporters like you, friend, who helped make each of these victories possible. When polls opened yesterday, we had 24 campaign victories under our belt. **Now, our winning track record is up to 30 campaigns, putting billions into the pockets of workers, expanding health care to over 1 MILLION Americans, and improving the lives of millions more. ** This would not have been possible without the help of supporters like you. **Thank you, friend.** And onwards to the fights ahead in 2023, 2024, and beyond! [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54370892/378308587/1511290073?refcode=E19394-20221109-NovPostElection-graphic-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzJkMmRiNS02NzYwLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNGE2NTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UZw3_RNIL0s0iNz_kN1aPCQMxBQXmd30mteN8GyWi8U=) Kelly Hall
Executive Director
Fairness Project
---
* * *
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54370894/378308588/1041002375?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzJkMmRiNS02NzYwLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNGE2NTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UZw3_RNIL0s0iNz_kN1aPCQMxBQXmd30mteN8GyWi8U=&emci=967d80b9-4b60-ed11-ade6-14cb6534a651&emdi=3c2d2db5-6760-ed11-ade6-14cb6534a651&ceid=561582) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54370902/378308590/-1451982884?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzJkMmRiNS02NzYwLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNGE2NTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UZw3_RNIL0s0iNz_kN1aPCQMxBQXmd30mteN8GyWi8U=&emci=967d80b9-4b60-ed11-ade6-14cb6534a651&emdi=3c2d2db5-6760-ed11-ade6-14cb6534a651&ceid=561582) clean_body: 2022 was the year that voters from across party lines came together and used ballot measures to decisively pass progressive policies that will better the lives of millions of people in America. | | Team: All I can say is wow. I think it’s safe to say last night’s results weren’t what anyone had expected. And while the control of Congress is yet to be decided, one thing is certain: 2022 was the year that voters from across party lines came together and used ballot measures to decisively pass progressive policies that will better the lives of millions of people in America. Because that’s what we do. When politicians are stuck in gridlock or ignore the needs of their constituents, Fairness Project is here to fight alongside voters and win the change they need. And that’s exactly what we did. = Voters in Arizona overwhelmingly came together to protect their homes and cars from predatory medical debt traps. Voters in Nebraska came together to raise the minimum wage to a life-changing $15/hr. Voters in South Dakota came together to help the 40,000 state residents without coverage gain access to Medicaid. And voters in Michigan and Vermont made history by winning the first-ever ballot measures to restore the protections of Roe v. Wade and protect their reproductive rights for good. We are SO proud of each of these campaigns and grateful to our bones for the hardworking volunteers, staff, and supporters like you, friend, who helped make each of these victories possible. When polls opened yesterday, we had 24 campaign victories under our belt. Now, our winning track record is up to 30 campaigns, putting billions into the pockets of workers, expanding health care to over 1 MILLION Americans, and improving the lives of millions more. This would not have been possible without the help of supporters like you. Thank you, friend. And onwards to the fights ahead in 2023, 2024, and beyond! = Kelly Hall Executive Director Fairness Project Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, our team at the Fairness Project has won 30 people-powered ballot measure campaigns since 2016, changing over 18 million lives by expanding health care, raising wages, guaranteeing paid leave, and ending predatory lending directly at the ballot box when politicians refuse to act. Your support allows us to make this progress possible.** = = Contributions or gifts to the Fairness Project are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions to the Fairness Project support its many efforts nationwide and any focus is at the Fairness Project’s sole discretion. Contributions will not necessarily be used to support activity in any one state. You can request to get only the most important emails from our team , or you can . name: Team Jayapal
subject: It’s all because of you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter,
These last two years have been a rollercoaster, and you’ve stuck with Pramila the entire way. For that, we are so grateful. Thanks to your support, we raised millions of dollars, made 90,000 calls, knocked thousands of doors, and ensured Pramila could pass bold, transformative legislation in Congress.
Now we get to see the fruits of our hard labor on this campaign pay off – Pramila is so grateful that the people of Washington’s Seventh Congressional District have re-elected her to be their voice in Congress.
**Pramila Jayapal:_PROJECTED TO WIN! _** _84.26% of the vote, 52% reporting - Associated Press_
---
We're so happy that Pramila won her re-election — this is the outcome that all of us worked so hard for, and we're proud to propel her to another term in Congress!
And while control of the House and Senate is still in limbo as votes are still being counted, one thing is abundantly clear: Democrats have outperformed expectations. That’s because our agenda was rooted in lifting up working people, in bringing real relief and real change, and voters want more action, not less.
We will keep a close eye on the election outcomes. It is so important that every vote is counted and every voice is heard. No matter the outcome, Peter, know that Pramila will always fight for each and every single one of us to build a society where we can all thrive, not just survive.
Thank you for every single thing you’ve done for Pramila, because we certainly couldn’t have done this without you. At the end of the day, we’re in this together.
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20221109-1830-footer&t=1&refcode2=1830_420207_brSg2t&akid=1830%2E420207%2EbrSg2t)**
---

Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the entire GOP establishment have already spent more than $52 million to defeat me – and you can bet they're lining up their shady megadonors to spend _even more_ in this next critical phase of the election _._

Friends,

**WE DID IT! WE WON!** I am honored to continue to serve as your Congressman in Iowa’s 4th District.

[**It is time we lead America and Iowa out of the turmoil the Democrats put us in.**](http://links.feenstraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=70b938be44d84e1197556ad813170f3c&_m=753e668e708a420a9a75f6c51c338f71&_e=fRoKBGb9c-OJ5HsujrL2hecCXkvb7byxEPVYjAO164PsvuJpUjLXhjb6YHspFxzxZaTUIwLr7Jt7uQphSTlKd81OqqoqEJdjTQUUJb-EaS5LOpNtr6l-Mem2-1ciNWs1LBgk8fQzlKE0leOPq1q4dUQxOsiXzVP2ZN2HDI4wlS4C4UTQXrNpJX5zBziY5evWD-hiI-P5XmYEarsWQRtuPrk4UYoNq9-9hhehN5prI4FQy-O0IRr-WR7E7E27x-VaX9BzxSm4xnzqmQjkYPP43ChDNOFTgLKfEvDWSeK-EhVeMpeqVAfhbFknGKBBSEcdC0UPJroEegkcVfkwrgd_5JnX5JxvmXfEAcmg1mff06p5bya9RHqE0W2DGm2CnYai-tR1-ZmEeF0pkrC_Z4uFYeuJTSUqxyHt2lEatfQkUEk%3D)
This would not have been possible without your support. I am blessed that you have chosen me as your leader and voice in Washington, but we still have a **LONG WAY TO GO** to get America back on track.

I am forever grateful for all of your help along the way. My supporters are what kept me going through the tough times.

**[I WILL CONTINUE TO FIGHT FOR IOWA AND AMERICA!](http://links.feenstraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=70b938be44d84e1197556ad813170f3c&_m=753e668e708a420a9a75f6c51c338f71&_e=fRoKBGb9c-OJ5HsujrL2hecCXkvb7byxEPVYjAO164PsvuJpUjLXhjb6YHspFxzxZaTUIwLr7Jt7uQphSTlKd81OqqoqEJdjTQUUJb-EaS5LOpNtr6l-Mem2-1ciNWs1LBgk8fQzlKE0leOPq1q4dUQxOsiXzVP2ZN2HDI4wlS4C4UTQXrNpJX5zBziY5evWD-hiI-P5XmYEarsWQRtuPrk4UYoNq9-9hhehN5prI4FQy-O0IRr-WR7E7E27x-VaX9BzxSm4xnzqmQjkYPP43Nm9d55b-KObvAM8N64zWaGCKsS3QmEyurFWcwIyRob8QcXzX6ylJ19vW-8_X7GKTcYsTBcTOg-VfQltUoKXddcnqKqJ0b6hnlWZRFNY5RjK_wdyM0UJFNJUnfPymo_1HZF2pXU1RC5v1NAxRCb_OBU%3D)**
I will keep my word to deliver Conservative results for you, **I PROMISE!**

Thank you again for putting your trust in me!

God Bless Iowa, and God Bless America,

name: Wesley Hunt
subject: Victory!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
I wanted to thank you first.
|
---
Friend,
---
I owe this victory to YOU.
---
_Thanks to your unrelenting support, we were able to run a strong campaign through and through and WON Texas’ new 38th congressional district._
---
---
Because of you, we’re one step closer to taking back our country, Friend.
---
I will never forget the amazing network of grassroots patriots who fought tirelessly by my side every step of the way in this race...
---
_Your donations, the countless hours our volunteers spent knocking doors, and this team’s unrelenting dedication all were invaluable in getting us across the finish line._
---
**So today, I hope you’ll take a moment to cherish this hard-fought victory with me._YOU earned it._**
---
**And tomorrow, we begin putting our country back on the path to GREATNESS!**
---
Thank you,
---
---
Wesley Hunt
Congressman-elect
TX-38
---
1707 1/2 Post Oak Blvd. #525
Houston, TX 77056
---

---

Qualified federal PACs may contribute a maximum of $5,000 for the primary election and $5,000 for the general election. name: Lizzie Pannill Fletcher
subject: We did it! Thank you for helping us make it happen again in TX-07
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/lizzie-reelect-logo-outlined.png]
We are celebrating a victory in TX-07 because of the hard work, support, and generous contributions of everyone on #TeamLizzie. Thank you for being part of the team.

# [#]

And while we are still waiting to see the outcomes of congressional races across the country, Democratic members in the House and Democratic candidates across the country outperformed expectations, and we have seen some inspiring, meaningful victories. And here at home, we are seeing our work result in victories in Harris County and Fort Bend County. Every single race and every single victory matters.
Over the last two years of this election cycle, we’ve seen so many reminders of how much elections matter. How much leadership matters. And how much you matter. Yesterday, we also saw what we can accomplish when we work together. And we have a lot of work ahead.
Since 2018, our campaign has been about building a coalition of people from across our diverse and dynamic district who want to ensure that our community’s core values — inclusion, innovation, and collaboration — result in progress, equality, and opportunity for all Americans. Together, we have done essential work for our community and our country. I am so proud of what we have accomplished together.
I remain committed to doing the work every day, and to making you proud to be a part of #TeamLizzie.
Together, we can do anything,
Lizzie Sign-off [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/lizzie_signature-1.png]
PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
Lizzie Fletcher for Congress
3262 Westheimer Road, PMB 636
Houston, TX 77098
United States

This can't wait, friend:
**We're officially going to a runoff in Georgia's must-win Senate race, and I urgently need your help to win.**
**[If you’re in this fight with me, will you split a donation between me and Jacky Rosen so we can defeat Herschel Walker and keep Georgia blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54387060/378368437/-1910320442?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2214-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzZlMDFmZS05MjYwLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNGE2NTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DAoYvp_n7J0qizPi2-GL-dOpit6Xn-oGgIB27jOel3w=)**

**We need to fight back ASAP , or else we could put this seat in serious danger. But with time running out before our midnight deadline, we're facing a MAJOR budget gap. We simply cannot power our campaign forward without an immediate surge of grassroots support.**
I know that we have what it takes to win this race and make history once again here in Georgia – but not if we fall short on important days like this. So please, I'm personally asking you to come through, friend:
