name: Rev. Raphael Warnock
subject: The fight continues
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54374664/378315096/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YWQ2NjZhOC02OTYwLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNGE2NTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XQXxkMI76klUYCNhTEfJX8jdQ75rfJpiUC2JNQlSU_4=&emci=4d9611f5-5760-ed11-ade6-14cb6534a651&emdi=6ad666a8-6960-ed11-ade6-14cb6534a651&ceid=43566853)

| | Peter, I just want to say _thank you._

Because of the strength of our grassroots movement, we've come one step closer to making history yet again here in Georgia. And we've shown the country that our fight for progress isn't over.

**We know we can win this – we have done it before! But I've always been honest with you, so I’ll do so again: we've got an incredibly tough fight ahead. We poured every cent we had into getting this far – which means we're now back to square one.** With all eyes on Georgia, the GOP is gearing up to flood us with millions in attack ads, and we need to refill our campaign.

That's why I'm asking directly: **_[Will you split $10 right now between my team and the Democratic Party of Georgia to kickstart this critical next phase and power our re-election campaign to victory?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54374665/378315097/1583625711?refcode=20221109.1_RW_A26&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YWQ2NjZhOC02OTYwLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNGE2NTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XQXxkMI76klUYCNhTEfJX8jdQ75rfJpiUC2JNQlSU_4=)_**

When we launched this campaign, we knew it wouldn't be easy. The GOP has been coming after me with everything they’ve got since the beginning, and they haven't let up since.

Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the entire Republican establishment have spent millions to prop up my opponent, Herschel Walker, and defeat me. And they're about to spend a whole lot more to definitively turn Georgia red.

That's why taking our foot off the gas is simply not an option. **We're in a position to win this race – but not without grassroots support.**

**With time running out before our crucial midnight deadline, we're falling short of the $500,000 we need to kickstart this runoff election, so I'm personally asking:_[Will you split $10 or more right now between my campaign and the Democratic Party of Georgia to help me defeat Herschel Walker and keep Georgia blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54374666/378315098/1583625711?refcode=20221109.1_RW_A26&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YWQ2NjZhOC02OTYwLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNGE2NTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XQXxkMI76klUYCNhTEfJX8jdQ75rfJpiUC2JNQlSU_4=)_**

Thank you for your support.

– Rev. Raphael Warnock

name: Val Hoyle
subject: We did it, Peter. Thank you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Val Hoyle for Congress
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54387414/378373034/553882890?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTlhM2QzOS05NTYwLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNGE2NTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dLBoT4alPTNJcVec5MyrHWJeZBQld3B_2sfZVtd3tKE=&emci=31888b00-9160-ed11-ade6-14cb6534a651&emdi=5e9a3d39-9560-ed11-ade6-14cb6534a651&ceid=9636579)
---

| | Peter, We did it. We won this campaign. **Our victory last night was for jobs and working people across this district and across the country. It was for protecting our reproductive freedoms, for our climate, and for the clean energy future that we need. And it was for everyone who believes in our fundamental rights and in our democracy.** Last night was also special to me because I got to celebrate this moment with my family. My father was the person that inspired me to get into politics and introduced me to the labor movement as a union leader and he stood by my side as we realized that we had enough votes to win. We held our election night watch party at the local 290 plumber and pipefitters hall because it was important to celebrate this win in a union hall to make sure there is no question where my focus will be in Congress, squarely in the fight for working families. **I want to thank everyone who's been a part of the broad coalition of support that we built in this campaign. It's because of your support and your work that we were able to win this race.** We ran a campaign focused on the issues that matter to Oregon's families on a day to day basis - the issues that I have focused on throughout my life and my time in public service. I am so proud of the campaign that we ran because it was authentic and it was honest. We went up against a Republican money machine that outspent us 2 to 1, but we had what they didn't have: the truth on our side, and thousands of grassroots supporters from every county in this district and from across the country who believed that we could stand up here and hold the line against the predicted "red wave." And Oregonians came through for us. I also want to thank my amazing staff. You have heard from some of them throughout the campaign, but what you may not know is that this spectacular campaign was run by a small team. Logan Gilles, our campaign manager, handled all the things that came at him with a calm and measured focus on what needed to get done. Mariah Morgan, our finance director, built the finance plan and executed our fundraising with military precision. Aaron Lewis, who grew up in Corvallis and graduated from the University of Oregon, brought his relentlessly positive attitude to every task and event. Skyler Cservak, who ran Commissioner Heather Buch's winning race in May, brought her skills and knowledge of the district to our team. And our newest member, David Martinez, stepped up to take on whatever needed to be done (he's also an incredible chef – and that goes a long way). Our interns and our field team worked incredibly hard and left nothing on the field. We were outspent but we outworked our opposition to bring home the win. I also want to recognize the tremendous service of Congressman Peter DeFazio. We have been well served by Peter's strong, independent leadership and his willingness to take on special interests on our behalf. He leaves a big legacy and even bigger shoes to fill. Peter is a friend and a mentor and his advice and guidance will continue to serve our district. **It is an immense honor to be the next member of Congress from Oregon's 4th district - and the first woman to hold this position. I don't take this responsibility lightly and you can count on me to work hard every single day to make sure that Oregonians in our corner of the state have their voices heard and their priorities addressed.** Today, we celebrate. Tomorrow, the work begins. Again, thank you. _Val_ |
---|---|---

name: Gabe Vasquez
subject: VICTORY: We flipped NM-02!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54387420/378373663/-840396548?refcode=fl_email_fr_20221109victory_gv_full_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmMyNzU4ZC05NTYwLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNGE2NTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WPT1whOeDorTiyUXISn86BPIjMQl2dagkR9DtSa7ZFc=)
---
Friends, we did it: **together, we flipped NM-02 blue!** I am incredibly honored and grateful to be your Congressman-elect. Thank you for your support, your love, your kindness, your time, and your passion throughout this entire congressional campaign. As I traveled throughout our district over the past year, I heard from so many families. Their stories shine a light on New Mexico’s greatest strengths, our biggest challenges, and our highest hopes. **Because behind every story is a dream, and behind that dream is a sense of hope and belief in a better way — a belief that here, in our America, anything is possible with hope, hard work, drive, and determination.** My own story has taught me to believe that this is the only place in the world where a son of immigrants from Mexico with barely more than the shirt on their backs could one day be elected to serve in Congress. Throughout the journey of this campaign, I’ve been reminded time and time again of the value of optimism in the face of adversity. Because the New Mexico families I’ve seen struggling with rising costs, those worried about losing their freedoms, and the folks nervous about threats to our democracy all feel the weight of these challenging times, but they never doubt that better days are possible. And they never, ever, stop fighting. Because THAT is who we are. We’re a state that punches above our weight and a people who fight even harder when our backs are to the wall. We value opportunity and fairness, justice, and equality. We believe in the rule of law and the strength of a vibrant Democracy. We cherish our families and are enchanted by possibility. But, like so many of our fellow Americans, we’ve been disappointed by a lot of what’s going on in Washington. We want politicians to stop fighting about what caused inflation and start investing in American manufacturing so we can lower costs and create new jobs. We want them to stop selling out to the pharmaceutical companies and start making prescription drugs affordable. We want them to stop pointing fingers and start fixing our broken immigration system. And we want them to get the heck out of doctors’ offices so women can make their own healthcare decisions. You have put your trust in me and, rest assured, I will go to Washington to fight for you. Because, make no mistake about it, there is nothing that happens in Washington that New Mexico can’t do better. Thank you to my family whose love fuels everything I do. Thank you to my staff whose talent and passion were at the foundation of this campaign. clean_body: | = Friends, we did it: together, we flipped NM-02 blue! I am incredibly honored and grateful to be your Congressman-elect. Thank you for your support, your love, your kindness, your time, and your passion throughout this entire congressional campaign. As I traveled throughout our district over the past year, I heard from so many families. Their stories shine a light on New Mexico’s greatest strengths, our biggest challenges, and our highest hopes. Because behind every story is a dream, and behind that dream is a sense of hope and belief in a better way — a belief that here, in our America, anything is possible with hope, hard work, drive, and determination. My own story has taught me to believe that this is the only place in the world where a son of immigrants from Mexico with barely more than the shirt on their backs could one day be elected to serve in Congress. Throughout the journey of this campaign, I’ve been reminded time and time again of the value of optimism in the face of adversity. Because the New Mexico families I’ve seen struggling with rising costs, those worried about losing their freedoms, and the folks nervous about threats to our democracy all feel the weight of these challenging times, but they never doubt that better days are possible. And they never, ever, stop fighting. Because THAT is who we are. We’re a state that punches above our weight and a people who fight even harder when our backs are to the wall. We value opportunity and fairness, justice, and equality. We believe in the rule of law and the strength of a vibrant Democracy. We cherish our families and are enchanted by possibility. But, like so many of our fellow Americans, we’ve been disappointed by a lot of what’s going on in Washington. We want politicians to stop fighting about what caused inflation and start investing in American manufacturing so we can lower costs and create new jobs. We want them to stop selling out to the pharmaceutical companies and start making prescription drugs affordable. We want them to stop pointing fingers and start fixing our broken immigration system. And we want them to get the heck out of doctors’ offices so women can make their own healthcare decisions. You have put your trust in me and, rest assured, I will go to Washington to fight for you. Because, make no mistake about it, there is nothing that happens in Washington that New Mexico can’t do better. Thank you to my family whose love fuels everything I do. Thank you to my staff whose talent and passion were at the foundation of this campaign. And thank you to everyone who cast a vote, put up a sign, talked to a friend, sent a text, made a phone call, or just wished us luck. No matter how you helped, I’m eternally grateful for all that you did and for what you and I are going to accomplish together. Thank you all so much, Gabe | = | PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS Gabe Vasquez for Congress Drawer L Mesilla, NM 88046 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Freedom First Project
subject: C.S. Lewis like you’ve never seen him before
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I'm writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News _because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty-like our free online courses. _ _ And though we're best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author-C.S. Lewis.In fact, our free online course, **"[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)" **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That's why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **"[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)," **we've received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis' writings.[](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)We've also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I'm pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **"[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-7b6g-g)"** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won't last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last:[**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._y1AGEQlb_UXyZceW4gEiQ) Warm regards, Bill Gray, '01Vice PresidentNational Donor OutreachHillsdale College
---
P.O. Box 523692, Springfield, VA 22152If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIyMzEzLTRjOTY3ODQ2YTJhZjRmZGY4Yzk5ZTIwZjI0OTk1NDU5IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/Vin6jPVj_f66IQlUxNDicg) to unsubscribe.

name: Kirsten Engel
subject: This fight isn't over
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
https://www.engelforarizona.com/ [https://www.engelforarizona.com/]
Friend,
First, I want to say thank you. This campaign wouldn't have been possible without you.
We overcame hundreds of thousands of dollars from dark money Republican groups supporting my opponent — not because we were getting big checks from special interests, but because we were backed by folks like you.
Now, we're in a virtual tie with 65% of the votes counted.
Counting the outstanding votes may take several more days — and then a recount may be necessary after that.
Friend, my team is working hard to make sure every ballot is counted correctly. But we'll need your help in this fight too. If we don't have the resources to fight Republicans' attempts at voter suppression, we could be in trouble.
Will you chip in now to make sure we have the resources to fight for every vote? Help us defend our democracy! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engelaz?refcode=X_110922_Ballots]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engelaz?refcode=X_110922_Ballots [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engelaz?refcode=X_110922_Ballots]
Thank you again!
— Kirsten
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engelaz?refcode=X_110922_Ballots [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engelaz?refcode=X_110922_Ballots] Kirsten is a mom, an environmental attorney, and a former State Legislator who has spent the past 5 years fighting to restore funding to public schools, protect Arizona's natural resources, and make our communities safer. She’s ready to take that fight to Washington to find common-sense solutions to the challenges we’re facing here in Arizona's Sixth Congressional District.
Will you help her fight for Arizona by chipping in now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engelaz?refcode=X_110922_Ballots]

Peter,

_**The fight for Georgia's Senate seat is going into OVERTIME.**_

It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks, so I need your help once again.

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff.

name: Brett Broesder, Democrats Serve
subject: what a night!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democrats Serve, DemocratsServe
body:
| [ ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54380935/378318641/390144955?source=DS_EM_EN_30DO_221109_1_1&refcode2=deed9fad-6e60-ed11-ade6-14cb6534a651&contactdata=UDRj+Zv8fLA+JA2IyidLZXr8Q1SJGbeA0HECiprk3dr4hQvUbTb9xfTbcuJiqhn7jQ2Ton8IaR6N+UmjW1znVA==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwNzg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRlZWQ5ZmFkLTZlNjAtZWQxMS1hZGU2LTE0Y2I2NTM0YTY1MSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=gvVRUDz2YExqa3O3Wn11Mfx49xfHUz0dWm7JQsI2gKA=)
---
**Peter, what a night!**

While pundits and naysayers gleefully predicted a “red wave”, Democrats Serve confidently invested in public service Democrats across the country who know first-hand the real-life impact of the policies they’re backing, and who know from experience what it takes to get things done.

**And our strategy worked.**

While we’re still awaiting results in key races in the Arizona governor’s race, the LA mayor’s race, and several key House races that will decide control of Congress, **we are thrilled to announce many Democrats Serve victories from last night:**
* **Patty Murray (WA), Michael Bennet (CO), and Richard Blumenthal (CT)** won resounding victories in their U.S. Senate races, building a strong foundation for Democrats to keep control of the Senate.

* **Josh Shapiro (PA) and Maura Healey (MA)** successfully FLIPPED their states’ Governor seats, guaranteeing strong leadership in those states to benefit our communities and economy.

* And at least 36 public service candidates running for the U.S. House of Representatives have already declared victory, blocking the so-called “red wave” entirely.

For these public service pros, strengthening their communities isn’t just a job – it’s a way of life. Their experience as frontline workers gives them first-hand expertise in tackling the toughest challenges our families face today.

We will keep you updated as we learn more about our remaining candidates’ results.

**Thank you for your commitment to electing public service Democrats!**

Brett Broesder
Democrats Serve

Democrats Serve is a national organization that backs Democrats running for office with frontline public service backgrounds, including first responders, firefighters, social workers, police officers, prosecutors, judges, public defenders, educators, and more.

Democratic candidates with professional experience serving their communities in government have a pragmatic approach to governing and know how to get things done, making for strong narratives and an ability to connect with voters uniquely.

However, when running for office, they often lack access to the professional campaign staff and wealthy donor networks that non-working class candidates do.

Democrats Serve
55 Beach Shore Drive
Milford, CT 06460
United States

name: Catherine Cortez Masto
subject: Too close to call – we need to count every last vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Voter Protection Project
body:
| Emails are our best tool to keep in touch with supporters, but if you would like to receive fewer emails from us, please [click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=1&akid=5276%2E878179%2Ea6_IBP). If you wish to no longer receive emails from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=5276%2E878179%2Ea6_IBP).
---
Team, Nevada's Senate race is too close to call and with control of the Senate still up for grabs, I need your immediate support. I appreciate everything you've done for this campaign - for the hard-earned, grassroots dollars you've already invested. **But now, I've got to make the most important ask I ever have of you:** [**Will you split a donation of $10 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and Voter Protection Project, so we have the resources to count every vote and defeat our election-denying opponent?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/33420?t=8&akid=5276%2E878179%2Ea6_IBP)

My opponent, Adam Laxalt, led Donald Trump's efforts to overturn Nevada's election results in 2020. This time around, he has once again indicated he will challenge the integrity of our free and fair election.

With Laxalt still commanding the backing of McConnell and his allies - to the tune of more than $55 million already spent in this race - it is crucial we have resources of our own to fight their anti-democracy tactics and ensure every last vote is counted.

But friend, our grassroots campaign spent every last dollar just to get through Election Day - because our race was one of the most expensive in the whole country. **Today, we start from scratch, which is why we've set an emergency $500,000 goal. Please:** [**Can you split $10 between my campaign and Voter Protection Project right now to get us started so we have the resources to count every last vote in our must-win race?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/33420?t=9&akid=5276%2E878179%2Ea6_IBP) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Catherine Cortez Masto and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/33421?t=10&akid=5276%2E878179%2Ea6_IBP)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/33424?t=13&akid=5276%2E878179%2Ea6_IBP)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/33420?t=14&akid=5276%2E878179%2Ea6_IBP)
Thank you so much.

_¡ La lucha sigue!_ The fight continues!
Catherine

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: Gabe Vasquez
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
Gabe has officially won his race in NM-02! [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54387678/378376409/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_CL_GEN_RES_AC_20221109_PM2_V1_S1_VSP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMGFkNWJmOS05ODYwLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNGE2NTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W9kXKW0Miikt8mQTnpBconNjRA7wVnxnv14lGIqXrts=&emci=3c80aa4d-9660-ed11-ade6-14cb6534a651&emdi=30ad5bf9-9860-ed11-ade6-14cb6534a651&ceid=252045)
---
It’s official! The people and values of New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District will now, once again, have representation in the House of Representatives. Congratulations to Gabe Vasquez! **This is a huge victory for New Mexico and our country. For pragmatism and working class values. And for our fight to deliver an economy that works for everyone — not just the wealthy; protect abortion rights and our land and water; and take on the climate crisis with urgency.** I’ve known Gabe a long time and I was proud to endorse him early — well before his primary — because I’ve seen firsthand that he has what it takes to get things done for New Mexico. **In fact, I go against conventional political wisdom and “wall leaners” — I endorse early and often. And that’s not all.**
* Alongside my team, we find, recruit, and encourage people to run for office — the folks everyone knows and respects in their communities, who often just need a nudge and a point in the right direction.
* Once they decide to run, I endorse early and I fundraise often — in-person, on calls, and by email (I know, I know, you’ve seen the emails!).
* I join them in canvassing their neighborhoods, knocking on doors, and grappling with the issues their communities face.
* I’m lucky to know many of the campaign and party staff and volunteers who work these races, too. So I do all I can to make sure they have what they need to get the job done.
* And thanks to your generosity, we donate directly into their campaigns. Every dollar we can.

Gabe’s race is a prime example of how you can make a huge difference in the outcome of a race by encouraging strong candidates and providing them the resources and support they need early on. It may be a risk — but **the right risks pay off**. That’s exactly what happened in New Mexico’s 2nd District — and in nearly every race I’ve endorsed this cycle. From the congressional wins to the county commission wins, this simply wouldn’t have happened without your support of the effort we’ve built. Thank you! And thank you to all of the volunteers, campaign and party staff, and voters who fought hard to power us all the way to the finish line. I’m looking forward to fighting for our public lands, our economy, and more alongside Gabe in Congress. We’re still only at the beginning. — Martin | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54387679/378376410/1569788089?refcode=AU_MTH_CL_GEN_RES_AC_20221109_PM2_V1_S1_VSP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMGFkNWJmOS05ODYwLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNGE2NTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W9kXKW0Miikt8mQTnpBconNjRA7wVnxnv14lGIqXrts=)
---
| Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
---
Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. If you would like to stay in touch but receive fewer emails from us, [click here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54387680/378376411/1737618405?refcode=AU_MTH_CL_GEN_RES_AC_20221109_PM2_V1_S1_VSP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMGFkNWJmOS05ODYwLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNGE2NTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W9kXKW0Miikt8mQTnpBconNjRA7wVnxnv14lGIqXrts=&emci=3c80aa4d-9660-ed11-ade6-14cb6534a651&emdi=30ad5bf9-9860-ed11-ade6-14cb6534a651&ceid=252045). If you would like to unsubscribe from emails altogether, [click here](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/XDS0qYRlFU-BTKcEniMrVQ2?unsubscribedata=ICNpyC2Cf4KcYvwBj2gtXUasmBgA05wZypM35xVrKIxuGVZ7VtK%2F%2F56qMNevG6Knfybwl5HDKMlUaqm2%2BZ7uJbonQtffFuyK3I8OVxOBF1f5Am3lb5KIeOwHoAn%2BR40qfLF5phckIsh66ZIKaI0vRa1aVJXE7Ywv79zpfNEGL2OUDG%2BAt23RMrYQOQtT5HSyRN71ci3HVuK4IsqXL%2B5q5cgwdK0Q6Uh03usY1QKf0inFlbW2TyiMFF21JQoAQnD9up4py2q2LLXX6LPRLUB%2FVEPLEPfW8zRrjJLbMTfRZ7D8LF6084qZcBnUj6iARSmPiX%2BSjx%2BtRK2zPAIpBfCwj2LOBPChv6ZY0qy78gmYsZmKavxPdgdJp8GCzkE0idhPvxAW5Dv7mdW0syyGKzQgPStQMpMlfSFZKV8va0asn1Y%3D).

It may be a risk — but the right risks pay off**. That’s exactly what happened in New Mexico’s 2nd District — and in nearly every race I’ve endorsed this cycle. From the congressional wins to the county commission wins, this simply wouldn’t have happened without your support of the effort we’ve built. Thank you! And thank you to all of the volunteers, campaign and party staff, and voters who fought hard to power us all the way to the finish line. I’m looking forward to fighting for our public lands, our economy, and more alongside Gabe in Congress. We’re still only at the beginning. — Martin | = | Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. If you would like to stay in touch but receive fewer emails from us, . If you would like to unsubscribe from emails altogether, . Martin Heinrich for Senate PO Box 25763 Albuquerque, NM 87125 United States

Hello Peter I had hoped to be declaring victory today, but unfortunately I did not win on Tuesday. Thank you for standing with me in this fight. name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: a personal note of thanks
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VAN HOLLEN FOR SENATE
body:
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54381090/378319430/396464211?refcode=em-logo&refcode2=5492675f-6f60-ed11-ade6-14cb6534a651&contactdata=sgEnNuJX1zPUg8qChaHgozeT1yjnEWdFzRcVAN7aF6h0TEapwp/Vo5vWDe99CBL4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDkyNjc1Zi02ZjYwLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNGE2NTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vZ-TXVF0U0RuUNWMEYRYuqveVpwoCM_sopYffjF8jOI=)

Dear Friend,
I want to thank you and the people of Maryland for your strong vote of confidence in my re-election to the United States Senate. I am grateful to you and everyone who supported our campaign during this journey and I pledge to continue working every day to uphold your trust.
I am also proud to be part of a historic Maryland statewide team that includes Wes Moore and Aruna Miller as our next Governor and Lt. Governor. I am looking forward to working closely with them to advance the values, priorities, and interests of our fellow Marylanders every day.
The results across the country are still unclear but — regardless of the ultimate makeup of the Congress — I will continue to do everything in my power to move our country forward as we tackle the many challenges we face at home and abroad.
The history of Maryland is woven into the story of America. The great abolitionist Frederick Douglass, born into slavery in Maryland, observed that “if there is no struggle there is no progress.” And the history of America is the story of the struggle to ensure that our country lives up to its promise of equal rights, equal justice, and equal opportunity for all.
Let us rededicate ourselves to the urgent work of building a more perfect union. I am grateful to have you as a partner in progress.
From the bottom of my heart: Thank You.
Onwards!
Chris

| | Peter,

After a long campaign, **we won the race for Wisconsin Attorney General**! I’m proud of what we’ve accomplished during my time as AG, and I’m thrilled to have the opportunity to build on that progress—to continue delivering results for Wisconsinites and working to make communities across the state safer and stronger—in a second term.

Successful campaigns are team efforts, and I’d like to thank everyone who helped this team succeed by knocking on doors, making phone calls, donating, and, of course, voting. Thank you!!!

After hard-fought elections like we had in Wisconsin this year, we must work to unite people. And at this point in history, it’s vital that we work to heal and strengthen our democracy.

Together, let’s keep moving Wisconsin forward!

Thank you!

Josh

* * *

name: =?utf-8?Q?Karina=20Lipsman?=
subject: You have my deepest appreciation
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/karinaforcongress/thankyou?e=22db41c18e)
---
Good afternoon, everyone! I’m writing to say a simple, heartfelt THANK YOU.I was born in Soviet Ukraine, and the fact that I was selected by voters to run for U.S. Congress is a true testament to the greatness of this country. It was my true honor to compete to represent Northern Virginia in Congress, and I so deeply appreciate the faith, support, and backing of so many people in this district. This district is a true melting pot and its vibrancy adds so much to the rich tapestry of America. Our campaign has been about the people in this district who feel like they don’t have a voice. Their costs have skyrocketed, crime is out of control, and parents are furious about the education system’s failings. I will continue to fight to give voice to those issues, because they’re so deeply important. I would also like to thank Don Beyer for his service to this district — public service is an endeavor that deserves so much respect. Again, thank you to my supporters for this wonderful opportunity. Please stay in touch!On to the next chapter... stay tuned.Sincerely,Karina Lipsman
|

_**The fight for Georgia's Senate seat is going into OVERTIME.**_

It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks, so I need your help once again.

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff.

It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks of this runoff campaign, so I need your help once again. | Fellow American, The fight for Georgia's Senate seat is going into OVERTIME. Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Tuesday, our Senate race is now heading to a RUNOFF on Tuesday, December 6th. It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks, so I need your help once again. We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff. Despite my opponent spending over $101 MILLION in the general election, Raphael Warnock could not win the support of a majority of Georgians as an incumbent senator. It is time for a change! Everything is at stake in this runoff election, and we don't have a moment to waste. Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: A note following yesterday’s results
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elissa Slotkin for Congress
body:
Elissa Slotkin for Congresshttps://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq42022?refcode=email20221109&amount=28 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq42022?refcode=email20221109&amount=28]
Team,
We’ve finally made it over the finish line and next January, I’ll officially begin my third term in Congress. Representing Michigan’s 8th district has been the greatest honor of my life, and I’m thrilled that the voters saw fit to re-elect me to the 7th district, even in a tough political environment.
I wanted to send a note to say thank you. You’ve been on this journey with me for quite a while, and none of this could have happened without your support. I also want to send you a video of my remarks from earlier today, which you can watch here. [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=RdcE0IgBxUE]
Your support allowed us to operate a far-reaching field operation that made more than 1.8 million attempts to reach voters this cycle, including more than 670,000 calls, more than 85,000 doors knocked and more than 1 million texts sent. A resounding theme of our results was our overperformance in Republican-leaning counties and rural areas. Here are some key takeaways from the data:
*
We
won
Eaton
County,
a
place
we
worked
especially
hard
in
because
it’s
Sen.
Tom
Barrett’s
home
county,
by
nearly
3%
(50.5%-47.2%). *
We
won
the
City
of
Grand
Ledge
by
16%
and
Windsor
Charter
Township
by
5%.

*
We
increased
our
2020
margin
in
conservative
Livingston
County
by
nearly
2%.

*
We
won
the
City
of
Howell
by
13
votes
–
the
first
time
in
recent
history
that
a
congressional
Democrat
carried
the
city.

*
We
won
the
City
of
Brighton
by
over
8%,
increasing
our
2020
margin
in
Brighton
by
6%.

*
In
Clinton
County,
which
was
new
to
us,
we
ran
over
5%
ahead
of
the
2020
congressional
Democrat.

*
We
won
the
City
of
Dewitt
by
17%
and
Dewitt
Township
by
12%
–
flipping
towns
that
congressional
Republicans
won
in
2020.

Thanks to your support, our campaign executed an unprecedented campus organizing effort. Thousands of Michigan State University students registered and voted, including over a thousand students just Tuesday.
This campaign has been based around the idea that our country is going through something right now – but that we can get through it as long as we have two things: engaged citizens and principled leaders. I’m incredibly lucky that mid-Michigan is filled with engaged citizens that care deeply about their communities and their country. People who volunteered their nights and weekends to make phone calls, knock doors, or even bring me and my team a home cooked meal.
I’m given hope by people like you and everyone I’ve met in the new 7th who have gotten up off the sidelines. Thank you again for all of your help throughout the past year. We truly could not have done any of this without you. Now, the work continues as I look to be the principled leader Michigan’s 7th district deserves.
Elissa

Elissa Slotkin proudly represents Michigan’s 8th district in Congress. In 2022, she is running to represent Michigan’s newly-drawn 7th district, which covers two-thirds of her existing district. Keep up with Elissa and the latest from the campaign trail on Facebook and Twitter.

Representing Michigan’s 8th district has been the greatest honor of my life, and I’m thrilled that the voters saw fit to re-elect me to the 7th district, even in a tough political environment. I wanted to send a note to say thank you. You’ve been on this journey with me for quite a while, and none of this could have happened without your support. name: Raphael Warnock
subject: fired up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
With you by my side, I know we can win this.
| | |
---
Friend, I'm feeling fired up. We've once again forced Georgia's Senate race into a runoff election – and I know we're going to win. Afterall, we’ve done it before.
**But to do that, I need your help more than ever. We nearly spent down to our last dollar to make it this far – which means we need to raise another $45,847 by midnight to fight back against GOP attacks, keep our TV ads live, and mobilize voters across the state.**
Donald Trump's allies have already flooded this race with more than $52 million to help Herschel Walker defeat me. So without an immediate surge in grassroots support, I'm worried we could put this seat in serious jeopardy.
**[Please, friend, can I count on you to rush $5 or more right now to fuel our people-powered movement to victory? I can't keep Georgia blue without you.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54382238/378323854/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk4881-fr-nd&recurring=0&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTA1NGYyOS03MjYwLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNGE2NTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cb2f13qXEhc_8DleI1yEzyhza5cjpYpuAKq-ompC_PA=)**
Thank you for sticking with me. With you by my side, I know we can win this.

– Rev. Raphael Warnock

name: Mark Kelly
subject: It looks like we’re not going to have the final results just yet
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Friends —
When we launched this campaign, I could have never anticipated just how many people would become a part of this mission. It means the world to me that millions of you stepped up to support me and this campaign.
I’m confident we’re going to win this thing, however, it looks like we’re not going to have the final results just yet. And after looking at voter turnout, one thing is clear: This is going to be a close race. Very close.
But before I go too far, I want to just say thank you to everyone who chipped in a few bucks, who made phone calls, sent texts, knocked on doors or volunteered — this would not have been possible without you.
We will keep you updated as more votes are counted.
Thank you so much for all of your support during this race. It means the world to me that so many of you are a part of this people-powered campaign.
My very best,
Mark

name: =?utf-8?Q?Robert=20Burns?=
subject: Thank You 🙏
body:
Truly, thank you, Peter.

Peter, when your country called, you answered.

I simply cannot express it enough ...
I am proud to know when America called, you answered. Regardless of the political outcome, you stood for what is right in the face of tyranny.

This may not be the moment in history any of us were hoping for, but that word, hope, is still alive because America’s future doesn’t reside in Washington, it lives within We the People. It lives within you.

We hoped to secure this seat, but honestly, I had already won being given the opportunity to sit at your table, where leadership truly resides.

For this, it’s gratitude I express, but not goodbye.

Onward.

Your friend,
Robert Burns

clean_body: Join the Fight today! | | | | | Friend, Are you a Freedom Loving American? Donald Trump Jr is asking YOU to join the special op team of the 2A Task Force to defend our constitutional rights. 2A Task Force was assembled by gun owner Donald Trump Jr because he realized there was a need to organize pro-second Amendment efforts. 2A Task Force at its core fights to protect our constitutional rights and to stop the democrats that are hellbent on taking away our freedoms. | | | | The radical left and the Biden administration abuse their power of government with efforts to take away our liberties. The 2A Task Force was built to FIGHT the extreme left’s agenda to take away our guns! The Second Amendment ensures that we can keep the ones we love safe from harm, but also protects us from tyrants using the power of government to take away our liberties. Now more than ever, there is an urgency to energize and mobilize freedom-loving Americans to fight back. Join the special op team of 2A Task Force advocates because our freedoms are worth fighting for! What do you say, Friend? Join the fight and consider making a donation today! | | | Paid for by 2nd Amendment Task Force

subject: Thank you
body:
I am deeply grateful and humbled by this vote of confidence from the voters in Contra Costa and Solano Counties. This decisive victory gives us an opportunity to continue the critically important work that’s before us.
---
| | |
---
| | | | | | [ View in browser](http://r.garamendiforcongress.org/mk/mr/UpmiQjIPyBSRhy9AhuBbD0__qTDpkm8M_SbCARFX1TS0pIHp0F9DlQH9DqO7AUITspqgh0KlMSnJN5iZ3-5Q0Pibm8ebje8aasIXgD2poA56F2co0QIA0M4pfgzcFD1P2MLjnhjAT10) |
---|---|---

| | | | | | |
---

|
---
Dear Friend,

I am deeply grateful and humbled by this vote of confidence from the voters in Contra Costa and Solano Counties. This decisive victory gives us an opportunity to continue the critically important work that’s before us.

In the last two years, we have accomplished so much for the American people in the face of unprecedented challenges. The United States has led the world in combating the COVID-19 pandemic and ensuing economic recovery through the American Rescue Plan, the Bipartisan Infrastructure Law, the Chips Act, and the Inflation Reduction Act.

These bills have capped the out-of-pocket costs of prescription drugs for seniors, provided the single largest investment to combat climate change in history, lowered the federal deficit, helped rebuild our infrastructure using American materials and workers, and grown our economy at a record pace while ensuring America’s inflation rate is one of the lowest in the world.

When the new Congress is sworn in, I will build upon this legislation to promote economic and environmental justice throughout Solano and Contra Costa counties. We will invest in the incredible businesses and people right here in our backyard to lift up the communities that have historically been left behind. This is critically important work that I am more determined than ever to accomplish on behalf of California’s 8th Congressional District.

Next week I will return to Washington to finish the work this Congress has before it. Nothing is more important than passing ironclad legislation to support our democracy. Our democracy is under attack. With the January 6th Insurrection and the ensuing calls from GOP leaders to ban things like mail-in voting and other safe and necessary electoral tools that provide the fulcrum to our democracy, it is clear that immediate action must be taken by this Congress to pass electoral reform and protect American democracy.

We have our work cut out for us, and I couldn’t be more thankful to everyone who participated in this election. I will take your voice with me to Washington and continue working on your behalf. I am incredibly hopeful for the days ahead. Together, we will create a prosperous future for all.

|
---
Sincerely,

|
---

|
---
JOHN GARAMENDI

|
---

subject: We stopped the Red Wave. Now it's all hands on deck.
body:
We did it, folks. We made it through another election cycle. But our work is not done yet and the fate of the Senate rests in one state: Georgia. | | | | | | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yA3tVaxbrjmEeQD3IRPUq_fn2toJ9AnieUrwShRJCcxSdwuuS6nKv4fLaRBqMSdN6opmNzdDY-hp0g0DfIXlWaMHP_DpQ6nBCtpQ5EgSJlN93lFGyCz1LsVOvJFmjjEYMcjV-SYMF6mknI8iO4y61wAkIzCmn8di0OPwxQ2Z0_RLbrR_tpViJBcd0Bj2Z04pr7gGZqg2CfE0xw9d-dFxsQ_YwHkOtJ3Z9xjULBU5XvHkmJpwA5Qp1_q5cb7YqUAvQGuGHld3ccsIipK3HjRJvp50eruQwWUwmVF41XcWir-W1dqGydqZdcO9Z2GPUPt_WwNdGMer_JDPbauqvqyGCx7TXz96QQtCC1-nC9ZFruel3k_f3tFcJgDWDNhvU_F5s/3r0/f_Kf1GpoRG6fAcGuhIbw0A/h0/VJuFqUWwlBrkYIlAN4NyJwguvBUxwDT13VTvKIyE6YM)

We did it, folks. We made it through another election cycle. **_But our work is not done yet and the fate of the Senate rests in one state: Georgia._**
****
We are currently witnessing the culmination of years of hard work and advocating for what we know to be true: the Youth Vote carries and will continue to carry the Democratic Party. In this cycle, we have witnessed historic turnout for voters under the age of 35 in key states and it is truly paying off for us.
[CLICK HERE TO INVEST IN THE CONTINUING YOUTH TURNOUT](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zpZyQFJmwsJ5PhvcCRPt5e_D8sxfbOqQ73HurmRHm7XnAO734j9OsmOAQ93V8LB4HGXpXeudsyEfTHRU43t3xz9dcHdD3Dxr2s7yGzp1iBzrHJ0fVnzCKPNAzl3MsmiZXVtNAdkTTzTOZshbs2WxXORdFsHzxe1il3VYw9cOeN4z5iomvdHHb4gG4rYQi72t4gDIvkwAOqr9nPvipLylFvR2cURNlQ0cPuThoEcuIg5MygEBMx5053I4QpK6w2N-4BPPu1dZF5Epok0Qf1-mQ1zNWkqf2ZlHlbCSqrWYgInagMTyLIQQX5I6shGrsScH2MerfB2U-Zc_6eqI8vaETC42y8y1HURAzOJcj3VjdQ_g/3r0/f_Kf1GpoRG6fAcGuhIbw0A/h1/54yIkCgx_QkBD4tpV6jP3C1f9EH3wlPhHTefAZ_9gn0)

Young voters came out in force to flip seats up and down the ballot. We maintained control of Senate seats in New Hampshire, Oregon, and Washington while we held onto and even flipped key House Races in states like Maine, New Hampshire, New York, Ohio, Pennsylvania, and Virginia.
These results could not have been possible without the youth vote. If not for Young Democrats, there would have been a Red Wave. Young voters showed up in huge, unprecedented numbers and surprised everyone who has told us that we are the most unreliable voting bloc in the country. We had not been counted in polling and we had not been counted in the narrative of what this election would result in too many times. We showed up and we shocked the nation.
We could not have done this without you and the great support of out donors over this last election cycle. But we have still more work to do! We got word that Georgia is moving to a run off and now our eyes turn to December 6. We want to send as many people as possible to help win this election for Senator Warnock.
[Can you give $5, $25, or $50 right now to help Young Democrats get down to Georgia and knock doors? We are going to go all out for this run off. It could decide the fate of the Senate and the balance of Congress. We need your help and your continued support to help us get there. The only way forward is together.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zpZyQFJmwsJ5PhvcCRPt5e_D8sxfbOqQ73HurmRHm7XnAO734j9OsmOAQ93V8LB4FCRpDsvaqEKgNAvb6p8dyBAI8JteYC5r2HYjtRxPQy4a3afATWka3gEmzWstJ3ZVr-pfbdOFbk5p8oJx3iAWI9AFldr_Cw0SMGaHc8Tnd_r8bWPWOFVwWv8RC9Xb0Aca9bBUXjp72EZFyP-VervriHFrRW27Si8s4gko8i7ulDAzny5hoH-GXeovzlF9zK036qWqIVXf96elxg-UIVWtMkgbA7z-6vXN4PgB_iGDDM_ax2DCkebCrSWg1OYgZSnyOHTiVG92n7jYKlCa-O3DbQaxgqPgfb1zAedsPg2SHAhg/3r0/f_Kf1GpoRG6fAcGuhIbw0A/h2/-rMTxQ1QpS8zXHgGJMmHcB1_EwRw_K6zJmbC2KGORRc)

name: Dr. Annie Andrews
subject: This fight will continue…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Annie Andrews for Congress
body:
| Team —

First off, I want to extend a sincere thank you to everyone who has supported us over the past year, and to everyone who believed in our vision of what the Lowcountry can be.

**I want you to know that our vision for the future, for the future our children deserve, does not end with this race. This is just the beginning.**

We knew the cards were stacked against us and we knew that this could happen. But I could not be prouder of the campaign we ran. I am incredibly grateful to everyone who donated their time, their dollars, and their energy to this campaign.

We left everything on the field and we ran a campaign based on honesty and integrity, and I can’t say thank you enough for the hard work you all put in.

I never envisioned myself running for Congress. After the Parkland shooting, I knew I could no longer sit on the sidelines. I turned to my state leaders and none of them were willing to help me— _so I decided to do it myself._

As a gun violence prevention advocate in South Carolina, I have had my share of losses. When we lose, we lose forward, we learn something that we can take with us into the next fight. I know none of you are ready to give up on your hope for the future. Please know that I am not giving up either. I will keep fighting with you, side by side, for all of our children, as long as they need us to.

Meeting all of you, hearing your stories, and receiving your support means more to me than I can possibly say. I am proud of myself, and I am proud of each and every one of you for stepping up and using your voices.

I could not have done this without the support of my amazing family. I wouldn’t have been able to do this without my incredible campaign staff. But most importantly, we would not have run such a great campaign if it wasn’t for our wonderful supporters who believe in our vision for the Lowcountry.

I will never give up the fight. I will continue to advocate for safer communities that are free from gun violence. I will continue to advocate for women and for their right to full bodily autonomy. And I will never stop working to create a better Lowcountry for our children.

Thank you so much for joining me on every step of this journey.

— Annie

---
* * *

**[Click here to unsubscribe from Dr. Annie's email list.](https://go.drannieandrews.com/p/xdO438I9HEexxn7DsXstAA2?unsubscribedata=RK5dXcjzGIPmiHrBtwv1an9UYsjVv%2B2%2FJmCrBtIgR4995Mnu2IMQxE71SZKC3CoFbYiVoKpgeuBxD3OAN3H5WlR5hI1iB0NQD%2FDsUWu5PgVHokR2BbnjbrvK31drpP9QGdTPlgb8w8mnt09hQdQDRgCki1zBhAVxefeKCcG3xDabHkhyflwmiEhEbfwUaHmxFCOGwS94afIqkkr3u%2BOtdmOl5uOYjLtZ9izguUxgM%2BeOpqsYMuB9Re8sKrS5noRZWcNPDKxl891HqFgnOWb2z6J1x6mWIEn4OO7RHk5RufUxT3GhpTMM%2B0GV9qGP3GSYn7P7vOr3wmpzmT3FK5ZsGgFbpaRWhWkdSNQ1IR%2Fw18EasTCLMQQwd059RpFLJyoexKhFwssgBz4zEPLOrKBfeCpOQTH4W2nXTq5X0gV77Nc%3D)** ****

name: Herschel Walker
subject: We’re going to overtime
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks of this runoff campaign, so I need your help once again. |

---
Peter,

_**The fight for Georgia's Senate seat is going into OVERTIME.**_

**Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Tuesday, our Senate race is now heading to a RUNOFF on Tuesday, December 6th.**

It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks, so I need your help once again.

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff.

**[I'm going to beat Senator Warnock in this runoff, but I can't do it without the help of my top supporters on DAY ONE. Please donate $25, $50, $100, or any amount up to the limit of $2,900 to help us rebuild our campaign war chest so we can launch our advertising immediately!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61829878:J-tBd6G6N:m:1:3369487795:4F7AE8CA5F71D5243DC2B192656DA182:r)**

clean_body: It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks of this runoff campaign, so I need your help once again. | Peter, The fight for Georgia's Senate seat is going into OVERTIME. Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Tuesday, our Senate race is now heading to a RUNOFF on Tuesday, December 6th. It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks, so I need your help once again. We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff. Despite my opponent spending over $101 MILLION in the general election, Raphael Warnock could not win the support of a majority of Georgians as an incumbent senator. It is time for a change! Everything is at stake in this runoff election, and we don't have a moment to waste. Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Peter, here we go again. In the 2020 Georgia runoff election, we fought tooth and nail to send Rev. Raphael Warnock to the Senate. Now, we’re gearing up for another INTENSE battle over our Senate majority. We know you’re tired — we are too. We have LESS THAN A MONTH to secure our Senate majority and protect abortion access, voting rights, and the rest of our fundamental rights. We know EXACTLY how to win in Georgia and, with your help, we can do it again. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | We’re ready to fight HARD to re-elect a progressive Black champion to the Senate, not give power to another Trump-backed extremist. This runoff could decide EVERYTHING, which is why we need you to step up. Our work continues. The Collective PAC | Thank you for your continued support of The Collective PAC, Peter. Thanks to supporters like you, we’re building Black political power across the country at all levels of government. Were you forwarded this email? Want to sign up for our email list? | The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. We know we can win this -- we have done it before! But I've always been honest with you, so I’ll do so again: we've got an incredibly tough fight ahead. | |

Derek, I just want to say thank you. Because of the strength of our grassroots movement, we've come one step closer to making history yet again here in Georgia. And we've shown the country that our fight for progress isn't over. **We know we can win this -- we have done it before! But I've always been honest with you, so I’ll do so again: we've got an incredibly tough fight ahead.** With all eyes on Georgia, the GOP is gearing up to flood us with attack ads, and we need to refill our campaign. **Will you split a $10 donation between my campaign and the DNC right now to power Democrats like me to victory now and in the future?**

clean_body: We know we can win this -- we have done it before! But I've always been honest with you, so I’ll do so again: we've got an incredibly tough fight ahead. | | Derek, I just want to say thank you. Because of the strength of our grassroots movement, we've come one step closer to making history yet again here in Georgia. And we've shown the country that our fight for progress isn't over. We know we can win this -- we have done it before! But I've always been honest with you, so I’ll do so again: we've got an incredibly tough fight ahead. With all eyes on Georgia, the GOP is gearing up to flood us with attack ads, and we need to refill our campaign. Will you split a $10 donation between my campaign and the DNC right now to power Democrats like me to victory now and in the future? When we launched this campaign, we knew it wouldn't be easy. The GOP has been coming after me with everything they’ve got since the beginning, and they haven't let up since. Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the Republican establishment have spent millions to prop up my opponent, Herschel Walker, and defeat me. And they're about to spend a whole lot more to turn Georgia red. That's why taking our foot off the gas is simply not an option. We're in a position to win this race -- but not without grassroots support. ** Thank you for your support. Raphael Reverend Raphael Warnock U.S. Senator, Georgia When you make a split donation to the DNC, your donation will not only benefit Democratic Senator Raphael Warnock -- it will also help create the lasting Democratic infrastructure Democrats need to win up and down the ballot in years to come. name: Carl Marlinga
subject: I’m proud of the race we ran
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARLINGA FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | | Peter, Last night did not go the way we would’ve liked. But I’m incredibly proud of the work we did here. And I’m thankful for the effort you put into my race and others like it. Without you, this race would not have been close. We lifted up the voices of the blue collar roots of MI-10. We brought attention to the needs of this community. Our best hope now is that John James goes to Washington and advocates for all of you. This does not mark the end. This result does not mean we’re done fighting for a better future. If anything, we now have even more work ahead of us. We must prepare to continue the fight for the soul of our nation. Thank you again for your work and your dedication. We can’t lose hope now. – Carl
We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in touch with our most critical supporters. name: Derek Schmidt
subject: Thank you, Kansas.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC
body:
Preliminary election-night vote totals are in from all counties. The election,
of course, is not final until every lawful ballot is counted, and we are
advised by election officials that thousands remain uncounted including
late-arriving mail ballots and provisional ballots.

Friend,

Preliminary election-night vote totals are in from all counties. The election,
of course, is not final until every lawful ballot is counted, and we are
advised by election officials that thousands remain uncounted including
late-arriving mail ballots and provisional ballots. However, it seems unlikely
those will be sufficient to close the remaining gap, so absent any unexpected
development it appears this race is over.

Therefore, I congratulate Governor Kelly on her apparent reelection and wish
the best for our beloved state during the next four years.

It has been a tremendous honor to be the nominee of the Republican Party for
governor of Kansas. I am grateful for the unwavering support and encouragement
of my family, particularly my wife, Jennifer, and our daughters, Caroline and
Claire; of my running mate, Katie Sawyer, and her family; of our many friends
and supporters and volunteers throughout our state; of our extraordinary
campaign team and staff; of the talented men and women at the Office of the
Attorney General who ensured the professional work of that office continued
uninterrupted; and of all who made this race possible. This journey has truly
been a blessing, and for that I will always be thankful.

If there is any disappointment beyond the immediate sting, it is having
witnessed up close the concerning tendency of modern political discourse to
veer away from discussing the great public issues we must solve together. In
Kansas, those include the continued long-term outmigration of our population
both young and old, the effective management of our precious water resource, an
excessive state and local tax burden, outdated or archaic structures or methods
of delivering public services, a public education system that needs more than
money to better serve our children, and the alarming structural imbalance that
persists in our state’s budget despite being masked for now by the temporary
proceeds of inflation.

Over the course of this campaign, I had the great pleasure to talk with
thousands of my fellow Kansans one-on-one and face-to-face. I know their desire
to solve these and other difficult problems is sincere and lasting — and I will
continue to be among those who want to make our state better, despite the
gravitational pull of modern politics and mass communication having largely
obscured so much of that discussion.

Still, despite all our challenges and frustrations, we live in an
extraordinary state and nation where an ordinary kid from Independence, Kansas,
can grow up to carry the banner of one of America’s great political parties in
a campaign to govern the state he loves. That alone is a victory, and it is one
I hope we can all share. Thank you, Kansas, for this opportunity.

God bless,

Derek Schmidt

PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC.,
KELLY ARNOLD, TREASURER.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you’d like to unsubscribe
please clickhere

.
clean_body: Preliminary election-night vote totals are in from all counties. The election, of course, is not final until every lawful ballot is counted, and we are advised by election officials that thousands remain uncounted including late-arriving mail ballots and provisional ballots. Friend, Preliminary election-night vote totals are in from all counties. The election, of course, is not final until every lawful ballot is counted, and we are advised by election officials that thousands remain uncounted including late-arriving mail ballots and provisional ballots. However, it seems unlikely those will be sufficient to close the remaining gap, so absent any unexpected development it appears this race is over. Therefore, I congratulate Governor Kelly on her apparent reelection and wish the best for our beloved state during the next four years. It has been a tremendous honor to be the nominee of the Republican Party for governor of Kansas. I am grateful for the unwavering support and encouragement of my family, particularly my wife, Jennifer, and our daughters, Caroline and Claire; of my running mate, Katie Sawyer, and her family; of our many friends and supporters and volunteers throughout our state; of our extraordinary campaign team and staff; of the talented men and women at the Office of the Attorney General who ensured the professional work of that office continued uninterrupted; and of all who made this race possible. name: Tony Evers
subject: Thank you, Wisconsin.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony for Wisconsin
body:
Holy Mackerel,
Derek! We did
it.

I am incredibly proud to be the 46th governor of the state of Wisconsin —
and I am jazzed as hell to tell you that on January 3rd, 2023, I will
still be the 46th governor of the great state of Wisconsin.

Four years ago, I made a promise to the people of Wisconsin that I would
never make promises I couldn’t keep and that I would always work for you.
Since then, I have worked hard to keep those promises and have always
tried to do the right thing. That’s who I am, and that’s who I have always
been.

Some people call it boring — but, as it turns out, boring wins.

The truth of the matter is that we won this election because of you. All
the folks from every corner of the state who went out and voted,
volunteered, chipped in, and so much more.

Over the last four years, you have welcomed me into your homes, small
businesses, farms, classrooms, and churches. You have talked to me in
hospitals, campuses, factories, and on street corners. I am so grateful to
you for the grace, kindness, and compassion you have shown me.

This victory isn’t really about me at all. It’s about each of you. You
showed up for me and Democrats up and down the ballot — but most
importantly, you showed up for each other.

You showed up for reproductive rights and the freedom to make your own
healthcare decisions without having to ask me or any other politician.

You showed up for working families who are worried about the economy,
rising costs, and putting food on the table.

You showed up for our kids, educators, and public schools because you
believe — as I believe — that what’s best for our kids is what’s best for
our state.

You showed up for LGBTQ+ folks and trans kids who want to safely be who
they are in our state.

You showed up for conservation, clean energy, and taking climate change
seriously with a future that doesn’t treat our environment and creating
new jobs like they’re mutually exclusive.

You showed up for fixing the damn roads, expanding access to high-speed
internet, and continuing to invest in our state’s infrastructure.

Most importantly, you showed up because you saw our democracy was on the
brink of existence and you decided to do something about it.

You have never stopped showing up and believing in the work we could do
together. You have never stopped fighting for the future we want to build
for Wisconsin and for our kids.

I want to thank all of you who made this possible. Because of the tireless
work of everyone on this incredible grassroots team, we have another four
years to keep doing the right thing for the people of our state.

Thank you from the bottom of my heart, Wisconsin, for putting your trust
in me once again.

Now, let’s get to work!

Tony Evers

Paid for by Tony for Wisconsin

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://go.tonyevers.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=6106%2E1827488%2ElCtJT5

clean_body: With control of the U.S. Senate likely on the line, this race is too important to stand on the sidelines. | Fellow American - I'll make this quick. With our Senate campaign now in a runoff, today is the first day of our overtime race. Fellow American, I know you've already done so much to help us through the General Election, and I hate asking for your help again - but I need to know if you're with me on this first day of our new race. We only have 27 days until the runoff election on December 6th, so we don't have a moment to waste. With control of the U.S. Senate likely on the line, this race is too important to stand on the sidelines. Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

name: Jamal Raad, Evergreen Action
subject: The winning issue last night
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
Voters deliver a clear mandate
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4378?t=2&akid=13116%2E53494%2EfrtB2o) Friend, Last night, Democrats achieved one of the best midterms for the sitting president's party in recent memory, and voters made it clear they want leaders who will take bold action on climate and clean energy. Voters in swing states elected Democrat governors who leaned in on climate action on the campaign trail, and key races across the country proved what we already know about the Inflation Reduction Act—it is incredibly popular. As we wait to see what happens with Congress, I'm excited to talk with climate champion Bill McKibben and some of our friends tomorrow about what comes next for the climate movement. [_**Join us tomorrow at 11 a.m PT / 2 p.m. ET at this link
(you don't need a Twitter account to join!),
to chat about the path forward.**_](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4378?t=3&akid=13116%2E53494%2EfrtB2o) \------- Forwarded message -------
From: **Jamal Raad, Evergreen Action**
Date: Mon, Nov 7, 2022
Subject: 📆 What's next for climate action? Bill McKibben and Evergreen discuss Friend, I'm thrilled to announce that this Thursday, I'll be hosting a conversation with climate champions Bill McKibben, Donnel Baird, and Dr. Leah Stokes about midterm election results and what comes next for our movement. [**Save the date and join us virtually Thursday, November 10th at 11 a.m. PT / 2 p.m. ET for "What's Next for Climate: A Post-Election Discussion with Bill McKibben, Donnel Baird, and Dr. Leah Stokes."**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4377?t=4&akid=13116%2E53494%2EfrtB2o) Nothing about these midterms is certain, but we do know one thing for sure: No matter the result, the climate crisis is here. Our movement must keep advocating for equitable solutions that reduce greenhouse gas emissions and build a thriving future. That's why this conversation, two days after the midterms, is so important. We'll discuss what the results of the election mean for climate action in the U.S., and outline the key pathways for impact for the climate movement between now and 2024 (including state-based action, executive action by the Biden administration, and ways to ensure that the funds in the Inflation Reduction Act are well spent). Add this event to your calendar right now for [**Thursday, November 10th at 11 a.m. PT / 2 p.m. ET, and we'll be in touch with a link next week.**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4377?t=5&akid=13116%2E53494%2EfrtB2o) Looking forward to seeing you then. Onward, Jamal Raad
Executive Direction, Evergreen Action P.S. Looking for a link to the event? We'll share it with you next week, but save the date now so you don't miss this conversation! | [ADD TO CALENDAR](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4377?t=6&akid=13116%2E53494%2EfrtB2o)
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](https://act.evergreenaction.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=13116%2E53494%2EfrtB2o). Contributions or gifts to EVERGREEN ACTION are not tax deductible. | PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
---

name: Michelle Vallejo
subject: Thank you, TX-15! I love you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michelle Vallejo for Congress
body:
| | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/tTBUZwcBH_2q13Ow12s-jc-9PHkp7BkSZ-MbOY7TNqbHMZZ7e6z8fxUUbQYxgrxk6a2v4Aw9Ux80o37VicMJ_2RUROn59OUiTeeVHLXdV7VQ6UP0B003zvnUXl-_g03dg2UzYa_vkDefpzV23uPB_Dja9hjkq5M-yzhJ5LZFM50AQlDNYzeJ1j9TP33msKVFzWglmFdcWSSC8g8FLybcs419bUW-FCT34-YGWbgWKrsLgMxg0bdgpXT5_x9nAhqU5WYP9D_Emw7m2xFmwTedjw/3r0/SbG29MLASy-32F8wVAnWPA/h0/kWeT4WAJujm8TdNfouGiEp3dlbdM5eSvtBhBJW25g5c)
---
Peter, Since day one, my campaign has been fueled by the dreams of our South Texas community and our faith in a brighter future for our families. Our campaign was never just about winning or losing this race — it was about fighting for our home and proving that running a campaign of hope can go head to head with a campaign fueled by hate and bankrolled by outside interest greed. This people-powered campaign was exactly that, a campaign by the people of South Texas that knew when it comes to fighting for our home, we have to do it ourselves. Because we know our people, nuestra gente, and we're the ones that know what our families go through ever single day. The fact that a daughter of immigrants and first-time candidate for Congress nominated by her community to run was the Democratic nominee for Texas' 15th Congressional District is a victory in itself. Together, we have proven that South Texas is ready to fight for South Texas — this is just the beginning. Thank you, South Texas. I love you! ¡Vamos Por Quince! Michelle Vallejo

name: American Briefing

name: Herschel Walker
subject: We’re not done yet
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks of this runoff campaign, so I need your help once again. |

---
Peter,

_**The fight for Georgia's Senate seat is going into OVERTIME.**_

**Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Tuesday, our Senate race is now heading to a RUNOFF on Tuesday, December 6th.**

It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks, so I need your help once again.

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff.

**[I'm going to beat Senator Warnock in this runoff, but I can't do it without the help of my top supporters on DAY ONE. Please donate $25, $50, $100, or any amount up to the limit of $2,900 to help us rebuild our campaign war chest so we can launch our advertising immediately!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61831950:JDpnH6GXN:m:1:3368395361:3F5FFA2AF7D9E8CB4A128948D5D39180:r)**

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61831950:JDpnH6GXN:m:1:3368395361:3F5FFA2AF7D9E8CB4A128948D5D39180:r)
[** RUSH $25 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61831951:JDpnH6GXN:m:1:3368395361:3F5FFA2AF7D9E8CB4A128948D5D39180:r)
[** RUSH $50 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61831952:JDpnH6GXN:m:1:3368395361:3F5FFA2AF7D9E8CB4A128948D5D39180:r)
[** RUSH $100 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61831953:JDpnH6GXN:m:1:3368395361:3F5FFA2AF7D9E8CB4A128948D5D39180:r)
Despite my opponent spending over $101 MILLION in the general election, Raphael Warnock could not win the support of a majority of Georgians as an incumbent senator. It is time for a change!

Everything is at stake in this runoff election, and we don't have a moment to waste. **[Will you rush in $5 or more in the next 30 minutes to be a DAY ONE runoff supporter?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61831950:JDpnH6GXN:m:1:3368395361:3F5FFA2AF7D9E8CB4A128948D5D39180:r)**

Thanks,

Herschel Walker

name: Laura Gillen
subject: From the bottom of my heart, thank you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Gillen for Congress
body:
We ran a campaign to be proud of in a challenging political environment. Together, we motivated thousands of Long Islanders to make their voices heard, to stand up for common sense leadership, and to vigorously defend fundamental rights from assault.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54384500/378335575/281630052?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzIwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTljY2Q2Mi04MTYwLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNGE2NTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ahpKDRvyQZNY9T1z88TFzd9qV8GkDZq-p7cRWX9tNkc=&emci=f2b028a6-6460-ed11-ade6-14cb6534a651&emdi=e99ccd62-8160-ed11-ade6-14cb6534a651&ceid=7377580)
Peter,

We ran a campaign to be proud of in a challenging political environment. Together, we motivated thousands of Long Islanders to make their voices heard, to stand up for common sense leadership, and to vigorously defend fundamental rights from assault.

This has been a long, close, and hard-fought race. I know this is not the outcome we hoped for, but it has been the honor of a lifetime to have been the Democratic nominee for this district. I'm incredibly thankful for all the stories people have shared, the steadfast support I’ve received, and for everyone who believed in the values that animated this campaign.

Thank you,

Laura
---

| Laura Gillen is running to represent New York's 4th Congressional District. To learn more, please visit [LauraGillenForCongress.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54384501/378335576/281630052?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzIwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTljY2Q2Mi04MTYwLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNGE2NTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ahpKDRvyQZNY9T1z88TFzd9qV8GkDZq-p7cRWX9tNkc=&emci=f2b028a6-6460-ed11-ade6-14cb6534a651&emdi=e99ccd62-8160-ed11-ade6-14cb6534a651&ceid=7377580)

name: Tina Kotek
subject: Thank you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
body:
Tina for Oregon [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92654/images/TinaForOregon-Logo-FullColor-white.png]
Peter,

Great news to share! The Oregonian and Oregon Public Broadcasting are now projecting that I will be the next Governor of the great state of Oregon.

First and foremost, I want to thank you for your support. Team Tina was absolutely phenomenal. We had:

-- 4,000 volunteers helping Democrats up and down the ballot.
-- 24,000 grassroots donors.
-- An amazing coalition of labor, reproductive justice, environmental, and equal rights organizations fighting for us.
-- An incredible student-led effort — Students for Tina on university campuses and Teens for Tina in high schools — mobilizing young Oregonians who care about the future of our state.
-- And you!

You showed up. You didn’t take anything for granted. You knocked on doors, you made phone calls, you pitched in a few dollars if you could.

Because of you, my team and I had the resources to build a strong grassroots campaign where people came together with a shared vision of a future dedicated to justice and opportunity for all — for an Oregon where we fight for each other, no matter where you live, where you come from, or who you are.

I also want to thank my wife, Aimee, for her unwavering support. For anyone who has felt othered for living as your authentic self, let this victory serve as a reminder that you can do whatever you set your heart to.

Our work is just getting started, and I am grateful to have you by my side as we build an Oregon that works for all of us.

Thank you for being on my team.

– Tina
Tina for Oregon
PO Box 42307
Portland, OR 97242
tinafororegon.com [https://www.tinafororegon.com/] | info@tinafororegon.com [info@tinafororegon.com]
